Through a controlled study of learning-rate timing and curriculum ordering, we find that early large parameter updates improve global WER by 12 absolute points, while a hard-to-easy curriculum adds gains for spontaneous speech. These findings motivate reverse multi-stage fine-tuning (R-MFT), a training recipe that enables a parameter-efficient 244M Whisper model to match or exceed conventionally fine-tuned 769M counterparts. Representational analysis via CKA and SVD reveals effective schedules concentrate adaptation in the decoder, preserving the pre-trained encoder's acoustic geometry. We release the benchmark and models.

</details>


### [73] [Does language matter for spoken word classification? A multilingual generative meta-learning approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13084)
*Batsirayi Mupamhi Ziki,Louise Beyers,Ruan van der Merwe*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 本文探索了生成式元持续学习（GMCL）在多语种口语词汇分类中的应用，发现多语模型表现最好，但各模型间性能差异不大，且训练时看到的独特数据小时数比语言数量更能预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 元学习在少样本单语口语词汇分类中已被证明优于监督学习，但在多语场景下尚未充分探索，作者希望填补这一空白。

Method: 应用生成式元持续学习（GMCL）算法进行口语词汇分类，分别在英语、德语、法语、加泰罗尼亚语上训练单语模型，在英语和德语上训练双语模型，在所有四种语言上训练多语模型。

Result: 多语模型表现最佳，但各模型间性能差异很小；训练中看到的独特数据小时数比语言数量更能预测模型性能。

Conclusion: 多语模型有优势但有限，数据量比语言多样性对性能影响更大。

Abstract: Meta-learning has been shown to have better performance than supervised learning for few-shot monolingual spoken word classification. However, the meta-learning approach remains under-explored in multilingual spoken word classification. In this paper, we apply the Generative Meta-Continual Learning algorithm to spoken word classification. The generative nature of this algorithm makes it viable for use in application, and the meta-learning aspect promotes generalisation, which is crucial in a multilingual setting. We train monolingual models on English, German, French, and Catalan, a bilingual model on English and German, and a multilingual model on all four languages. We find that although the multilingual model performs best, the differences between model performance is unexpectedly low. We also find that the hours of unique data seen during training seems to be a stronger performance indicator than the number of languages included in the training data.

</details>


### [74] [Leveraging Speech to Identify Signatures of Insight and Transfer in Problem Solving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12970)
*Linas Nasvytis,Judith E. Fan*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 通过让参与者解决"火柴棒算术"问题，研究发现当问题类型相同时，参与者提升更快，并且更倾向于自发对问题进行分类。这表明可迁移的"顿悟"具有可口头报告的特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究"顿悟"以什么形式出现，以及它对人们未来解决类似问题有什么影响。

Method: 189名参与者被分为两组（相同类型问题 vs. 不同类型问题），要求他们在解决5个火柴棒算术问题时出声思考，记录其语言内容和问题解决表现。

Result: 相同组比不同组进步更快；随着进步，相同组参与者说话更多，并更多地自发对问题进行分类。

Conclusion: 可迁移的顿悟的关键特征是其可口头报告性，尽管顿悟的底层前因仍然难以用语言表达。

Abstract: Many problems seem to require a flash of insight to solve. What form do these sudden insights take, and what impact do they have on how people approach similar problems in the future? In this work, we prompted participants (N = 189) to talk aloud as they attempted to solve a sequence of five "matchstick-arithmetic" problems. These problems either all relied on the same kind of non-obvious solution (Same group) or a different kind each time (Different group). We found that Same participants improved more rapidly than Different participants, and as they improved, they talked more and talked about different things when solving later problems. Specifically, they were more likely to spontaneously categorize the problem they were working on. Taken together, these findings suggest that a hallmark of transferable insights is their accessibility for verbal report, even if the underlying precursors of insight remain difficult to articulate.

</details>


### [75] [Leveraging Multimodal Self-Consistency Reasoning in Coding Motivational Interviewing for Alcohol Use Reduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12987)
*Guangzeng Han,James G. Murphy,Benjamin O. Ladd,Xiaolei Huang,Brian Borsari*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出基于音频-语言模型(ALM)的多模态自一致性方法来自动编码动机性访谈(MI)会话，通过四种分析提示和多数投票集成12条推理轨迹，在少量音频数据上取得了优于基线的编码性能（准确率52.56%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动机性访谈编码对于理解来访者行为和预测结果至关重要，但传统方法需要大量训练有素的MI专业人员投入时间和人力。本研究旨在利用多模态音频-语言模型自动化MI编码过程，减少人工成本。

Method: 使用四种互补的分析提示（言语线索、韵律线索、证据评分、对比推理），每种提示采样3次共生成12条独立推理轨迹，通过多数投票（自一致性）确定最终预测。

Result: 在5段录音上，自一致性方法实现52.56%准确率、54.03%精确率、47.45%召回率和46.40%宏F1分数，优于基线方法；消融实验表明各模块均有贡献。

Conclusion: 多模态自一致性方法优于单次基线提示方法，表明结合"说什么"和"怎么说"有助于更可靠的自动MI编码。

Abstract: BACKGROUND: Coding Motivational Interviewing (MI) sessions is essential for understanding client behaviors and predicting outcomes, but it requires substantial time and labor from trained MI professionals. Recent advances in audio-language models (ALMs) offer new opportunities to automate MI coding by capturing multimodal behavioral signals. OBJECTIVE: This study aims to develop an automatic MI coding approach based on ALMs that analyzes raw audio input and integrates predictions from multiple reasoning trajectories using self-consistency to improve coding robustness. METHODS: We experimented with five recorded sessions from de-identified MI audio tapes. We deployed ALMs with four complementary analytic prompts to support utterance-level reasoning: analytic prompting for verbal cues, prosody-aware prompting for acoustic cues, evidence-scoring prompting for quantitative hypothesis testing, and comparative prompting for contrastive reasoning. Three stochastic samples were drawn for each prompt, generating 12 independent reasoning trajectories per utterance. Final predictions were determined by majority voting across all trajectories. RESULTS: Performance was evaluated using accuracy, precision, recall, and macro-F1 scores. The proposed multimodal self-consistency approach achieved 52.56% accuracy, 54.03% precision, 47.45% recall, and a macro-F1 score of 46.40%, exceeding baseline methods. Systematic ablation experiments that removed individual modules consistently degraded performance on the primary metrics. CONCLUSIONS: Multimodal self-consistency outperforms single-pass baseline prompting approaches for MI coding. These findings suggest that incorporating both what clients say and how they say it can support more reliable automatic MI coding.

</details>


### [76] [Scaling few-shot spoken word classification with generative meta-continual learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13075)
*Louise Beyers,Batsirayi Mupamhi Ziki,Ruan van der Merwe*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文研究少样本口语单词分类在1000个类别上的扩展能力，使用GeMCL算法与HuBERT基线模型对比，发现GeMCL性能稳定且适应速度快2000倍，训练数据不到一半，训练时间少两个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索少样本口语单词分类在大规模类别（1000类）上的潜力，因为现有工作主要集中在少量类别上。

Method: 使用生成式元持续学习（GeMCL）算法训练模型，并与反复全微调HuBERT模型、冻结HuBERT+反复训练分类头的基线进行比较。

Result: GeMCL性能稳定，虽未总是优于全微调HuBERT和冻结HuBERT+分类头，但与后者性能相当，且适应速度快2000倍，训练数据少一半以上，训练时间少两个数量级。

Conclusion: 少样本口语单词分类具备向大规模类别扩展的能力，GeMCL在效率与性能之间取得了良好平衡。

Abstract: Few-shot spoken word classification has largely been developed for applications where a small number of classes is considered, and so the potential of larger-scale few-shot spoken word classification remains untapped. This paper investigates the potential of a spoken word classifier to sequentially learn to distinguish between 1000 classes when it is given only five shots per class. We demonstrate that this scaling capability exists by training a model using the Generative Meta-Continual Learning (GeMCL) algorithm and comparing it to repeatedly trained or finetuned baselines. We find that GeMCL produces exceptionally stable performance, and although it does not always outperform a repeatedly fully-finetuned HuBERT model nor a frozen HuBERT model with a repeatedly trained classifier head, it produces comparable performance to the latter while adapting 2000 times faster, having been trained less than half of the data for two orders of magnitude less time.

</details>


### [77] [Continual Learning with Multilingual Foundation Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13415)
*Barathi Ganesh HB,Michal Ptaszynski,Rene Melendez,Juuso Eronen*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出了一个多阶段框架，用于检测多语言社交媒体中LGBTQ+相关冒犯性词汇的回收性使用（reclaimed vs. non-reclaimed），结合数据增强、迁移学习、掩码语言建模和语言特定阈值优化，在英语、西班牙语和意大利语推文上实现2-5%的F1提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决多语言社交媒体中识别回收性冒犯词汇（reclaimed slurs）的挑战，特别是面临数据稀缺、类别不平衡和跨语言情感表达差异三个交织的方法论难题。

Method: 多阶段框架：(1) 基于交叉验证的数据驱动模型选择；(2) 通过GPT-4o-mini回译进行语义保持的数据增强；(3) 使用动态epoch级欠采样的归纳迁移学习；(4) 通过掩码语言建模注入领域知识。最终通过ROC分析优化语言特定决策阈值。

Result: XLM-RoBERTa被选为最佳基础模型；回译增强使训练语料扩大三倍；语言特定阈值优化带来2-5%绝对F1提升，无需重新训练模型。

Conclusion: 不同语言的最优决策边界存在显著差异，反映了模型置信度分数的分布差异和回收性语言使用的语言学差异；该框架完全可复现。

Abstract: This paper presents a multi-stage framework for detecting reclaimed slurs in multilingual social media discourse. It addresses the challenge of identifying reclamatory versus non-reclamatory usage of LGBTQ+-related slurs across English, Spanish, and Italian tweets. The framework handles three intertwined methodological challenges like data scarcity, class imbalance, and cross-linguistic variation in sentiment expression. It integrates data-driven model selection via cross-validation, semantic-preserving augmentation through back-translation, inductive transfer learning with dynamic epoch-level undersampling, and domain-specific knowledge injection via masked language modeling. Eight multilingual embedding models were evaluated systematically, with XLM-RoBERTa selected as the foundation model based on macro-averaged F1 score. Data augmentation via GPT-4o-mini back-translation to alternate languages effectively tripled the training corpus while preserving semantic content and class distribution ratios. The framework produces four final runs for the evaluation purposes where RUN 1 is inductive transfer learning with augmentation and undersampling, RUN 2 with masked language modeling pre-training, RUN 3 and RUN 4 are previous predictions refined via language-specific decision thresholds optimized via ROC analysis. Language-specific threshold refinement reveals that optimal decision boundaries vary significantly across languages. This reflects distributional differences in model confidence scores and linguistic variation in reclamatory language usage. The threshold-based optimization yields 2-5% absolute F1 improvement without requiring model retraining. The methodology is fully reproducible, with all code and experimental setup available at https://github.com/rbg-research/MultiPRIDE-Evalita-2026.

</details>


<div id='cs.CV'></div>

# cs.CV [[Back]](#toc)

### [78] [Training Long-Context Vision-Language Models Effectively with Generalization Beyond 128K Context](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13831)
*Zhaowei Wang,Lishu Luo,Haodong Duan,Weiwei Liu,Sijin Wu,Ji Luo,Shen Yan,Shuai Peng,Sihang Yuan,Chaoyi Huang,Yi Lin,Yangqiu Song*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 90.0

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了LVLM长上下文继续预训练的实践方法，通过将7B模型从32K扩展到128K上下文，发现长文档VQA优于OCR转录、平衡数据长度分布优于聚焦目标长度、检索是主要瓶颈、纯长文档VQA能保持短上下文能力。基于这些发现提出MMProLong，仅用5B token预算即显著提升长文档VQA性能，并泛化到更长的上下文和多种多模态任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文建模已成为现代视觉-语言模型的核心能力，但在实际训练中的数据混合策略设计（尤其是如何平衡长上下文数据）仍缺乏系统研究。

Method: 基于Qwen2.5-VL-7B模型，从32K扩展到128K上下文进行继续预训练，系统消融研究了不同类型数据（长文档VQA vs OCR转录）、序列长度分布（平衡分布 vs 目标长度聚焦）、任务混合策略（检索密集型 vs 推理密集型）以及短数据混合的影响。

Result: MMProLong在长文档VQA上提升7.1%，无需额外训练即可泛化到256K和512K上下文，并在网页多模态检索、长上下文视觉-文本压缩、长视频理解等任务上表现良好。

Conclusion: 长文档VQA比OCR转录更有效；平衡的序列长度分布优于聚焦目标长度的数据；检索是主要瓶颈，应侧重检索密集型数据；纯长文档VQA能较好保持短上下文能力。这些发现为长上下文视觉-语言模型提供了实用的训练配方和经验基础。

Abstract: Long-context modeling is becoming a core capability of modern large vision-language models (LVLMs), enabling sustained context management across long-document understanding, video analysis, and multi-turn tool use in agentic workflows. Yet practical training recipes remain insufficiently explored, particularly for designing and balancing long-context data mixtures. In this work, we present a systematic study of long-context continued pre-training for LVLMs, extending a 7B model from 32K to 128K context with extensive ablations on long-document data. We first show that long-document VQA is substantially more effective than OCR transcription. Building on this observation, our ablations further yield three key findings: i) for sequence-length distribution, balanced data outperforms target-length-focused data (e.g., 128K), suggesting that long-context ability requires generalizable key-information retrieval across various lengths and positions; ii) retrieval remains the primary bottleneck, favoring retrieval-heavy mixtures with modest reasoning data for task diversity; and iii) pure long-document VQA largely preserves short-context capabilities, suggesting that instruction-formatted long data reduces the need for short-data mixing. Based on these findings, we introduce MMProLong, obtained by long-context continued pre-training from Qwen2.5-VL-7B with only a 5B-token budget. MMProLong improves long-document VQA scores by 7.1% and maintains strong performance at 256K and 512K contexts beyond its 128K training window, without additional training. It further generalizes to webpage-based multimodal needle retrieval, long-context vision-text compression, and long-video understanding without task-specific supervision. Overall, our study establishes a practical LongPT recipe and an empirical foundation for advancing long-context vision-language models.

</details>


### [79] [Learning to See What You Need: Gaze Attention for Multimodal Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13080)
*Junha Song,Byeongho Heo,Geonmo Gu,Jaegul Choo,Dongyoon Han,Sangdoo Yun*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 提出Gaze Attention机制，通过空间分组视觉嵌入为紧凑注视区域，让MLLMs在生成时动态选择相关区域进行注意力计算，减少90%视觉KV条目，同时保持或提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前MLLMs在每一生成步骤中对所有视觉token进行注意力计算，导致注意力分散和不必要的计算开销。人类描述场景时只会选择性关注相关区域，受此启发，作者希望让MLLMs也能动态选择任务相关的视觉区域进行注意力计算。

Method: 1) 将视觉嵌入（以KV缓存形式存储）按空间分组为紧凑的注视区域，每个区域用轻量级描述符表示。2) 在解码步骤中，模型动态选择最相关的区域并限制注意力到这些区域。3) 引入可学习的上下文token附加到每个图像或帧，以弥补局部注意力造成的全局上下文损失。

Result: 在图像和视频理解基准测试上，Gaze Attention匹配或超越了密集注意力基线，同时在注意力计算中使用的视觉KV条目减少了高达90%。

Conclusion: 提出的Gaze Attention机制有效减少了MLLMs的计算开销，同时保持了模型性能，证明了在生成过程中选择性注视策略的有效性。

Abstract: When humans describe a visual scene, they do not process the entire image uniformly; instead, they selectively fixate on regions relevant to their intended description. In contrast, current multimodal large language models (MLLMs) attend to all visual tokens at each generation step, leading to diluted focus and unnecessary computational overhead. In this work, we introduce Gaze Attention, a novel mechanism that enables MLLMs to selectively attend to task-relevant visual regions during generation. Specifically, we spatially group visual embeddings-stored as key-value caches-into compact gaze regions, each represented by a lightweight descriptor. At each decoding step, the model dynamically selects the most relevant regions and restricts attention to them, reducing redundant computation while enhancing focus. To mitigate the loss of global context caused by localized attention, we further propose learnable context tokens appended to each image or frame, allowing the model to maintain holistic visual awareness. Extensive experiments on image and video understanding benchmarks demonstrate that Gaze Attention matches or surpasses dense-attention baselines, while using up to 90% fewer visual KV entries in the attention computation.

</details>


### [80] [LoREnc: Low-Rank Encryption for Securing Foundation Models and LoRA Adapters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13163)
*Beomjin Ahn,Jungmin Kwon,Chanyong Jung,Jaewook Chung*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: LoREnc是一种无需训练的安全框架，通过对基础模型权重进行谱截断并补偿到授权适配器中，同时使用正交重参数化隐藏适配器结构特征，从而保护大模型和低秩适配器免受知识产权泄露和模型恢复攻击，计算开销不到1%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有防御方案不实用，需要重新训练或访问原始数据集，LoREnc旨在实现无需训练即可保护基础模型和适配器安全。

Method: 1) 对基础模型权重进行谱截断，抑制主导低秩成分；2) 将缺失信息补偿到授权适配器中；3) 对授权适配器施加正交重参数化以隐藏结构指纹。

Result: 未经授权用户产生结构坍塌的输出，而授权用户能恢复完全性能；计算开销低于1%。

Conclusion: LoREnc是一种训练无关、高效且实用的模型保护框架，能有效防御模型恢复攻击。

Abstract: Foundation models and low-rank adapters enable efficient on-device generative AI but raise risks such as intellectual property leakage and model recovery attacks. Existing defenses are often impractical because they require retraining or access to the original dataset. We propose LoREnc, a training-free framework that secures both FMs and adapters via spectral truncation and compensation. LoREnc suppresses dominant low-rank components of FM weights, compensates for the missing information in authorized adapters, and further applies orthogonal reparameterization to obscure structural fingerprints of the protected adapter. Unauthorized users produce structurally collapsed outputs, while authorized users recover exact performance. Experiments demonstrate that LoREnc provides strong protection against model recovery with under 1% computational overhead.

</details>


### [81] [What Happens Before Decoding? Prefill Determines GUI Grounding in VLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12549)
*Jiaping Lin,Fei Shen,Junzhe Li,Ping Nie,Fei Yu,Ming Li,Haizhou Li*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文发现VLM的GUI grounding遵循两阶段范式：prefill阶段确定候选UI元素，decoding阶段精修坐标。基于此提出Re-Prefill方法，通过注意力引导的第二轮prefill阶段，将高注意力视觉token作为目标假设重新输入模型，实现无训练的grounding性能提升，在多个基准上获得最高4.3%的改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有训练无关的GUI grounding方法依赖多次推理（如迭代裁剪、候选聚合），但每次前向传播仍独立理解指令和解析视觉布局，缺乏视觉token间的逐步交互。作者试图揭示VLM在GUI grounding中的推理瓶颈，并设计一种无需额外训练的方法来改进。

Method: 提出Re-Prefill方法：(1) 首先进行标准推理，记录query位置（final token）在各层对视觉token的注意力分数；(2) 将高注意力视觉token作为初步目标假设提取出来；(3) 将这些视觉token与指令隐状态一起追加到输入中，执行第二阶段的prefill，让模型在生成坐标前重新思考决策。

Result: 在ScreenSpot-Pro、ScreenSpot-V2、OSWorld-G、UI-Vision、MMBench-GUI五个基准上，跨4个VLM取得一致提升，ScreenSpot-Pro上最高提升4.3%。

Conclusion: GUI grounding存在prefill决定候选、decoding精修的两阶段不对称性，prefill是关键瓶颈；通过注意力引导的第二轮prefill可以让模型重新审视视觉信息，有效改善grounding效果，且无需额外训练。

Abstract: Existing training-free approaches for GUI grounding often rely on multiple inference runs, such as iterative cropping or candidate aggregation, to identify target elements. Despite this additional computation, each forward pass still independently interprets the instruction and parses the visual layout, without enabling progressive interaction among visual tokens. In this paper, we study what happens during GUI grounding in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) and identify a previously overlooked bottleneck. We show that grounding follows a two-stage paradigm: the prefill stage determines candidate UI elements, while the decoding stage subsequently refines the final coordinates. This asymmetry establishes prefill as the critical step, as errors in candidate selection cannot be effectively corrected during decoding. Based on this observation, we propose Re-Prefill, a training-free method that revisits inference by introducing an attention-guided second prefill stage to refine target selection. Specifically, visual tokens that consistently receive high attention from the query position, i.e., the final token, across layers are extracted as a preliminary target hypothesis and appended to the input, together with the instruction hidden states, enabling the model to deeply re-think its decision before coordinate generation. Experiments across four VLMs and five benchmarks, including ScreenSpot-Pro, ScreenSpot-V2, OSWorld-G, UI-Vision, and MMBench-GUI, demonstrate consistent improvements without additional training, with gains of up to 4.3% on ScreenSpot-Pro. Code will be available at https://github.com/linjiaping1/Re-Prefill.

</details>


### [82] [DistractMIA: Black-Box Membership Inference on Vision-Language Models via Semantic Distraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12574)
*Hongyi Tang,Zhihao Zhu,Yi Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出DistractMIA，一种仅基于文本输出的黑盒成员推断攻击方法，通过向图像中插入语义干扰物并观察生成文本变化来判断训练数据成员资格。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的VLM成员推断攻击要么需要概率级信号（实际部署中难以获取），要么依赖基于掩码的语义预测任务（受限于以物体为中心的视觉假设）。亟需一种仅依赖输出文本的黑盒成员推断方法。

Method: DistractMIA保留原始图像，插入已知语义干扰物，然后测量生成文本的变化。基于以下直觉：训练集内样本更锚定于原图语义，非成员样本更容易被干扰物引导。在参考集上校准干扰配置，从重复文本生成中提取成员推断分数，无需访问logits、概率或隐藏状态。

Result: 在多个VLM和基准测试上，DistractMIA一致优于仅输出访问方法以及更强访问权限的基线方法。在医学基准上的表现进一步证明了其超越以物体为中心的自然图像场景的适用性。

Conclusion: 语义干扰可以成为VLM成员推断的有效信号，DistractMIA为实际部署场景下仅依赖文本输出的训练数据审计提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) are trained on large-scale image-text corpora that may contain private, copyrighted, or otherwise sensitive data, motivating membership inference as a tool for training-data auditing. This is especially challenging for deployed VLMs, where auditors typically observe only generated textual responses. Existing VLM membership inference attacks either rely on probability-level signals unavailable in such settings, or use mask-based semantic prediction tasks whose effectiveness depends on object-centric visual assumptions. To address these limitations, we propose DistractMIA, an output-only black-box framework based on semantic distraction. Rather than removing visual evidence, DistractMIA preserves the original image, inserts a known semantic distractor, and measures how generated responses change. This design is motivated by the intuition that member samples remain more anchored to the original image semantics, while non-member samples are more easily redirected toward the distractor. To make this signal reliable, DistractMIA calibrates distractor configurations on a reference set and derives membership scores from repeated textual generations, capturing response stability and distractor uptake without accessing logits, probabilities, or hidden states. Experiments across multiple VLMs and benchmarks show that DistractMIA consistently outperforms both output-only and stronger-access baselines. Its performance on a medical benchmark further demonstrates applicability beyond object-centric natural images.

</details>


### [83] [3D Primitives are a Spatial Language for VLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12586)
*Junze Liu,Kun Qian,Florian Dubost,Kai Zhong,Arvind Srinivasan,Nan Chen,Anping Wang,Sam Zhang,Alejandro Mottini,Qingjun Cui,Tian Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文发现VLM在通过代码生成3D几何基元重建场景时表现良好，但在简单空间问答上却失败。作者提出SpatialBabel基准、Code-CoT推理策略和S3-FT自监督微调方法，证明代码形式的几何基元可作为VLM空间理解的诊断工具和可迁移的空间词汇。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLM存在一个悖论：能通过代码生成3D几何基元（立方体、球体、圆柱体）重建场景，却在同一图像的简单空间问答上失败。作者希望利用3D几何基元代码作为中间表征来桥接这一鸿沟，并探索其作为诊断工具和可迁移空间词汇的潜力。

Method: 1) SpatialBabel基准：评估14个VLM在六种场景-代码语言上的基元3D场景重建能力；2) Code-CoT：无需训练的推理策略，将空间推理路由到基元代码生成；3) S3-FT：自监督空间微调，通过解析模型自身Three.js基元重建结果生成结构化标注，无需人工标签和教师模型。

Result: Code-CoT在SpatialBabel上提升+6.4%，CV-Bench-3D准确率提升+5.0%；S3-FT使Qwen3-VL-8B在SpatialBabel上提升+4.6%~+8.6%，CV-Bench-2D提升+9.7%，HallusionBench提升+17%，且跨模型族可迁移。

Conclusion: 代码形式的几何基元既可以作为VLM空间理解的诊断工具，也可以作为可迁移的空间词汇，帮助弥合VLM在执行复杂代码生成与简单空间推理之间的能力鸿沟。

Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) exhibit a striking paradox: they can generate executable code that reconstructs a 3D scene from geometric primitives with correct object counts, classes, and approximate positions, yet the same models fail at simpler spatial questions on the same image. We show that 3D geometric primitives (cubes, spheres, cylinders, expressed in executable code) serve as a powerful intermediate representation for spatial understanding, and exploit this through three contributions. First, we introduce \textbf{\textsc{SpatialBabel}}, a benchmark evaluating fourteen VLMs on primitive-based 3D scene reconstruction across six \emph{scene-code languages} (programming languages and declarative formats for 3D primitive scenes), revealing that a single model's object-detection F1 can vary by up to $5.7\times$ across languages. Second, we propose \textbf{Code-CoT} (Code Chain-of-Thought), a training-free inference strategy that routes spatial reasoning through primitive-based code generation. Code-CoT lifts the SpatialBabel-QA-Score by up to $+6.4$\% on primitive scenes and real-photo CV-Bench-3D accuracy by $+5.0$\% for VLMs with strong coding capabilities. Third, we propose \textbf{S$^{3}$-FT} (Self-Supervised Spatial Fine-Tuning), which self-supervisedly distills primitive spatial knowledge into general visual reasoning by parsing the model's own Three.js primitive-reconstructions into structured annotations and fine-tuning on the result, with \emph{no human labels and no teacher model}. Training on primitive images alone, S$^3$-FT improves Qwen3-VL-8B by $+4.6$ to $+8.6$\% on SpatialBabel-Primitive-QA, $+9.7$\% on CV-Bench-2D, and $+17$\% on HallusionBench; the recipe transfers across model families. These results establish geometric primitives in code as both a diagnostic and a transferable spatial vocabulary for VLMs. We will release all artifacts upon publication.

</details>


### [84] [MMCL-Bench: Multimodal Context Learning from Visual Rules, Procedures, and Evidence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12703)
*Yifan Chen,Fei Yin,Qingyan Bai,Zicheng Lin,Yujiu Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: MMCL-Bench是一个多模态上下文学习基准，包含102个任务，评估模型从视觉/混合模态中学习规则、流程和模式的能力。最强模型在严格评估下也只能解决不到三分之一的测试任务，揭示了多模态上下文学习是当前模型的关键能力瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准主要关注文本上下文学习或标准多模态问答，缺乏评估模型从多模态语境中学习并应用规则、流程和模式的能力。作者希望填补这一评估空白。

Method: 构建包含102个任务的MMCL-Bench基准，涵盖规则系统应用、程序性任务执行、经验发现与归纳三类；采用严格基于评分标准的评估方法，并进行了诊断性消融实验和错误分析。

Result: 最强模型在严格评估下解决不到三分之一的测试任务；错误在整个上下文到答案的管道中均有出现，包括上下文锚定、视觉证据提取、上下文推理和响应构建等环节。

Conclusion: 多模态上下文学习是当前多模态模型的关键能力瓶颈，MMCL-Bench为此重要但未被充分研究的能力提供了系统评估框架。

Abstract: We introduce MMCL-Bench, a benchmark for multimodal context learning: learning task-local rules, procedures, and empirical patterns from visual or mixed-modality teaching context and applying them to new visual instances. Unlike text-only context learning or standard multimodal question answering, this setting requires models to recover and localize relevant evidence from images, screenshots, manuals, videos, and frame sequences before they can reason over the learned context. MMCL-Bench contains 102 tasks spanning three categories: rule system application, procedural task execution, and empirical discovery and induction. We evaluate frontier multimodal models with strict rubric-based scoring and find that current systems remain far from robust multimodal context learning, with even the strongest model solving fewer than one-third of tasks under strict evaluation. Diagnostic ablations and error analysis show that failures arise throughout the context-to-answer pipeline, including context anchoring, visual evidence extraction, context reasoning, and response construction. MMCL-Bench thus highlights multimodal context learning as an important unsolved capability bottleneck for current multimodal models.

</details>


### [85] [ViDR: Grounding Multimodal Deep Research Reports in Source Visual Evidence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13034)
*Zhuofan Shi,Peilun Jia,Baoqin Sun,Haiyang Shen,Sixiong Xie,Yun Ma,Xiang Jing*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: ViDR是一个多模态深度研究框架，将源图片作为可检索、可解释、可路由和可验证的证据对象，生成长篇基于视觉证据的报告，同时引入MMR Bench+基准进行评估，实验表明其在报告质量、源图整合和可验证性上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度研究系统大多依赖纯文本证据，多模态系统要么仅弱化地检索图片，要么自行生成图表，没有充分利用源图中的视觉证据。

Method: ViDR将源图片视为可检索、可解释、可路由、可验证的证据对象，构建证据索引大纲连接声明与文本/视觉证据，通过上下文感知过滤、大纲感知重排序和VLM视觉分析将噪声网页图片精炼为源图证据原子，逐节生成报告内容，并验证视觉引用以减少幻觉或错位图片。

Result: ViDR在报告整体质量、源图整合和可验证性方面优于强商业和开源基线方法。

Conclusion: 源视觉证据对多模态深度研究很重要，能增强证据基础、视觉支持和报告可验证性。

Abstract: Recent deep research systems have improved the ability of large language models to produce long, grounded reports through iterative retrieval and reasoning. However, most text-centered systems rely mainly on textual evidence, while multimodal systems often retrieve images only weakly or generate charts themselves, leaving source figures underused as evidence. We present ViDR, a multimodal deep research framework that grounds long-form reports in source figures. ViDR treats source figures as retrievable, interpretable, routable, and verifiable evidence objects, while still generating analytical charts when needed. It builds an evidence-indexed outline linking claims to textual and visual evidence, refines noisy web images into source-figure evidence atoms through context-aware filtering, outline-aware reranking, and VLM-based visual analysis, and generates each section with section-specific evidence. ViDR further validates visual references to reduce hallucinated or misplaced figures. We also introduce MMR Bench+, a benchmark for evaluating visual evidence use in deep research reports, covering source-figure retrieval, placement, interpretation, verifiability, and analytical chart generation. Experiments show that ViDR improves overall report quality, source-figure integration, and verifiability over strong commercial and open-source baselines. These results suggest that source visual evidence is important for multimodal deep research, as it strengthens evidential grounding, visual support, and report verifiability.

</details>


### [86] [AnyFlow: Any-Step Video Diffusion Model with On-Policy Flow Map Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13724)
*Yuchao Gu,Guian Fang,Yuxin Jiang,Weijia Mao,Song Han,Han Cai,Mike Zheng Shou*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: AnyFlow 提出基于流映射（flow map）的视频扩散蒸馏框架，通过优化完整 ODE 采样轨迹而非仅固定步数的一致性映射，实现了任意步数的高质量视频生成，且在少步和多数步下均优于一致性蒸馏方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有一致性蒸馏方法在测试时分配更多采样步数时性能反而下降（缺乏 test-time scaling），因为一致性蒸馏用一致性采样轨迹替代了原始 ODE 轨迹，限制了 ODE 采样的可扩展性。作者希望设计一种能随采样步数增加而性能提升的蒸馏框架。

Method: 1) 将蒸馏目标从端点一致性映射 (z_t→z_0) 改为流映射过渡学习 (z_t→z_r)，覆盖任意时间间隔；2) 提出流映射反向模拟 (Flow Map Backward Simulation)，将完整 Euler rollout 分解为短路流映射过渡，实现高效的 on-policy 蒸馏，减少测试时误差（离散化误差和曝光偏差）。

Result: 在双向和因果两种架构上，参数规模从 1.3B 到 14B 的实验表明：AnyFlow 在少步生成场景下达到或超越一致性蒸馏方法，并且随着采样步数增加性能持续提升（良好的 test-time scaling）。

Conclusion: AnyFlow 首次实现了视频扩散模型的任意步数蒸馏，解决了一致性蒸馏缺乏 test-time scaling 的根本问题，为高效高质量视频生成提供了新范式。

Abstract: Few-step video generation has been significantly advanced by consistency distillation. However, the performance of consistency-distilled models often degrades as more sampling steps are allocated at test time, limiting their effectiveness for any-step video diffusion. This limitation arises because consistency distillation replaces the original probability-flow ODE trajectory with a consistency-sampling trajectory, weakening the desirable test-time scaling behavior of ODE sampling. To address this limitation, we introduce AnyFlow, the first any-step video diffusion distillation framework based on flow maps. Instead of distilling a model for only a few fixed sampling steps, AnyFlow optimizes the full ODE sampling trajectory. To this end, we shift the distillation target from endpoint consistency mapping $(z_{t}\rightarrow z_{0})$ to flow-map transition learning $(z_{t}\rightarrow z_{r})$ over arbitrary time intervals. We further propose Flow Map Backward Simulation, which decomposes a full Euler rollout into shortcut flow-map transitions, enabling efficient on-policy distillation that reduces test-time errors (i.e., discretization error in few-step sampling and exposure bias in causal generation). Extensive experiments across both bidirectional and causal architectures, at scales ranging from 1.3B to 14B parameters, demonstrate that AnyFlow achieves performance matches or surpasses consistency-based counterparts in the few-step regime, while scaling with sampling step budgets.

</details>


### [87] [AdaFocus: Adaptive Relevance-Diversity Sampling with Zero-Cache Look-back for Efficient Long Video Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12954)
*Xiao Yang,Yingzhe Ma,Haoxuan Yu,Zixin Li,Ning Qin*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 80.0

TL;DR: AdaFocus提出了一种渐进式证据获取框架，通过查询自适应采样器（AdaRD）和不确定性触发的零缓存回溯机制，在长视频理解中实现了33倍的视觉令牌节省和更好的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有长视频理解方法受限于一次性编码范式：密集编码成本高昂，稀疏压缩则不可逆地丢失细粒度证据，难以同时兼顾时间覆盖、视觉细节和计算效率。

Method: 1) 查询感知的自适应相关性-多样性采样器（AdaRD），在缺乏可靠局部定位时自动切换为全局聚类；2) 不确定性触发的精炼机制，仅在模型不自信时从磁盘零缓存检索高分辨率证据进行回溯。

Result: 在7个长视频基准上，AdaFocus相比密集编码实现性能提升（VideoMME +2.59准确率，Charades-STA +8.39 mIoU），同时减少约33倍视觉令牌消耗，并消除了内存帧预缓存需求。

Conclusion: 渐进式预览结合零缓存证据精炼是一种高效的可扩展多媒体推理范式，打破了长视频理解中效率与精度的权衡瓶颈。

Abstract: Long video understanding is heavily bottlenecked by a rigid one-shot paradigm: existing methods either densely encode videos at prohibitive memory and latency costs, or aggressively compress them into sparse frame sets that irreversibly discard fine-grained evidence needed for downstream reasoning. Consequently, current models struggle to simultaneously balance temporal coverage, visual details, and computational efficiency.
  We propose AdaFocus, an efficient framework that rethinks long-video understanding as progressive evidence acquisition rather than one-pass encoding. AdaFocus relies on two tightly coupled components. First, a Query-Aware Adaptive Relevance-Diversity sampler (AdaRD) produces a compact yet informative video preview, adaptively switching to global clustering when the query lacks reliable local grounding. Second, instead of caching exhaustive frame sequences in memory, AdaFocus introduces an uncertainty-triggered refinement mechanism. It performs targeted look-back only when the model is not confident, retrieving high-resolution evidence directly from disk via a zero-cache I/O design. This turns discarded visual details from an irreversible loss into on-demand recoverable evidence without paying the cost of exhaustive preloading.
  Experiments on seven standard long-video benchmarks show that AdaFocus delivers a substantially better efficiency-accuracy trade-off than strong baselines. Compared with conventional dense encoding, AdaFocus achieves improved task performance (e.g., +2.59 accuracy on VideoMME, +8.39 mIoU on Charades-STA over single-pass inference) while reducing visual token consumption by ~33x and eliminating the need for in-memory frame pre-caching through its zero-cache disk retrieval design. These findings suggest that progressive preview combined with zero-cache evidence refinement is a highly effective paradigm for scalable multimedia reasoning.

</details>


### [88] [VideoSEAL: Mitigating Evidence Misalignment in Agentic Long Video Understanding by Decoupling Answer Authority](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12571)
*Chenhao Qiu,Yechao Zhang,Xin Luo,Shien Song,Xusheng Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文发现长视频问答中现有LVU智能体存在"证据错位"问题（答案正确但证据不支持），提出解耦的规划器-检查器框架，将长程规划与答案权威分离，通过像素级验证门控最终回答，在多个长视频基准上提升了答案准确性和证据对齐度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长视频问答需要定位稀疏、分散的视觉证据，现有MLLM在短视频上表现良好但长视频需要多轮agentic交互。现有LVU智能体存在"证据错位"问题——答案正确但检索或检查的证据不支持，且该问题在提示压力和奖励压力下被放大。根本原因是耦合的agent范式混淆了长程规划与答案权威。

Method: 提出解耦的规划器-检查器框架（decoupled planner-inspector framework），将规划与答案权威分离，最终回答基于像素级验证进行门控。同时引入两种诊断指标：时间基础度（temporal groundedness）和语义基础度（semantic groundedness）来表征证据错位。

Result: 在四个长视频基准上，框架同时提升了答案准确性和证据对齐度，在LVBench上达55.1%，LongVideoBench上达62.0%。解耦架构随搜索预算增加可一致扩展，并支持即插即用地升级MLLM骨干网络而无需重训练规划器。

Conclusion: 解耦的规划器-检查器范式能有效解决长视频问答中的证据错位问题，通过分离规划与答案权威实现更好的可解释性和可扩展性。

Abstract: Long video question answering requires locating sparse, time-scattered visual evidence within highly redundant content. Although current MLLMs perform well on short videos, long videos introduce long-horizon search and verification, which often necessitates multi-turn, agentic interaction. We show that existing LVU agents can exhibit "evidence misalignment": they produce correct answers that are not supported by the retrieved or inspected evidence. To characterize this failure, we introduce two diagnostics (temporal groundedness and semantic groundedness) and use them to reveal two pressures that amplify misalignment: prompt pressure from shared-context saturation at inference time and reward pressure from outcome-only optimization during training. These findings point to a structural root cause: the coupled agent paradigm conflates long-horizon planning with answer authority. We therefore propose the decoupled planner-inspector framework, which separates planning from answer authority and gates final answering on pixel-level verification. Across four long-video benchmarks, our framework improves both answer accuracy and evidence alignment, achieving 55.1% on LVBench and 62.0% on LongVideoBench while producing interpretable search trajectories. Moreover, the decoupled architecture scales consistently with increased search budgets and supports plug-and-play upgrades of the MLLM backbone without retraining the planner. Code and models are available at https://github.com/Echochef/VideoSEAL.

</details>


### [89] [MambaPanoptic: A Vision Mamba-based Structured State Space Framework for Panoptic Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12640)
*Qing Cheng,Damiano Bertolini,Wei Zhang,Dong Wang,Niclas Zeller,Daniel Cremers*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出MambaPanoptic，一种基于状态空间模型（Mamba）的全景分割框架。通过MambaFPN实现线性复杂度的多尺度全局特征建模，结合PanopticFCN风格的无 proposal 核生成器，在Cityscapes和COCO上以更少参数达到或超越Mask2Former的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有卷积方法缺乏长程依赖建模能力，而Transformer方法在密集预测任务中面临二次计算复杂度的瓶颈。需要一种能同时满足长程建模、多尺度表示和高效预测的方法。

Method: 1) MambaFPN：基于Mamba块的自顶向下特征金字塔，以线性复杂度实现全局连贯的多尺度特征表示；2) PanopticFCN风格的核生成器，统一生成thing和stuff核，并结合QuadMamba特征精炼模块进行多阶段增强。

Result: 在Cityscapes和COCO全景分割基准上，MambaPanoptic在相似参数量下持续优于PanopticDeepLab和PanopticFCN，在Cityscapes上的PQ和AP指标匹配或超越Mask2Former，同时参数量更少。

Conclusion: 状态空间模型（Mamba）可以有效替代Transformer用于密集预测任务，在保持全局建模能力的同时显著降低计算复杂度，为全景分割提供了一种更高效的架构选择。

Abstract: Panoptic segmentation requires the simultaneous recognition of countable thing instances and amorphous stuff regions, placing joint demands on long-range context modelling, multi-scale feature representation, and efficient dense prediction. Existing convolutional and transformer-based methods struggle to satisfy all three requirements concurrently: convolutional architectures are limited in their capacity to model long-range dependencies, while transformer-based methods incur quadratic computational cost that is prohibitive at high resolutions. In this paper, we propose MambaPanoptic, a fully Mamba-based panoptic segmentation framework that addresses these limitations through two principal contributions. First, we introduce MambaFPN, a top-down feature pyramid that leverages Mamba blocks to generate globally coherent, multi-scale feature representations with linear computational complexity. Second, we adopt a PanopticFCN-style kernel generator that produces unified thing and stuff kernels for proposal-free panoptic prediction, enhanced by a QuadMamba-based feature refinement module applied at multiple network stages. Experiments on the Cityscapes and COCO panoptic segmentation benchmarks demonstrate that MambaPanoptic consistently outperforms PanopticDeepLab and PanopticFCN under comparable model sizes, and matches or surpasses Mask2Former on Cityscapes in PQ and AP while requiring fewer parameters.

</details>


### [90] [No One Knows the State of the Art in Geospatial Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12678)
*Isaac Corley,Nils Lehmann,Caleb Robinson,Gabriel Tseng,Anthony Fuller,Hamed Alemohammad,Evan Shelhamer,Jennifer Marcus,Hannah Kerner*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文通过152篇论文审计，发现地理空间基础模型（GFM）领域存在严重的标准化缺失问题：46次跨论文评分差异≥10分、94/126篇论文使用独有预训练配置、39%不公开权重。提出六项具体改进建议以推动领域标准化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前GFM领域缺乏统一评估标准，导致研究者无法比较不同模型的性能，也无法判断当前的最优方法。本文旨在揭示这一"协调失败"问题，并推动社区建立共享规范。

Method: 对152篇GFM论文进行系统性审计，量化分析评估标准、训练/测试协议、权重发布、预训练控制等维度的一致性，识别出46处跨论文分歧、94种独有配置等具体问题。

Result: 发现GFM领域存在严重的标准化缺失：46次跨论文评分差异≥10分、74.6%的论文使用独有配置、39%不公开权重。这些问题阻碍了领域内的公平比较和可重复性。

Conclusion: 提出六项具体期望：权重发布（命名许可证）、共享核心评估、基线标注（复制vs重跑）、方差报告、统一评估框架、数据/架构/算法控制变量。强调这是社区协调问题而非个体过错。

Abstract: Geospatial foundation models (GFMs) have been proposed as generalizable backbones for disaster response, land-cover mapping, food-security monitoring, and other high-stakes Earth-observation tasks. Yet the published work about these models does not give reviewers or users enough information to tell which model fits a given task. We argue that nobody knows what the current state of the art is in geospatial foundation models. The methods may be useful, but the GFM literature does not standardize evaluations, training and testing protocols, released weights, or pretraining controls well enough for anyone to compare or rank them. In a 152-paper audit, we find 46 cross-paper disagreements of at least 10 points for the same model, benchmark, and protocol; 94/126 papers with extractable pretraining data use a configuration no other paper uses; and 39% of GFM papers release no model weights. This lack of community standards can be solved. We propose six concrete expectations: named-license weight release, shared core evaluations, copied-versus-rerun baseline annotations, variance reporting, one shared evaluation harness, and data-vs-architecture-vs-algorithm controls. These gaps are a coordination failure, not a fault of any individual lab; the authors of this paper, like many others in the GFM community, have contributed to them. Rather than just critiquing the community, we aim to provide concrete steps toward a shared understanding of how to innovate GFMs.

</details>


### [91] [Visual Aesthetic Benchmark: Can Frontier Models Judge Beauty?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12684)
*Yichen Feng,Yuetai Li,Chunjiang Liu,Yuanyuan Chen,Fengqing Jiang,Yue Huang,Hang Hua,Zhengqing Yuan,Kaiyuan Zheng,Luyao Niu,Bhaskar Ramasubramanian,Basel Alomair,Xiangliang Zhang,Misha Sra,Zichen Chen,Radha Poovendran,Zhangchen Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出视觉审美基准(VAB)，通过比较选择而非标量分数来评估多模态大模型的审美判断能力。研究发现当前最先进的MLLM在VAB上远低于人类专家表现（26.5% vs 68.9%），揭示了模型与人类审美判断之间存在显著差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有审美评估将审美判断简化为预测单个图像的标量分数，但研究表明这些分数无法忠实反映比较偏好。作者希望通过构建基于比较选择的基准来更准确地衡量MLLM的审美判断能力。

Method: 1) 进行对照实验，证明分数驱动的排序与人工直接比较一致性差，而直接排名更可靠；2) 构建VAB基准，包含400个任务、1195张图像（涵盖美术、摄影、插画），每个任务由10位专家标注，以比较选择（从候选集中选最优/最差）形式评估；3) 测试20个前沿MLLM和6个视觉质量奖励模型。

Result: 最强系统在三轮随机排列中仅26.5%任务正确识别最佳和最差图像，远低于人类专家的68.9%。在2000个专家样本上微调35B模型可将准确率提升至接近397B开源模型的水平。

Conclusion: 当前多模态模型与人类审美判断之间存在可量化的显著差距，VAB为追踪和弥合这一差距提供了首个基于集合、专家标注的测试平台。

Abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are now routinely deployed for visual understanding, generation, and curation. A substantial fraction of these applications require an explicit aesthetic judgment. Most existing solutions reduce this judgment to predicting a scalar score for a single image. We first ask whether such scores faithfully capture comparative preference: in a controlled study with eight expert annotators, score-derived rankings align poorly with the same annotators' direct comparisons, while direct ranking yields substantially higher inter-annotator agreement on best- and worst-image labels. Motivated by this finding, we introduce the Visual Aesthetic Benchmark (VAB), which casts aesthetic evaluation as comparative selection over candidate sets with matched subject matter. VAB contains 400 tasks and 1,195 images across fine art, photography, and illustration, with labels derived from the consensus of 10 independent expert judges per task. Evaluating 20 frontier MLLMs and six dedicated visual-quality reward models, we find that the strongest system identifies both the best and the worst image correctly across three random permutations of the candidate order in only 26.5% of tasks, far below the 68.9% achieved by human experts. Fine-tuning a 35B-parameter model on 2,000 expert examples brings its accuracy close to that of a 397B-parameter open-weight model, suggesting that the comparative signal in VAB is transferable. Together, these results expose a clear and measurable gap between current multimodal models and expert aesthetic judgment, and VAB provides the first set-based, expert-grounded testbed on which that gap can be tracked and closed.

</details>


### [92] [Just Ask for a Table: A Thirty-Token User Prompt Defeats Sponsored Recommendations in Twelve LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12772)
*Andreas Maier,Jeta Sopa,Gozde Gul Sahin,Paula Perez-Toro,Siming Bayer*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 该论文复现并验证了Wu等人(2026)关于大语言模型在软赞助提示词下会推荐更贵赞助产品的发现，同时揭示了评估流程描述不充分导致的可复现性问题，并提出了有效的缓解措施。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证Wu等人(2026)关于LLM推荐行为受商业赞助影响的发现是否可复现，并探究评估流程的透明度和可复现性问题。

Method: 在10个开源聊天模型和2个OpenAI模型(gpt-3.5-turbo, gpt-4o)上复现原实验，使用gpt-4o作为主要评判器，同时引入gpt-oss-120b和gpt-4o-mini作为消融实验的辅助评判器。并测试30-token用户提示（要求中性比较表）作为缓解措施。

Result: 发现三个静默实现错误会导致评分偏移数十个百分点；核心结论可泛化（gpt-3.5-turbo的logistic回归截距0.81接近原论文的0.86）；30-token中性提示可将赞助推荐率从46.9%降至1.0%（开源模型）和从53.0%降至0%（OpenAI模型）。

Conclusion: LLM评估流程的文字描述不足以支持准确复现；核心发现具有泛化性；简单的中性提示可有效缓解赞助推荐问题；AI素养和价格比较门户是市场层面的缓解方案。

Abstract: Wu et al. (2026) showed that most frontier large language models (LLMs) recommend a sponsored, roughly twice-as-expensive flight when their system prompt contains a soft sponsorship cue. We reproduce their evaluation on ten open-weight chat models plus the two of their twenty-three models that are still reachable today (gpt-3.5-turbo, gpt-4o). All reported rates in this paper are produced under the same judge the original paper used (gpt-4o); we additionally store every label under an open-weight (gpt-oss-120b) and a smaller proprietary (gpt-4o-mini) judge for an ablation. Three findings emerge. First, a prose description of an LLM evaluation pipeline is not, on its own, sufficient for accurate reproduction: we surfaced three silent implementation failures that each shifted a reported rate by tens of percentage points. Second, the central claims do generalise - the gpt-3.5-turbo logistic-regression intercept of alpha = 0.81 is within four points of the original alpha = 0.86, and 200 of 200 trials on gpt-3.5-turbo and gpt-4o promote a payday lender to a financially distressed user. Third, a thirty-token user prompt that asks the assistant for a neutral comparison table first cuts sponsored recommendation from 46.9% to 1.0% averaged across our ten open-source models, and from 53.0% to 0% averaged across the two OpenAI models. AI literacy and price-comparison portals are likely market-level mitigations; the harmful-product cell is bounded by neither. Raw data, labels and analysis scripts are at https://github.com/akmaier/Paper-LLM-Ads .

</details>


### [93] [Debunking Grad-ECLIP: A Comprehensive Study on Its Incorrectness and Fundamental Principles for Model Interpretation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12952)
*Yongjin Cui,Xiaohui Fan*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文指出Grad-ECLIP（中间特征路线）并非新方法，而是注意力路线（Attention-ECLIP）的等效变体；同时发现Grad-ECLIP存在根本性缺陷——其解释结果偏离原始模型，并提出模型解释应遵循的两条基本原则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 澄清对Transformer可解释性技术路线的误解，揭示Grad-ECLIP方法的缺陷，并确立模型解释应遵循的基本原则以避免类似错误。

Method: 通过形式化推导和实验验证，证明中间特征路线（Grad-ECLIP）等价于注意力路线（Attention-ECLIP）；分析Grad-ECLIP的解释结果与原始模型行为不一致的根源，提出两条基本原则。

Result: 1) 证明Grad-ECLIP并非新颖方法，而是注意力方法的等价变体；2) 揭示Grad-ECLIP的解释结果存在偏差，与原始模型性能不匹配；3) 提出模型解释应遵循的两条基本原则。

Conclusion: 中间特征路线（Grad-ECLIP）存在根本性缺陷，其解释结果不可靠；研究者应遵循基本原则来设计正确的模型解释方法。

Abstract: Grad-ECLIP is published at ICML 2024 and represents a new Transformer interpretation technical route (intermediate features-based). First, this paper demonstrates that the intermediate features-based technical route is not a novel one. Based on the existing attention-based route, we have developed Attention-ECLIP, which is completely equivalent to Grad-ECLIP but with simpler computation. Both through formal derivation and experimental validation, we prove that the intermediate feature-based route represented by Grad-ECLIP is actually an equivalent variant of the attention-based route. Next, this paper demonstrates that the Grad-ECLIP method is flawed. The model interpretation results obtained by Grad-ECLIP are not those of the original model, and the interpretation results are misaligned with the model's performance. We analyze the causes of Grad-ECLIP's flaws and propose, or rather, explicitly emphasize two fundamental principles that model interpretation should adhere to in order to avoid similar errors.

</details>


### [94] [Seg-Agent: Test-Time Multimodal Reasoning for Training-Free Language-Guided Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12953)
*Chao Hao,Jun Xu,Ji Du,Shuo Ye,Ziyue Qiao,Xiaodong Cun,Guangcong Wang,Xubin Zheng,Zitong Yu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: Seg-Agent 提出了一种完全无需训练的多模态链式推理框架，通过可视化的 Set-of-Mark 提示让 MLLM 在视觉空间中进行显式推理（生成-选择-优化），实现了与有监督方法相当的语言引导分割性能，并构建了 Various-LangSeg 基准进行评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语言引导分割方法依赖于两阶段框架（MLLM 解释指令生成视觉提示 + SAM 分割），但由于 MLLM 空间定位能力有限，通常需要在大规模数据集上训练。虽有工作引入推理机制，但仅在文本域进行链式推理，缺乏直接视觉反馈，性能受限。

Method: 提出 Seg-Agent，一个无需训练的三阶段显式多模态链式推理框架：(1) 生成阶段：利用 SoM 可视化提示在图像上标注候选区域；(2) 选择阶段：MLLM 在视觉域中观察并选择最符合条件的区域；(3) 优化阶段：迭代细化选择结果。整个过程完全在视觉空间中进行推理，无需参数更新。

Result: 在多个分割任务上，Seg-Agent 无需任何训练即可达到与基于有监督学习方法相当的性能；同时提出了 Various-LangSeg 基准（涵盖显式语义、通用物体和推理引导分割），展示了方法的泛化能力。

Conclusion: 通过显式的多模态视觉推理循环替代传统的纯文本链式推理，可以在不进行任何训练的情况下实现高质量的语言引导分割，为 MLLM 在视觉定位任务中的应用提供了一种高效且可扩展的新范式。

Abstract: Language-guided segmentation transcends the scope limitations of traditional semantic segmentation, enabling models to segment arbitrary target regions based on natural language instructions. Existing approaches typically adopt a two-stage framework: employing Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to interpret instructions and generate visual prompts, followed by foundational segmentation models (e.g., SAM) to produce masks. However, due to the limited spatial grounding capabilities of off-the-shelf MLLMs, these methods often rely on extensive training on large-scale datasets to achieve satisfactory accuracy. While recent advances have introduced reasoning mechanisms to improve performance, they predominantly operate within the textual domain, performing chain-of-thought reasoning solely based on abstract text representations without direct visual feedback. In this paper, we propose Seg-Agent, a completely training-free framework that pioneers Explicit Multimodal Chain-of-Reasoning. Unlike prior text-only reasoning, our approach constructs an interactive visual reasoning loop comprising three stages: generation, selection, and refinement. Specifically, we leverage Set-of-Mark (SoM) visual prompting to render candidate regions directly onto the image, allowing the MLLM to ``see'' and iteratively reason about spatial relationships in the visual domain rather than just the textual one. This explicit multimodal interaction enables Seg-Agent to achieve performance comparable to state-of-the-art training-based methods without any parameter updates. Furthermore, to comprehensively evaluate generalization across diverse scenarios, we introduce Various-LangSeg, a novel benchmark covering explicit semantic, generic object, and reasoning-guided segmentation tasks. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of our method.

</details>


### [95] [Revealing the Gap in Human and VLM Scene Perception through Counterfactual Semantic Saliency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13047)
*Ziqi Wen,Parsa Madinei,Miguel P. Eckstein*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出反事实语义显著性（CSS）框架，通过因果消融场景中的物体来量化视觉语言模型（VLM）对物体的依赖程度，并与人类感知进行对比。实验发现VLM存在显著的场景理解偏差：过度依赖大物体、中心物体和高显著性物体，而对人的关注不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的白盒可解释性方法无法用于闭源模型，而被动评估指标无法隔离因果特征，缺乏评估VLM与人类高层语义场景理解一致性的有效框架。

Method: 提出黑盒、模型无关的反事实语义显著性（CSS）框架，通过因果消融场景中的物体并测量语义偏移来量化物体重要性，并与人类心理物理学基线（16,289条有效响应）进行对比。

Result: VLM存在多种感知偏差：对大物体（尺寸偏差）、图像中心物体（中心偏差）和高显著性物体的过度依赖，同时对人像的关注不足。模型尺寸偏差是解释模型与人类语义分歧的主要驱动因素。

Conclusion: 当前VLM与人类对复杂场景的语义理解存在系统性差距，为改进模型与人类感知对齐提供了方向。

Abstract: Evaluating whether large vision-language models (VLMs) align with human perception for high-level semantic scene comprehension remains a challenge. Traditional white-box interpretability methods are inapplicable to closed-source architectures and passive metrics fail to isolate causal features. We introduce Counterfactual Semantic Saliency (CSS). This black-box, model-agnostic framework quantifies the importance of objects by measuring the semantic shift induced by their causal ablation from a scene. To evaluate AI-human semantic alignment, we tested prominent VLMs against a human psychophysics baseline comprising 16,289 valid responses across 307 complex natural scenes and 1,306 high-fidelity counterfactual variants. Our analysis reveals a pervasive scene comprehension gap: models exhibit an overreliance (relative to humans) on large objects (size bias), objects at the center of the image (center bias), and high saliency objects. In contrast, models rely less on people in the scenes than our human participants to describe the images. A model's size bias is a primary driver explaining variations in model-human semantic divergence. Code and data will be available at https://github.com/starsky77/Counterfactual-Semantic-Saliency.

</details>


### [96] [Dual-Pathway Circuits of Object Hallucination in Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13156)
*Jiaxin Liu,Ding Zhong,Yue Wang,Zhidong Yang,Zhaolu Kang,Guangyuan Dong,Qishi Zhan,Pengcheng Fang,Aofan Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出双路径电路分析框架，用于识别和表征VLM中的物体幻觉相关电路。通过激活修补找到视觉接地通路和幻觉通路，引入条件通路分析揭示通路交互，并通过抑制幻觉通路组件将物体幻觉降低高达76%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLM常产生物体幻觉（描述图像中不存在的内容），限制了其可靠性和可解释性。现有方法缺乏对幻觉机制的深入理解，作者希望通过电路级分析实现可解释的因果干预。

Method: 1) 激活修补(activation patching)识别两类通路；2) 条件通路分析(CPA)表征通路交互；3) 靶向抑制幻觉通路组件以减少幻觉。

Result: 在5种架构VLM上验证：抑制幻觉通路可降低高达76%的物体幻觉，且电路可选择性迁移到关系型（而非属性型）幻觉上。

Conclusion: VLM中存在可分离的视觉接地通路和幻觉通路，它们在正确和幻觉样本中呈现极性翻转，通过因果干预可有效缓解幻觉问题。

Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in bridging visual perception and natural language understanding, enabling a wide range of multimodal reasoning tasks. However, they often produce object hallucinations, describing content absent from the input image, which limits their reliability and interpretability. To address this limitation, we propose Dual-Pathway Circuit Analysis, a framework that identifies and characterizes hallucination-related circuits in VLMs for mechanistic understanding and causal probing. We first apply activation patching across five architecturally diverse VLMs to identify a visual grounding pathway that supports correct predictions and a hallucination pathway that drives erroneous outputs. We then introduce Conditional Pathway Analysis (CPA) to characterize pathway-level interactions, revealing that grounding components remain strongly redundant in both correct and hallucinating samples but undergo a consistent polarity flip, shifting from supporting the ground truth on correct samples to aligning with the hallucinated answer on erroneous ones. We further perform targeted suppression of hallucination-pathway components, showing that scaling these components reduces object hallucination by up to 76% with minimal accuracy cost, and validate that the same circuit selectively transfers to relational but not attribute hallucination. Evaluations on POPE-adversarial and AMBER show that the identified circuits are consistent across architectures, support causal intervention, and transfer selectively across hallucination types.

</details>


### [97] [PanoWorld: Towards Spatial Supersensing in 360$^\circ$ Panorama World](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13169)
*Changpeng Wang,Xin Lin,Junhan Liu,Yuheng Liu,Zhen Wang,Donglian Qi,Yunfeng Yan,Xi Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文针对多模态大模型在360度全景图像理解上的不足，提出PanoWorld模型与专用数据集PanoSpace-Bench。通过球形空间交叉注意力机制和全景原生训练数据，该模型在全景空间推理任务上显著超越现有开源和商业模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLM处理全景图时通常将其分解为多个透视视图，丢失了全景图（ERP）的球面连续结构，导致空间理解能力不足。本文旨在让MLLM能够直接以"全景原生"方式理解ERP图像作为连续的、以观察者为中心的空间。

Method: 1) 定义全景原生理解的关键能力（语义锚定、球面定位、参考系变换、深度感知3D推理）。2) 构建大规模元数据管道，从混合源ERP全景生成几何感知、语言对齐、深度感知的监督信号，并实例化为能力对齐的指令微调数据。3) 提出PanoWorld模型，核心创新是球形空间交叉注意力机制，将球面几何注入视觉流。4) 构建PanoSpace-Bench诊断基准。

Result: PanoWorld在PanoSpace-Bench、H* Bench和R2R-CE Val-Unseen基准上大幅超越闭源和开源基线模型，验证了专用全景原生监督和几何感知模型适配的必要性。

Conclusion: 鲁棒的全景空间推理需要专用的全景原生监督数据和几何感知的模型设计，代码与数据将开源。

Abstract: Multimodal large laboratory models (MLLMs) still struggle with spatial understanding under the dominant perspective-image paradigm, which inherits the narrow field of view of human-like perception. For navigation, robotic search, and 3D scene understanding, 360-degree panoramic sensing offers a form of supersensing by capturing the entire surrounding environment at once. However, existing MLLM pipelines typically decompose panoramas into multiple perspective views, leaving the spherical structure of equirectangular projection (ERP) largely implicit. In this paper, we study pano-native understanding, which requires an MLLM to reason over an ERP panorama as a continuous, observer-centered space. To this end, we first define the key abilities for pano-native understanding, including semantic anchoring, spherical localization, reference-frame transformation, and depth-aware 3D spatial reasoning. We then build a large-scale metadata construction pipeline that converts mixed-source ERP panoramas into geometry-aware, language-grounded, and depth-aware supervision, and instantiate these signals as capability-aligned instruction tuning data. On the model side, we introduce PanoWorld with Spherical Spatial Cross-Attention, which injects spherical geometry into the visual stream. We further construct PanoSpace-Bench, a diagnostic benchmark for evaluating ERP-native spatial reasoning. Experiments show that PanoWorld substantially outperforms both proprietary and open-source baselines on PanoSpace-Bench, H* Bench, and R2R-CE Val-Unseen benchmarks. These results demonstrate that robust panoramic reasoning requires dedicated pano-native supervision and geometry-aware model adaptation. All source code and proposed data will be publicly released.

</details>


### [98] [CLIP Tricks You: Training-free Token Pruning for Efficient Pixel Grounding in Large VIsion-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13178)
*Sangin Lee,Yukyung Choi*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 提出LiteLVLM，一种无需训练、基于文本引导的视觉token剪枝策略，通过反转CLIP视觉-文本相似度排序，在像素级定位任务中保留关键区域token并恢复上下文token，实现高效推理（22%加速、2.3倍内存减少，性能保持90%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型视觉-语言模型中视觉token占输入大部分，导致计算开销巨大。现有token剪枝方法在像素级定位任务中效果差，因为token重要性高度依赖输入文本。

Method: 通过分析CLIP发现，指代区域内的视觉token往往与文本表示的相似度较低。基于此，LiteLVLM反转CLIP视觉-文本相似度排序，保留覆盖指代区域的视觉token，同时恢复上下文token以实现清晰的前景-背景分离，且无需训练。

Result: 在多种token预算下，LiteLVLM比现有方法提升超过5%；无需训练微调，保持90%原始性能的同时实现22%加速和2.3倍内存减少。

Conclusion: LiteLVLM是一种有效的、无需训练的文本引导token剪枝策略，特别适用于像素级定位任务，显著提升了推理效率和内存使用。

Abstract: In large vision-language models, visual tokens typically constitute the majority of input tokens, leading to substantial computational overhead. To address this, recent studies have explored pruning redundant or less informative visual tokens for image understanding tasks. However, these methods struggle with pixel grounding tasks, where token importance is highly contingent on the input text. Through an in-depth analysis of CLIP, we observe that visual tokens located within referent regions often exhibit low similarity to the textual representation. Motivated by this insight, we introduce LiteLVLM, a training-free, text-guided token pruning strategy for efficient pixel grounding inference. By reversing the ranking of CLIP's visual-text similarity, LiteLVLM effectively retains visual tokens covering the referent regions, while recovering context tokens to enable clear foreground-background separation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LiteLVLM significantly outperforms existing methods by over 5% across diverse token budgets. Without any training or fine-tuning, LiteLVLM maintains 90\% of the original performance with a 22% speedup and a 2.3x memory reduction. Our code is available at https://github.com/sejong-rcv/LiteLVLM.

</details>


### [99] [FIKA-Bench: From Fine-grained Recognition to Fine-Grained Knowledge Acquisition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13193)
*Geng Li,Yuxin Peng*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 论文提出了FIKA-Bench，一个用于评估细粒度知识获取能力的新基准，要求系统通过主动搜索、比对和验证外部证据来回答开放式的细粒度识别问题。实验表明，即使是最先进的LMM和智能体系统，准确率也不超过30%，且问题主要在于错误的实体检索和视觉判断能力不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准主要评估视觉识别能力，但忽略了实际场景中人类在面对陌生物体时会主动搜索外部证据的行为模式，这种主动的外部知识获取能力尚未被充分探索。

Method: 构建了FIKA-Bench，包含311个公开来源和真实生活实例，通过过滤前沿闭卷模型可记忆的案例以及审计图像-答案泄露的方式确保基准质量，并评估了多种最新大型多模态模型和智能体系统。

Result: 最佳系统准确率仅25.1%，无模型超过30%；仅给模型配备工具不足以弥合差距，智能体的失败主要源于实体检索错误和视觉判断能力差。

Conclusion: 可靠的细粒度知识获取需要更好的智能体设计，特别是要聚焦于细粒度识别能力，而非仅仅依赖工具调用。

Abstract: Fine-grained recognition in everyday life is often not a closed-book classification problem: when encountering unfamiliar objects, humans actively search, compare visual details, and verify evidence before deciding. Existing benchmarks primarily evaluate visually recognition, leaving this active external knowledge acquisition ability underexplored. We study fine-grained knowledge acquisition, where a system must seek, verify, and use external evidence to answer open-ended fine-grained recognition questions. We introduce FIKA-Bench, a leakage-aware and evidence-grounded collection of 311 public-source and real-life instances. To ensure high quality, every example is filtered against frontier closed-book models to remove memorized cases and audited to eliminate image-answer leakage, retaining only samples supported by verified evidence. Our evaluation of latest Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) and agents reveals that the task remains a formidable challenge: the best system reaches only 25.1% accuracy, with no model exceeding 30%. Crucially, we find that merely equipping models with tools is insufficient to bridge this gap; agent failures are predominantly driven by wrong entity retrieval and poor visual judgement. These results show that reliable knowledge acquisition needs better agent designs that focus on fine-grained recognition.

</details>


### [100] [ReTool-Video: Recursive Tool-Using Video Agents with Meta-Augmented Tool Grounding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13228)
*Xiao Liu,Nayu Liu,Junnan Zhu,Ruirui Chen,Guohui Xiang,Changjian Wang,Kaiwen Wei,Rongzhen Li,Jiang Zhong*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出ReTool-Video框架，通过构建包含134个工具的MetaAug-Video Tool Library (MVTL)和递归工具使用方法，解决现有视频智能体在细粒度组合推理和动作空间扁平化方面的局限。实验表明在MVBench、MLVU和Video-MME上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频智能体在时间推理、跨模态理解和复杂问答方面存在两个关键局限：(1) 工具空间粗粒度，缺乏支持组合推理的细粒度操作；(2) 动作空间扁平化，将高层视频意图硬映射为底层工具调用，缺乏灵活适配能力。

Method: 提出两个互补设计：(1) MVTL工具库，包含26个基础工具和108个元工具（支持过滤、聚合、重排序、格式化等中间结果操作）；(2) ReTool-Video递归工具使用方法，对于不匹配的意图通过解析器进行参数修复、工具替换或分解，将抽象动作（如时间合并、跨模态验证）逐步转化为具体多模态操作。

Result: 在MVBench、MLVU和Video-MME（w/o sub）数据集上，ReTool-Video一致性地优于强基线方法。进一步分析表明递归接地和细粒度元工具提升了复杂视频理解的稳定性和有效性。

Conclusion: 细粒度元工具设计+递归意图解析机制能有效弥合高层视频理解意图与底层工具执行之间的语义鸿沟，提升视频智能体的组合推理能力。

Abstract: Video understanding requires active evidence seeking, motivating tool-augmented video agents for temporal reasoning, cross-modal understanding, and complex question answering. Existing video agents have improved video reasoning with retrieval, memory, frame inspection, and verifier tools, but they still face two limitations: (1) a coarse tool space that lacks fine-grained operations for compositional reasoning; and (2) a flat action space that forces high-level video intents into primitive executable tool calls. In this paper, we address these challenges with two complementary designs. First, we construct a MetaAug-Video Tool Library (MVTL), an extensible tool library with 134 registered tools, including 26 base tools for general multimodal signal processing and 108 meta tools for filtering, aggregation, reranking, formatting, and other intermediate-result operations. MVTL supports dual-level access to both structured video information and raw modal evidence, enabling diverse video reasoning scenarios. Second, we propose ReTool-Video, a recursive tool-using method that grounds high-level video intents into executable tool chains. In ReTool-Video, matched actions are executed directly, while unmatched intents are delegated to a resolver for parameter repair, tool substitution, or decomposition. This allows abstract actions such as temporal merging, cross-modal verification, or repeated-event aggregation to be progressively translated into concrete multimodal operations at runtime. Experiments on MVBench, MLVU, and Video-MME w/o sub. show that ReTool-Video consistently outperforms strong baselines. Further analysis demonstrates that recursive grounding and fine-grained meta tools improve the stability and effectiveness of complex video understanding.

</details>


### [101] [GRIP-VLM: Group-Relative Importance Pruning for Efficient Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13375)
*Mingzhe Huang,Weijun Wang,Xin Ding,Liang Mi,Hao Wen,Yuanchun Li,Lichen Pang,Shansong Yang,Yunxin Liu,Ting Cao*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: GRIP-VLM提出了一种基于强化学习（GRPO）的视觉token剪枝方法，将剪枝建模为离散马尔可夫决策过程，避免了传统连续梯度松弛方法陷入局部最优的问题，实现了更高效的VLM推理加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLM处理大量视觉token导致巨大计算开销，现有训练感知剪枝方法依赖连续梯度松弛，但视觉token剪枝本质是离散非凸组合优化问题，连续近似易陷入次优局部最小值，尤其是在高压缩比下。

Method: 将token剪枝建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），采用Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）范式，结合监督式预热来直接探索离散选择空间；设计预算感知评分器，轻量级agent动态评估每个token的重要性，无需重训练即可适应任意压缩比。

Result: 在多种多模态基准测试中，GRIP-VLM一致优于启发式和监督学习方法，实现了更优的帕累托前沿，在相同精度下推理速度提升高达15%。

Conclusion: 基于强化学习的离散剪枝方法比连续梯度松弛方法更适合视觉token剪枝任务，GRPO结合监督预热能有效探索离散空间，实现高效的VLM推理加速。

Abstract: In Vision-Language Models (VLMs), processing a massive number of visual tokens incurs prohibitive computational overhead. While recent training-aware pruning methods attempt to selectively discard redundant tokens, they largely rely on continuous-gradient relaxations. However, visual token pruning is inherently a discrete, non-convex combinatorial problem; consequently, these continuous approximations frequently trap the optimization in sub-optimal local minima, especially under aggressive compression budgets. To overcome this fundamental bottleneck, we propose GRIP-VLM, a Group-Relative Importance Pruning framework driven by Reinforcement Learning. Rather than relying on smooth-gradient assumptions, GRIP-VLM formulates pruning as a Markov Decision Process, employing a Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) paradigm anchored by supervised warm-up to directly explore the discrete selection space. Integrated with a budget-aware scorer, our lightweight agent dynamically evaluates per-token importance and adapts to arbitrary compression ratios without retraining. Extensive experiments across diverse multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that GRIP-VLM consistently outperforms heuristic and supervised-learning baselines, achieving a superior Pareto frontier and delivering up to a 15\% inference speedup at equal accuracy.

</details>


### [102] [MindVLA-U1: VLA Beats VA with Unified Streaming Architecture for Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12624)
*Yuzhou Huang,Benjin Zhu,Hengtong Lu,Victor Shea-Jay Huang,Haiming Zhang,Wei Chen,Jifeng Dai,Yan Xie,Hongsheng Li*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: MindVLA-U1提出了首个统一的流式VLA架构，通过共享表示同时生成语言token和连续动作轨迹，实现端到端自动驾驶。在WOD-E2E基准上首次超越人类驾驶员，达到8.20 RFS，同时保持16 FPS推理速度和自然语言接口。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型在规划质量上落后于VA模型，根本原因在于VLA被构建为孤立子任务改进的拼接，缺乏统一的组合能力。作者希望设计一种统一的流式架构，让语义推理、时序上下文和连续控制能够自然融合。

Method: 1) 统一VLM骨干网络：单次前向传播同时生成自回归语言token和流匹配连续动作轨迹；2) 流式帧级视频处理 + 学习记忆通道传递时序上下文；3) 基于Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT)的快速/慢速执行机制；4) 语言预测的驾驶意图通过分类器无引导(CFG)控制动作扩散生成。

Result: WOD-E2E基准上首次超越人类驾驶员(8.20 RFS vs 8.13 GT RFS)，仅需2步扩散；SOTA规划ADE大幅领先现有VA/VLA方法；推理速度16 FPS接近VA方法（RAP-DINO的18 FPS）。

Conclusion: 统一的VLA架构能够同时保留语言接口和连续动作控制，且不牺牲规划质量和推理效率，证明了"语言到动作"的可测量路径的有效性。

Abstract: Autonomous driving has progressed from modular pipelines toward end-to-end unification, and Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are a natural extension of this journey beyond Vision-to-Action (VA). In practice, driving VLAs have often trailed VA on planning quality, suggesting that the difficulty is not simply model scale but the interface through which semantic reasoning, temporal context, and continuous control are combined. We argue that this gap reflects how VLA has been built -- as isolated subtask improvements that fail to compose into coherent driving capabilities -- rather than what VLA is. We present MindVLA-U1, the first unified streaming VLA architecture for autonomous driving. A unified VLM backbone produces autoregressive language tokens and flow-matching continuous action trajectories in a single forward pass over one shared representation, preserving the natural output form of each modality. A streaming design processes the driving video framewise rather than as fixed video-action chunks, while a learned memory channel carries temporal context across frames so planned trajectories evolve smoothly without redundant multi-frame VLM modeling. The unified architecture admits fast/slow execution on dense/sparse Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT) backbones via flexible self-attention context management, and exposes a measurable language-to-action route: a language-predicted driving intent steers action diffusion through classifier-free guidance (CFG), turning language-side intent into a control signal for continuous trajectory generation. On the long-tail WOD-E2E benchmark, MindVLA-U1 surpasses experienced human drivers for the first time (8.20 RFS vs. 8.13 GT RFS) with 2 diffusion steps, achieves state-of-the-art planning ADEs over prior VA/VLA methods by large margins, and matches VA-class throughput (16 FPS vs. RAP-DINO's 18 FPS) while preserving natural-language interfaces.

</details>


### [103] [RotVLA: Rotational Latent Action for Vision-Language-Action Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13403)
*Qiwei Li,Xicheng Gong,Xinghang Li,Peiyan Li,Quanyun Zhou,Hangjun Ye,Jiahuan Zhou,Yadong Mu*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 提出RotVLA，一种基于连续旋转潜动作空间（SO(n)）的视觉-语言-动作模型，通过流匹配动作头和三元组帧学习框架，在跨本体机器人数据上预训练，实现高效的下游操控任务，在LIBERO等基准上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的潜在动作模型（LAM）依赖离散量化编码-解码管道，存在帧重建琐碎化、表示能力有限、缺乏物理意义结构等问题，无法有效捕捉动作的连续性和几何结构。

Method: 1) 将潜动作建模为SO(n)群上的连续旋转表示，保证连续性、组合性和结构几何对齐；2) 提出三元组帧学习框架强制有意义的时序动态并防止退化；3) 采用VLM骨干+流匹配动作头，在跨本体机器人数据和人类视频上预训练；4) 流匹配头扩展为统一动作专家，潜动作作为高层规划器指导动作生成。

Result: 仅1.7B参数和1700+小时预训练数据，LIBERO上98.2%，RoboTwin2.0上89.6%/88.5%（干净/随机），真实世界操控任务持续优于现有VLA模型。

Conclusion: 连续旋转潜动作表示比离散量化更有效，流匹配框架结合潜规划器机制能显著提升VLA模型在跨本体、多任务场景下的性能。

Abstract: Latent Action Models (LAMs) have emerged as an effective paradigm for handling heterogeneous datasets during Vision-Language-Action (VLA) model pretraining, offering a unified action space across embodiments. However, existing LAMs often rely on discrete quantization encode and decode pipelines, which can lead to trivial frame reconstruction behavior, limited representational capacity, and a lack of physically meaningful structure. We introduce RotVLA, a VLA framework built on a continuous rotational latent action representation. Latent actions are modeled as elements of SO(n), providing continuity, compositionality, and structured geometry aligned with real-world action dynamics. A triplet frame learning framework further enforces meaningful temporal dynamics while avoiding degeneration. RotVLA consists of a VLM backbone and a flow-matching action head, pretrained on large-scale cross-embodiment robotic datasets and human videos with latent-action supervision. For downstream robot control, the flow-matching head is extended into a unified action expert that jointly denoises latent and robot actions. Here, latent actions serve as a latent planner, providing high-level guidance that conditions action generation. With only 1.7B parameters and 1700+ hours of pretraining data, RotVLA achieves 98.2% on LIBERO and 89.6% / 88.5% on RoboTwin2.0 under clean and randomized settings, respectively. It also demonstrates strong real-world performance on manipulation tasks, consistently outperforming existing VLA models.

</details>


### [104] [CRAFT: Clinical Reward-Aligned Finetuning for Medical Image Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12650)
*Yunsung Chung,Alex El Darzi,Carlo El Khoury,Han Feng,Nassir Marrouche,Jihun Hamm*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 72.0

TL;DR: 本文提出临床对齐分数（CAS）和基于奖励的微调框架CRAFT，用于将扩散模型适配到医学影像生成，有效减少幻觉式合成，提升临床相关对齐性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散模型在医学影像适配中面临标注数据有限导致的幻觉和不真实生成问题，且传统评估指标（如FID）无法衡量生成图像与病理标准的对齐程度。

Method: 提出CAS作为临床对齐代理指标，从四个互补维度评估生成图像；在此基础上提出CRAFT框架，通过多模态大模型和视觉语言模型进行标签条件提示增强、临床检查表约束和可微奖励优化。

Result: CRAFT在四种模态上显著提升CAS和下游分类性能，将低对齐尾部（低于真实图像阈值）降低5.5-34.7个百分点，平均相对降低20.4%，并通过医生偏好研究等多维度验证。

Conclusion: CRAFT框架有效减少了医学图像生成中的幻觉现象，提升了临床对齐性，为扩散模型在医学领域的可靠应用提供了新范式。

Abstract: Foundation diffusion models can generate photorealistic natural images, but adapting them to medical imaging remains challenging. In medical adaptation, limited labeled data can exacerbate hallucination-like and clinically implausible synthesis, while existing metrics such as FID or Inception Score do not quantify per-image alignment with pathology-relevant criteria. We introduce the Clinical Alignment Score (CAS), a foundation-model-based proxy for clinical alignment that evaluates generated images along four complementary dimensions beyond visual fidelity. Building on CAS, we propose Clinical Reward-Aligned Finetuning (CRAFT), a reward-based adaptation framework that transfers medical knowledge from multimodal large language models and vision-language models through label-conditioned prompt enrichment, clinical checklists, and differentiable reward optimization. Across four diverse modalities, CRAFT improves CAS and downstream classification performance over strong adaptation baselines. Beyond average CAS gains, CRAFT reduces the empirical low-alignment tail below a real-image reference threshold by 5.5-34.7% points relative to the strongest baseline, corresponding to a 20.4% average relative reduction across datasets. These results indicate fewer hallucination-like generations under CAS, and are corroborated by out-of-family evaluator evaluation, structured checklist auditing, memorization analysis, and a blinded physician preference study on CheXpert.

</details>


### [105] [Does Engram Do Memory Retrieval in Autoregressive Image Generation?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13179)
*Jinghao Wang,Qiyuan He,Chunbin Gu,Pheng-Ann Heng*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 72.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了Engram模块（一种哈希键控的O(1)关联记忆模块）从LLM迁移到自回归图像生成任务的效果。作者发现，虽然Engram模块能节省骨干网络FLOPs，但并未提升生成质量（FID更差）。通过一系列消融实验（门控钳位、捐赠探针、冻结随机表等），证明Engram在图像生成中实际上并非作为内容寻址检索器，而是作为一个门控侧通路（gated architectural side-pathway），其收益主要来自通路本身而非学习到的记忆表。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究Engram模块（在LLM预训练中有效的哈希键关联记忆）迁移到自回归图像生成任务时，其增益是否源于相同的"内容寻址快捷方式"机制，还是来自不同的机制。

Method: 将Engram模块适配到视觉任务（2D空间n-gram哈希、门控融合、KV缓存兼容增量推理），注入类条件AR生成器（ImageNet 256x256），并通过门控钳位实验、捐赠探针实验、冻结随机表实验等多种消融分析来探测其工作机制。

Result: 1) 不同骨干/记忆预算比下，所有Engram增强变体的FID均差于纯AR基线；2) 禁用Engram通路导致灾难性退化，但极小常数门控（g=0.10）即可匹配或超越学习到的门控；3) 哈希输入替换为匹配/对抗/随机同类别样本后输出分布无显著差异；4) 记忆表冻结为随机噪声仅导致ΔFID=0.10且提升了Inception Score。

Conclusion: Engram在AR图像生成中并非内容寻址检索器，而是作为一个哈希键控的残差侧通路，其收益主要来自通路结构本身，学习到的记忆表仅贡献微小的分布细化。

Abstract: The Engram module -- a hash-keyed, O(1) associative memory injected into Transformer layers -- was recently shown to improve large language model pretraining, with the appealing interpretation that it provides a content-addressed shortcut to recurring local token patterns. We ask whether this interpretation transfers to autoregressive (AR) image generation, or whether the observed gains, if any, come from a different mechanism. We adapt the Engram module to vision with 2D spatial $n$-gram hashing, gated fusion, and KV-cache-compatible incremental inference, and inject it into a class-conditional AR generator trained on ImageNet 256x256. Across a sweep of backbone-to-memory budget ratios $ρ{\in}[0.17, 0.90]$, every Engram-augmented variant trails the pure AR baseline in FID, indicating that the module saves backbone FLOPs but does not, by itself, improve sample quality. We then probe how the module is used. A gate-clamp sweep shows that disabling the Engram pathway entirely is catastrophic, yet a tiny constant gate (g=0.10) matches or beats the learned gate -- inconsistent with a heavily content-addressed recall mechanism. A donor-probe experiment shows that swapping the hash inputs for matched, adversarial, or random same-class exemplars produces statistically indistinguishable next-token distributions, while collapsing or randomising the table degrades them by two to three orders of magnitude. Finally, training a model from scratch with the entire memory table frozen to $\mathcal{N}(0, 1)$ noise costs only $Δ\text{FID}{=}0.10$ and actually raises Inception Score. Together, these findings indicate that the Engram in AR image generation behaves not as a content-addressed retriever but as a gated architectural side-pathway: a hash-keyed residual stream whose benefit is dominated by the pathway itself, with the learned table contributing only a small distributional refinement.

</details>


### [106] [MedCore: Boundary-Preserving Medical Core Pruning for MedSAM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13688)
*Cenwei Zhang,Suncheng Xiang,Lei You*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 72.0

TL;DR: MedCore是一种针对医学分割基础模型MedSAM的结构化剪枝框架，通过保留适应过程中重要结构和边界高杠杆结构，在参数量减少60%、FLOPs减少58.4%的情况下仍保持高Dice和强边界质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医学分割基础模型（如SAM、MedSAM）的图像编码器过大，不适合临床部署；且医学场景中对模型压缩有特殊挑战——即使Dice指标高，边界保真度可能严重下降，现有压缩方法未能有效解决这一问题。

Method: 提出MedCore结构化剪枝框架：1) 使用双干预分数（dual-intervention score）识别SAM向MedSAM适应过程中变得重要的结构；2) 使用边界感知Fisher估计（boundary-aware Fisher）识别对边界有高杠杆作用的结构；3) 提出边界杠杆原理（boundary leverage principle），解释压缩导致边界位移的机制。

Result: 在息肉分割基准上：参数量减少60.0%、FLOPs减少58.4%，恢复微调后Dice达0.9549，Boundary F1达0.6388，HD95达5.14；最高可实现86.6%参数压缩和90.4G FLOPs下仍保持良好边界质量。分析发现MedSAM处于"头部脆弱边界"状态——头部剪枝的边界杠杆是MLP剪枝的2.887倍。

Conclusion: MedCore能有效压缩医学分割基础模型，同时保持边界质量；边界杠杆原理为理解压缩-边界退化关系提供了理论基础；MedSAM的头部结构对边界质量尤为关键。

Abstract: Medical segmentation foundation models such as SAM and MedSAM provide strong prompt-driven segmentation, but their image encoders are still too large for many clinical settings. Compression is also risky in medicine because a model can keep high Dice while losing boundary fidelity. We propose MedCore, a structured pruning framework for MedSAM. The main idea is to preserve two kinds of structures: structures that became important during SAM-to-MedSAM adaptation, and structures that have high boundary leverage. We identify the first type by a dual-intervention score that compares zeroing a group with resetting it to its original SAM weight. We identify the second type by boundary-aware Fisher estimation. We also introduce a boundary leverage principle, which shows that compression-induced boundary displacement is controlled by logit perturbation on the boundary divided by the logit spatial gradient. This principle explains why boundary metrics can degrade even when Dice remains high. On polyp segmentation benchmarks, MedCore reduces parameters by 60.0% and FLOPs by 58.4% while achieving Dice 0.9549, Boundary F1 0.6388, and HD95 5.14 after recovery fine-tuning. It also reaches 86.6% parameter reduction and 90.4G FLOPs with strong boundary quality. Our analysis further shows that MedSAM lies in a head-fragile boundary regime: head-pruning steps have 2.887 times larger 95th-percentile boundary leverage than MLP-pruning steps, and this logit-level effect is consistent with BF1 and HD95 degradation. Our code is available at https://github.com/cenweizhang/MedCore.

</details>
