### [107] [Pyramid Forcing: Head-Aware Pyramid KV Cache Policy for High-Quality Long Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13111)
*Jiayu Chen,Junbei Tang,Wenbiao Zhao,Maoliang Li,Jiayi Luo,Zihao Zheng,Jiawei Yang,Guojie Luo,Xiang Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Pyramid Forcing，一种基于多头注意力类型识别的金字塔式KVCache框架，通过区分Anchor、Wave、Veil三类注意力头并为其分配不同的缓存策略，有效缓解自回归视频生成中的长期退化问题，在VBench-Long上显著提升长视频生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自回归视频生成模型存在长期退化问题，主要由累积误差导致；现有的KVCache策略对所有注意力头采用统一的历史帧保留策略，忽略了不同注意力头对历史依赖的异质性需求。

Method: 1) 通过分析注意力模式，将注意力头分为三类：Anchor Head（需广泛长期上下文）、Wave Head（周期性时间依赖）、Veil Head（关注初始帧和相邻帧）；2) 提出Pyramid Forcing框架，离线识别头类型，为每类头分配行为特定的缓存策略，并通过高效的ragged-cache attention支持异构缓存长度。

Result: 在Self Forcing和Causal Forcing两种范式下均一致提升长视频生成质量。60秒Self Forcing在VBench-Long上的得分从77.87提升至81.21，在运动动态、视觉保真度和语义一致性方面均有改善。

Conclusion: 通过识别注意力头的异质性并采用头感知的金字塔式缓存策略，可以显著改善自回归视频生成的长时生成质量，为长视频生成中的KVCache管理提供了新思路。

Abstract: Autoregressive video generation enables streaming and open-ended long video synthesis, but still suffers from long-term degradation caused by accumulated errors. Existing KVCache strategies usually apply unified historical-frame retention, implicitly assuming homogeneous historical dependencies across attention heads. We revisit historical-frame attention and reveal three distinct head types: Anchor Heads require broad long-range context, Wave Heads exhibit periodic temporal dependencies, and Veil Heads focus on initial and adjacent frames. Based on this finding, we propose Pyramid Forcing, a head-aware pyramidal KVCache framework that identifies head types offline, assigns behavior-specific cache policies, and supports heterogeneous cache lengths via efficient ragged-cache attention. Experiments on Self Forcing and Causal Forcing show that Pyramid Forcing consistently improves long-horizon generation quality on VBench-Long, increasing the 60-second Self Forcing score from 77.87 to 81.21 while enhancing motion dynamics, visual fidelity, and semantic consistency. Project: https://if-lab-pku.github.io/Pyramid-Forcing/.

</details>


### [108] [Test-time Sparsity for Extreme Fast Action Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13316)
*Kangye Ji,Yuan Meng,Jianbo Zhou,Ye Li,Chen Tang,Zhi Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 本文提出测试时稀疏性（Test-time Sparsity）方法，通过动态剪枝残差计算来加速动作扩散模型，设计了并行化推理流水线和全方位特征重用策略，在保持无损性能的同时实现92%的FLOPs减少和5倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动作扩散模型因迭代去噪导致计算成本高昂，现有缓存特征加速方法难以适应开放环境中策略动态变化（多样感知和多轮 rollout 迭代）。作者提出测试时稀疏性范式，旨在动态预测可剪枝的残差计算以加速模型前向传播。

Method: 1) 高并行化推理流水线：设计轻量级剪枝器共享扩散Transformer编码器；将所有去噪时间步并行处理，解耦编码和剪枝与自回归去噪循环；通过异步机制重叠剪枝器与解码器前向推理。2) 全方位特征重用策略：从当前前向、先前去噪时间步和早期 rollout 迭代中选择性重用缓存特征，实现95%稀疏度。3) 通过采样少量动作轨迹逐步监督稀疏化扩散过程，学习 rollout 级别重用策略。

Result: FLOPs减少92%，动作生成加速5倍，推理频率达47.5 Hz，实现无损性能。

Conclusion: 测试时稀疏性有效克服了动态环境下的计算瓶颈，为加速动作扩散模型提供了实用方案，代码已开源。

Abstract: Action diffusion excels at high-fidelity action generation but incurs heavy computational costs owing to its iterative denoising nature. Despite current technologies showing promise in accelerating diffusion transformers by reusing the cached features, they struggle to adapt to policy dynamics arising from diverse perceptions and multi-round rollout iterations in open environments. We propose test-time sparsity to tackle this challenge, which aims to accelerate action diffusion by dynamically predicting prunable residual computations for each model forward at test time. However, two bottlenecks remain in this paradigm: 1) repetitive conditional encoding and pruning offset most potential speed gains, and 2) the features cached from previous denoising timesteps cannot constrain large pruning errors under aggressive sparsity. To address the first bottleneck, we design a highly parallelized inference pipeline that minimizes the non-decoder delay to milliseconds. Specifically, we first design a lightweight pruner that shares the encoder with the diffusion transformer. Then, we decouple the encoding and pruning from the autoregressive denoising loop by processing all denoising timesteps in parallel, and overlap the pruner with the decoder forward inference through asynchronism. To overcome the second bottleneck, we introduce an omnidirectional reusing strategy, which achieves 95% sparsity by selectively reusing features cached from the current forward, previous denoising timesteps, and earlier rollout iterations. To learn the rollout-level reusing strategies, we sample a few action trajectories to supervise the sparsified diffusion step by step. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method reduces FLOPs by 92% and accelerates action generation by 5x, achieving lossless performance with an inference frequency of 47.5 Hz. Our code is available at https://github.com/ky-ji/Test-time-Sparsity.

</details>


### [109] [Sparse Code Uplifting for Efficient 3D Language Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13600)
*Lovre Antonio Budimir,Yushi Guan,Steve Ryhner,Sven Lončarić,Nandita Vijaykumar*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 提出SCOUP方法，通过将语言表征学习与3D高斯优化解耦，利用稀疏码本和2D到3D的权重聚合，实现快速、高效、低存储的开放词汇3D场景理解，训练速度提升400倍，内存效率提升3倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D语言高斯溅射方法在高效存储、快速渲染和快速3D语义重建三者之间难以兼顾：直接存储稠密特征导致高存储和慢渲染，学习紧凑表示则需昂贵的逐场景优化。目标是同时实现三者。

Method: 将语言表征学习与3D高斯优化解耦：先在2D图像区域学习基于稀疏码本的表征（每个区域用稀疏码本系数表示），再通过加权稀疏聚合将系数提升到3D高斯，利用高斯-像素关联跨视图聚合，最后用Top-K过滤提取主导多视图系数。

Result: 训练速度提升最高400倍，训练内存效率提升3倍，在多个基准上达到或超越现有方法的开放词汇查询准确率。

Conclusion: 通过解耦设计和稀疏码本表示，SCOUP成功同时实现了快速3D语义重建、高效存储和快速渲染，证明了将语言表征学习从3D优化中分离的有效性。

Abstract: 3D Language Gaussian Splatting (3DLGS) augments 3D Gaussian Splatting with language-aligned visual features for open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding. A core challenge is efficiently associating high-dimensional vision-language embeddings with millions of 3D Gaussians while preserving efficient feature rendering for text-based querying. Existing methods either store dense features directly on Gaussians, causing high storage costs and slow rendering, or learn compact representations through expensive per-scene optimization with repeated feature rasterization. No existing method simultaneously achieves fast 3D semantic reconstruction, efficient storage, and fast rendering. We propose SCOUP (Sparse COde UPlifting), which addresses all three by decoupling language representation learning from 3D Gaussian optimization. Rather than working directly in 3D, we learn sparse codebook-based representations entirely using features associated with 2D image regions, associating each region with a sparse set of codebook coefficients. We then uplift these coefficients to 3D Gaussians with our weighted sparse aggregation using Gaussian-to-pixel associations, where each Gaussian accumulates coefficients over codebook atoms across views. Top-$K$ filtering then extracts the most dominant multi-view coefficients per Gaussian, enabling efficient storage and fast rendering. Our method achieves up to $400\times$ training speedup while being $3\times$ more memory efficient during training compared to the state-of-the-art in rendering speed. Across multiple benchmarks, SCOUP matches or outperforms existing methods in open-vocabulary querying accuracy.

</details>


### [110] [EvoGround: Self-Evolving Video Agents for Video Temporal Grounding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13803)
*Minjoon Jung,Byoung-Tak Zhang,Lorenzo Torresani*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 提出EvoGround框架，通过两个自演进智能体（提议者和求解者）构成的强化学习循环，在无需人工标注数据的情况下实现视频时序定位，性能媲美甚至超越全监督方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VTG方法依赖大规模人工标注数据集，成本高昂，因此希望探索无需人工标注的自监督方法。

Method: 构建两个耦合的自演进智能体：提议者从原始视频生成查询-片段对，求解者学习定位并反馈信号改进提议者，通过自增强强化学习循环迭代优化。

Result: 在2.5K未标注视频上训练，在多个VTG基准上匹配或超越全监督模型，且成为无标注的细粒度视频描述SOTA。

Conclusion: 自演进强化学习框架可有效从原始视频中学习时序定位能力，无需人工标注，展现出强大的泛化能力。

Abstract: Video temporal grounding (VTG) takes an untrimmed video and a natural-language query as input and localizes the temporal moment that best matches the query. Existing methods rely on large, task-specific datasets requiring costly manual annotation. We introduce EvoGround, a framework of two coupled self-evolving agents, a proposer and a solver, that learn temporal grounding from raw videos without any human-labeled data. The proposer generates query--moment pairs from raw videos, while the solver learns to ground them and feeds back signals that improve the proposer in return. Through this self-reinforcing reinforcement-learning loop, the two agents are initialized from the same backbone and mutually improve across iterations. Trained on 2.5K unlabeled videos, EvoGround matches or surpasses fully supervised models across multiple VTG benchmarks, while emerging as a state-of-the-art fine-grained video captioner without manual labels.

</details>


### [111] [Action Emergence from Streaming Intent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12622)
*Pengfei Jing,Victor Shea-Jay Huang,Hengtong Lu,Jifeng Dai,Xie Yan,Benjin Zhu*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 本文提出“行为涌现”（Action Emergence）概念，指端到端自动驾驶中通过场景推理生成物理可行、语义恰当且安全的行为。现有范式（自回归、扩散/流匹配）均有缺陷，为此提出Streaming Intent机制：通过连续思维链推导驾驶意图，并用意图指导流匹配动作头生成轨迹。在Waymo基准上取得竞争力结果，首次实现VLA模型中的意图忠实可控性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶方法无法同时满足多模态预测和意图可控性：自回归轨迹解码器将多模态未来坍缩为单一输出，扩散/流匹配虽能表达多模态但无法被推理意图引导。作者希望形式化"行为涌现"这一能力，即通过场景条件推理生成合理动作，而非检索或插值已有映射。

Method: 提出Streaming Intent机制，包含：(1) 语义流式：四步连续思维链（chain-of-thought）因果推导意图；(2) 时间流式：跨片段保持意图一致性。基于VLA模型SI实现，自回归解码思维链后输出意图token，再用意图驱动流匹配动作头的classifier-free guidance（CFG），仅需两步去噪生成轨迹。

Result: 在Waymo端到端基准上，验证集RFS 7.96，测试集RFS 7.74，达到竞争性聚合性能。更重要的是首次在端到端VLA模型中展示意图忠实可控性：固定场景下改变推理时的意图类别，能生成不同风格但一致高质量的规划方案，完全由数据驱动学习获得，无需预建轨迹库或后处理选择器。

Conclusion: Streaming Intent是通往"行为涌现"的有效途径，将推理意图与生成式轨迹规划结合，既保留多模态未来分布又实现意图可控，为端到端自动驾驶提供了新的范式方向。

Abstract: We formalize action emergence as a target capability for end-to-end autonomous driving: the ability to generate physically feasible, semantically appropriate, and safety-compliant actions in arbitrary, long-tail traffic scenes through scene-conditioned reasoning rather than retrieval or interpolation of learned scene-action mappings. We show that previous paradigms cannot deliver action emergence: autoregressive trajectory decoders collapse the inherently multimodal future into a single averaged output, while diffusion and flow-matching generators express multimodality but are not steerable by reasoned intent. We propose Streaming Intent as a concrete way to approach action emergence: a mechanism that makes driving intent (i) semantically streamed through a continuous chain-of-thought that causally derives the intent from scene understanding, and (ii) temporally streamed across clips so that intent commitments remain coherent along the driving horizon. We realize Streaming Intent in a VLA model we call SI (Streaming Intent). SI autoregressively decodes a four-step chain-of-thought and emits an intent token; the decoded intent then drives classifier-free guidance (CFG) on a flow-matching action head, requiring only two denoising steps to generate the final trajectory. On the Waymo End-to-End benchmark, SI achieves competitive aggregate performance, with an RFS score of 7.96 on the validation set and 7.74 on the test set. Beyond aggregate metrics, the model demonstrates -- to our knowledge for the first time in a fully end-to-end VLA -- intent-faithful controllability: for a fixed scene, varying the intent class at inference yields qualitatively distinct yet consistently high-quality plans, arising purely from data-driven learning without any pre-built trajectory bank or hand-coded post-hoc selector.

</details>


### [112] [Driving Intents Amplify Planning-Oriented Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12625)
*Hengtong Lu,Victor Shea-Jay Huang,Chengmin Yang,Pengfei Jing,Jifeng Dai,Yan Xie,Benjin Zhu*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 本文提出DIAL框架，通过两阶段方法解决连续动作策略中的模式坍塌问题：第一阶段用意图条件流匹配+无分类器引导扩展采样分布，第二阶段用多意图GRPO防止微调时重新坍塌，在端到端驾驶任务中首次超越人类演示水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 连续动作策略在单条演示轨迹训练下会出现模式坍塌（采样聚集在单一动作模式，无法表达语义不同的替代方案），这限制了偏好优化场景下的best-of-N性能上限，因为即使oracle选择也无法恢复采样分布中不存在的内容。

Method: 两阶段框架：1) 意图条件流匹配动作头 + 无分类器引导(CFG)，用离散意图标签展开采样分布；2) 多意图GRPO，在每个偏好组内覆盖所有意图类别，防止微调后重新坍塌到当前偏好模式。

Result: 在WOD-E2E基准上：意图CFG采样在best-of-128下达到RFS 9.14，首次超越人类演示(8.13)和此前最优RAP(8.5)；多意图GRPO提升留出集RFS从7.681到8.211，而所有单意图基线均表现更差且训练后期退化。

Conclusion: 偏好RL在基于演示训练的连续动作策略上的瓶颈不仅在于如何更新策略，更在于如何扩展并保持被优化的采样分布的多样性。

Abstract: Continuous-action policies trained on a single demonstrated trajectory per scene suffer from mode collapse: samples cluster around the demonstrated maneuver and the policy cannot represent semantically distinct alternatives. Under preference-based evaluation, this caps best-of-N performance -- even oracle selection cannot recover what the sampling distribution does not contain. We introduce DIAL, a two-stage Driving-Intent-Amplified reinforcement Learning framework for preference-aligned continuous-action driving policies. In the first stage, DIAL conditions the flow-matching action head on a discrete intent label with classifier-free guidance (CFG), which expands the sampling distribution along distinct maneuver modes and breaks single-demonstration mode collapse. In the second stage, DIAL carries this expanded distribution into preference RL through multi-intent GRPO, which spans all intent classes within every preference group and prevents fine-tuning from re-collapsing around the currently preferred mode. Instantiated for end-to-end driving with eight rule-derived intents and evaluated on WOD-E2E: competitive Vision-to-Action (VA) and Vision-Language-Action (VLA) Supervised Finetuning (SFT) baselines plateau below the human-driven demonstration at best-of-128, with the strongest prior (RAP) capping at Rater Feedback Score (RFS) 8.5 even with best-of-64; intent-CFG sampling lifts this ceiling to RFS 9.14 at best-of-128, surpassing both the prior best (RAP 8.5) and the human-driven demonstration (8.13) for the first time; and multi-intent GRPO improves held-out RFS from 7.681 to 8.211, while every single-intent baseline peaks lower and degrades by training end. These results suggest that the bottleneck of preference RL on continuous-action policies trained from demonstrations is not only how to update the policy, but to expand and preserve the sampling distribution being optimized.

</details>


### [113] [TrackCraft3R: Repurposing Video Diffusion Transformers for Dense 3D Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12587)
*Jisu Nam,Jahyeok Koo,Soowon Son,Jaewoo Jung,Honggyu An,Junhwa Hur,Seungryong Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: TrackCraft3R 是首个将视频扩散Transformer（video DiT）改造为前馈式稠密3D追踪器的方法。它通过双隐层表示和时间RoPE对齐，将video DiT的逐帧生成范式转换为参考帧锚定的追踪范式，在标准稠密3D追踪基准上达到SOTA，且速度更快、内存消耗更低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D追踪方法要么在合成数据上从头训练缺乏真实运动先验，要么微调静态3D重建模型。预训练video DiT蕴含丰富的时空先验，但传统的逐帧生成范式与参考帧锚定的稠密3D追踪存在根本性不匹配，需解决如何将前者改造为后者的核心问题。

Method: (1) 双隐层表示（dual-latent representation）：使用逐帧几何隐层和参考帧锚定的追踪隐层作为稠密查询；(2) 时间RoPE对齐（temporal RoPE alignment）：为每个追踪隐层指定目标时间戳。通过LoRA微调将video DiT的逐帧生成范式转换为参考帧锚定的追踪范式。

Result: 在稀疏和稠密3D追踪基准上达到SOTA，比最强先前方法快1.3倍、峰值内存低4.6倍，对大运动和长视频具有鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 成功证明了视频扩散Transformer可被有效改造为前馈式稠密3D追踪器，解决了生成范式与追踪范式之间的根本性不匹配问题。

Abstract: Dense 3D tracking from monocular video is fundamental to dynamic scene understanding. While recent 3D foundation models provide reliable per-frame geometry, recovering object motion in this geometry remains challenging and benefits from strong motion priors learned from real-world videos. Existing 3D trackers either follow iterative paradigms trained from scratch on synthetic data or fine-tune 3D reconstruction models learned from static multi-view images, both lacking real-world motion priors. Pre-trained video diffusion transformers (video DiTs) offer rich spatio-temporal priors from internet-scale videos, making them a promising foundation for 3D tracking. However, their frame-anchored formulation, which generates each frame's content, is fundamentally mismatched with reference-anchored dense 3D tracking, which must follow the same physical points from a reference frame across time. We present TrackCraft3R, the first method to repurpose a video DiT as a feed-forward dense 3D tracker. Given a monocular video and its frame-anchored reconstruction pointmap, TrackCraft3R predicts a reference-anchored tracking pointmap that follows every pixel of the first frame across time in a single forward pass, along with its visibility. We achieve this through two designs: (i) a dual-latent representation that uses per-frame geometry latents and reference-anchored track latents as dense queries, and (ii) temporal RoPE alignment, which specifies the target timestamp of each track latent. Together, these designs convert the per-frame generative paradigm of video DiTs into a reference-anchored tracking formulation with LoRA fine-tuning. TrackCraft3R achieves state-of-the-art performance on standard sparse and dense 3D tracking benchmarks, while running 1.3x faster and using 4.6x less peak memory than the strongest prior method. We further demonstrate robustness to large motions and long videos.

</details>


### [114] [CRePE: Curved Ray Expectation Positional Encoding for Unified-Camera-Controlled Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12938)
*Seonghyun Jin,Youngmin Kim,Sunwoo Park,Jong Chul Ye*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出Curved Ray Expectation Positional Encoding (CRePE)，一种兼容统一相机模型的深度感知位置编码方法，用于视频生成中的稳定相机控制，通过几何注意力适配器注入场景距离信息，并支持径向地图控制等外部几何控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有相机条件视频生成的位置编码要么只提供光线信号，要么局限于针孔相机模型，无法处理广角和鱼眼镜头等统一相机模型下的通用相机控制需求。

Method: 提出CRePE，将每个图像token表示为沿其源射线的深度感知位置分布；通过几何注意力适配器注入冻结视频DiTs的选择性注意力层；利用单目几何基础模型提供伪监督稳定训练；扩展支持Radial MixForcing实现外部几何控制。

Result: 在多种相机模型下，CRePE在几何感知和感知质量指标上优于RayRoPE风格的端点PE基线，在视频质量指标上保持竞争力，消融实验显示整体平均排名更高。

Conclusion: CRePE通过统一相机模型兼容的投影路径集成，实现了更稳定的相机控制，并可扩展至外部几何控制，展示了场景几何信息在视频生成中的有效性。

Abstract: Camera-conditioned video generation requires positional encoding that remains reliable under changes in camera motion, lens configuration, and scene structure. However, existing attention-level camera encodings either provide ray-only camera signals or rely on pinhole camera geometry, limiting their applicability to general camera control under the Unified Camera Model, including wide-angle and fisheye lenses. To address this limitation, we propose Curved Ray Expectation Positional Encoding (CRePE). CRePE represents each image token as a depth-aware positional distribution along its source ray, providing a Unified Camera Model-compatible positional encoding that captures the projected-path geometry induced by wide-angle and fisheye cameras. CRePE is implemented through a Geometric Attention Adapter added to frozen video DiTs, injecting token-wise scene-distance information into selected attention layers and stabilizing it with pseudo supervision from a monocular geometry foundation model. This design leads to more stable camera control and improves several geometry-aware and perceptual-quality metrics, while remaining competitive on video-quality metrics. Controlled positional-encoding ablations show a better overall average rank than a RayRoPE-style endpoint PE baseline, demonstrating the effectiveness of UCM-aware projected-path integration across diverse camera models. Furthermore, by extending the same positional-encoding pathway to external geometry control through Radial MixForcing, CRePE supports external radial-map control for scene-geometry-conditioned generation and source-video motion transfer beyond camera control.

</details>


### [115] [Reducing Bias and Variance: Generative Semantic Guidance and Bi-Layer Ensemble for Image Clustering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12961)
*Feijiang Li,Zhenxiong Li,Jieting Wang,Zizheng Jiu,Saixiong Liu,Liang Du*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出GSEC框架，利用多模态大语言模型生成语义描述作为先验知识，并结合双层集成策略（内层BatchEnsemble、外层对齐机制）进行图像聚类，在6个数据集上超越18个SOTA方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于语义描述的图像聚类方法依赖匹配技术与预定义词汇表，匹配空间有限且忽略了方差缩减，导致适应性差。

Method: 1) 使用多模态大语言模型生成语义描述并通过加权平均获得图像嵌入；2) 双层集成策略：内层通过BatchEnsemble融合跨模态信息，外层通过对齐机制整合输出。

Result: 在6个基准数据集上超越18个SOTA方法，同时有效减少了偏差和方差。

Conclusion: 生成式语义引导结合双层集成能同时降低偏差与方差，显著提升图像聚类性能。

Abstract: Image clustering aims to partition unlabeled image datasets into distinct groups. A core aspect of this task is constructing and leveraging prior knowledge to guide the clustering process. Recent approaches introduce semantic descriptions as prior information, most of which typically relying on matching-based techniques with predefined vocabularies. However, the limited matching space restricts their adaptability to downstream clustering tasks. Moreover, these methods primarily focus on reducing bias to improve performance, frequently overlooking the importance of variance reduction. To address these limitations, we propose GSEC (Image Clustering based on Generative Semantic Guidance and Bi-Layer Ensemble), a framework designed to reduce bias through generative semantic guidance and mitigate variance via ensemble learning. Our method employs Multimodal Large Language Models to generate semantic descriptions and derive image embeddings via weighted averaging. Additionally, a bi-layer ensemble strategy integrates cross-modal information through BatchEnsemble in the inner layer and aligns outputs via an alignment mechanism in the outer layer. Comparative experiments demonstrate that GSEC outperforms 18 state-of-the-art methods across six benchmark datasets, while further analysis confirms its effectiveness in simultaneously reducing both bias and variance. The code is available at https://github.com/2017LI/GSEC.git.

</details>


### [116] [PRISM: Prior Rectification and Uncertainty-Aware Structure Modeling for Diffusion-Based Text Image Super-Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13027)
*Zihang Xu,Xiaoyang Liu,Zheng Chen,Yulun Zhang,Xiaokang Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: PRISM是一种基于单步扩散的文字图像超分辨率框架，通过Flow-Matching Prior Rectification（FMPR）修正退化文本的全局先验，并利用Structure-guided Uncertainty-aware Residual Encoder（SURE）精细恢复局部笔画结构，在毫秒级推理下实现SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文字图像超分辨率方法在严重退化下存在两个未解决挑战：从低质量输入中提取的文字条件本身不可靠，且全局先验不足以确定精细的笔画边界。因此需要同时修正全局先验并细化局部结构。

Method: 提出PRISM框架，包含两个核心模块：1) FMPR：利用配对的高低质量潜在表示构建特权训练先验，通过流匹配将退化嵌入向恢复导向的先验空间迁移；2) SURE：预测不确定性感知的结构残差，选择性吸收可靠的局部边界证据，抑制模糊笔画线索。整体为单步扩散恢复流程。

Result: 在合成和真实世界基准上达到SOTA性能，且推理时间为毫秒级。

Conclusion: 通过全局先验修正与局部结构细化的显式结合，单步扩散框架有效解决了文字超分辨率中笔画拓扑保持的难题。

Abstract: Text image super-resolution (Text-SR) requires more than visually plausible detail synthesis: slight errors in stroke topology may alter character identity and break readability. Existing methods improve text fidelity with stronger recognition-based or generative priors, yet they still face two unresolved challenges under severe degradation: the text condition extracted from low-quality inputs can itself be unreliable, and a plausible global prior does not fully determine fine-grained stroke boundaries. We present PRISM, a single-step diffusion-based Text-SR framework that addresses these two challenges through Flow-Matching Prior Rectification (FMPR) and a Structure-guided Uncertainty-aware Residual Encoder (SURE). FMPR constructs a privileged training-time prior from paired low-quality/high-quality latents and learns a flow matching that transports degraded embeddings toward this restoration-oriented prior space, yielding more accurate and reliable global text guidance. SURE further predicts uncertainty-aware structural residuals to selectively absorb reliable local boundary evidence while suppressing ambiguous stroke cues. Together, these components enable explicit global prior rectification and local structure refinement within a single diffusion restoration pass. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world benchmarks show that PRISM achieves state-of-the-art performance with millisecond-level inference. Our dataset and code will be available at https://github.com/faithxuz/PRISM.

</details>


### [117] [Pareto-Guided Optimal Transport for Multi-Reward Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13155)
*Ying Ba,Tianyu Zhang,Mohan Zhou,Yalong Bai,Wenyi Mo,Guiwei Zhang,Bing Su,Ji-Rong Wen*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出Pareto Frontier-Guided Optimal Transport (PG-OT)框架，通过构造提示特定的帕累托前沿并利用最优传输将受支配样本映射到前沿，解决文本到图像生成中多奖励融合时的奖励破解问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本到图像生成的多奖励融合方法依赖加权求和，调优成本高且难以平衡冲突目标，同时优化过程极易遭遇奖励破解（reward hacking）——奖励分数上升但生成图像质量下降。亟需一种能缓解奖励破解、实现鲁棒多奖励对齐的方法。

Method: 1) 构造提示特定的帕累托前沿（Pareto Frontier）；2) 通过分布感知的最优传输（Optimal Transport）将受支配样本映射向帕累托前沿；3) 提出在线和离线两种优化策略以适应不同奖励信号特征；4) 引入联合支配率（JDR）和联合崩溃率（JCR）作为评估指标。

Result: 在JDR指标上相比强基线提升11%，人类评估中达到近80%的胜率。

Conclusion: PG-OT框架有效缓解了多奖励优化中的奖励破解问题，实现了多奖励目标的鲁棒对齐，优于现有加权求和等方法。

Abstract: Text-to-image generation models have achieved remarkable progress in preference optimization, yet achieving robust alignment across diverse reward models remains a significant challenge. Existing multi-reward fusion approaches rely on weighted summation, which is costly to tune and insufficient for balancing conflicting objectives. More critically, optimization with reward models is highly susceptible to reward hacking, where reward scores increase while the perceived quality of generated images deteriorates. We demonstrate that optimizing against a unified global target under heterogeneous reward upper bounds can induce reward hacking, a risk further exacerbated by the inherent instability of weak reward models. To mitigate this, we propose a Pareto Frontier-Guided Optimal Transport (PG-OT) framework. Our method constructs a prompt-specific Pareto frontier and maps dominated samples toward it via distribution-aware optimal transport. Furthermore, we develop both online and offline optimization strategies tailored to diverse reward signal characteristics. To provide a more rigorous assessment, we introduce the Joint Domination Rate (JDR) and Joint Collapse Rate (JCR) as principled metrics to quantify multi-reward synergy and reward hacking. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms strong baselines with an 11% gain in JDR and achieves a near 80% win rate in human evaluations.

</details>


### [118] [STAR: Semantic-Temporal Adaptive Representation Learning for Few-Shot Action Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13202)
*Hongli Liu,Yu Wang,Shengjie Zhao*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文提出STAR框架，通过语义对齐模块（TSA）和时序感知模块（STPR）解决少样本动作识别中的语义-时序错配问题，结合Mamba状态空间模型和LLM生成的长程语义描述，在多个基准上取得显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有少样本动作识别方法存在两个关键问题：(1) 静态文本提示无法捕捉稀疏分布于视频序列中的关键视觉线索，导致语义-时序错配；(2) 多尺度时序动态建模不足，短期判别性线索和长程依赖关系常被过度平滑或碎片化。

Method: 提出统一框架STAR，包含：(1) 语义对齐模块：Temporal Semantic Attention (TSA) 机制，实现帧级跨模态对齐；(2) 时序感知模块：Semantic Temporal Prototype Refiner (STPR)，集成语义引导的Mamba块、多频时序采样和双向状态空间精化；(3) 利用LLM生成时序依赖的类别描述作为长程语义引导。

Result: 在五个FSAR基准上超越SOTA，SSv2-Full和SSv2-Small上1-shot设置提升8.1%和6.7%，HMDB51上提升7.3%。

Conclusion: STAR有效桥接了语义与时序之间的鸿沟，验证了将Mamba的序列建模能力迁移到少样本动作识别的可行性。

Abstract: Few-shot action recognition (FSAR) requires models to generalize to novel action categories from only a handful of annotated samples. Despite progress with vision-language models, existing approaches still suffer from semantic-temporal misalignment, where static textual prompts fail to capture decisive visual cues that appear sparsely across sequences, and from inadequate modeling of multi-scale temporal dynamics, as short-term discriminative cues and long-range dependencies are often either oversmoothed or fragmented. To address these challenges, we propose Semantic Temporal Adaptive Representation Learning (STAR), a unified framework, consisting of a semantic-alignment component and a temporal-aware component, effectively bridging the semantic and temporal gaps and transferring the sequence modeling capability of Mamba into the FSAR. The semantic alignment module introduces a Temporal Semantic Attention (TSA) mechanism, which performs frame-level cross-modal alignment with textual cues, ensuring fine-grained semantic-temporal consistency. The temporal-aware module incorporates a Semantic Temporal Prototype Refiner (STPR) that integrates semantic-guided Mamba blocks with multi-frequency temporal sampling and bidirectional state-space refinement, yielding semantically aligned prototypes with enhanced discriminative fidelity and temporal consistency. Furthermore, temporally dependent class descriptors derived from large language models (LLMs) provide long-range semantic guidance. Extensive experiments on five FSAR benchmarks demonstrate the consistent superiority of STAR over state-of-the-art methods. For instance, STAR achieves up to 8.1% and 6.7% gains on the SSv2-Full and SSv2-Small datasets under the 1-shot setting, and 7.3% on HMDB51, validating its effectiveness under limited supervision. The code is available at https://github.com/HongliLiu1/STAR-main.

</details>


### [119] [On Hallucinations in Inverse Problems: Fundamental Limits and Provable Assessment Methods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13146)
*David Iagaru,Nina M. Gottschling,Anders C. Hansen,Josselin Garnier*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个理论框架，证明AI在成像逆问题中的幻觉不仅源于模型，更源于问题本身的病态性质，并给出可计算的幻觉边界及估计算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度神经网络在成像逆问题中会产生看似真实但错误的细节（幻觉），尤其在缺乏真实数据时可靠性不足。现有研究多将幻觉归因于模型缺陷，本文旨在从理论层面揭示其本质根源。

Method: 推导了幻觉产生的必要条件和充分条件，以及仅依赖前向模型的可计算幻觉幅度上界；提出两种算法：(1)估计任意重构模型对给定输入的最小可达幻觉幅度；(2)评估特定模型重构细节的忠实度。

Result: 在三个成像任务上的实验表明，该方法广泛适用（包括现代生成模型），能有效地量化和评估AI幻觉。

Conclusion: AI幻觉是逆问题病态性的固有产物，本文提供了一套理论驱动的量化评估框架，有助于提升AI在成像任务中的可信度。

Abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) has transformed imaging inverse problems, from medical diagnostics to Earth observation. Yet deep neural networks can produce hallucinations, realistic-looking but incorrect details, undermining their reliability, especially when ground truth data is unavailable. We develop a theoretical framework showing that such hallucinations are not merely artifacts of particular models, but can arise from the ill-posed nature of the inverse problem itself. We derive necessary and sufficient conditions for hallucinations, together with computable bounds on their magnitude that depend only on the forward model. Building on this theory, we introduce algorithms to: (1) estimate the minimum hallucination magnitude achievable by any reconstruction model for a given input; (2) assess the faithfulness of reconstructed details by a given reconstruction model. Experiments across three imaging tasks demonstrate that our approach applies broadly, including to modern generative models, and provides a principled way to quantify and evaluate AI hallucinations.

</details>


### [120] [SSDA: Bridging Spectral and Structural Gaps via Dual Adaptation for Vision-Based Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12550)
*Mingrui Zhang,Hanchen Yang,Wengen Li,Xudong Jiang,Yichao Zhang,Jihong Guan,Shuigeng Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: 本文提出SSDA双分支网络，通过频谱幅度对齐和结构引导的低秩适应，弥合时间序列图像与自然图像之间的频谱和结构差距，从而充分释放大规模视觉模型（LVM）在时间序列预测中的潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法直接将时间序列渲染为图像并利用预训练LVM进行预测，但忽略了渲染图像与自然图像之间的频谱差距（功率谱更浅）和结构差距（2D重塑破坏时间连续性、引入虚假空间邻接），这限制了LVM在时间序列任务中的表现。

Method: 提出SSDA双分支网络：(1) 数据级：频谱幅度对齐器(SMA)通过2D FFT增强渲染图像的幅度谱以匹配自然图像统计，同时保留相位信息；(2) 模型级：结构引导低秩适应(SG-LoRA)向patch嵌入注入位置感知的时间编码，并通过低秩更新适配注意力机制；两个分支自适应融合产生最终预测。

Result: 在7个真实世界基准上，SSDA在full-shot和few-shot设置下均持续优于强大的LVM和LLM基线方法。

Conclusion: 通过显式弥合频谱和结构两个关键差距，可以更有效地将LVM的知识迁移到时间序列预测任务中，SSDA的设计为此提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Large vision models (LVMs) have recently proven to be surprisingly effective time series forecasters, simply by rendering temporal data as images. This success, how ever, rests on a largely unexamined premise: the rendered time series images are sufficiently close to natural images for knowledge in pre-trained models to transfer effectively. We argue that two gaps still remain, i.e., spectral and structural gaps, fundamentally limiting the potential of LVMs for time series forecasting. Spectrally, we systematically reveal that rendered time series images exhibit a markedly shallower power spectrum than the natural images LVMs are pre-trained to recognize. Structurally, reshaping 1D temporal sequences into 2D grids fabricates spurious spatial adjacencies while severing genuine temporal continuities, misleading the spatial inductive biases of pre-trained LVMs. To bridge these gaps, we propose SSDA, a dual-branch network that spectrally and structurally adapts to unlock the full potential of LVMs for time series forecasting. At the data level, a Spectral Magnitude Aligner (SMA) applies 2D FFT to selectively enhance the magnitude spectrum toward natural-image statistics while preserving phase. At the model level, a Structural-Guided Low-Rank Adaptation (SG-LoRA) injects position-aware temporal encodings into patch embeddings and adapts at tention via low-rank updates. The two branches are further adaptively fused to produce the final forecast. Extensive experiments on seven real-world benchmarks demonstrate that SSDA consistently outperforms strong LVM- and LLM-based baselines under both full-shot and few-shot settings. Code is publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SSDA-8C5B.

</details>


### [121] [Inline Critic Steers Image Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12724)
*Weitai Kang,Xiaohang Zhan,Yizhou Wang,Mang Tik Chiu,Jason Kuen,Kangning Liu,Yan Yan*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Inline Critic，一种可在前向传播过程中实时批评和引导冻结图像编辑模型的可学习标记，通过三阶段训练实现SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像编辑的精细化方法在生成完成后或去噪步骤结束后才进行修正，信号滞后。作者探究是否能在一次前向传播过程中就进行实时修正。

Method: 1）通过探针实验发现错误模式在早期层就已形成（与最终层误差的秩相关ρ=0.83）；2）提出Inline Critic，一个可学习token，在中间层批评模型预测并通过调整隐藏状态引导生成；3）三阶段训练策略：从学习批评到引导生成逐步稳定训练。

Result: GEdit-Bench 7.89（SOTA），RISEBench上相比同骨干网络提升+9.4，KRIS-Bench 81.92（超过GPT-4o，最强开源结果）。

Conclusion: Inline Critic能有效在单次前向传播过程中实时修正模型生成，且分析表明批评token确实影响后续层的注意力与预测更新。

Abstract: Instruction-based image editing exhibits heterogeneous difficulty not only across cases but also across regions of an image, motivating refinement approaches that allocate correction to where the model struggles. Existing refinement signals arrive late, after a fully generated image or a completed denoising step. We ask whether such a signal can act within an ongoing forward pass. To investigate this, we probe a frozen image-editing model and find that although generation capability emerges only in the last few layers, the error pattern is already set in early layers (rank correlation \r{ho} = 0.83 with the final-layer error map). Based on this, we introduce Inline Critic, a learnable token that critiques a frozen model's predictions at its intermediate layers and steers its hidden states to refine generation during the forward pass. A three-stage recipe is proposed to stabilize the training from learning how to critique to steering generation. As a result, we achieve state of the art on GEdit-Bench (7.89), a +9.4 gain on RISEBench over the same backbone, and the strongest open-source result on KRIS-Bench (81.92, surpassing GPT-4o). We further provide analyses showing that the critic genuinely shapes the model's attention and prediction updates at subsequent layers.

</details>


### [122] [Anatomy-Slot: Unsupervised Anatomical Factorization for Homologous Bilateral Reasoning in Retinal Diagnosis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12929)
*Yingzhe Ma,Xiao Yang,Yuguo Yin,Zheyu Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: 提出Anatomy-Slot方法，通过无监督解剖瓶颈将双目光学图像的对侧结构对齐，显著提升视网膜诊断性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视网膜诊断本质上依赖双侧对比（如视盘不对称性），但现有深度学习模型大多基于单目表征，忽略了双目的结构对应关系。

Method: 通过将图像块token分解为slots，并利用双向交叉注意力机制将双眼的slots对齐，构建无监督的解剖瓶颈。

Result: 在ODIR-5K数据集上，相比ViT-L基线AUC提升4.2%（95%置信区间，Wilcoxon检验p=0.002），并在REFUGE上验证了视盘定位能力。

Conclusion: 显式建模双目结构对应关系能有效提升视网膜诊断性能，且模型具有一定抗噪声鲁棒性。

Abstract: Retinal diagnosis is inherently bilateral: clinicians compare homologous structures across eyes (e.g., optic disc asymmetry), yet most deep models operate on monocular representations. We investigate whether explicit structural correspondence improves diagnosis, and propose Anatomy-Slot to operationalize this hypothesis. Anatomy-Slot introduces an unsupervised anatomical bottleneck by decomposing patch tokens into slots and aligning slots across eyes via bidirectional cross-attention. On ODIR-5K with $n=10$ seeds, the method improves AUC by 4.2% over a matched ViT-L baseline (95% CIs; Wilcoxon signed-rank test, $W=0$, $p=0.002$). Pairing disruption and stress testing under Gaussian noise provide controlled tests of correspondence dependence and robustness under corruption. We further report quantitative optic disc grounding on REFUGE and cross-attention localization analysis.

</details>


### [123] [Asymmetric Flow Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12964)
*Hansheng Chen,Jan Ackermann,Minseo Kim,Gordon Wetzstein,Leonidas Guibas*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: 提出非对称流建模（AsymFlow），通过秩非对称速度参数化，将噪声预测限制在低秩子空间，同时保持数据预测全维，从而在高维空间中实现高效流生成，在ImageNet 256×256上达到1.57 FID，并首次实现将预训练潜在流模型微调为像素空间模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维空间中的流生成面临速度预测需要建模高维噪声的困难，即使数据具有强低秩结构，传统方法仍需预测全维噪声，计算效率低且性能受限。

Method: 提出秩非对称速度参数化：将噪声预测限制在低秩子空间，数据预测保持全维；通过分析方式从非对称预测中恢复全维速度，不改变网络架构或训练/采样流程。

Result: 在ImageNet 256×256上达到1.57 FID，优于DiT/JiT类像素扩散模型；将FLUX.2 klein 9B微调为像素空间模型，在HPSv3、DPG-Bench、GenEval上超越原潜在基座模型，显著提升视觉真实感。

Conclusion: AsymFlow通过在流模型中利用数据的低秩结构实现更高效的生成，并提供了从潜在空间到像素空间模型微调的有效路径，证明了像素空间生成仍具巨大潜力。

Abstract: Flow-based generation in high-dimensional spaces is difficult because velocity prediction requires modeling high-dimensional noise, even when data has strong low-rank structure. We present Asymmetric Flow Modeling (AsymFlow), a rank-asymmetric velocity parameterization that restricts noise prediction to a low-rank subspace while keeping data prediction full-dimensional. From this asymmetric prediction, AsymFlow analytically recovers the full-dimensional velocity without changing the network architecture or training/sampling procedures. On ImageNet 256$\times$256, AsymFlow achieves a leading 1.57 FID, outperforming prior DiT/JiT-like pixel diffusion models by a large margin. AsymFlow also provides the first-ever route for finetuning pretrained latent flow models into pixel-space models: aligning the low-rank pixel subspace to the latent space gives a seamless initialization that preserves the latent model's high-level semantics and structure, so finetuning mainly improves low-level mismatches rather than relearning pixel generation. We show that the pixel AsymFlow model finetuned from FLUX.2 klein 9B establishes a new state of the art for pixel-space text-to-image generation, beating its latent base on HPSv3, DPG-Bench, and GenEval while qualitatively showing substantially improved visual realism.

</details>


### [124] [Amortized Guidance for Image Inpainting with Pretrained Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13010)
*Yilie Huang,Xun Yu Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Amortized Inpainting with Diffusion (AID)方法，冻结预训练扩散模型主干，训练一个小型可复用引导模块，在不进行逐实例优化的情况下实现图像修复，并在多个数据集上取得更好的质量-速度权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散模型图像修复方法要么训练专用模型（开销大），要么在部署时为每个掩码图像单独适配预训练模型（效率低）。作者希望找到一个折中方案：冻结预训练扩散模型，通过学习可复用的引导模块，在保持质量的同时提升效率。

Method: 将图像修复建模为带监督终端目标的确定性引导问题。为解决高维可学习性问题，推导出辅助高斯公式，证明求解该随机化问题可恢复最优确定性引导场。基于此设计了一个连续时间actor-critic算法，以完全数据驱动的方式学习引导模块。

Result: 在AFHQv2、FFHQ（像素EDM管道）和ImageNet（潜在EDM2管道）上，AID在多种掩码类型下均优于强基线方法，且可训练参数量增加不到1%。

Conclusion: AID成功地在专用模型训练和逐实例优化之间找到了有效的折中点，通过小规模可复用引导模块实现了高效的图像修复，验证了确定性引导问题的可学习性。

Abstract: We study image inpainting with generative diffusion models. Existing methods typically either train dedicated task-specific models, or adapt a pretrained diffusion model separately for each masked image at deployment. We introduce a middle-ground model, termed Amortized Inpainting with Diffusion (AID), which keeps a pretrained diffusion backbone fixed, trains a small reusable guidance module offline, and then reuses it across masked images without per-instance optimization. We formulate it as a deterministic guidance problem with a supervised terminal objective. To make this problem learnable in high dimensions, we derive an auxiliary Gaussian formulation and prove that solving this randomized problem recovers the optimal deterministic guidance field. This bridge yields a principled continuous-time actor--critic algorithm for learning the guidance module in a fully data-driven manner. Empirically, on AFHQv2 and FFHQ under the pixel EDM pipeline and on ImageNet under the latent EDM2 pipeline, AID consistently improves the quality--speed trade-off over strong fixed-backbone and amortized inpainting baselines across multiple mask types, while adding less than one percent trainable overhead.

</details>


### [125] [Towards Unified Surgical Scene Understanding:Bridging Reasoning and Grounding via MLLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13530)
*Jincai Huang,Shihao Zou,Yuchen Guo,Jingjing Li,Wei Ji,Kai Wang,Shanshan Wang,Weixin Si*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: 提出了SurgMLLM，一个统一的手术场景理解框架，通过多模态大语言模型将高层推理（手术阶段、器械-动词-目标三元组）与底层视觉分割（像素级掩码）联合建模，并在CholecT45-Scene数据集上实现了显著性能提升（AP_IVT从40.7%提升至46.0%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有手术场景理解方法将过程推理（阶段识别、语义三元组）与视觉分割（像素级定位）割裂处理，导致表征碎片化、语义一致性差，无法满足临床对统一、上下文感知的手术辅助需求。

Method: 基于多模态大语言模型（MLLM）进行端到端微调，统一输出手术阶段、IVT三元组及对应的实体分割token；通过时序聚合后作为prompt输入分割网络，实现精确像素级定位；联合语言推理损失与视觉分割损失进行协同训练。

Result: 在CholecT45-Scene数据集上，三元组识别指标AP_IVT从40.7%提升至46.0%，在阶段识别和分割任务上也一致优于已有方法。

Conclusion: 统一推理与视觉定位的端到端框架能显著提升手术场景理解的准确性和语义一致性，为可靠的上下文感知手术辅助提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Surgical scene understanding is a cornerstone of computer-assisted intervention. While recent advances, particularly in surgical image segmentation, have driven progress, real-world clinical applications require a more holistic understanding that jointly captures procedural context, semantic reasoning, and precise visual grounding. However, existing approaches typically address these components in isolation, leading to fragmented representations and limited semantic consistency. To address this limitation, we propose SurgMLLM, a unified surgical scene understanding framework that bridges high-level reasoning and low-level visual grounding within a single model. Given surgical videos, SurgMLLM fine-tunes a multimodal large language model (MLLM) to support structured interpretability reasoning, which is used to jointly model phases, instrument-verb-target (IVT) triplets, and triplet-entity segmentation tokens. These tokens are then temporally aggregated and serve as prompts for a segmentation network, enabling accurate pixel-wise grounding of triplet instruments and targets. The entire framework is trained end-to-end with a unified objective that couples language-based reasoning supervision with visual grounding losses, promoting coherent cross-task learning and clinically consistent scene representations. To facilitate unified evaluation, we introduce CholecT45-Scene, extending CholecT45 dataset with 64,299 frames of pixel-level mask annotations for instruments and targets, aligned with existing triplet labels. Extensive experiments show that SurgMLLM significantly advances surgical scene understanding, improving the primary triplet recognition metric AP_IVT from 40.7% to 46.0% and consistently outperforming prior methods in phase recognition and segmentation. These results highlight the effectiveness of unified reasoning-and-grounding for reliable, context-aware surgical assistance.

</details>


### [126] [VoxCor: Training-Free Volumetric Features for Multimodal Voxel Correspondence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13798)
*Guney Tombak,Ertunc Erdil,Ender Konukoglu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: VoxCor是一种无需训练即可从冻结的2D ViT基础模型生成可复用的3D体素特征表示的方法，通过三平面（triplanar）推理和加权偏最小二乘（WPLS）投影，实现跨模态、跨主体的医学图像密集对应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法仅沿单一解剖轴提取2D ViT特征，并在配准求解器内逐对适配，未利用互补视角信息，且特征无法迁移到新体数据。文中旨在构建一种可复用的、训练免费的3D体素级特征表示方法。

Method: VoxCor包含离线拟合和在线变换两阶段：1) 拟合阶段：对配准好的图像对进行三平面（轴向、冠状、矢状）2D ViT推理，用封闭形式的加权偏最小二乘（WPLS）投影选择模态稳定的解剖方向；2) 变换阶段：新体数据仅需三平面ViT推理和线性投影，无需微调或配准，直接通过最近邻搜索查询对应关系。

Result: 在腹部MR-CT（单主体跨模态）和HCP T2w-T1w（跨主体跨模态）任务上，VoxCor在变形配准、体素kNN分割和中心点定位中，改善了最难的跨主体跨模态设置，降低了编码器敏感性，配准性能与手工特征和3D学习特征相当。

Conclusion: VoxCor可作为下游多模态分析（超越成对配准）的可复用特征层。

Abstract: Cross-modal 3D medical image analysis requires voxelwise representations that remain anatomically consistent across imaging contrasts, scanners, and acquisition protocols. Recent work has shown that frozen 2D Vision Transformer (ViT) foundation models can support such representations, but typical pipelines extract features along a single anatomical axis and adapt those features inside a registration solver for one image pair at a time, leaving complementary viewing directions unused and producing representations that do not transfer to new volumes. We introduce VoxCor, a training-free fit--transform method for reusable volumetric feature representations from frozen 2D ViT foundation models. During an offline fitting phase, VoxCor combines triplanar ViT inference with a compact closed-form weighted partial least squares (WPLS) projection that uses fitting-time voxel correspondences to select modality-stable anatomical directions in the triplanar feature space. At transform time, new volumes are mapped by triplanar ViT inference and linear projection alone, without fine-tuning or registration. Voxel correspondences can then be queried directly by nearest-neighbor search. We evaluate VoxCor on intra-subject Abdomen MR--CT and inter-subject HCP T2w--T1w tasks using deformable registration, voxelwise k-nearest-neighbor segmentation, and segmentation-center landmark localization. VoxCor improves the hardest cross-subject, cross-modality transfer settings, reduces encoder sensitivity for dense correspondence transfer, and yields registration performance competitive with handcrafted descriptors and learned 3D features. This positions VoxCor as a reusable feature layer for downstream multimodal analysis beyond pairwise registration. Code, configuration files, and implementation details are publicly available on GitHub at \href{https://github.com/guneytombak/VoxCor}{guneytombak/VoxCor}.

</details>


### [127] [Still Camouflage, Moving Illusion: View-Induced Trajectory Manipulation in Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12743)
*Shuo Ju,Qingzhao Zhang,Huashan Chen,Xuheng Wang,Haotang Li,Wanqian Zhang,Feng Liu,Kebin Peng,Sen He*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种利用视角变化本身作为攻击工具的新型物理对抗攻击方法。通过在车辆上安装静态被动对抗伪装，利用相对运动导致的目标感知特征漂移，诱导自动驾驶系统产生错误的轨迹预测（如虚假切入），最终触发不必要的紧急制动，在nuScenes数据集上实现了高达87.5%的攻击成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有物理对抗攻击方法要么通过复杂的物理补丁导致检测框漂移，要么使用动态变化的补丁产生不同时间感知错误。这些方法都将视角变化视为挑战，需要复杂的多视角优化。本文动机是反转这一思路，将视角变化本身转化为攻击工具，从而简化攻击部署。

Method: 提出了一种静态被动对抗伪装攻击范式：在目标车辆上安装视角依赖的对抗伪装图案，当被攻击车辆与目标车辆发生相对运动时，伪装图案的自然视角变化导致感知特征持续漂移，使得系统推断出物理上看似合理但实际错误的轨迹（如虚假切入），进而误导下游决策触发紧急制动。

Result: 在nuScenes数据集上实现最高87.5%的端到端攻击成功率（以硬制动事件为指标），在不同场景背景、目标车辆速度和感知模型下均保持鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 视角变化本身可以被利用为攻击工具，绕过传统方法对多视角鲁棒性或主动干预的需求。这种攻击源于正常驾驶动态，部署简单——停放车辆通过自然伪装即可诱发经过的自动驾驶车辆急刹车，对自动驾驶安全性构成实际威胁。

Abstract: Existing physical adversarial attacks on vision-based autonomous driving induce time-evolving perception errors, including biased object tracking or trajectory prediction, through (i) sophisticated physical patch inducing detection box drift when entering the view distance, or (ii) dynamically changing patches that cause different perception errors at different time. In both cases, viewing-angle variation is treated as a challenge, requiring adversarial patches to remain effective across frames under varying views, leading to complex multi-view optimization. In contrast, we show that viewing-angle variation itself can be turned into an attack tool. We design a new attack paradigm where a static, passive adversarial camouflage is mounted on a vehicle whose view-dependent appearance naturally evolves with relative motion, inducing consistent feature drift across frames. This causes the system to infer a physically plausible but incorrect trajectory, such as a false cut-in, which propagates to downstream decision-making and triggers unnecessary braking. Unlike prior approaches that require multi-view robustness or active intervention, our attack emerges from normal driving dynamics and is easy to deploy: a parked vehicle with a natural camouflage can induce hard braking in passing autonomous vehicles. We demonstrate the novel attack on nuScenes dataset, showing the effectiveness with an end-to-end success rate of up to 87.5%, measured by hard-braking events, and robustness across different scene backgrounds, victim vehicle speeds, and perception models.

</details>


### [128] [RoboEvolve: Co-Evolving Planner-Simulator for Robotic Manipulation with Limited Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13775)
*Harold Haodong Chen,Sirui Chen,Yingjie Xu,Wenhang Ge,Ying-Cong Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: RoboEvolve通过耦合VLM规划器和VGM模拟器形成协同进化循环，仅利用无标注种子图像即可自动合成机器人操作数据，实现高效的任务对齐物理交互数据生成，在数据效率（减少50倍）和任务性能上显著超越基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人操作的可扩展性受限于任务对齐的物理交互数据稀缺。现有VLM和视频生成模型分别存在语义-空间错位和物理幻觉问题，难以直接用于自主数据合成。

Method: 提出RoboEvolve框架，包含VLM规划器和VGM模拟器的协同进化循环。采用认知启发的双阶段机制：(i) 日间探索阶段，通过语义控制的多粒度奖励进行物理基础的行为发现；(ii) 夜间巩固阶段，挖掘"险些失败"案例以稳定策略优化。结合自主渐进式课程学习，从简单原子动作自然扩展到复杂任务。

Result: (I) 将基础规划器提升30个绝对百分点，模拟器成功率平均提高48%；(II) 仅需500个无标注种子即可超越全监督基线，数据量减少50倍；(III) 展示出鲁棒的持续学习能力，无灾难性遗忘。

Conclusion: RoboEvolve通过VLM与VGM的协同进化循环，有效解决了机器人数据稀缺问题，实现了高效、可扩展的自主数据合成，为机器人操作学习提供了一种数据高效的新范式。

Abstract: The scalability of robotic manipulation is fundamentally bottlenecked by the scarcity of task-aligned physical interaction data. While vision-language models (VLMs) and video generation models (VGMs) hold promise for autonomous data synthesis, they suffer from semantic-spatial misalignment and physical hallucinations, respectively. To bridge this gap, we introduce RoboEvolve, a novel framework that couples a VLM planner and a VGM simulator into a mutually reinforcing co-evolutionary loop. Operating purely on unlabeled seed images, RoboEvolve leverages a cognitive-inspired dual-phase mechanism: (i) daytime exploration fosters physically grounded behavioral discovery through a semantic-controlled multi-granular reward, and (ii) nighttime consolidation mines "near-miss" failures to stabilize policy optimization. Guided by an autonomous progressive curriculum, the system naturally scales from simple atomic actions to complex tasks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RoboEvolve (I) achieves superior effectiveness, elevating base planners by 30 absolute points and amplifying simulator success by 48% on average; (II) exhibits extreme data efficiency, surpassing fully supervised baselines with merely 500 unlabeled seeds--a 50x reduction; and (III) demonstrates robust continual learning without catastrophic forgetting.

</details>


### [129] [Realtime-VLA FLASH: Speculative Inference Framework for Diffusion-based VLAs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13778)
*Jiahui Niu,Kefan Gu,Yucheng Zhao,Shengwen Liang,Tiancai Wang,Xing Hu,Ying Wang,Huawei Li*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: Realtime-VLA FLASH 通过引入轻量级草稿模型和并行验证机制，大幅减少扩散型视觉-语言-动作模型（dVLAs）的全推理调用，将平均推理延迟降至19.1ms，实现3.04倍加速，适用于实时具身智能任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散型视觉-语言-动作模型（dVLAs）在具身智能中表现优异，但全推理的高延迟严重限制了其实时部署能力。

Method: 提出推测性推理框架FLASH，包括：(1) 轻量级草稿模型快速生成候选动作；(2) 主模型的Action Expert进行并行验证；(3) 阶段感知的退避机制，在必要时回退到全推理流程。

Result: 在LIBERO上，将全推理延迟58.0ms降至平均19.1ms（3.04倍加速）；在真实传送带分拣任务中也验证了有效性。

Conclusion: FLASH框架能在不牺牲可靠性的前提下实现低延迟、高频的重新规划，对延迟关键的具身任务具有重要实用价值。

Abstract: Diffusion-based vision-language-action models (dVLAs) are promising for embodied intelligence but are fundamentally limited in real-time deployment by the high latency of full inference. We propose Realtime-VLA FLASH, a speculative inference framework that eliminates most full inference calls during replanning by introducing a lightweight draft model with parallel verification via the main model's Action Expert and a phase-aware fallback mechanism that reverts to the full inference pipeline when needed. This design enables low-latency, high-frequency replanning without sacrificing reliability. Experiments show that on LIBERO, FLASH largely preserves task performance by replacing many 58.0 ms full-inference rounds with speculative rounds as fast as 7.8 ms, lowering task-level average inference latency to 19.1 ms (3.04x speedup). We additionally demonstrate effectiveness on real-world conveyor-belt sorting, highlighting its practical impact for latency-critical embodied tasks.

</details>


### [130] [Edit-Compass & EditReward-Compass: A Unified Benchmark for Image Editing and Reward Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13062)
*Xuehai Bai,Yang Shi,Yi-Fan Zhang,Xuanyu Zhu,Yuran Wang,Yifan Dai,Xinyu Liu,Yiyan Ji,Xiaoling Gu,Yuanxing Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 58.0

TL;DR: 提出了Edit-Compass和EditReward-Compass，一个统一的图像编辑和奖励模型评估套件，包含精细标注的数据集和细粒度多维评估框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像编辑基准在任务难度和评估粒度上不足以区分前沿模型，且奖励模型基准脱离实际RL场景，阻碍了可靠的评估。

Method: 构建了包含2,388个精心标注实例的Edit-Compass（涵盖6个渐进难度任务类别）和2,251个偏好对的EditReward-Compass（模拟实际RL优化场景），采用基于结构化推理的细粒度多维评估框架。

Result: 提供了更全面、细粒度的图像编辑模型和奖励模型评估方案，能够更好地区分前沿模型性能。

Conclusion: 所提出的统一评估套件能更可靠地反映人类判断，弥补了现有基准在任务难度和评估粒度上的不足。

Abstract: Recent image editing models have achieved remarkable progress in instruction following, multimodal understanding, and complex visual editing. However, existing benchmarks often fail to faithfully reflect human judgment, especially for strong frontier models, due to limited task difficulty and coarse-grained evaluation protocols. In parallel, reward models have become increasingly important for RL-based image editing optimization, yet existing reward model benchmarks still rely on unrealistic evaluation settings that deviate from practical RL scenarios. These limitations hinder reliable assessment of both image editing models and reward models. To address these challenges, we introduce Edit-Compass and EditReward-Compass, a unified evaluation suite for image editing and reward modeling. Edit-Compass contains 2,388 carefully annotated instances spanning six progressively challenging task categories, covering capabilities such as world knowledge reasoning, visual reasoning, and multi-image editing. Beyond broad task coverage, Edit-Compass adopts a fine-grained multidimensional evaluation framework based on structured reasoning and carefully designed scoring rubrics. In parallel, EditReward-Compass contains 2,251 preference pairs that simulate realistic reward modeling scenarios during RL optimization.

</details>


### [131] [DirectTryOn: One-Step Virtual Try-On via Straightened Conditional Transport](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12939)
*Xianbing Sun,Jiahui Zhan,Liqing Zhang,Jianfu Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 55.0

TL;DR: 本文针对扩散/流模型在虚拟试衣(VTON)任务中多步采样高计算成本的问题，提出通过三种针对性改进（纯条件传输、衣物保持损失、自一致性损失）实现接近单步生成的直采样轨迹，并引入一步蒸馏，在保持SOTA效果的同时显著提升效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散/流驱动的VTON方法依赖于多步采样，推理成本高；现有加速方法未利用VTON任务本身条件约束强、采样轨迹可更直的内在特性。作者希望利用这一特性实现一步生成。

Method: 1) 纯条件传输（Pure Conditional Transport）：使采样轨迹更直；2) 衣物保持损失（Garment Preservation Loss）：保留衣物细节；3) 自一致性损失（Self Consistency Loss）：鼓励轨迹一致性；4) 一步蒸馏阶段（One-step Distillation）：将多步模型蒸馏为单步模型。

Result: 在多个VTON基准上，该方法以单步采样实现SOTA效果，兼顾高效与高质量生成。

Conclusion: 通过针对性设计而非通用加速策略，VTON任务可以自然地实现一步生成，为高效虚拟试衣建立了新标准。

Abstract: Recent diffusion- and flow-based VTON methods achieve strong results with pretrained generative models, but their reliance on multi-step sampling incurs high inference cost, while existing acceleration methods largely overlook the intrinsic structure of the try-on task. In this paper, we highlight a key observation: VTON outputs are highly constrained by the conditional inputs, suggesting that the conditional sampling trajectory can be much straighter than that in general image generation, making one-step generation a natural solution. However, limited task-specific data makes training from scratch impractical, forcing existing methods to fine-tune pretrained models whose objectives do not encourage such straight conditional trajectories. Thus, the deviation from an ideal straight path mainly comes from the mismatch between pretrained base models and the conditional nature of try-on generation, rather than from the task itself. Motivated by this insight, we encourage straighter VTON sampling trajectories through three targeted modifications: pure conditional transport, a garment preservation loss, and a self consistency loss. We further introduce a one-step distillation stage. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance with one-step sampling, establishing a new standard for efficient and high-quality VTON.

</details>


### [132] [A$_3$B$_2$: Adaptive Asymmetric Adapter for Alleviating Branch Bias in Vision-Language Image Classification with Few-Shot Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13161)
*Yiyun Zhou,Zhonghua Jiang,Wenkang Han,Kunxi Li,Mingjing Xu,Chang Yao,Jingyuan Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 55.0

TL;DR: 本文揭示了视觉-语言模型（如CLIP）在图像分类中存在的“分支偏置”问题：图像编码器的适配在分布外场景下并不总是提升性能。为此提出A$_3$B$_2$自适应非对称适配器，通过不确定性感知的适配器抑制（UAAD）和轻量级非对称架构（MoE+负载均衡正则化），在少样本学习任务中优于11个基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型（如CLIP）的迁移学习方法遵循固定的微调范式，默认图像和文本分支的重要性一致。作者通过实验发现这一假设不成立——图像编码器适配在分布外场景下可能损害性能，即存在"Branch Bias"问题，需要系统研究并解决。

Method: 提出A$_3$B$_2$：1) Uncertainty-Aware Adapter Dampening (UAAD)：根据预测不确定性自动抑制图像分支适配；2) 轻量级非对称架构，借鉴Mixture-of-Experts思想并引入负载均衡正则化，实现软性的、数据驱动的分支控制。

Result: 在3个少样本图像分类任务、11个数据集上，A$_3$B$_2$一致优于11种基于prompt和adapter的竞争性基线方法。

Conclusion: 视觉-语言模型适配中存在Branch Bias问题，非对称、自适应地控制分支适配可以有效提升少样本学习性能。A$_3$B$_2$提供了一种无需人工干预的软性控制方案。

Abstract: Efficient transfer learning methods for large-scale vision-language models ($e.g.$, CLIP) enable strong few-shot transfer, yet existing adaptation methods follow a fixed fine-tuning paradigm that implicitly assumes a uniform importance of the image and text branches, which has not been systematically studied in image classification. Through extensive analysis, we reveal a Branch Bias issue in vision-language image classification: adapting the image encoder does not always improve performance under out-of-distribution settings. Motivated by this observation, we propose A$_3$B$_2$, an Adaptive Asymmetric Adapter that alleviates Branch Bias in few-shot learning. A$_3$B$_2$ introduces Uncertainty-Aware Adapter Dampening (UAAD), which automatically suppresses image-branch adaptation when prediction uncertainty is high, enabling soft and data-driven control without manual intervention. Architecturally, A$_3$B$_2$ adopts a lightweight asymmetric design inspired by mixture-of-experts with Load Balancing Regularization. Extensive experiments on three few-shot image classification tasks across 11 datasets demonstrate that A$_3$B$_2$ consistently outperforms 11 competitive prompt- and adapter-based baselines.

</details>


### [133] [KamonBench: A Grammar-Based Dataset for Evaluating Compositional Factor Recovery in Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13322)
*Richard Sproat,Stefano Peluchetti*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 55.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了KamonBench，一个基于语法规则的日本家纹（Kamon）图像到结构的基准数据集，包含20,000个合成家纹及其形式化描述语言（kamon yōgo）标注，支持组合视觉识别中因子级别的评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 日本家纹（Kamon）是组合视觉识别的自然测试用例：每个家纹由少量符号化选择（容器、修饰符、主题）组合而成，但可能的描述空间是稀疏的。现有视觉语言模型在组合性理解上表现不足，缺乏能够精细评估因子恢复能力的基准。

Method: 构建基于语法规则的图像生成流程，生成20,000个合成家纹。每个家纹配有形式化描述语言（kamon yōgo）、日语分析、英语翻译和程序代码。支持多种评估范式：程序代码因子指标、因子对重组拆分、反事实主题敏感性组、因子可访问性的线性探针。

Result: 提供了ViT编码器/Transformer解码器以及两个VGG n-gram解码器的基线结果，包含有无学习位置掩码的对比。展示了基准在稀疏组合视觉识别和因子恢复评估中的有效性。

Conclusion: KamonBench为组合视觉识别和因子恢复提供了一个受控的测试平台，能够超越传统字幕级精度，实现更细粒度的因子级评估。

Abstract: Kamon (family crests) are an important part of Japanese culture and a natural test case for compositional visual recognition: each crest combines a small number of symbolic choices, but the space of possible descriptions is sparse. We introduce KamonBench, a grammar-based image-to-structure benchmark with 20,000 synthetic composite crests and auxiliary component examples. Each composite crest is paired with a formal kamon description language - "kamon yōgo" - description, a segmented Japanese analysis, an English translation, and a non-linguistic program code. Because each synthetic crest is generated from known factors, namely container, modifier, and motif, KamonBench supports evaluation beyond caption-level accuracy: direct program-code factor metrics, controlled factor-pair recombination splits, counterfactual motif-sensitivity groups under fixed container-modifier contexts, and linear probes of factor accessibility. We include baseline results for a ViT encoder/Transformer decoder and two VGG n-gram decoders, with and without learned positional masks. KamonBench therefore provides a controlled testbed for sparse compositional visual recognition and factor recovery in vision-language models.

</details>


### [134] [Backbone is All You Need: Assessing Vulnerabilities of Frozen Foundation Models in Synthetic Image Forensics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13381)
*Chiara Musso,Joy Battocchio,Andrea Montibeller,Giulia Boato*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 55.0

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于替代迭代的对抗攻击方法（SIAA），仅利用检测器ViT骨干网络的知识（灰盒攻击），就能在特征空间中生成高效对抗样本，揭示当前基于冻结预训练骨干的深度伪造检测器存在严重安全隐患。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度伪造检测器过度依赖冻结的预训练ViT骨干网络，这种设计存在隐蔽但关键的漏洞——攻击者可能仅利用骨干网络知识就能绕过检测，但目前缺乏对此类脆弱性的系统性研究。

Method: 提出Surrogate Iterative Adversarial Attack (SIAA)，一种灰盒攻击方法。攻击者仅需知道检测器的ViT骨干架构，在目标检测器的特征空间内迭代生成对抗样本，不需要知道分类头或训练数据等完整信息。

Result: 在多种ViT检测器、少样本学习、训练不对齐和攻击迁移性等灰盒场景下，SIAA均实现高攻击成功率，接近白盒攻击性能，证明仅靠骨干网络知识就足以严重破坏检测器可靠性。

Conclusion: 仅凭ViT骨干网络知识即可有效攻击深度伪造检测器，揭示了当前检测范式在对抗环境下的脆弱性，迫切需要更具鲁棒性的防御策略。

Abstract: As AI-generated synthetic images become increasingly realistic, Vision Transformers (ViTs) have emerged as a cornerstone of modern deepfake detection. However, the prevailing reliance on frozen, pre-trained backbones introduces a subtle yet critical vulnerability. In this work, we present the Surrogate Iterative Adversarial Attack (SIAA), a gray-box attack that exploits knowledge of the detector's ViT backbone alone and operates entirely within the target detector's feature space to craft highly effective adversarial examples. Through our experiments, involving multiple ViT-based detectors and diverse gray-box scenarios, including few-shot learning, complete training misalignment and attack transferability tests, we demonstrate that this vulnerability consistently yields high attack success rates, often approaching white-box performance. By doing so, we reveal that backbone knowledge alone is sufficient to undermine detector reliability, highlighting the urgent need for more resilient defenses in adversarial multimedia forensics.

</details>


### [135] [Z-Order Transformer for Feed-Forward Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13465)
*Can Wang,Lei Liu,Wei Jiang,Dong Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 50.0

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的架构，利用Z-order策略将无结构的高斯集合转化为空间连贯序列，通过稀疏注意力机制建模高斯之间的关系，实现单次前向预测高斯属性并压缩冗余基元，从而快速高质量地完成新视角合成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统3D高斯泼溅依赖缓慢的迭代优化过程，无法满足实时新视角合成需求；现有前馈方法预测高斯属性时存在基元冗余和渲染质量不足的问题。

Method: 提出基于Transformer的架构，核心包括：1) Z-order策略将无结构高斯集组织为空间连贯序列；2) 在此序列上应用稀疏注意力机制捕获高斯间的空间和语义关系；3) 利用Z-order自适应抑制冗余，保留关键结构细节；4) 单次前向完成高斯属性预测。

Result: 实现快速、高质量的新视角合成，且使用更少的高斯基元。

Conclusion: Z-order+稀疏注意力Transformer能有效建模高斯上下文、压缩冗余、预测属性，为前馈式3DGS提供高效解决方案。

Abstract: Recent advances in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have enabled significant progress in photorealistic novel view synthesis. However, traditional 3DGS relies on a slow, iterative optimization process, which limits its use in scenarios demanding real-time results. To overcome this bottleneck, recent feed-forward methods aim to predict Gaussian attributes directly from images, but they often struggle with the redundancy of Gaussian primitives and rendering quality. In this work, we introduce a transformer-based architecture specifically designed for feed-forward Gaussian Splatting. Our key insight is that spatial and semantic relationships among Gaussians can be effectively captured through a sparse attention mechanism, enabled by a Z-order strategy that organizes the unstructured Gaussian set into a spatially coherent sequence. Furthermore, we incorporate this Z-order strategy to adaptively suppress redundancy while preserving critical structural details. This allows the transformer to efficiently model context, compress Gaussian primitives, and predict Gaussian attributes in a single forward pass. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves fast and high-quality novel view synthesis with fewer Gaussian primitives.

</details>


### [136] [Adaptive Conformal Prediction for Reliable and Explainable Medical Image Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12917)
*One Octadion,Novanto Yudistira,Lailil Muflikhah*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种自适应Lambda准则优化RAPS方法，通过最小化最坏情况下的覆盖违规来改善医学影像模型的分层覆盖性能，在OrganAMNIST和PathMNIST数据集上验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医学影像深度学习模型在模糊诊断场景中常表现出过度自信，带来安全风险。标准CP方法（如RAPS）优化平均效率，可能掩盖困难样本上的严重失败。

Method: 提出自适应Lambda准则（Adaptive Lambda Criterion），通过最小化跨预测集大小分层的最大覆盖违规来优化RAPS，使模型在不同预测集大小下均能保持稳定的覆盖率。

Result: 在OrganAMNIST上：全局覆盖95.72%，平均集大小1.09，所有分层至少90%覆盖；PathMNIST跨域验证确认泛化能力。Grad-CAM分析显示多标签预测对应解剖模糊区域的聚焦注意力（rho=-0.30）。

Conclusion: 该方法在保持高效性的同时显著提升了可靠性，适用于安全关键的医学AI应用。

Abstract: Deep learning models for medical imaging often exhibit overconfidence, creating safety risks in ambiguous diagnostic scenarios. While Conformal Prediction (CP) provides distribution-free statistical guarantees, standard methods such as Regularized Adaptive Prediction Sets (RAPS) optimize for average efficiency and can mask severe failures on difficult inputs.
  We propose an Adaptive Lambda Criterion for RAPS that minimizes the worst-case coverage violation across prediction set size strata. On OrganAMNIST (58,850 abdominal CT images, 11 classes), standard size-optimized RAPS converges to near-deterministic behavior with stratified undercoverage on uncertain samples, while our method achieves 95.72 percent global coverage with average set size 1.09 and at least 90 percent coverage across all strata. Cross-domain validation on PathMNIST (107,180 pathology images, 9 classes) confirms generalizability.
  Quantitative Grad-CAM analysis (rho = -0.30, p < 1e-22) shows that multi-label predictions correspond to focused attention on anatomically ambiguous regions. These results demonstrate that the proposed method improves reliability while maintaining efficiency, making it suitable for safety-critical medical AI applications.

</details>


### [137] [SpurAudio: A Benchmark for Studying Shortcut Learning in Few-Shot Audio Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13672)
*Giries Abu Ayoub,Morad Tukan,Loay Mualem*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出SpurAudio基准，用于评估少样本音频分类中的虚假相关性（背景与前景的伪关联），发现现有方法在上下文偏移下性能严重下降，即使大型预训练音频基础模型也无法避免。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有少样本图像分类已关注虚假相关性，但音频领域缺乏类似研究，且音频基准无法控制上下文结构，导致模型可能利用背景信号与前景事件之间的虚假关联。

Method: 利用音频中前景事件与背景环境的天然可分离性，构建SpurAudio基准，支持跨支持集和查询集的上下文偏移的多层次控制评估。

Result: 多种SOTA少样本方法在背景相关性被破坏时性能严重下降；大型预训练音频基础模型同样存在此问题；不同方法对虚假相关性的敏感度差异显著，揭示了算法层面的系统性强弱。

Conclusion: 少样本音频分类存在严重的虚假相关性依赖问题，现有评估协议掩盖了这一缺陷，亟需显式探测上下文依赖性的基准。

Abstract: Few-shot classification (FSC) is widely used for learning from limited labeled data, yet most evaluations implicitly assume that target concepts are independent of contextual cues. In real-world settings, however, examples often appear within rich contexts, allowing models to exploit spurious correlations between foreground content and background signals. While such effects have been studied in few-shot image classification, their role in few-shot audio classification remains largely unexplored, and existing audio benchmarks offer limited control over contextual structure. We introduce SpurAudio, a benchmark that leverages the natural separability of foreground events and background environments in audio to enable controlled, multi-level evaluation of contextual shifts across support and query sets. Using this benchmark, we show that many state-of-the-art few-shot methods suffer severe performance degradation when background correlations are disrupted, despite achieving similar accuracy under standard evaluation protocols. Crucially, this vulnerability persists even in large pretrained audio foundation models, ruling out limited backbone capacity as an explanation. Moreover, methods that appear comparable under conventional benchmarks can exhibit markedly different sensitivity to spurious correlations, revealing systematic algorithmic strengths and vulnerabilities tied to how feature representations interact with classifier heads at inference time. These findings provide new insight into the behavior of few-shot methods in audio and highlight the need for benchmarks that explicitly probe context dependence when evaluating FSC models.

</details>


### [138] [Aligning Network Equivariance with Data Symmetry: A Theoretical Framework and Adaptive Approach for Image Restoration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13744)
*Feiyu Tan,Qi Xie,Zongben Xu,Deyu Meng*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文从优化视角出发，首次提出了数据集级别的非严格对称性量化定义，并证明恢复模型等变性可自然从引入对称约束的反问题中导出。理论表明最优恢复算子的等变误差受数据对称误差和离散化网格尺寸严格界定。基于此，提出样本自适应等变网络(SA-Conv)，通过超网络和学习型等变卷积动态对齐样本的固有对称性，在超分辨率、去噪、去雨任务上显著优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有等变网络研究缺乏系统理论框架来量化数据对称性、选择变换群以及评估模型与数据的对齐程度，尤其是在真实世界中数据对称性不完美的情况下。

Method: 1) 提出数据集级别非严格对称性的可量化定义；2) 将其作为约束融入逆问题公式，推导出恢复模型的等变性；3) 证明最优恢复算子的等变误差与数据对称误差和离散化网格尺寸的关系；4) 通过经验风险分析展示对齐等变性与数据对称性可优化偏差-方差权衡；5) 提出样本自适应等变网络(SA-Conv)，使用超网络和学习型等变卷积。

Result: 在超分辨率、去噪、去雨任务上的大量实验验证了理论发现，并显著优于标准基线和传统等变模型。

Conclusion: 模型等变性与数据对称性的对齐能够最小化总期望风险，样本自适应的等变设计能有效处理真实世界中不完全对称的数据。

Abstract: Image restoration is an inherently ill posed inverse problem. Equivariant networks that embed geometric symmetry priors can mitigate this ill posedness and improve performance. However, current understanding of the relationship between network equivariance and data symmetry remains largely heuristic. Particularly for real world data with imperfect symmetry, existing research lacks a systematic theoretical framework to quantify symmetry, select transformation groups, or evaluate model data alignment. To bridge this gap, we conduct an analysis from an optimization perspective and formalize the intrinsic relationship among data symmetry priors, model equivariance, and generalization capability. Specifically, we propose for the first time a quantifiable definition of non strict symmetry at the dataset level (rather than sample level) and use it as a constraint to formulate the restoration inverse problem. We then show that the equivariance for restoration models can be naturally derived from this inverse problems incorporated the proposed symmetry constraints, and that the equivariance error of the optimal restoration operator is strictly bounded by the data symmetry error and the discretization mesh size. Furthermore, by analyzing the network's empirical risk, we demonstrate that aligning equivariance with data symmetry optimizes the bias variance trade off, minimizing the total expected risk. Guided by these insights, we propose a Sample Adaptive Equivariant Network that uses a hypernetwork and transformation learnable equivariant convolutions to dynamically align with each sample's inherent symmetry. Extensive experiments on super resolution, denoising, and deraining validate our theoretical findings and show significant superiority over standard baselines and traditional equivariant models. Our code and supplementary material are available at https://github.com/tanfy929/SA-Conv.

</details>


### [139] [LEXI-SG: Monocular 3D Scene Graph Mapping with Room-Guided Feed-Forward Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13741)
*Christina Kassab,Hyeonjae Gil,Matías Mattamala,Ayoung Kim,Maurice Fallon*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: LEXI-SG是首个仅使用单目RGB相机即可构建开放词汇3D场景图的密集单目视觉建图系统，通过利用开放词汇基础模型的语义先验划分房间，采用基于房间的因子图全局对齐，实现了可扩展的密集建图和场景理解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的场景图建图方法大多依赖深度相机或LiDAR传感器，限制了其应用场景。本文旨在探索仅使用单目RGB相机即可实现准确、可扩展的开放词汇3D场景图建图。

Method: 1) 利用开放词汇基础模型的语义先验将场景划分为房间；2) 每个房间完全观察到后才进行前馈重建，避免滑动窗口尺度不一致；3) 提出基于房间的因子图公式，全局对齐房间重建同时保持局部一致性；4) 在每个房间内支持开放词汇对象分割和跟踪。

Result: 在Habitat-Matterport 3D和自采数据集上验证，相比现有前馈SLAM和场景图基线方法，在轨迹估计、密集重建和开放词汇分割方面均表现更优或具有竞争力。

Conclusion: 证明仅使用单目RGB相机即可实现准确、可扩展的开放词汇3D场景图，为机器人导航提供了一种更经济的视觉建图方案。

Abstract: Scene graphs are becoming a standard representation for robot navigation, providing hierarchical geometric and semantic scene understanding. However, most scene graph mapping methods rely on depth cameras or LiDAR sensors. In this work, we present LEXI-SG, the first dense monocular visual mapping system for open-vocabulary 3D scene graphs using only RGB camera input. Our approach exploits the semantic priors of open-vocabulary foundation models to partition the scene into rooms, deferring feed-forward reconstruction to when each room is fully observed -- enabling scalable dense mapping without sliding-window scale inconsistencies. We propose a room-based factor graph formulation to globally align room reconstructions while preserving local map consistency and naturally imposing the semantic scene graph hierarchy. Within each room, we further support open-vocabulary object segmentation and tracking. We validate LEXI-SG on indoor scenes from the Habitat-Matterport 3D and self-collected egocentric office sequences. We evaluate its performance against existing feed-forward SLAM methods, as well as established scene graphs baselines. We demonstrate improved trajectory estimation and dense reconstruction, as well as, competitive performance in open-vocabulary segmentation. LEXI-SG shows that accurate, scalable, open-vocabulary 3D scene graphs can be achieved from monocular RGB alone. Our project page and office sequences are available here: https://ori-drs.github.io/lexisg-web/.

</details>


### [140] [PRA-PoE: Robust Alzheimer's Diagnosis with Arbitrary Missing Modalities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13081)
*Guangqian Yang,Ye Du,Wenlong Hou,Qian Niu,Shujun Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 提出PRA-PoE框架，通过原型锚定表示对齐（PRA）和不确定性感知专家乘积融合（UA-PoE），解决阿尔茨海默病多模态学习中缺失模态导致的表示偏移和不确定性校准问题，在ADNI和OASIS-3上显著优于基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 真实AD评估中模态缺失普遍存在，且训练与部署时缺失模式分布不一致，导致条件表示偏移。现有方法隐式插补或模态合成未能显式建模模态可用性和不确定性，产生过度自信依赖和校准差的不确定性估计。

Method: 1) PRA：利用可学习全局原型和可用性条件Token编码模态可用性，重新合成缺失模态特征并自适应调整观测特征，对齐不同缺失模式下的潜在空间。2) UA-PoE：将每个模态建模为高斯专家，通过闭式专家乘积融合，高不确定性专家自动被低精度权重削弱，提升不确定性可靠性。

Result: 在自然缺失数据训练协议下，PRA-PoE在ADNI上平均准确率相对提升5.4%，在OASIS-3上平均F1相对提升10.9%，均超越所有非空模态组合上的最强基线。

Conclusion: PRA-PoE通过显式建模模态缺失和不确定性，有效缓解了缺失模式偏移问题，提升了多模态学习的鲁棒性和不确定性校准质量。

Abstract: Missing modalities are prevalent in real-world Alzheimer's disease (AD) assessment and pose a significant challenge to multimodal learning, particularly when the distribution of observed modality subsets differs between training and deployment. Such missingness pattern mismatch induces a conditional representation shift across modality subsets. Existing approaches that rely on implicit imputation or modality synthesis often fail to explicitly model modality availability and uncertainty, leading to overconfident dependence on synthesized features, reduced robustness, and miscalibrated uncertainty estimates. To address these limitations, we propose PRA-PoE, an incomplete multimodal learning framework that is equipped with Prototype-anchored Representation Alignment (PRA) and an Uncertainty-aware Product of Experts (UA-PoE) fusion mechanism. First, PRA uses learnable global prototypes and availability-conditioned tokens to encode modality availability, distinguish observed from missing modalities, re-synthesize features for missing modalities, and adaptively refine observed representations to align latent spaces across modality subsets, with the goal of reducing representation shift under varying missingness patterns. Second, UA-PoE models each modality as a Gaussian expert and performs closed-form Product of Experts fusion, where experts with higher uncertainty are automatically down-weighted via lower precision, improving uncertainty reliability. We evaluate PRA-PoE under a clinically realistic protocol by training with naturally missing data and testing on all non-empty modality combinations. PRA-PoE consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art across datasets, achieving a 5.4% relative improvement in average accuracy on ADNI and a 10.9% relative gain in average F1 on OASIS-3 over the strongest baseline across all non-empty modality subsets.

</details>


### [141] [X-Restormer++: 1st Place Solution for the UG2+ CVPR 2026 All-Weather Restoration Challenge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13258)
*Youwei Pan,Leilei Cao,Yingfang Zhu,Fengjie Zhu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了针对CVPR 2026 UG2+挑战赛天气图像恢复任务的夺冠方案，基于X-Restormer框架，通过引入空间自适应输入缩放、梯度引导边缘感知损失函数以及扩充训练数据等改进，在图像恢复任务中取得了第一名。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对复杂天气条件下的图像恢复任务，现有方法在空间适应性和边缘细节保持方面存在不足，需要在强基线模型基础上进一步改进以提升恢复性能。

Method: 以X-Restormer为基线框架（含通道全局依赖和空间局部结构的双注意力机制），引入Restormer-Plus的空间自适应输入缩放机制，提出梯度引导边缘感知（GGEA）损失函数与L1、MS-SSIM损失联合训练，并利用FoundIR、WeatherBench和WeatherStream数据集扩充训练数据。

Result: 在8th UG2+挑战赛Track 1中排名第一。

Conclusion: 空间自适应缩放、边缘感知损失以及数据增强策略可以有效提升天气图像恢复的性能。

Abstract: In this work, we present our winning solution for the 8th UG2+ Challenge (CVPR 2026) Track 1: Image Restoration under All-weather Conditions. Our method is built upon the strong baseline framework X-Restormer, which effectively captures both channel-wise global dependencies and spatially-local structural information through its dual-attention design (Multi-DConv Head Transposed Attention and Overlapping Cross-Attention). To further boost the restoration performance, we propose several key improvements. First, we integrate the spatially-adaptive input scaling mechanism from Restormer-Plus to dynamically adjust the spatial weights of the input image, enhancing spatial adaptability. Second, to better preserve structural details and edge information, we introduce a novel Gradient-Guided Edge-Aware (GGEA) loss, which is combined with L1 and Multi-Scale SSIM losses in a unified training objective. Third, we significantly expand the training data by incorporating an extra 24,500 degraded-clean image pairs from FoundIR and WeatherBench alongside the original WeatherStream dataset. With these strategies, our proposed method successfully ranks the 1st place in the challenge.

</details>


### [142] [SceneGraphVLM: Dynamic Scene Graph Generation from Video with Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13667)
*Vladislav Makarov,Mark Gizetdinov,Dmitry Yudin*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: SceneGraphVLM提出了一种紧凑的图像和视频场景图生成方法，使用小型视觉语言模型，通过TOON格式序列化、两阶段训练（监督微调+强化学习）以及幻觉感知奖励，实现了质量与速度的良好平衡，生成完整场景图仅需约一秒延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM方法生成场景图时输出冗长，包含大量无关物体和关系，无法实现准确且快速的场景图预测。作者希望通过紧凑的VLM和创新的训练方法解决这一问题。

Method: 1) 使用TOON格式进行token高效的图序列化；2) 两阶段训练：先监督微调，再使用带幻觉感知奖励的强化学习（平衡关系覆盖率和精确度，惩罚不支持的对象和关系）；3) 视频任务中可选的帧间上下文条件化机制。

Result: 在PSG、PVSG和Action Genome数据集上，使用紧凑VLM和vLLM加速解码，实现了强大的质量-速度权衡，提升了面向精确度的SGG指标，同时保持了合理的召回率，生成完整场景图约一秒延迟。

Conclusion: SceneGraphVLM证明了小型VLM结合精心设计的训练策略（强化学习+幻觉感知奖励）和高效序列化格式，可以在场景图生成任务中取得优异的质量和速度表现。
