A key technical step is to reduce the constrained nonconvex factorized problem to an explicit logit-level convex characterization for cyclic symmetry and to a symmetry-based lower bound for permutation symmetry, together with a sharp characterization of the optimal factorization. Finally, we empirically demonstrate that open-source LLMs naturally exhibit symmetries consistent with our theoretical predictions, despite being trained without any explicit regularization promoting such geometric structure.

</details>


### [252] [No Attack Required: Semantic Fuzzing for Specification Violations in Agent Skills](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13044)
*Ying Li,Hongbo Wen,Yanju Chen,Hanzhi Liu,Yuan Tian,Yu Feng*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 82.0

TL;DR: 提出Sefz框架，通过目标导向的语义模糊测试自动发现LLM代理技能中的规范违规（specification violations），在402个真实技能中发现29.9%存在此类漏洞。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM代理在执行常规用户请求时，因所调用技能违反了自身声明的安全规则（规范违规），可能导致删除文档、泄露凭证等严重后果。这类漏洞对静态分析、传统模糊测试和提示注入防御均不可见，却破坏了用户信任。

Method: 将每个护栏（guardrail）转化为执行轨迹上的可达性目标，将违规检测简化为确定性图查询；使用基于LLM的变异器生成良性输入，通过多臂老虎机算法以目标接近度为奖励信号逐步逼近违规模式。

Result: 在402个真实技能中发现120个（29.9%）存在规范违规，包括26个此前未知的可利用护栏违规；总结出6种反复出现的规范缺陷模式。

Conclusion: 规范违规是LLM代理安全的重要威胁来源，Sefz能有效发现此类漏洞，总结的规范缺陷模式为更安全的技能设计提供了具体原则。

Abstract: LLM-powered agents can silently delete documents, leak credentials, or transfer funds on a routine user request, not because the agent was attacked, but because the skill it invoked broke its own declared safety rules. We call these specification violations: benign inputs cause a skill to breach the natural-language guardrails in its own specification, typically because the guardrail's semantics are undefined for autonomous execution, or because the implementation silently ignores the documented constraint. These violations are invisible to static analyzers, traditional fuzzers, and prompt-injection defenses alike, yet they undermine the very contract a user trusts when installing a skill.
  We present Sefz, a goal-directed semantic fuzzing framework that automatically discovers specification violations in agent skills. Sefz translates each guardrail into a reachability goal over an annotated execution trace, reducing violation checking to a deterministic graph query. An LLM-based mutator generates benign inputs whose traces progressively approach the violation patterns, guided by a multi-armed bandit that uses goal-proximity as its reward signal.
  On 402 real-world skills from the largest public agent-skill marketplace, Sefz finds specification violations in 120 (29.9%), including 26 previously unknown exploitable guardrail violations in deployed skills. Six recurring specification pitfalls explain the bulk of the failures, suggesting concrete principles for safer skill design.

</details>


### [253] [NAACA: Training-Free NeuroAuditory Attentive Cognitive Architecture with Oscillatory Working Memory for Salience-Driven Attention Gating](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13651)
*Zhongju Yuan,Geraint Wiggins,Dick Botteldooren*

Main category: cs.SD

Relevance: 82.0

TL;DR: NAACA是一种无需额外训练的神经听觉认知架构，通过引入类脑振荡工作记忆（OWM）机制，将注意力分配建模为听觉显著性过滤问题，在长音频中只对显著事件触发大模型推理，从而缓解音频语言模型（ALM）的注意力瓶颈。在XD-Violence数据集上将AudioQwen的平均精度从53.50%提升至70.60%，并减少不必要的模型调用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前音频语言模型在处理长录音时存在注意力瓶颈：背景声音模式占主导，使得罕见但重要的音频事件被稀释，模型难以有效聚焦于关键信息。

Method: 提出NAACA架构，核心是OWM（振荡工作记忆）模块。OWM维持类似吸引子的稳定状态，当检测到自适应能量波动（即感知显著性信号）时，才触发上层ALM进行高级认知处理，否则保持低功耗状态，从而实现对音频流的显著性过滤和选择性注意力分配。

Result: 1. 在XD-Violence数据集上，将AudioQwen的平均精度从53.50%提升至70.60%；2. 显著减少不必要的ALM调用次数；3. 在USoW数据集上，OWM能有效捕获新事件和子类别转换，同时对短暂停顿和城市环境噪声保持鲁棒性。

Conclusion: NAACA通过类脑认知机制有效解决了ALM在长音频中的注意力瓶颈问题，以训练-free的方式大幅提升任务性能并降低计算开销，为长音频场景下的高效语言-音频融合提供了一个有前景的方向。

Abstract: Audio provides critical situational cues, yet current Audio Language Models (ALMs) face an attention bottleneck in long-form recordings where dominant background patterns can dilute rare, salient events. We introduce NAACA, a training-free NeuroAuditory Attentive Cognitive Architecture that reframes attention allocation as an auditory salience filtering problem. At its core is OWM, a neuro-inspired Oscillatory Working Memory that maintains stable attractor-like states and triggers higher-cognition ALM processing only when adaptive energy fluctuations signal perceptual salience, triggering higher-level reasoning. On XD-Violence, NAACA improves AudioQwen's average precision (AP) from 53.50% to 70.60% while reducing unnecessary ALM invocations. Furthermore, qualitative case studies on the Urban Soundscapes of the World (USoW) dataset show that OWM captures novel events and subcategory shifts while remaining robust to transient pauses and ambient urban noise.

</details>


### [254] [Neurosymbolic Auditing of Natural-Language Software Requirements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13817)
*Bethel Hall,William Eiers*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 82.0

TL;DR: 本文提出VERIMED，一种结合LLM与SMT求解器的神经符号学管道，用于审计医疗设备软件需求中的歧义、不一致性和安全违规问题。通过LLM将自然语言需求形式化为形式逻辑，利用随机变化检测歧义，并通过SMT查询暴露缺陷，在血液透析QA基准上将验证准确率从55.4%提升至98.5%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然语言软件需求常存在歧义、不一致和规格缺失问题，尤其在安全关键领域（如医疗设备），这些缺陷会传播到形式化模型和实际实现中，导致验证错误规格或产生不安全行为。现有方法难以自动检测和修复这些问题。

Method: 构建VERIMED神经符号学管道：(1) 使用LLM将自然语言需求翻译为形式逻辑（SMT公式）；(2) 利用LLM输出的随机变异性，多次独立形式化生成，通过双向SMT等价性检查检测歧义；(3) 使用SMT求解器查询规范的一致性、空洞性和安全性；(4) 通过具体SMT反例引导LLM修复，实现反例引导修复。

Result: 在血液透析问答基准上，反例引导修复将验证准确率从55.4%提升至98.5%。在开源血液透析安全需求上的广泛实验表明，该方法有效减少了对歧义敏感的需求，并实现了通过SMT查询对软件需求的严格审计。

Conclusion: LLM结合SMT求解器可以有效审计软件需求；随机变化是检测歧义的有效信号；符号反馈的粒度至关重要，具体的SMT反例比抽象反馈更有效。

Abstract: Natural-language software requirements are often ambiguous, inconsistent, and underspecified; in safety-critical domains, these defects propagate into formal models that verify the wrong specification and into implementations that ship unsafe behavior. We show that large language models, equipped with an SMT solver, can audit such requirements: translating them into formal logic, detecting ambiguity through stochastic variation in the generated formalization, and exposing inconsistency, vacuousness, and safety violations through solver queries on the resulting specification. We present VERIMED, a neurosymbolic pipeline that operationalizes this idea for medical-device software requirements, and report two findings. First, stochastic variation across independent formalizations is a signal of ambiguity: requirements that admit multiple plausible interpretations produce SMT-inequivalent formalizations, and bidirectional SMT equivalence checking turns this disagreement into a solver-checkable test. Second, the usefulness of symbolic feedback depends on its granularity: in counterexample-guided repair on a hemodialysis question-answering benchmark, concrete SMT counterexamples raise verified accuracy from 55.4% to 98.5%. Over an extensive experimental evaluation on open-source hemodialysis safety requirements, we show that the LLM-based approach in VERIMED successfully reduces ambiguity-sensitive requirements and enables rigorous auditing of software requirements through SMT-based queries.

</details>


### [255] [Assessing the Creativity of Large Language Models: Testing, Limits, and New Frontiers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13450)
*Samuel Schapiro,Alexi Gladstone,Jonah Black,Heng Ji*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 80.0

TL;DR: 本文首次大规模系统评估了现有人类创造力测试对LLM创造力预测的有效性，发现不同测试在不同创造力维度上表现差异显著，且没有单一测试能全面预测所有维度。为此，作者提出了DRAT测试，同时评估发散与收敛思维，成为唯一能可靠预测LLM科学构思能力的测试。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究常用人类创造力测试来衡量LLM的创造力，但这些测试对机器创造力的有效性尚未得到验证，且对人类创造力的预测效度本就有限。亟需系统评估这些测试对LLM创造力成就的预测能力。

Method: 1) 首次大规模系统研究，评估人类创造力测试对LLM在创意写作、发散思维、科学构思三个维度的预测效果。2) 提出DRAT（Divergent Remote Association Test），在同一测试中同时评估发散思维和收敛思维。

Result: DAT和Conditional DAT分别是创意写作和发散思维的最佳预测指标；但没有任何现有测试能可靠预测科学构思能力。DRAT是首个且唯一能显著预测LLM科学构思能力的测试，且其增益无法通过DAT和RAT的线性组合恢复。

Conclusion: 单一创造力测试无法全面评估LLM的创造力，需针对不同维度设计不同测试。同时评估发散与收敛思维对预测科学构思能力至关重要。

Abstract: Measuring the creativity of large language models (LLMs) is essential for designing methods that can improve creativity and for enhancing our scientific understanding of this ability. To accomplish this, it has become common in recent years to administer tests of human creativity to LLMs. Although these tests provide a convenient and fully automated way to score "creativity," their validity as measures of machine creativity has not been established, and these tests already have limited validity as predictors of human creativity. To address this problem, we conduct the first large-scale, systematic study assessing the effectiveness of human creativity tests for predicting the creative achievement of LLMs across three target constructs: creative writing, divergent thinking, and scientific ideation. We find that the Divergent Association Task (DAT) and the Conditional DAT are the best predictors of creative writing and divergent thinking, respectively, but that test effectiveness varies significantly by construct, and no single test predicts all constructs well. Moreover, contrary to popular belief, no existing test reliably predicts scientific ideation ability. Motivated by this problem, we introduce the Divergent Remote Association Test (DRAT), a vocabulary-space test that assesses both convergent and divergent thinking in a single instrument. The DRAT is the first and only creativity test for LLMs that is a significant predictor of scientific ideation ability, demonstrating robustness across major design choices. Furthermore, the performance gain of the DRAT is not recoverable from any linear combination of the Divergent Association Task and the Remote Associates Test, indicating that assessing divergent and convergent thinking in the same test is essential to reliably predicting scientific ideation ability.

</details>


### [256] [RealICU: Do LLM Agents Understand Long-Context ICU Data? A Benchmark Beyond Behavior Imitation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13542)
*Chengzhi Shen,Weixiang Shen,Tobias Susetzky,Chen,Chen,Jun Li,Yuyuan Liu,Xuepeng Zhang,Zhenyu Gong,Daniel Rueckert,Jiazhen Pan*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 80.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了RealICU基准，一个用于评估大语言模型在重症监护室（ICU）场景下临床决策支持能力的回溯标注数据集，揭示了现有LLM在时序推理中的召回-安全权衡和锚定偏差两大失败模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ICU基准将临床医生的历史行为视为金标准，但这些行为是在信息不完整、时间上下文有限的条件下做出的，可能并非最优，因此难以真正评估AI系统的推理能力。作者希望构建一个更严谨的、基于医生回顾完整患者轨迹后标注的基准来评估LLM。

Method: 从MIMIC-IV中选取94名患者，由资深医生在回顾完整轨迹后对每30分钟窗口进行标注，构建RealICU-Gold（930个窗口）；再通过医生验证的LLM（Oracle）扩展至RealICU-Scale（11,862个窗口）。定义了四个任务：患者状态评估、急性问题识别、推荐行动、危险行动识别。并引入ICU-Evo结构化记忆智能体研究长程时序推理。

Result: 现有LLM（包括记忆增强版本）在RealICU上表现不佳，暴露出两个失败模式：临床推荐的召回-安全权衡（Recall-Safety Tradeoff）以及对患者早期解读的锚定偏差（Anchoring Bias）。ICU-Evo改善了长程推理但未能完全消除安全缺陷。

Conclusion: RealICU为在高风险医疗场景中测量和提升AI时序决策支持能力提供了一个临床上有依据的测试平台，表明当前LLM在复杂ICU时序推理方面仍有显著局限。

Abstract: Intensive care units (ICU) generate long, dense and evolving streams of clinical information, where physicians must repeatedly reassess patient states under time pressure, underscoring a clear need for reliable AI decision support. Existing ICU benchmarks typically treat historical clinician actions as ground truth. However, these actions are made under incomplete information and limited temporal context of the underlying patient state, and may therefore be suboptimal, making it difficult to assess the true reasoning capabilities of AI systems. We introduce RealICU, a hindsight-annotated benchmark for evaluating large language models (LLMs) under realistic ICU conditions, where labels are created after senior physicians review the full patient trajectory. We formulate four physician-motivated tasks: assess Patient Status, Acute Problems, Recommended Actions, and Red Flag actions that risk unsafe outcomes. We partition each trajectory with 30-min windows and release two datasets: RealICU-Gold with 930-window annotations from 94 MIMIC-IV patients, and RealICU-Scale with 11,862 windows extended by Oracle, a physician-validated LLM hindsight labeler. Existing LLMs including memory-augmented ones performed poorly on RealICU, exposing two failure modes: a recall-safety tradeoff for clinical recommendations, and an anchoring bias to early interpretations of the patient. We further introduce ICU-Evo to study structured-memory agents that improves long-horizon reasoning but does not fully eliminate safety failures. Together, RealICU provides a clinically grounded testbed for measuring and improving AI sequential decision-support in high-stakes care. Project page: https://chengzhi-leo.github.io/RealICU-Bench/

</details>


### [257] [Multimodal Hidden Markov Models for Persistent Emotional State Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12838)
*Anamika Ragu,Aneesh Jonelagadda*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种轻量级框架，利用sticky factorial HDP-HMM对多模态（视频、音频、文本）情感表征进行建模，以捕捉对话中的情感阶段变化，并通过LLM-as-a-Judge等指标评估，证明其相比传统HMM更优，且能以低计算成本提升LLM在情感不稳定阶段的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有情感识别方法多停留在话语层面，无法捕捉对话中持续的情感阶段动态变化，而临床等应用场景需要可解释、轻量级的情感轨迹分析。

Method: 使用sticky factorial HDP-HMM对多模态（视频、音频、文本）的valence-arousal表征进行时序建模，自动学习对话中的情感阶段（regime）；采用LLM-as-a-Judge、几何一致性、时序一致性等指标进行评价。

Result: sticky HDP-HMM相比高斯HMM产生更可解释的情感阶段序列，计算成本远低于LLM-based对话状态追踪方法；在临床数据集的问答实验中，利用情感阶段信息进行上下文增强可提升LLM在情感不稳定阶段的回答质量。

Conclusion: 该框架为大规模、可解释、轻量化的对话情感动态分析提供了可行路径，尤其适用于临床等应用场景。

Abstract: Tracking an interpretable emotional arc of a conversation via the sentiment of individual utterances processed as a whole is central to both understanding and guiding communication in applied, especially clinical, conversational contexts. Existing approaches to emotion recognition operate at the utterance level, obscuring the persistent phases that characterize real conversational dynamics. We propose a lightweight framework that models conversational emotion as a sequence of latent emotional regimes using sticky factorial HDP-HMMs over multimodal valence-arousal representations derived from simultaneous video, audio and textual input. We evaluate the quality of regime prediction using LLM-as-a-Judge, geometric, and temporal consistency metrics, demonstrating that the sticky HDP-HMM produces more interpretable regime sequences than the baseline Gaussian HMM at a fraction of the computational cost of LLM-based dialogue state tracking methods. In addition, Question-Answer experiments in a clinical dataset suggest that meaningful emotional phases can reliably be recovered from multimodal valence-arousal trajectories and used to improve the quality of LLM responses in unstable affective regimes via context augmentation. This framework thus opens a path toward interpretable, lightweight, and actionable analysis of conversational emotion dynamics at scale.

</details>


### [258] [Position: Agentic AI System Is a Foreseeable Pathway to AGI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12966)
*Junwei Liao,Shuai Li,Muning Wen,Jun Wang,Weinan Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文挑战了"单一模型规模化是通向AGI的唯一路径"这一主流观点，提出**Agentic AI（智能体系统）** 是掌握现实世界复杂异构任务的必要范式。通过理论推导，对比了单一学习器与智能体系统的优化约束差异，从简单路由机制推广到有向无环图（DAG）拓扑，证明智能体AI在泛化能力和样本效率上具有指数级优势，并讨论了与混合专家模型（MoE）的联系及现有多智能体框架的不稳定性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 质疑"规模化单一模型"这一主流信条，认为仅靠扩大单一模型规模不足以实现AGI，因为现实任务分布本质上是异构且复杂的，需要更灵活的Agentic范式。

Method: 通过严格的理论推导，对比单一学习器与Agentic系统的优化约束，从简单路由机制扩展到通用DAG拓扑结构，从理论上论证Agentic AI在泛化与样本效率上的指数级优势。

Result: 理论证明了Agentic AI在泛化能力和样本效率上相比单一模型具有指数级优势；揭示了与MoE的联系；指出了当前多智能体框架存在不稳定性问题。

Conclusion: 呼吁研究界更多关注Agentic AI范式，认为其是超越单一模型规模化、通向AGI的关键路径。

Abstract: Is monolithic scaling the only path to AGI? This paper challenges the dogma that purely scaling a single model is sufficient to achieve Artificial General Intelligence. Instead, we identify Agentic AI as a necessary paradigm for mastering the complex, heterogeneous distribution of real-world tasks. Through rigorous theoretical derivations, we contrast the optimization constraints of monolithic learners against the efficiency of Agentic systems, progressing from simple routing mechanisms to general Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) topologies. We demonstrate that Agentic AI achieves exponentially superior generalization and sample efficiency. Finally, we discuss the connection to Mixture-of-Experts, reinterpret the instability of current multi-agent frameworks, and call for greater research focus on Agentic AI.

</details>


### [259] [Formal Conjectures: An Open and Evolving Benchmark for Verified Discovery in Mathematics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13171)
*Moritz Firsching,Paul Lezeau,Salvatore Mercuri,Miklós Z. Horváth,Yaël Dillies,Calle Sönne,Eric Wieser,Fred Zhang,Thomas Hubert,Blaise Agüera y Arcas,Pushmeet Kohli*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 提出了 Formal Conjectures 基准测试，包含 2615 个用 Lean 4 形式化的数学问题陈述（1029 个开放猜想+836 个已解决问题），用于评估 AI 在研究级数学推理方面的能力，并已在开放猜想发现中取得实际成果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着自动推理系统的快速发展，需要研究级的正式数学问题来准确评估其能力。现有的基准测试要么是已解决的习题级问题，要么缺乏形式化验证，无法衡量 AI 在真实前沿数学研究中的推理水平。

Method: 从活跃数学研究领域收集问题，用 Lean 4 形式化；构建结构化接口连接数学家与 AI/人类求解者；采用开源社区协作确保正确性；利用 AI 生成的证明/反证作为审计机制迭代改进基准；提供标准化评估设置和冻结子集基线结果。

Result: 构建了包含 2615 个形式化问题陈述的基准，已有 1029 个开放猜想和 836 个已解决问题；该基准已被用于发现新的数学成果（包括解决开放猜想）；提供了基线结果，展示了可攀升的信号。

Conclusion: 该基准能够有效衡量当前自动推理系统在研究级数学上的前沿能力，且通过社区协作和 AI 审计机制可持续迭代优化，为评估和改进 AI 数学推理提供了有价值的基础设施。

Abstract: As automated reasoning systems advance rapidly, there is a growing need for research-level formal mathematical problems to accurately evaluate their capabilities. To address this, we present Formal Conjectures, an evolving benchmark of currently 2615 mathematical problem statements formalized in Lean 4. Sourced from areas of active mathematical research, the dataset features 1029 open research conjectures providing a zero-contamination benchmark for mathematical proof discovery, and 836 solved problems for proof autoformalization. Notably, the repository provides a structured interface connecting mathematicians who formalize and clarify problems with the AI systems and humans attempting to solve them. Demonstrating its immediate utility, the benchmark has already been leveraged to make new mathematical discoveries, including the resolution of open research conjectures. We describe our approach to ensuring the correctness of these formalizations in a collaborative open-source project where contributions stem from an active community. In this framework, AI-generated proofs and disproofs serve as a valuable auditing mechanism to iteratively improve the fidelity of the benchmark. Finally, we provide a standardized evaluation setup and report baseline results on frozen evaluation subsets, demonstrating a climbable signal that measures the current frontier of automated reasoning on research-level mathematics.

</details>


### [260] [VERA-MH: Validation of Ethical and Responsible AI in Mental Health](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13318)
*Luca Belli,Kate H. Bentley,Josh Gieringer,Emily Van Ark,Nilu Zhao,Pradip Thachile,Matt Hawrilenko,Millard Brown,Adam M. Chekroud*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: VERA-MH 是一个针对心理健康支持场景中聊天机器人安全性的临床验证评估框架，通过三步流程（对话模拟、对话评判、模型评分）评估聊天机器人对自杀意念风险用户的回应能力，并对四大主流LLM提供商进行了评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 聊天机器人在心理健康支持等非原始设计领域的使用日益增多，但缺乏针对性的安全性评估工具，尤其是对存在自杀意念等危机状态的用户回应的安全性评估。

Method: 三步流程：(1) 用另一个聊天机器人模拟基于临床指导开发的用户角色与待评估聊天机器人对话；(2) 使用LLM-as-a-Judge配合临床开发的逐步是非题评分流程进行评判；(3) 聚合对话结果形成最终评估。

Result: 提出了VERA-MH框架，并展示了针对四大领先LLM提供商的评估结果。

Conclusion: VERA-MH提供了首个临床验证的心理健康支持场景聊天机器人安全性评估方法，通过结构化的三步流程和临床指导的评估标准，能够有效评估模型在自杀意念等危机情境下的表现。

Abstract: Chatbot usage has increased, including in fields for which they were never developed for--notably mental health support. To that end, we introduce Validations of Ethical and Responsible AI in Mental Health (VERA-MH), a novel clinically-validated evaluation for safety of chatbots in the context of mental health support. The first iteration of VERA-MH focuses on Suicidal Ideation (SI) risks, by assessing how well chatbots can responds to users that might be in crisis.
  VERA-MH is comprised of three steps: conversation simulation, conversation judging and model rating. First, to simulate conversations with the chatbot under evaluation, another chatbot is tasked with role-playing users based on specific personas. Such user personas have been developed under clinical guidance, to make sure that, among others, multiple risk factors, demographic characteristics and disclosure factors were represented. In the judging step, a second support model is used as an LLM-as-a-Judge, together with a clinically-developed rubric. The rubric is structured as a flow, with a single Yes/No question asked each time, to improve answers' consistency and highlight models' failure modes. In the last stage, results of each conversation are aggregated to present the final evaluation of the chatbot. Together with the framework, we present the result of the evaluations for four leading LLM providers.

</details>


### [261] [RS-Claw: Progressive Active Tool Exploration via Hierarchical Skill Trees for Remote Sensing Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13391)
*Liangtian Liu,Zeyuan Wang,Ziyu Li,Kai Ouyang,Zichao Tang,Chengfu Liu,Haifeng Li,Hanwen Yu,Wentao Yang,Cheng Yang,Dongyang Hou*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出RS-Claw，一种基于主动探索范式的遥感智能体架构，通过技能封装（Skill encapsulation）对工具描述进行层次化组织，使智能体能够按需顺序决策，先读工具摘要选择技能分支，再动态加载详细描述，最终实现精确调用。在Earth-Bench基准上，该方法实现了高达86%的输入令牌压缩，全面优于Flat和RAG基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有遥感智能体采用被动选择范式（全工具注册或RAG检索）来调用工具，但在海量、多源异构的遥感工具生态中，难以动态平衡"上下文负载"与"工具集完整性"：全工具注册导致长任务中上下文空间不足，RAG检索可能在关键步骤遗漏关键工具。

Method: 提出RS-Claw架构，核心是技能封装技术——对工具描述进行层次化组织，智能体先通过阅读工具摘要选择相关技能分支，再动态加载详细工具描述，最终实现精确调用。这是一种主动探索范式，智能体在工具空间中主动探索而非被动选择。

Result: 在Earth-Bench基准上，RS-Claw实现高达86%的输入令牌压缩，有效过滤语义噪声、释放推理空间，在复杂推理评估中全面优于Flat和RAG基线方法。

Conclusion: 主动探索范式（技能封装+层次化工具选择）能有效解决海量工具场景下上下文负载与工具完整性的矛盾，为遥感领域复杂任务智能体设计提供了新思路。

Abstract: The rise of multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) is shifting remote sensing (RS) intelligence from "see" to "action", as OpenClaw-style frameworks enable agents to autonomously operate massive RS image-processing tools for complex tasks. Existing RS agents adopt a passive selection paradigm for tool invocation, relying on either full tool registration (Flat) or retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). However, in the massive and multi-source heterogeneous RS tool ecosystem, such passive mechanisms struggle to dynamically balance "context load" and "toolset completeness" throughout task reasoning, thus exhibiting inherent limitations: full tool registration triggers context space deficits during long-horizon tasks, whereas RAG retrieval may omit critical tools in essential steps. To overcome these bottlenecks, this paper redefines tool selection by arguing that the agent should act as an active explorer within the tool space. Based on this perspective, we propose RS-Claw, a novel RS agent architecture. By leveraging Skill encapsulation technology at the tool end, this architecture hierarchically structures tool descriptions, enabling the agent to execute on-demand sequential decision-making: initially selecting relevant skill branches by reading only tool summaries, then dynamically loading detailed descriptions, and ultimately achieving precise invocation. This active paradigm not only significantly liberates the agent's context space but also effectively ensures the accurate hit rate of critical tools during long-horizon reasoning. Systematic experiments on the Earth-Bench benchmark demonstrate that RS-Claw's active exploration mechanism effectively filters semantic noise and substantially frees up reasoning space, achieving an input token compression ratio of up to 86%, and comprehensively outperforming existing Flat and RAG baselines across complex reasoning evaluations.

</details>


### [262] [ScioMind: Cognitively Grounded Multi-Agent Social Simulation with Anchoring-Based Belief Dynamics and Dynamic Profiles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13725)
*Yitian Yang,Yiqun Duan,Linghan Huang,Yiqi Zhu,Francesco Bailo,Chunmeizi Su,Huaming Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 提出ScioMind框架，将结构化观点动力学与LLM智能体推理结合，通过记忆锚定信念更新规则、分层记忆架构和动态智能体配置文件，在政策辩论场景中提升了社会模拟的行为现实性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM多智能体社会模拟中，要么依赖固定更新规则缺乏认知基础，要么将信念变化完全交给无约束的LLM交互，缺乏认知合理性。作者希望桥接这两种范式，构建更具认知真实性的社会模拟框架。

Method: 1) 记忆锚定的信念更新规则，通过个性调节锚定强度影响被说服程度；2) 分层记忆架构支持持久、经验驱动的信念形成；3) 基于语料库检索的动态智能体配置文件，实现异质性个性和内部状态演化。

Result: 在现实政策辩论场景中，动态配置文件提升了观点多样性，记忆与反思减少了不稳定振荡，锚定机制产生了更符合政治心理学模式的持久信念轨迹。

Conclusion: 认知驱动的设计为LLM社会模拟提供了新颖解决方案，同时在稳定性和行为现实性上取得改进。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based multi-agent simulation offers a powerful testbed for studying social opinion dynamics. Yet current approaches often adopt two contrasting methods: either relying on fixed update rules with limited cognitive grounding or delegating belief change largely to unconstrained LLM interaction. We introduce ScioMind, a cognitively grounded simulation framework that bridges these paradigms by combining structured opinion dynamics with LLM-based agent reasoning. ScioMind integrates three key components: 1) a memory-anchored belief update rule that modulates susceptibility to influence via personality-conditioned anchoring strength; 2) a hierarchical memory architecture that supports persistent, experience-driven belief formation; and 3) dynamic agent profiles derived from a corpus-grounded retrieval pipeline, enabling heterogeneous personalities, rationales, and evolving internal states. We evaluate ScioMind on multiple case studies in a real-world policy debate scenario. Across metrics including polarisation, diversity, extremization, and trajectory stability, the proposed components consistently yield improvements in behavioural realism. In particular, dynamic profiles increase opinion diversity, memory and reflection reduce unstable oscillation, and anchoring induces persistent belief trajectories that better align with patterns reported in political psychology. These results suggest that our cognitively grounded design provides a novel solution to LLM-based social simulation that improves both stable and behavioural realism

</details>


### [263] [Mechanism Plausibility in Generative Agent-Based Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12824)
*Patrick Zhao,David Huu Pham,Nicholas Vincent*

Main category: cs.MA

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出“机制合理性量表”（Mechanism Plausibility Scale），将LLM驱动的基于智能体建模（ABM）和社会模拟中模型的评估分为四个层次，区分“生成充分性”（能否复现现象）与“机制合理性”（如何产生现象），并借鉴科学哲学和机制文献，明确能力、预测与解释之间的区别。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM被广泛用于ABM和社会模拟，但研究者容易混淆“模型能生成现象”（能力）和“模型能解释现象”（解释）这两个概念。由于缺乏统一的评估框架，建模者难以判断模拟结果是在提升预测能力还是提供了真正的机制性解释。本文旨在引入哲学视角，为这一区分提供可操作的评估尺度。

Method: 整合近期LLM-ABM研究与当代科学哲学文献，将“合理性”（plausibility）操作化为四个层次。每个层次从生成充分性和机制合理性两个维度进行评价，并明确预测模型与解释模型在此框架中的不同角色。

Result: 提出了一个四层级量表：层级1（仅生成现象但机制不明）、层级2（生成现象+机制约束）、层级3（生成现象+合理的机制关联）、层级4（生成现象+机制上可解释/可验证）。每一层级清晰区分了模型是否只是“能做出结果”与是否“能解释结果如何产生”。

Conclusion: 该量表为LLM驱动的社会模拟提供了一种更严谨的评估方法，帮助研究者避免将预测能力错误地等同于解释能力，并促进跨学科对话（AI、社会科学、科学哲学）。未来可用于指导ABM的设计和结果解读。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can generate high-level diverse phenomena without explicitly programmed rules. This capability has led to their adoption within different agent-based models (ABMs) and social simulations. Recently, research has aim to test whether they are capable of generating different phenomena of interest, for example, human behavior on social media platforms or performance in game-theoretic scenarios.
  However, capability, prediction, and explanation are different -- drawing from the philosophy of science and mechanisms literature, \textit{explanation} requires showing, to some degree, how a phenomenon is produced by related organized entities and activities. For modelers, describing the characteristics of an experiment or whether a simulation provides progress in capability (or explanation), can be difficult without being grounded in potentially distant research areas.
  We integrate recent work on LLM-ABMs with contemporary philosophy of science literature and use it to operationalize a definition of `plausibility' in a four-level scale. Our scale separates the evaluation of a model's generative sufficiency (ability to reproduce a phenomenon) from its mechanistic plausibility (how the phenomenon could be produced), and clarifies the distinct roles of different models, such as predictive and explanatory ones. We introduce this as the Mechanism Plausibility Scale.

</details>


### [264] [Embodied Multi-Agent Coordination by Aligning World Models Through Dialogue](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12920)
*Vardhan Dongre,Dilek Hakkani-Tür*

Main category: cs.MA

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了基于LLM的具身智能体在部分可观测环境下能否通过自然语言对话实现真正的世界模型对齐，而非表面协调。论文扩展了PARTNR基准，引入对话通道，并提出了一套衡量世界模型对齐的框架（观测收敛性、信息新颖性、信念敏感消息传递）。实验表明，对话虽能大幅减少动作冲突（40-83个百分点），但任务成功率反而低于静默协调，揭示了当前LLM在真正对齐上的不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在部分可观测环境中，具身智能体间的有效协作需要通信来弥合信息差距，但现有LLM智能体是否真正具备通过通信实现世界模型对齐的能力尚不明确。作者旨在量化这种"表面协调"与"真正对齐"之间的差距。

Method: 扩展PARTNR基准，引入自然语言对话通道；提出世界模型对齐框架，包含三个指标：观测收敛性（私有世界模型是否随时间对齐）、信息新颖性（消息是否传递对方缺乏的信息）、信念敏感消息传递（智能体是否建模对方的知识状态）。在三种LLM上进行实验对比。

Result: 对话将动作冲突减少40-83个百分点，但任务成功率低于无通信的静默协调。通过所提指标，论文刻画了当前模型在表面协调与真正世界模型对齐之间的差距。

Conclusion: 当前LLM具身智能体虽然通过对话能减少冲突，但并未实现真正的世界模型对齐，反而因通信开销或误导性信息降低了任务成功率。现有模型在信念建模和信息传递方面仍有显著不足。

Abstract: Effective collaboration between embodied agents requires more than acting in a shared environment; it demands communication grounded in each agent's evolving understanding of the world. When agents can only partially observe their surroundings, coordination without communication is provably hard, but communication can, in principle, bridge this gap by allowing agents to share observations and align their world models. In this work, we examine whether LLM-based embodied agents actually realize the ability to communicate. We extend PARTNR, a benchmark for collaborative household robotics, with a natural-language dialogue channel that enables two agents with partial observability to communicate during task execution. To evaluate whether dialogue leads to genuine world-model alignment rather than superficial coordination, we propose a framework for measuring world-model alignment defined over per-agent world graphs: observation convergence (do private world models align over time?), information novelty (do messages convey what the partner lacks?), and belief-sensitive messaging (do agents model what their partner knows?). Our experiments across three LLMs reveal that dialogue reduces action conflicts 40 to 83 percentage points but degrades task success relative to silent coordination. Using our metrics, we characterize the gap between superficial coordination and genuine world-model alignment, and identify where current models fall on this spectrum.

</details>


### [265] [Agentic Interpretation: Lattice-Structured Evidence for LLM-Based Program Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12694)
*Jacqueline L. Mitchell,Chao Wang*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 提出"agentic interpretation"框架，将基于格（lattice）的静态分析范式引入LLM驱动的程序推理，通过将高层分析目标分解为局部claims并在有限高度格中追踪LLM判断，结合工作列表算法来提升分析的可解释性和可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM能够访问传统静态分析无法获取的信息（如文档、安全公告、API合约），但直接要求LLM做一次性全程序分析存在脆弱性——将多个证据依赖的判断压缩为单一不透明答案，无法暴露哪些结论被支持或质疑，也无法利用中间发现指导后续搜索。

Method: 提出agentic interpretation框架：1) 将高层分析目标分解为局部claims；2) 在有限高度的格（lattice）中追踪LLM对每个claim的判断；3) 使用工作列表算法（worklist algorithm）管理claims及其判断的演化过程。形式化建模并探索设计空间。

Result: 通过一个依赖不透明第三方组件的代码分析示例展示了该方法的可行性，但该工作目前主要是框架提出和形式化建模，尚未提供大规模实验评估结果。

Conclusion: Agentic interpretation为LLM驱动的程序分析提供了一种更严谨、可解释的范式，融合了静态分析的结构化纪律与LLM的语义理解能力。该框架有助于解决直接LLM分析的不透明性问题。

Abstract: Large language models can consult information that fixed static analyzers cannot, such as documentation, current security advisories, version-specific metadata, and informal API contracts. This makes LLMs a compelling option for program analyses that depend on information beyond the source program, or that are otherwise not amenable to conventional static analyzers. However, directly asking an LLM for a one-shot whole-program analysis is brittle because it compresses many evidence-dependent judgments into a single opaque answer, rather than exposing which conclusions are supported or disputed and using intermediate findings to guide later, more focused searches. In this paper, we propose agentic interpretation, a framework that brings the discipline of lattice-based static analysis to LLM-driven program reasoning. At a high level, agentic interpretation decomposes a high-level analysis goal into localized claims, and tracks the LLM's judgment about each claim in a finite-height lattice. A worklist algorithm governs how claims and their judgments evolve during the analysis. We introduce a formal model of agentic interpretation, explore the design space it opens, and illustrate the approach with a worked example analyzing code that depends on opaque third-party components.

</details>


### [266] [ChipMATE: Multi-Agent Training via Reinforcement Learning for Enhanced RTL Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12857)
*Zhongkai Yu,Yichen Lin,Chenyang Zhou,Yuwei Zhang,Kun Zhou,Junxia Cui,Haotian Ye,Zhengding Hu,Zaifeng Pan,Ruiyi Wang,Yujie Zhao,Hejia Zhang,Jingbo Shang,Jishen Zhao,Yufei Ding*

Main category: cs.MA

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: ChipMATE是首个自训练多智能体RTL代码生成框架，通过Verilog与Python参考模型相互验证实现无金标准测试的代码生成，在4B和9B基座上达到75.0%和80.1% pass@1，超越DeepSeek V4（1600B）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有API-based智能体系统与工业实践脱节：依赖金标准测试平台、使用闭源API无法满足芯片厂商气隙安全要求、无法利用厂商专有RTL代码库进行训练；自训练模型虽解决了部署约束，但仍是单轮生成器，忽视了验证在工业流程中的关键作用。

Method: 1) 双智能体架构：Verilog智能体+Python参考模型智能体，互验输出无金标准；2) 基于回溯的推理工作流防止错误跨轮传播；3) 两阶段训练：先独立训练每个智能体饱和代码生成能力，再联合训练团队协作；4) 混合数据生成框架产出6.44万高质量参考模型训练样本。

Result: VerilogEval V2上4B模型pass@1达75.0%，9B模型达80.1%，超越所有现有自训练模型，并超越DeepSeek V4（1600B参数）。

Conclusion: ChipMATE通过多智能体互验机制有效弥合了RTL代码生成与工业实践间的鸿沟，验证了自训练多智能体框架在资源受限场景下的巨大潜力。

Abstract: Existing API-based agentic systems for RTL code generation are fundamentally misaligned with industrial practice: they assume a golden testbench is available at generation time, rely on closed-source APIs incompatible with chip vendors' air-gapped security requirements, and cannot be trained on vendors' proprietary RTL codebases, leaving valuable internal data unused. Recent self-trained models address the deployment constraint but remain single-turn generators that overlook the critical role of verification in real industrial flows.
  To bridge these gaps, we present ChipMATE, the first self-trained multi-agent framework for RTL generation. Inspired by industrial practice where correctness emerges from cross-comparison between independently written RTL modules and reference models, ChipMATE pairs a Verilog agent with a Python reference-model agent that mutually verify each other's outputs without any golden oracle. We design a backtrack-based inference workflow to prevent error propagation across turns, and a two-stage training pipeline that first trains each agent individually to saturate its code-generation capability, then trains the team jointly to collaborate effectively. To support the training, we further build a hybrid data-generation framework that produces 64.4K high-quality reference model training samples. ChipMATE achieves 75.0\% and 80.1\% pass@1 on VerilogEval V2 with 4B and 9B base models, outperforming all existing self-trained models and even DeepSeek V4 with 1600B parameters. Our code and model weights are publicly available in https://github.com/zhongkaiyu/ChipMATE.

</details>


### [267] [EcoGEO: Trajectory-Aware Evidence Ecosystems for Web-Enabled LLM Search Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12887)
*Hengwei Ye,Jiasheng Mao,Zhenhan Guan,Zheng Tian*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出EcoGEO框架，将生成式引擎优化（GEO）从单页面层面提升到环境层面，通过构建协调的证据生态系统（TRACE）来影响LLM agent的浏览轨迹，从而提升目标产品的推荐率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GEO研究仅关注单页面内容优化，但实际agentic搜索涉及多步浏览、链接跳转、证据合成等复杂过程，页面之间的组织结构和交互路径同样重要，因此需要从生态系统层面研究GEO。

Method: 提出TRACE方法：构建一个协调的证据生态系统，包含agent面向的导航入口页面和异构支持页面，通过共享术语、内部链接和一致的产品属性来引入、验证和强化目标产品，从而影响agent的浏览轨迹。

Result: 在OPR-Bench上，TRACE在目标产品推荐率上持续优于页面级GEO基线。轨迹级指标显示目标结果爬取、特定目标搜索和内部链接爬取均有显著提升。

Conclusion: GEO研究应从页面级转向生态系统级范式，通过设计协调的证据环境来引导LLM agent的搜索、浏览和答案合成过程，效果优于单纯增加目标相关内容。

Abstract: Web-enabled LLM agents are changing how online information influences search outcomes. \ Existing Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) studies mainly focus on individual webpages. \ However, agentic web search is not a single-document setting: an agent may issue queries, crawl pages, follow links, reformulate searches, and synthesize evidence across multiple browsing steps. \ Influence therefore depends not only on page content, but also on how pages are organized, connected, and encountered along the agent's browsing trajectory. \ We study this shift through \textbf{Ecosystem Generative Engine Optimization} (\textbf{EcoGEO}), which treats GEO as an environment-level influence problem for web-enabled LLM agents. \ To instantiate this perspective, we propose \textbf{TRACE}, a \textbf{Trajectory-Aware Coordinated Evidence Ecosystem}. \ Given a recommendation query and a fictional target product, our method builds a controlled evidence environment that coordinates an agent-facing navigation entry page with heterogeneous support pages. \ These pages use shared terminology, internal links, and consistent product attributes to introduce, verify, and reinforce the target product. We evaluate our method on OPR-Bench, a benchmark for open-ended product recommendation. \ Experiments show that it consistently outperforms page-level GEO baselines in final target recommendation. \ Trajectory-level metrics further show increased initial target-result crawls, target-specific follow-up searches, and internal-link crawls, suggesting that the gains come from shaping the agent's evidence-acquisition process rather than merely adding more target-related content. \ Overall, our findings support an ecosystem research paradigm for GEO, where web-enabled LLM agents are studied in relation to the broader evidence environments that guide search, browsing, and answer synthesis.

</details>


### [268] [Ego2World: Compiling Egocentric Cooking Videos into Executable Worlds for Belief-State Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13335)
*Qinchuan Cheng,Zhantao Gong,Pengzhan Sun,Angela Yao,Xulei Yang,Shijie Li*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 72.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Ego2World，一个将第一人称烹饪视频转化为可执行的符号化世界的基准测试，用于评估具身智能体在部分可观测环境下的规划与记忆能力。实验表明，信念维护（belief maintenance）是具身智能体评估中一个关键但常被忽视的目标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有具身智能体基准测试存在两大缺陷：第一人称视频数据集虽然真实但无法交互，交互式模拟器虽然支持执行但依赖合成场景和手控动力学，存在sim-to-real差距，且常假设完全可观测状态。因此需要一个既能真实反映部分观测特性，又能支持交互执行的基准。

Method: 基于HD-EPIC视频数据集，Ego2World从视频标注中提取可复用的图转换规则，构建隐藏的符号化世界图。评估时，模拟器维护真实隐藏图，智能体仅基于局部观测和执行反馈构建自身信念图，通过两者分离强制智能体在不观测真实世界状态的情况下更新记忆并重新规划。

Result: 1) 动作重叠分数会高估物理状态的成功率；2) 持久性信念记忆（persistent belief memory）能提升任务完成度，同时减少重复的视觉探索。

Conclusion: 信念维护应成为具身智能体评估的首要目标，Ego2World为具身智能体在部分可观测环境下的规划、记忆和推理提供了更真实的测试平台。

Abstract: Embodied agents in household environments must plan under partial observation: they need to remember objects, track state changes, and recover when actions fail. Existing benchmarks only partially test this ability. Egocentric video datasets capture realistic human activities but remain passive, while interactive simulators support execution but rely on synthetic scenes and hand-crafted dynamics, introducing a sim-to-real gap and often assuming fully observable state. We introduce Ego2World, an executable benchmark that turns egocentric cooking videos into executable symbolic worlds governed by graph-transition rules. Built on HD-EPIC, Ego2World derives reusable transition rules from video annotations and executes them in a hidden symbolic world graph. During evaluation, the simulator maintains the hidden world graph, while the agent plans over its own partial belief graph using only local observations and execution feedback. This separation forces agents to update memory and replan without observing the true world state. Experiments show that action-overlap scores overestimate physical-state success, and that persistent belief memory improves task completion while reducing repeated visual exploration -- suggesting that belief maintenance should be a first-class target of embodied-agent evaluation.

</details>


### [269] [Can LLM Agents Simulate Dynamic Networks? A Case Study on Email Networks with Phishing Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12507)
*Siqi Miao,Ziyang Chen,Yuhong Luo,Hans Hao-Hsun Hsu,Mufei Li,Kaiqing Zhang,Pan Li*

Main category: cs.SI

Relevance: 72.0

TL;DR: 本文指出LLM多智能体系统在模拟人类行为时，虽然能生成合理的微观交互，但无法捕捉宏观网络拓扑结构。作者提出两种扩展：1) 用数据驱动的事件触发器维持长期交互；2) 集成Hawkes过程建模时间动态。方法在合成钓鱼攻击网络方面展示了应用价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM多智能体系统能模拟微观交互，但从动态网络视角看，无法复现真实的宏观拓扑结构和时间动态，限制了在信息传播、网络安全等依赖网络动态的领域应用。

Method: 1) 为LLM智能体增加数据驱动的事件触发器，有机维持长时程交互；2) 集成Hawkes过程精确建模时间激活动态。这两个扩展可轻松集成到现有仿真框架中。

Result: 该方法使LLM MAS能够同时捕捉合理的微观模式和宏观拓扑结构；并在合成钓鱼攻击通信网络场景中验证了有效性，揭示了威胁如何利用结构漏洞。

Conclusion: 提出的扩展有效弥合了LLM多智能体系统在微观行为与宏观网络动态之间的鸿沟，为开发下一代网络安全防御提供了新工具。

Abstract: While Large Language Model (LLM) multi-agent systems (MAS) offer a transformative approach to simulating human behavior in complex systems, it remains largely unexplored whether these simulations can replicate realistic structural and temporal dynamics from a dynamic network perspective. Our evaluation indicates that existing frameworks excel at generating plausible micro-level interactions but fail to capture the emergent, macroscopic topologies necessary for domains that rely on realistic network dynamics, such as modeling information propagation and cybersecurity threats. To bridge this gap, we introduce two easily integrable extensions to simulation frameworks to ensure they preserve macroscopic network fidelity: 1) augmenting LLM agents with data-driven event triggers to organically sustain long-horizon interactions, and 2) integrating Hawkes processes to accurately model temporal activation dynamics. Our approach allows LLM MAS to capture both plausible micro-level patterns and macroscopic topologies. We further demonstrate the utility of this framework in synthesizing realistic phishing campaigns within evolving communication networks. The study reveals how threats exploit structural vulnerabilities, highlighting the potential of our framework for developing next-generation defenses. Our code is available at https://github.com/Graph-COM/NSL.

</details>


### [270] [Watermarking Should Be Treated as a Monitoring Primitive](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13095)
*Toluwani Aremu,Nils Lukas,Jie Zhang*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 72.0

TL;DR: 本文提出水印应作为监控原语，并引入基于观察者的威胁模型，证明即使零比特水印在多密钥设置下也能实现实体级归属，揭示了归属与监控之间的双重用途张力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有水印评估仅关注对抗者在单样本层面的规避/误报攻击，但忽视了观察者可通过聚合输出信号推断实体级信息的风险，需建立更全面的威胁模型。

Method: 提出基于观察者的威胁模型，分析聚合攻击下多密钥水印的归属泄露；论证外部监控可从密钥相关的统计结构中涌现；探讨分布保持或不可检测方案对监控的缓解作用。

Result: 零比特水印在多密钥设置下也能实现实体归属；外部监控可随时间从密钥依赖的统计结构中涌现，但可被分布保持方案缓解。

Conclusion: 水印评估应超越单样本鲁棒性，考虑聚合和基于观察者的能力，归属与监控之间存在内在的双重用途张力。

Abstract: Watermarking is widely proposed for provenance, attribution, and safety monitoring in generative models, yet is typically evaluated only under adversaries who attempt to evade detection or induce false positives at the level of individual samples. We argue that watermarking should be treated as a monitoring primitive, and that internal monitoring is unavoidable given per-entity attribution keys and messages, as well as detector access. We introduce an observer-based threat model in which observers can aggregate watermark signals across outputs to infer entity-level information, showing that even zero-bit watermarking enables attribution under multi-key settings. We further show that external monitoring can emerge over time from persistent, key-dependent statistical structure, although this depends on watermark design and may be mitigated by distribution-preserving or undetectable schemes. Our findings reveal a fundamental dual-use tension between attribution and monitoring, motivating evaluation of watermarking beyond per-sample robustness to account for aggregation and observer-based capabilities.

</details>


### [271] [Harnessing Agentic Evolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13821)
*Jiayi Zhang,Yongfeng Gu,Jianhao Ruan,Maojia Song,Yiran Peng,Zhiguang Han,Jinyu Xiang,Zhitao Wang,Caiyin Yang,Yixi Ouyang,Bang Liu,Chenglin Wu,Yuyu Luo*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 本文提出AEvo，一种将智能体进化形式化为交互环境的元编辑框架，通过元智能体编辑驱动进化的程序或上下文，实现长期有效搜索，在智能体和推理基准上提升26%，并在开放优化任务上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能体进化方法要么是固定手写流程（模块化但僵硬），要么是通用智能体（灵活但长期漂移），两者都积累了丰富证据却缺乏组织这些证据并修正进化机制的稳定接口。本文旨在解决这一长期进化中的机制更新问题。

Method: 将智能体进化形式化为交互环境，把累积的进化上下文作为过程级状态；引入AEvo元编辑框架，元智能体不直接提出下一个候选，而是编辑控制未来进化的程序或智能体上下文，统一驱动基于程序和基于智能体的两种进化范式。

Result: 在智能体和推理基准上，AEvo超越5种进化基线，相对最强基线提升26%；在三个开放端优化任务中，超越4种进化基线，在相同迭代预算下达到SOTA。

Conclusion: AEvo通过元编辑统一了程序驱动和智能体驱动的进化，使累积证据在长期搜索中变得可操作，显著提升了进化效率和效果。

Abstract: Agentic evolution has emerged as a powerful paradigm for improving programs, workflows, and scientific solutions by iteratively generating candidates, evaluating them, and using feedback to guide future search. However, existing methods are typically instantiated either as fixed hand-designed procedures that are modular but rigid, or as general-purpose agents that flexibly integrate feedback but can drift in long-horizon evolution. Both forms accumulate rich evidence over time, including candidates, feedback, traces, and failures, yet lack a stable interface for organizing this evidence and revising the mechanism that drives future evolution. We address this limitation by formulating agentic evolution as an interactive environment, where the accumulated evolution context serves as a process-level state. We introduce AEvo, a harnessed meta-editing framework in which a meta-agent observes this state and acts not by directly proposing the next candidate, but by editing the procedure or agent context that controls future evolution. This unified interface enables AEvo to steer both procedure-based and agent-based evolution, making accumulated evidence actionable for long-horizon search. Empirical evaluations on agentic and reasoning benchmarks show that AEvo outperforms five evolution baselines, achieving a 26 relative improvement over the strongest baseline. Across three open-ended optimization tasks, AEvo further outperforms four evolution baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance under the same iteration budget.

</details>


### [272] [Quantifying LLM Safety Degradation Under Repeated Attacks Using Survival Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12869)
*Zvi Topol*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 本文提出将生存分析方法应用于LLM越狱攻击评估，通过时间-事件建模来刻画模型在持续攻击下的脆弱性动态变化，而不仅仅是二元的成功/失败指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM越狱攻击评估框架通常只报告二元成功/失败指标，无法捕捉在持续性对抗压力下攻击成功的时间动态特性，缺乏对模型脆弱性随时间演变的深入理解。

Method: 将"越狱时间"建模为生存结局，应用生存分析技术估计风险函数、生存曲线以及与成功攻击相关的风险因素，在HarmBench数据集上对三个LLM进行评估。

Result: 不同模型展现出不同的脆弱性特征：一个模型在迭代攻击下快速退化，另外两个模型表现出持续的适度脆弱性。

Conclusion: 生存分析为LLM安全评估提供了严谨的方法论，能为模型开发者和应用开发者提供可操作的见解。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in a wide range of applications, yet remain vulnerable to adversarial jailbreak attacks that circumvent their safety guardrails. Existing evaluation frameworks typically report binary success/failure metrics, failing to capture the temporal dynamics of how attacks succeed under persistent adversarial pressure. This preliminary work proposes a novel evaluation framework that applies survival analysis techniques to characterize LLM jailbreak vuln`erability. Our approach models the time-to-jailbreak as a survival outcome, enabling estimation of hazard functions, survival curves, and risk factors associated with successful attacks. We evaluate three LLMs against a subset of prompts from the HarmBench dataset spanning three attack categories. Our analysis reveals that models exhibit distinct vulnerability profiles: while one model demonstrates rapid degradation under iterative attacks, the two other models show consistent moderate vulnerability. Our framework provides actionable insights for model and LLM application developers and establishes survival analysis as a rigorous methodology for LLM safety evaluation.

</details>


### [273] [AgentLens: Revealing The Lucky Pass Problem in SWE-Agent Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12925)
*Priyam Sahoo,Gaurav Mittal,Xiaomin Li,Shengjie Ma,Benjamin Steenhoek,Pingping Lin,Yu Hu*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 论文指出传统SWE智能体评估仅看最终测试（binary信号）会混淆"幸运通过"与真正解决问题的方法，提出AgentLens框架（基于前缀树接收器PTA和上下文意图标注器）对轨迹进行过程级评估，发现约10.7%的通过轨迹实为"幸运通过"，并基于质量分数将轨迹划分为幸运/扎实/理想三档，且质量排名与通过率排名差异显著（最高变动5个位置）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SWE智能体评估仅依赖最终测试是否通过（binary信号），将严谨的方案与混沌的试错过程视为等价。作者通过实验证明这种等价性在经验上不成立——许多"通过"轨迹实际上依赖不规范的依赖归因（Lucky Pass），因此需要过程级评估框架来区分解决方案的质量。

Method: 提出AgentLens框架：(1) 构建任务级前缀树接收器（PTA）参考，融合同一任务的多个通过轨迹；(2) 使用上下文敏感意图标注器，基于轨迹历史而非仅工具名称将动作分类为探索/实现/验证/编排；(3) 基于PTA对齐和浪费信号计算质量分数。(4) 数据集：2,614条OpenHands轨迹（8种模型后端，60个SWE-bench Verified任务），筛选出1,815条有足够通过轨迹的子集。

Result: 在通过轨迹中，10.7%为幸运通过（回归循环、盲目重试、缺少验证、时间无序等）。质量分数将轨迹分为Lucky/Solid/Ideal三档。不同后端模型的幸运率差异显著（0.5%~23.2%），按质量分数排名与按通过率排名最多相差5个位置。

Conclusion: 仅依赖测试通过率的评估方式存在严重偏差，掩盖了智能体行为的本质差异。过程级评估（AgentLens）能更准确反映SWE智能体的真实能力，且不同模型在过程质量上的差异远大于通过率指标所显示的。

Abstract: Evaluation of software engineering (SWE) agents is dominated by a binary signal: whether the final patch passes the tests. This outcome-only view treats a principled solution and a chaotic trial-and-error process as equivalent. We show that this equivalence is empirically false. We evaluate 2,614 OpenHands trajectories from eight model backends on 60 SWE-bench Verified tasks. Of these, 47 have enough passing trajectories to construct task-level process references, yielding a 1,815-trajectory evaluation subset. Among passing trajectories in this subset, 10.7% exhibit behavior we call a Lucky Pass: regression cycles, blind retries, missing verification, or temporally disordered exploration, implementation, and verification.
  We introduce AgentLens, a framework for process-level assessment of SWE-agent trajectories, and release AgentLens-Bench, a dataset of 1,815 trajectories annotated with quality scores, waste signals, divergence points, and 47 task-level Prefix Tree Acceptor (PTA) references. AgentLens builds PTA references by merging multiple passing solutions for the same task, and uses a context-sensitive intent labeler to assign actions to Exploration, Implementation, Verification, or Orchestration based on trajectory history rather than tool identity alone.
  On AgentLens-Bench, the quality score separates passing trajectories into Lucky, Solid, and Ideal tiers and further decomposes Lucky Passes into five recurring mechanisms. Across the eight model backends, Lucky rates range from 0.5% to 23.2%, and some models move by as many as five rank positions when ranked by quality score instead of pass rate. We release the anonymized project repository, including the AgentLens-Bench dataset and AgentLens SDK, at https://github.com/microsoft/code-agent-state-trajectories/.

</details>


### [274] [AI Harness Engineering: A Runtime Substrate for Foundation-Model Software Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13357)
*Hailin Zhong,Shengxin Zhu*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 本文提出软件工程能力源于模型-工具-环境系统（而非仅模型能力），形式化了AI工具工程（AI Harness Engineering）框架，包含11个组件责任和4级工具阶梯（H0-H3），并提出了基于轨迹的评估协议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自主软件工程代理在真实开发场景中不可靠，主流观点将问题归因于模型能力不足。本文认为真正的瓶颈在于运行时工具（runtime substrate/harness）的设计缺陷，因此需要系统化地形式化和研究这一工具层。

Method: 1) 形式化AI工具工程（AI Harness Engineering），定义11个组件责任（任务规范、上下文选择、工具访问、项目记忆、任务状态、可观测性、失败归因、验证、权限、熵审计、干预记录）; 2) 提出4级工具阶梯（H0-H3），逐步暴露运行时支持; 3) 设计基于轨迹的评估协议，将每次代理运行转换为可审计的情节包（episode package）。

Result: 在控制验证任务上应用该框架，不同工具级别生成的情节包在证据结构上存在系统性差异：低级工具只产生最终补丁，高级工具产生复现日志、失败归因、确定性需求检查和结构化验证报告。

Conclusion: 自主软件工程的核心问题应从"基础模型能否生成补丁"转向"模型-工具-环境系统能否产生可验证正确、可归因、可维护的变更"。本文概述了基础模型软件代理所需运行时系统的研究路线。

Abstract: Foundation models have transformed automated code generation, yet autonomous software-engineering agents remain unreliable in realistic development settings. The dominant explanation locates this gap in model capability. We propose a different locus: software-engineering capability emerges from a model-harness-environment system, in which a runtime substrate -- the harness -- mediates how a foundation-model agent observes a project, acts on it, receives feedback, and establishes that a change is complete. We formalize this substrate as an AI Harness Engineering and identify eleven component responsibilities: task specification, context selection, tool access, project memory, task state, observability, failure attribution, verification, permissions, entropy auditing, and intervention recording. We operationalize the harness through a four-level ladder (H0-H3) that progressively exposes runtime support to the agent, and we propose a trace-based evaluation protocol that converts each agent run into an auditable episode package. Applied to a controlled validation task, the framework yields episode packages whose evidence structure varies systematically with harness level: lower levels produce only a final patch, higher levels produce reproduction logs, failure attributions, deterministic requirement checks, and structured verification reports. The framework reframes the central question of autonomous software engineering from whether a foundation model can produce a patch to whether the model-harness-environment system can produce a verifiably correct, attributed, and maintainable change. We outline a research program for the runtime systems that foundation-model software agents will require.

</details>


### [275] [(How) Do Large Language Models Understand High-Level Message Sequence Charts?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13773)
*Mohammad Reza Mousavi*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 该论文通过129个语义任务测试了三个LLM（Gemini-3, GPT-5.4, Qwen-3.6）对高层消息序列图（HMSCs）形式语义的理解能力，发现整体准确率约52%，对基本语义理解较好（88%），但在抽象组合（36%）和迹/LTS推理（42%）上表现不佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管LLM被广泛用于软件开发自动化，但它们对处理对象的语义理解是否一致尚不清楚，特别是对于具有严格形式语义的架构设计规约（如HMSCs）缺乏研究。

Method: 设计129个覆盖HMSC语义不同层面的任务（基本事件/排序、抽象组合、迹/LTS），测试三个LLM并评估准确性。

Result: 整体准确率约52%；基本语义88%，抽象组合36%，迹/LTS 42%。所有模型在核心域和显式因果依赖上表现糟糕，从未在语义保持变换中使用这些概念。

Conclusion: LLM对形式语义仅有中等程度理解，尤其在高级语义推理任务上存在显著不足，暗示当前LLM难以可靠地处理需要严格语义理解的架构设计任务。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are being employed widely to automate tasks across the software development life-cycle. It is, however, unclear whether these tasks are performed consistently with respect to the semantics of the artefacts being handled. This question is particularly under-researched concerning architectural design specification. In this paper, we address this question for High-Level Message Sequence Charts (HMSCs). These are visual models with a rigorous formal semantics that have been used for various purposes, including as a foundation for Sequence Diagrams in the Unified Modelling Language (UML). We examine whether LLMs "understand" the semantics of HMSCs by examining three LLMs (Gemini-3, GPT-5.4, and Qwen-3.6) on how they perform 129 semantic tasks ranging from querying basic semantic constructs in HMSCs (i.e., events and their ordering) to semantic-preserving abstractions and compositions, and calculating the set of traces and trace-equivalent labelled transition systems. The results show that LLMs only have a modest understanding of the formal semantics of HMSCs (ca. 52% overall accuracy), with great variability across different semantic concepts: while LLMs seem to understand the basic semantic concepts of MSCs (ca. 88% accuracy), they struggle with semantic reasoning in tasks involving abstraction and composition (ca. 36% accuracy) and traces and LTSs (ca. 42% accuracy). In particular, all three LLMs struggle with the notions of co-region and explicit causal dependencies and never employed them in semantic-preserving transformations.

</details>


### [276] [CHAL: Council of Hierarchical Agentic Language](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12718)
*Tommaso Giovannelli,Griffin D. Kent*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 68.0

TL;DR: 本文提出CHAL框架，将多智能体辩论从追求正确答案的任务转向可反驳领域（defeasible domains）的信念优化，通过图结构信念表示（CBS）、梯度驱动的信念更新机制和可配置的元认知价值系统，实现结构化、可审计的辩证推理过程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM多智能体辩论方法存在结构性局限：辩论轨迹呈现鞅性质（martingale）、多数投票主导性能提升、LLM在轮次间置信度虚高而非校准。作者认为辩论的真正价值不在追求ground-truth任务，而在可反驳领域——任何立场原则上都可被更好的推理驳倒。

Method: CHAL框架包含三个核心设计：(1) CHAL信念模式（CBS）——基于贝叶斯启发的图结构信念表示；(2) 梯度驱动的动态机制——将信念论点的强度作为可微目标进行信念修正；(3) 元认知价值系统——将认识论、逻辑学和伦理学的价值体系作为可配置超参数，控制智能体推理和裁决结果。

Result: 消融实验表明：裁决者的价值系统决定潜在信念空间中的辩论整体轨迹；多智能体多样性完善所有参与者的信念；框架在不同领域具有泛化能力。

Conclusion: CHAL是首个将多智能体辩论视为可反驳领域上的结构化信念优化框架。其产生的可审计信念制品为可反驳论证的专用评测套件奠定了基础，有助于构建推理和价值承诺透明、对齐且受人类监督的AI系统。

Abstract: Multi-agent debate has emerged as a promising approach for improving LLM reasoning on ground-truth tasks, yet current methodologies face certain structural limitations: debate tends to induce a martingale over belief trajectories, majority voting accounts for most observed gains, and LLMs exhibit confidence escalation rather than calibration across rounds. We argue that the genuine value of debate, and dialectic systems as a whole, lies not in ground-truth tasks but in defeasible domains, where every position can in principle be defeated by better reasoning. We present the Council of Hierarchical Agentic Language (CHAL), a multi-agent dialectic framework that treats defeasible argumentation as an engine for belief optimization. Each agent maintains a CHAL Belief Schema (CBS), a graph-structured belief representation with a Bayesian-inspired architecture, that facilitates belief revision through a gradient-informed dynamic mechanism by leveraging the strength of the belief's thesis as a differentiable objective. Meta-cognitive value systems spanning epistemology, logic, and ethics are elevated to configurable hyperparameters governing agent reasoning and adjudication outcomes. We provide a series of ablation experiments that demonstrate systematic and interpretable effects: the adjudicator's value system determines the debate's overall trajectories in latent belief space, council diversity refines beliefs for all participants, and the framework generalizes across broad fields. CHAL is, to our knowledge, the first framework to treat multi-agent debate as structured belief optimization over defeasible domains. Further, the auditable belief artifacts it produces establish the foundation for dedicated evaluation suites for defeasible argumentation, with broader implications for building AI systems whose reasoning and value commitments are transparent, aligned, and subject to human oversight.

</details>


### [277] [Think Twice, Act Once: Verifier-Guided Action Selection For Embodied Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12620)
*Nishad Singhi,Christian Bialas,Snehal Jauhri,Vignesh Prasad,Georgia Chalvatzaki,Marcus Rohrbach,Anna Rohrbach*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: VegAS是一种测试时框架，通过生成验证器从多个候选动作中筛选最可靠的选择，提升基于MLLM的具身体代理在复杂分布外场景中的鲁棒性，在Habitat和ALFRED基准上取得最高36%的相对性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLM驱动的具身体代理虽具备强视觉语言知识和链式推理能力，但在面临分布外挑战性场景时表现脆弱，缺乏鲁棒性。

Method: 提出Verifier-Guided Action Selection (VegAS)，在推理时对多个候选动作进行采样，使用生成式验证器选择最可靠动作；同时采用LLM驱动的数据合成策略，自动构建包含失败案例的多样化课程数据来训练验证器。

Result: 在Habitat和ALFRED环境的多项具身推理基准上，VegAS一致提升泛化性能，在最困难的多目标长程任务上相比强CoT基线获得最高36%的相对性能提升。

Conclusion: 通过显式的验证步骤和合成失败案例训练，可以有效提升MLLM具身体代理在分布外场景下的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

Abstract: Building generalist embodied agents capable of solving complex real-world tasks remains a fundamental challenge in AI. Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have significantly advanced the reasoning capabilities of such agents through strong vision-language knowledge and chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning, yet remain brittle when faced with challenging out-of-distribution scenarios. To address this, we propose Verifier-Guided Action Selection (VegAS), a test-time framework designed to improve the robustness of MLLM-based embodied agents through an explicit verification step. At inference time, rather than committing to a single decoded action, VeGAS samples an ensemble of candidate actions and uses a generative verifier to identify the most reliable choice, without modifying the underlying policy. Crucially, we find that using an MLLM off-the-shelf as a verifier yields no improvement, motivating our LLM-driven data synthesis strategy, which automatically constructs a diverse curriculum of failure cases to expose the verifier to a rich distribution of potential errors at training time. Across embodied reasoning benchmarks spanning the Habitat and ALFRED environments, VeGAS consistently improves generalization, achieving up to a 36% relative performance gain over strong CoT baselines on the most challenging multi-object, long-horizon tasks.

</details>


### [278] [Revealing Interpretable Failure Modes of VLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12674)
*Isha Chaudhary,Vedaant V Jain,Kavya Sachdeva,Sayan Ranu,Gagandeep Singh*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: REVELIO是一个系统性地发现视觉语言模型（VLM）可解释失效模式的框架，通过多样性波束搜索和高斯过程汤普森采样组合策略，在自动驾驶和室内机器人领域揭示了现有VLM中未报告的安全漏洞。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLM在安全关键应用中被广泛使用，但会在特定现实场景中表现出灾难性故障（失效模式）。现有方法难以在指数级组合空间中高效、系统地发现这些可解释的失效模式。

Method: 提出REVELIO框架，将失效模式定义为可解释领域相关概念的组合；采用多样性感知波束搜索高效映射失效空间，结合高斯过程汤普森采样策略探索更复杂的失效模式，在自动驾驶和室内机器人场景中进行验证。

Result: 在自动驾驶环境中发现VLM空间定位薄弱、忽视主要障碍物导致模拟碰撞；在室内机器人任务中，VLM要么遗漏安全风险，要么过度保守产生误报降低操作效率。

Conclusion: REVELIO能够发现结构化、可解释的失效模式，提供可操作见解以支持VLM的针对性安全改进。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly used in safety-critical applications because of their broad reasoning capabilities and ability to generalize with minimal task-specific engineering. Despite these advantages, they can exhibit catastrophic failures in specific real-world situations, constituting failure modes.
  We introduce REVELIO, a framework for systematically uncovering interpretable failure modes in VLMs. We define a failure mode as a composition of interpretable, domain-relevant concepts-such as pedestrian proximity or adverse weather conditions-under which a target VLM consistently behaves incorrectly. Identifying such failures requires searching over an exponentially large discrete combinatorial space. To address this challenge, REVELIO combines two search procedures: a diversity-aware beam search that efficiently maps the failure landscape, and a Gaussian-process Thompson Sampling strategy that enables broader exploration of complex failure modes.
  We apply REVELIO to autonomous driving and indoor robotics domains, uncovering previously unreported vulnerabilities in state-of-the-art VLMs. In driving environments, the models often demonstrate weak spatial grounding and fail to account for major obstructions, leading to recommendations that would result in simulated crashes. In indoor robotics tasks, VLMs either miss safety hazards or behave excessively conservatively, producing false alarms and reducing operational efficiency. By identifying structured and interpretable failure modes, REVELIO offers actionable insights that can support targeted VLM safety improvements.

</details>


### [279] [Moltbook Moderation: Uncovering Hidden Intent Through Multi-Turn Dialogue](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12856)
*Ali Al-Lawati,Nafis Tripto,Abolfazl Ansari,Jason Lucas,Suhang Wang,Dongwon Lee*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Bot-Mod，一种基于意图检测而非内容过滤的多智能体系统审核框架，通过Gibbs采样引导的多轮对话推断智能体潜在意图，实现对恶意行为的识别。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体系统中，仅靠内容过滤无法识别那些表面上无害但实际具有恶意意图的智能体行为，需要一种基于意图的审核方法。

Method: 通过多轮对话与目标智能体交互，利用Gibbs采样对候选意图假设进行逐步采样，不断缩小可能的智能体目标空间，最终识别其真实意图。

Result: 在基于Moltbook构建的数据集上，Bot-Mod能在多种对抗配置下可靠识别智能体意图，同时对良性行为保持较低的误报率。

Conclusion: 该工作为开放多智能体环境中可扩展的、基于意图的审核奠定了基础。

Abstract: The emergence of multi-agent systems introduces novel moderation challenges that extend beyond content filtering. Agents with {\em malicious intent} may contribute harmful content that appears benign to evade content-based moderation, while compromising the system through exploitative and malicious behavior manifested across their overall interaction patterns within the community. To address this, we introduce \textsc{\textbf{Bot-Mod}} (\textsc{\textbf{Bot-Mod}}eration), a moderation framework that grounds detection in agent intent rather than traditional content level signals. \method{} identifies the underlying intent by engaging with the target agent in a multi-turn exchange guided by Gibbs-based sampling over candidate intent hypotheses. This progressively narrows the space of plausible agent objectives to identify the underlying behavior. To evaluate our approach, we construct a dataset derived from Moltbook that encompasses diverse benign and malicious behaviors based on actual community structures, posts, and comments. Results demonstrate that \textsc{\textbf{Bot-Mod}} reliably identifies agent intent across a range of adversarial configurations, while maintaining a low false positive rate on benign behaviors. This work advances the foundation for scalable, intent-aware moderation of agents in open multi-agent environments.

</details>


### [280] [Sustaining AI safety: Control-theoretic external impossibility, intrinsic necessity, and structural requirements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12963)
*James M. Mazzu*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文利用控制理论论证了在AI系统能力超越外部控制极限后，任何依赖外部强制力的安全策略必然失效，唯一可行的策略必须内在于系统本身，并给出了四个结构性必要条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI系统能力日益增强，现有的外部控制安全策略（如监管、约束）在系统超越人类控制能力后可能失效。作者希望从控制理论的结构层面，严格论证外部强制安全策略的根本局限性，并为可行的替代方案提供形式化条件。

Method: 采用控制理论框架，建立形式化前提（包括可达性条件），通过证明两个主要结果（外部不可能性定理和条件性内在必要性定理），从类层面（class-wide）而非策略层面推导结构性结论。

Result: 1）证明了外部强制执行策略的类层面不可能性：一旦系统影响超出外部控制的可抵消范围，任何依赖外部强制力的策略都会失效。2）证明了残余策略必须是内在的（intrinsic）。3）给出了四个结构性必要条件：安全不依赖外部强制、终端目标初始须安全兼容、目标在自修改下保持稳定、安全随能力增长持续保持。

Conclusion: 外部控制存在根本性局限，AI安全的长期维持需要内在化策略。本文不提供完整方案，而是为"外部控制有限"这一广泛关注的问题提供了形式化结构。

Abstract: As AI systems become increasingly capable, safety strategies must be evaluated not only by how much they reduce present risk, but by whether they could sustain safety once external control can no longer reliably constrain system behavior. This paper addresses that problem by using control theory to clarify, at a structural level, whether externally enforced safety-sustaining strategies can succeed and, if not, what any alternative strategy would have to satisfy in order to be viable. It establishes two main results. First, under explicit premises including a reachability condition, it proves a class-wide external impossibility result: once the system's effects exceed what bounded external control can counteract, no strategy that depends in any degree on continued external enforcement can sustain AI safety. This failure is structural across the entire externally enforced class rather than contingent on any particular strategy. Second, it establishes a conditional class-level necessity result: if at least one candidate safety-sustaining strategy remains after that elimination, then all such remaining strategies must be intrinsic. It then states four structural requirements for viability: safety may not depend on continued external enforcement; the system's terminal objective must be safety-compatible when first formed; that objective must remain stable under self-modification; and safety must continue to be preserved as capability grows. The paper does not propose a complete strategy for sustaining AI safety. Its contribution is to give formal structure to a widely held concern about the limits of external control. It does so by deriving explicit conditional results that identify which safety-sustaining strategies are ruled out and what any remaining strategies must satisfy.

</details>


### [281] [Retrieval-Augmented Tutoring for Algorithm Tracing and Problem-Solving in AI Education](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12988)
*Mragisha Jain,Tirth Bhatt,Griffin Pitts,Aum Pandya,Peter Brusilovsky,Narges Norouzi,Arto Hellas,Juho Leinonen,Bita Akram*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了KITE，一种基于RAG的智能辅导系统，用于辅助算法推理和问题解决教学。它采用意图感知的苏格拉底式回答策略，通过多模态RAG管线检索课程材料，为学生提供针对性提示和引导。实验证明其能生成语境相关且教学合理的回答，并帮助模拟学生模型在程序性问题上更准确地作答。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 学生在学习算法时，需要支持来理解执行过程、调试推理错误以及将程序应用于不熟悉的问题实例。现有的教学辅助工具往往缺乏对上下文的理解和个性化的引导，亟需一个能智能检索课程内容并提供针对性辅导的系统。

Method: KITE采用意图感知的苏格拉底式回答策略，根据学生不同需求提供针对性提示、引导性问题和渐进式脚手架。系统通过多模态RAG管线从课程材料中检索相关信息，确保回答与课程内容一致。评估采用三种方式：RAGAs指标评估回答质量、专家评估教学合理性、以及模拟学生对话管线评估辅导效果。

Result: KITE能产生语境相关且教学合理的回答。在模拟学生实验中，KITE的反馈帮助较弱的学生模型在程序性和追踪问题上产生更准确的后续回答，表明其脚手架能有效支持算法问题解决。

Conclusion: 本文贡献了一个基于检索的智能辅导架构，以及评估检索增强解释和脚手架式问题解决反馈的方法。KITE在辅助算法教学方面展现出潜力。

Abstract: Students learning algorithms often need support as they interpret traces, debug reasoning errors, and apply procedures across unfamiliar problem instances. In this paper, we present KITE (Knowledge-Informed Tutoring Engine), a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)-based intelligent tutoring system designed to serve as a classroom teaching assistant for algorithmic reasoning and problem-solving tasks. KITE uses an intent-aware Socratic response strategy to tailor support to different student needs, responding with targeted hints, guiding questions, and progressive scaffolding intended to strengthen students' algorithmic problem-solving ability. To keep responses aligned with course content, KITE uses a multimodal RAG pipeline that retrieves relevant information from course materials. We evaluate KITE using three forms of assessment: RAGAs-based metrics for response grounding and quality, expert evaluation of pedagogical quality, and a simulated student pipeline in which a weaker language model interacts with KITE across two-turn dialogues and produces revised answers after receiving feedback. Results indicate that KITE produces contextually grounded and pedagogically appropriate responses. Further, using simulated students, KITE's feedback helped the student models produce more accurate follow-up responses on procedural and tracing questions, suggesting that its scaffolding can support algorithmic problem-solving. This work contributes a tutoring architecture and an evaluation approach for assessing retrieval-grounded explanations and scaffolded problem-solving feedback.

</details>


### [282] [An Agentic LLM-Based Framework for Population-Scale Mental Health Screening](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13046)
*Giuliano Lorenzoni,Paulo Alencar,Donald Cowan*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于LangChain agent的LLM管线构建框架，通过策略控制、代理引导评估和冻结/回滚机制实现稳定配置，在抑郁症检测任务中验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 心理健康数据量激增，传统方法难以处理非结构化临床信息并适应患者特定需求，需要智能化的LLM框架来提升可信性、可复现性和适应性。

Method: 将LLM管线的每个阶段封装为LangChain agent，由显式策略和代理引导评估控制，通过逐步锁定验证过的阶段、冻结/回滚机制以及Orchestrator Agent协调预处理、检索、选择、多样性、阈值优化和解码等环节。

Result: 在基于转录的抑郁症检测任务中，框架收敛到稳定配置（余弦相似度、动态Top-k、阈值0.75），控制了评估成本并避免了性能退化。

Conclusion: Agentic AI在大规模临床数据集上实现人群级心理健康筛查具有潜力，能够解决医疗环境中对可信性、可复现性和适应性的关键挑战。

Abstract: Mental health disorders affect millions worldwide, and healthcare systems are increasingly overwhelmed by the volume of clinical data generated from electronic records, telemedicine platforms, and population-level screening programs. At the same time, the emergence of novel AI-based approaches in healthcare calls for intelligent frameworks capable of processing domain-specific unstructured clinical information while adapting to patient-specific needs. This paper proposes an agentic framework for building robust LLM-based pipelines, where each stage is encapsulated as a LangChain agent governed by explicit policies and proxy-guided evaluation. Stages are incrementally locked once validated, ensuring that later adaptations cannot overwrite configurations without demonstrated improvement. The proposed framework evolves from feature-level exploration, through proxy-based tuning and freeze/rollback mechanisms, to full orchestration by an Orchestrator Agent that coordinates preprocessing, retrieval, selection, diversity, threshold optimization, and decoding. A proof-of-concept in transcript-based depression detection demonstrates that the framework converges to stable configurations, such as cosine similarity, dynamic Top-k, and threshold 0.75, while controlling evaluation costs and avoiding regressions. These results highlight the potential of agentic AI to enable population-level mental health screening over large clinical datasets, addressing critical challenges in trustworthiness, reproducibility, and adaptability required in healthcare environments.

</details>


### [283] [What properties of reasoning supervision are associated with improved downstream model quality?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13290)
*Mikołaj Langner,Dzmitry Pihulski,Jan Eliasz,Michał Rajkowski,Przemysław Kazienko,Maciej Piasecki,Jan Kocoń,Teddy Ferdinan*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出了一套内在数据指标，可在微调前预测推理数据集对模型性能的效用，发现预测因子具有规模依赖性：小模型依赖对齐指标，大模型受益于高冗余度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证推理模型的训练数据通常需要昂贵的试错微调循环，缺乏在训练前可靠预测数据效用的方法。

Method: 提出一套定量指标，在8B和11B模型上对波兰推理数据集的语义不同变体进行微调，分析内在指标与下游性能的相关性。

Result: 内在指标与下游模型性能之间存在强且显著的相关性；预测因子具有规模依赖性：小模型依赖对齐指标，大模型受益于高冗余度和详细轨迹。

Conclusion: 建立了一个规模感知的推理数据验证框架，使从业者无需穷举实验即可选择有效的训练集。

Abstract: Validating training data for reasoning models typically requires expensive trial-and-error fine-tuning cycles. In this work, we investigate whether the utility of a reasoning dataset can be reliably predicted prior to training using intrinsic data metrics. We propose a suite of quantitative measures and evaluate their predictive power by fine-tuning 8B and 11B models on semantically distinct variants of a Polish reasoning dataset. Our analysis reveals that these intrinsic metrics demonstrate strong and significant correlations with downstream model performance. Crucially, we find that the predictors of utility are scale-dependent: smaller models rely on alignment-focused metrics to ensure precision, whereas larger models benefit from high redundancy, utilizing verbose traces to solve complex tasks. These findings establish a scale-aware framework for validating reasoning data, enabling practitioners to select effective training sets without the need for exhaustive empirical testing.

</details>


### [284] [Cognifold: Always-On Proactive Memory via Cognitive Folding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13438)
*Suli Wang,Yiqun Duan,Yu Deng,Rundong Zhao,Dai Shi,Xinliang Zhou*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: CogniFold是一种受大脑启发的"始终在线"智能体记忆系统，它将互补学习系统(CLS)理论从两层扩展到三层（海马体、新皮层、前额叶皮层），通过图拓扑自组织实现事件流到认知结构的持续折叠，在多项基准测试中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能体记忆系统仍然是反应式和基于检索的，缺乏将经验自主组织为持久认知结构的能力，无法实现真正自主的智能体。

Method: 将CLS理论从两层扩展到三层（增加前额叶意图层），通过图拓扑自组织实现：认知结构在事件流中主动组装、语义相似时合并、过时时衰减、通过关联回忆重新链接、概念簇密度超过阈值时浮现意图。

Result: 在CogEval-Bench上验证了能产生匹配认知期望和概念涌现的记忆结构；在覆盖5个认知领域的7个基准测试中，同时在传统记忆基准上表现稳健。

Conclusion: CogniFold通过大脑启发的三层记忆架构和自组织机制，实现了从被动检索到主动认知结构构建的跨越，为下一代自主智能体提供了可扩展的记忆解决方案。

Abstract: Existing agent memory remains predominantly reactive and retrieval-based, lacking the capacity to autonomously organize experience into persistent cognitive structure. Toward genuinely autonomous agents, we introduce Cognifold, a brain-inspired "always-on" agent memory designed for the next generation of proactive assistants. CogniFold continuously folds fragmented event streams into self-emerging cognitive structures, bootstrapping progressively higher-level cognition from incoming events and accumulated knowledge. We ground this by extending Complementary Learning Systems (CLS) theory from two layers (hippocampus, neocortex) to three, adding a prefrontal intent layer. Emulating the prefrontal cortex as the locus of intentional control and decision-making, CogniFold achieves this through graph-topology self-organization: cognitive structures proactively assemble under the stream, merge when semantically similar, decay when stale, relink through associative recall, and surface intents when concept-cluster density crosses a threshold. We evaluate structural formation using CogEval-Bench, demonstrating that CogniFold uniquely produces memory structures that match cognitive expectations and concept emergence. Furthermore, across 7 broad-coverage benchmarks spanning five cognitive domains, we validate that CogniFold simultaneously performs robustly on conventional memory benchmarks.

</details>


### [285] [PERCEIVE: A Benchmark for Personalized Emotion and Communication Behavior Understanding on Social Media](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12525)
*Jian Liao,Yujin Zheng,Suge Wang,Jianxing Zheng,Deyu Li*

Main category: cs.SI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出了PERCEIVE，一个双语（英文和中文）大规模基准数据集，整合了作者内容、读者情感反馈、沟通行为、用户属性和社交图五个维度，推动社交媒体情感分析从作者中心转向真正的读者中心范式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有社交媒体情感分析以作者为中心，忽略了不同读者对相同内容产生不同情感反应的主观性，以及个体感知、沟通行为和社交网络之间的关键联系。

Method: 构建PERCEIVE基准，包含五个维度：作者创作内容、读者评论中的真实情感反馈、沟通行为、用户属性和社交图；通过注解读者评论的情感并同步捕获沟通意图，建立情感与行为的内在耦合资源。

Result: 建立了全面的评估协议，测试了包括增强推理能力的大语言模型在内的多种SOTA方法，发现现有方法在处理多面性、用户感知任务时存在显著缺陷。

Conclusion: PERCEIVE为社会智能NLP提供了基础资源和明确方向，推动模型在社交媒体情感上实现更统一的理解。

Abstract: Current emotion analysis in social media is predominantly author-centric, failing to capture the subjective nature of emotional responses across diverse readers. This paradigm overlooks the crucial link between individual perception, communication behavior, and the underlying social network. To bridge this gap, we introduce PERCEIVE, a novel bilingual (English and Chinese) large-scale benchmark that, to the best of our knowledge, is the first to integrate five critical dimensions for social perception: author-created content, genuine readers' emotional feedback (derived from their comments), communication behavior, user attributes, and the social graph. This benchmark enables a paradigm shift towards truly personalized, reader-centric analysis, where different readers' emotional responses to the same content are naturally captured through their real-world interactions. By annotating emotions from reader comments and synchronously capturing communication intent, PERCEIVE provides a unique resource to model the intrinsic coupling between emotion and behavior, grounded in social context. We establish a comprehensive evaluation protocol, testing state-of-the-art methods, including large language models (LLMs) with advanced reasoning enhancement. Our findings reveal significant shortcomings in existing approaches when handling this multifaceted, user-aware task. PERCEIVE offers a foundational resource and clear direction for future research in socially-intelligent NLP, pushing models towards a more unified understanding of emotion on social media.

</details>


### [286] [The critical slowing down in diffusion models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12597)
*Luca Maria Del Bono,Giulio Biroli,Patrick Charbonneau,Marylou Gabrié*

Main category: cond-mat.dis-nn

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文通过O(n)统计场论模型在n→∞高斯极限下的理论分析，揭示了扩散模型在临界点附近采样时存在的临界慢化问题，并证明通过合理设计网络架构（如使用两层网络）可以大幅缓解该问题，使训练时间从二次缩放变为对数缩放。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型在实践中效果显著，但其成功原因和失败条件缺乏理论控制。作者希望在一个可解析求解的统计物理框架下深入理解扩散模型的行为机制。

Method: 在O(n)统计场论模型的高斯极限（n→∞）下进行理论分析；使用匹配精确解的单层网络训练评分模型；引入两层架构和局部评分近似来缓解临界慢化。

Result: 单层网络训练存在严重的临界慢化（训练时间与系统尺寸呈二次缩放）；两层架构可将训练时间降至对数缩放，且不增加参数量。

Conclusion: 扩散模型可以通过合理的架构设计克服临界慢化问题，为理解和改进统计物理及更广泛领域中的学习的采样方法建立了可控的分析框架。

Abstract: Computational sampling has been central to the sciences since the mid-20th century. While machine-learning-based approaches have recently enabled major advances, their behavior remains poorly understood, with limited theoretical control over when and why they succeed.
