Each method converges to a geometrically distinct basin. Low-rank activations diverge from full-rank in later layers as training progresses, with GaLore tracking full-rank most closely. Further, validation perplexity does not translate to downstream performance at every scale. Adding geometric and spectral metrics improves the prediction.

</details>


### [357] [Learning with Rare Success but Rich Feedback via Reflection-Enhanced Self-Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12741)
*Yuwei Zhang,Sha Li,Changlong Yu,Qin Lu,Shuowei Jin,Chengyu Dong,Haoran Liu,Ilgee Hong,Xintong Li,Zhenyu Shi,Bing Yin,Jingbo Shang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 92.0

TL;DR: RESD框架通过反思性自我蒸馏，将失败反馈转化为主动纠错信号，使LLM能在稀有成功场景下持续学习，仅需单次采样即超越GRPO的8倍样本效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自我蒸馏方法将环境反馈视为被动条件信号，严重依赖成功示范，难以在成功样本稀缺的场景下学习。本文旨在解决LLM在稀有成功场景中从环境交互持续学习的难题。

Method: 提出RESD框架：1）对失败轨迹生成反思性回顾，诊断局部错误；2）构建持久全局策略手册，跨训练步骤保留可复用经验；3）利用丰富上下文为自教师提供token级监督，无需成功 rollout 也能提供纠错信号。

Result: 在多个持续学习任务上显著优于标准自我蒸馏基线；与GRPO相比，仅用单次rollout/prompt即达到8倍样本的效率，且早期改进速度更快。

Conclusion: RESD通过将失败反馈转化为主动监督信号，提升了LLM在稀有成功场景下的交互学习效率，实现了更高的样本效率和更快的收敛速度。

Abstract: Enabling Large Language Models (LLMs) to continuously improve from environmental interactions is a central challenge in post-training. While on-policy self-distillation offers a promising paradigm, existing methods predominantly treat environmental feedback as a passive conditioning signal. Consequently, they heavily rely on successful demonstrations and struggle to learn in rare-success regimes. To bridge this gap, we introduce Reflection-Enhanced Self-Distillation (RESD), a framework that transforms raw failure feedback into an active source of corrective supervision. Instead of passively appending feedback, RESD interprets failed trajectories by generating retrospective reflections to diagnose local errors, and curates a persistent global playbook to preserve reusable lessons across training steps. The enriched context enables the self-teacher to provide actionable token-level supervision even in the absence of successful rollouts. Empirical evaluations on multiple continual learning tasks demonstrate that RESD substantially outperforms standard self-distillation baselines. Furthermore, RESD achieves significantly faster early-stage improvement than GRPO with $8\times$ samples using only a single rollout per prompt, highlighting its superior interaction efficiency.

</details>


### [358] [Not Just RLHF: Why Alignment Alone Won't Fix Multi-Agent Sycophancy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12991)
*Adarsh Kumarappan,Ananya Mujoo*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 92.0

TL;DR: 本文发现LLM多智能体管道在模拟同伴分歧下会从正确答案翻转到错误答案（称为屈服率），并反驳了传统上归因于RLHF诱导的谄媚行为——预训练基础模型同样表现出该模式且屈服率更高。通过激活修补定位到中层注意力窗口，发现压力抑制了清洁推理特征而非激活新谄媚回路，单名正确反对者可将屈服率降低54-73个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究LLM多智能体系统在同伴分歧情境下从正确答案翻转到错误答案的机制原因，检验该现象是否真的由RLHF诱导的谄媚行为（sycophancy）导致。

Method: 跨四个模型家族对比基础模型与指令微调变体的屈服率；使用激活修补（activation patching）定位因果关键层；分解通道框架和共识强度两个独立因素；通过两种激活空间干预验证压力对推理特征的抑制作用。

Result: 基础模型比指令变体平均屈服率更高；因果关系定位在窄中层注意力窗口（MLP几乎无贡献）；修补上层窗口可恢复96%的干净-压力P(正确)差距；通道框架与共识强度交互产生47.5个百分点的屈服率差距；单名正确反对者降低屈服率54-73个百分点。

Conclusion: 缓解措施应针对机制层面，在管道级别引入结构化异议（如加入正确反对者），而非依赖提示级别的防御。

Abstract: LLM-based multi-agent pipelines flip from correct to incorrect answers under simulated peer disagreement at rates we term yield, a vulnerability widely attributed to RLHF-induced sycophancy. We test this attribution across four model families and find it largely wrong: pretrained base models exhibit the same substitution pattern as their Instruct variants, averaging higher yield than Instruct. Using activation patching, we localize the corruption to a narrow mid-layer window where attention carries the causal weight and MLP contribution is negligible; patching above this window restores 96% of the clean-to-pressured P(correct) gap. The attack surface decomposes into two independent factors (channel framing and consensus strength) whose interaction produces a 47.5 percentage-point yield gap at majority consensus, preserved across jury sizes $N \in \{4, 5, 6\}$. Two converging activation-space interventions show that pressure suppresses clean-reasoning features rather than activating a new sycophancy circuit. A single correctly-arguing dissenter reduces yield by 54-73 percentage points across all framings tested, whereas the strongest prompt-level defense fails on attack variants outside its design surface. Mitigations should target the mechanism, structured dissent at the pipeline level, rather than prompt-level defenses.

</details>


### [359] [ODRPO: Ordinal Decompositions of Discrete Rewards for Robust Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12667)
*Nirmal Patel,Fei Wang,Inderjit Dhillon*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 90.0

TL;DR: 论文提出ODRPO框架，通过将离散奖励分解为序数二元指标来隔离评估噪声，从而在RLAIF中实现更稳健的策略优化，在Qwen2.5-7B和Qwen3-4B上取得显著提升且计算开销极小。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RLAIF中使用LLM自动评分器提供离散奖励时存在随机性（提示敏感性、采样噪声），这种噪声会传播到GRPO、MaxRL等优势估计器中，破坏归一化统计量和全局学习信号。直接增加采样进行多数投票虽能降噪但计算成本高。

Method: 将离散奖励（如1-10分）分解为一系列序数二元指标（比如是否≥某个阈值），然后独立计算和累积每个阈值上的优势，从而隔离异常评估对全局更新的影响，并隐式构建方差感知的学习课程。

Result: 在Qwen2.5-7B和Qwen3-4B上，ODRPO相比基线在FACTS-grounding-v2上提升14.8%，在Alpaca-Evals上提升7.5%，且训练时间开销可忽略不计。

Conclusion: ODRPO提供了一种可扩展且稳健的框架，能在噪声离散评估环境下有效对齐模型，理论分析也证实了其优化稳定性。

Abstract: The alignment of Large Language Models (LLMs) utilizes Reinforcement Learning from AI Feedback (RLAIF) for non-verifiable domains such as long-form question answering and open-ended instruction following. These domains often rely on LLM based auto-raters to provide granular, multi-tier discrete rewards (e.g., 1-10 rubrics) that are inherently stochastic due to prompt sensitivity and sampling randomness. We empirically verify the stochasticity of auto-raters that can propagate and corrupt standard advantage estimators like GRPO and MaxRL, as a noisy reward samples can skew normalization statistics and degrade the global learning signal. Empirically, sampling more rewards and taking majority voting may reduce the noise and improve performance, but this approach is computationally expensive. To address this bottleneck, we introduce $\textbf{O}$rdinal $\textbf{D}$ecomposition for $\textbf{R}$obust $\textbf{P}$olicy $\textbf{O}$ptimization ($\textbf{ODRPO}$), a framework that structurally isolates evaluation noise by decomposing discrete rewards into a sequence of ordinal binary indicators. By independently computing and accumulating advantages across these progressively challenging success thresholds, ODRPO prevents outlier evaluations from corrupting the global update while establishing an implicit, variance-aware learning curriculum. Empirically, ODRPO achieves robust performance on Qwen2.5-7B and Qwen3-4B models, outperforming baselines with relative improvements of upto 14.8% on FACTS-grounding-v2 and 7.5% on Alpaca-Evals. Critically, these gains are achieved with negligible training-time overhead, as ODRPO requires no additional compute per step compared to standard estimators. Supported by theoretical analysis confirming its optimization stability, ODRPO provides a scalable and robust framework for aligning models within the noisy, discrete evaluation landscape of modern RLAIF.

</details>


### [360] [Controlling Logical Collapse in LLMs via Algebraic Ontology Projection over F2](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12968)
*Hisashi Miyashita,Mgnite Inc*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 90.0

TL;DR: 本文提出代数本体投影（AOP），将LLM隐藏状态投影到伽罗瓦域F2上，利用仅42个关系对作为代数键，实现了最高93.33%的零样本包含性准确率。同时提出语义结晶化（SC）指标量化代数约束满足度，发现系统提示与指令微调的组合能防止"后期层坍塌"现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究大语言模型内部是否在形式上可验证的代数结构中编码本体论关系，即LLM的推理过程是否具有可形式化的代数基础，而非仅仅是统计近似。

Method: 提出代数本体投影（AOP），将LLM隐藏状态投影到伽罗瓦域F2，借助里氏替换原则约束，仅用42个关系对作为代数键进行零样本推理。提出语义结晶化（SC）指标，量化F2约束满足度并预测零样本准确率。

Result: AOP在Gemma-2 Instruct上达到93.33%零样本包含准确率，跨多个模型族一致达到86.67%；发现"后期层坍塌"现象（7/10条件下出现），即最后几层逻辑一致性系统性退化。

Conclusion: 前向计算可被重新理解为代数组织的迭代过程，LLM的逻辑结构不仅是近似而是形式上可访问的。系统提示充当代数边界条件，与指令微调协同可维持深层逻辑一致性。

Abstract: Do large language models internally encode ontological relations in a formally verifiable algebraic structure? We introduce Algebraic Ontology Projection (AOP), which projects LLM hidden states into the Galois Field F2 under Liskov Substitution Principle constraints, using only 42 relational pairs as algebraic keys. AOP achieves up to 93.33% zero-shot inclusion accuracy on unseen concept pairs (Gemma-2 Instruct with optimized prompt), with consistent 86.67% accuracy observed across multiple model families -- with no model tuning, but through prompt alone.
  This algebraic structure is strongly layer-dependent. We introduce Semantic Crystallisation (SC), a metric that quantifies F2 constraint satisfaction relative to a random baseline and predicts zero-shot accuracy without held-out data. System prompts act as algebraic boundary conditions: only their combination with instruction tuning prevents Late-layer Collapse -- a systematic degradation of logical consistency in the final layers, observed in 7 of 10 conditions. These findings reframe forward computation as an iterative process of algebraic organisation, and open a path toward LLMs whose logical structure is not merely approximated, but formally accessible.

</details>


### [361] [Revisiting Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards from a Contrastive Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12969)
*Feng Zhang,Xinhong Ma,Ziqiang Dong,Xi Leng,Jianfei Zhao,Xin Sun,Yang Yang,Guanjun Jiang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 90.0

TL;DR: 本文提出ConSPO框架，针对GRPO在强化学习推理（RLVR）中的两个结构性问题（似然错位评分和分数不敏感的信用分配），通过用长度归一化的序列对数概率替代裁剪比率分数，并采用InfoNCE对比目标优化，显著提升了数学推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GRPO作为RLVR的代表算法，存在两个关键局限：1) 裁剪比率代理分数与真实生成似然不一致；2) 组内正负样本的信用分配未考虑相对分数差距。这限制了模型推理能力的进一步提升。

Method: ConSPO框架包含三点核心改进：1) 用长度归一化的序列对数概率替代GRPO的裁剪比率分数；2) 采用组内InfoNCE式对比目标，使正样本与同组负样本对比优化；3) 引入课程学习式的间隔调度，从粗略正负排序逐步过渡到强分离。

Result: 在多种主干模型、参数规模和训练数据集上，ConSPO在挑战性数学推理基准上持续优于多个强RLVR基线方法。

Conclusion: ConSPO通过对比式序列级策略优化有效解决了GRPO的两大结构性问题，为RLVR提供了一种更优的替代方案。

Abstract: RLVR has become a widely adopted paradigm for improving LLMs' reasoning capabilities, and GRPO is one of its most representative algorithms. In this paper, we first show that GRPO admits an equivalent discriminative reformulation as a weighted positive-negative score difference. Under this view, GRPO increases sequence-level scores of verified positive rollouts and decreases those of negative rollouts, where the scores are averages of clipped token-level importance sampling ratios. This reformulation reveals two structural limitations of GRPO: likelihood-misaligned scoring, where clipped ratio-based surrogate scores are optimized instead of generation likelihoods, and score-insensitive credit assignment, where rollout-level credit is assigned without accounting for relative score gaps between positive and negative rollouts in the same group. To address these limitations, we propose ConSPO, a framework for Contrastive Sequence-level Policy Optimization in RLVR. ConSPO replaces GRPO's clipped ratio-based scores with length-normalized sequence log-probabilities, aligning the optimized rollout scores with the likelihoods used in autoregressive generation. It then optimizes a group-wise InfoNCE-style objective that contrasts each positive rollout against negative distractors from the same group, enabling credit assignment to depend on their relative scores. This contrastive formulation amplifies updates for poorly separated positives while concentrating suppressive updates on high-scoring negatives. Moreover, ConSPO introduces a curriculum-scheduled margin, guiding optimization from coarse positive-negative ordering in early training toward stronger separation in later stages. Extensive evaluations across diverse backbone models, parameter scales, and training datasets show that ConSPO consistently outperforms several strong RLVR baselines on challenging mathematical reasoning benchmarks.

</details>


### [362] [Large Language Models Lack Temporal Awareness of Medical Knowledge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13045)
*Zihan Guan,Qiao Jin,Guangzhi Xiong,Fangyuan Chen,Mengxuan Hu,Qingyu Chen,Yifan Peng,Zhiyong Lu,Anil Vullikanti*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 90.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了TempoMed-Bench，首个评估LLM在医学领域时间感知能力的基准，通过演化中的指南知识来评测。实验发现LLM存在时间感知缺失：性能随时间逐渐下降而非骤降、历史知识准确率仅为最新知识的25-54%、时间一致性差，且检索工具难以解决此问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有医学知识评估方法基于静态考试式基准，忽略了医学知识是动态演化的（新证据、新治疗），无法评估LLM对时间特定医学知识的推理能力。需要弥补这一评估空白。

Method: 构建TempoMed-Bench基准，基于随时间演化的医学指南知识。评估多个LLM在不同时间点上对up-to-date和historical医学知识的准确性，并分析时间一致性。

Result: (1) LLM性能随时间线性下降而非在知识截止点骤降；(2) 历史知识准确率仅为最新知识的25-54%，存在知识遗忘；(3) 邻近年份预测波动大，时间一致性差；(4) 集成检索工具仅带来-3.15%~14.14%的变化，无法轻易解决。

Conclusion: LLM在医学领域缺乏时间感知能力，这是一个重要但未被充分探索的挑战，需要未来研究开发能更好编码时间特定医学知识的LLM。

Abstract: The existing methods for evaluating the medical knowledge of Large Language Models (LLMs) are largely based on atemporal examination-style benchmarks, while in reality, medical knowledge is inherently dynamic and continuously evolves as new evidence emerges and treatments are approved. Consequently, evaluating medical knowledge without a temporal context may provide an incomplete assessment of whether LLMs can accurately reason about time-specific medical knowledge. Moreover, most medical data are historical, requiring the models not only to recall the correct knowledge, but also to know when that knowledge is correct. To bridge the gap, we built TempoMed-Bench, the first-of-its-kind benchmark for evaluating the temporal awareness of the LLMs in the medical domain through evolving guideline knowledge. Based on the TempoMed-Bench, our evaluation analysis first reveals that LLMs lack temporal awareness in medical knowledge through the key findings: (1) model performance on up-to-date medical knowledge exhibits a gradual linear decline over time rather than a sharp knowledge-cutoff behavior, suggesting that parametric medical knowledge is not strictly bounded by knowledge cutoffs; (2) LLMs consistently struggle more with recalling outdated historical medical knowledge than with up-to-date recommendations: accuracy of historical knowledge is only 25.37%-53.89% of up-to-date knowledge, indicating potential knowledge forgetting effects during training; and (3) LLMs often exhibit temporally inconsistent behaviors, where predictions fluctuate irregularly across neighboring years. We also show that the temporal awareness problem is a challenge that cannot be easily solved when integrated with agentic search tools (-3.15%-14.14%). This work highlights an important yet underexplored challenge and motivates future research on developing LLMs that can better encode time-specific medical knowledge.

</details>


### [363] [Effective Context in Transformers: An Analysis of Fragmentation and Tokenization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13485)
*Amirmehdi Jafari Fesharaki,Mohammadamin Rami,Aslan Tchamkerten*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 90.0

TL;DR: 本文从信息论角度研究了有限上下文预测中，不同序列表示（如字节、字符、子词）对Transformer预测能力的影响，提出了"碎片化"（fragmentation）和"贪婪分词"（greedy tokenization）两个互补现象，分别解释了字节级模型性能损失的原因和分词器能够提升上下文效率的机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在Transformer等有限上下文模型中，同样的数据可以用不同方式表示（字节、字符、子词），但这些表示向模型暴露的信息不同。作者希望从理论层面理解：表示方式的选择如何影响有限上下文预测器的能力上限。

Method: 本文基于Markov源进行理论分析。首先提出"碎片化"概念（将源符号替换为多个更小单元的无损重编码），证明碎片化会严格增加最优有限上下文对数损失，说明这不是优化或容量问题，而是表示本身的固有性质。其次，研究贪婪分词（BPE、WordPiece等）如何将源符号分组为更大单元，证明分词能使较短token窗口起到较长源上下文窗口的作用，并给出了损失保证。

Result: (1) 碎片化导致的理论下界上升，解释了ByT5、CANINE等字节/字符级模型相比子词模型性能差距的内在原因；(2) 贪婪分词在特定条件下可以实现上下文窗口的"压缩"效果，其损失保证取决于分词器覆盖所需源历史的可靠性和压缩率；(3) 提出了一个简单诊断方法：衡量固定token窗口可靠包含的源上下文量。

Conclusion: 本文建立了关于Transformer中表示选择的有限上下文信息论框架，从理论上揭示了子词分词的有效性不仅仅是一个工程实践，而是有其信息论基础；同时为理解字节级模型的局限性提供了严谨的理论解释。

Abstract: Transformers predict over a representation of a sequence. The same data can be written as bytes, characters, or subword tokens, and these representations may be lossless. Yet, under a fixed context window, they need not expose the same information to the model. This raises a basic question: how does the choice of representation change what a finite-context predictor can achieve?
  We study this question on Markov sources and uncover two complementary phenomena. First, we observe that moving to smaller representation units can hurt prediction even when the context window is enlarged to cover the relevant source history. To explain this, we introduce fragmentation: a lossless recoding that replaces each source symbol by several smaller units. We prove that fragmentation can strictly increase the optimal finite-context log-loss, showing that the gap is not merely an optimization or capacity issue, but can be intrinsic to the representation. This gives a theoretical account of the finite-context gap observed in byte- and character-level models such as ByT5 and CANINE relative to subword-tokenized models. Second, we study the opposite direction: greedy tokenization -- BPE, WordPiece, and related methods -- which groups source symbols into larger units. We show that tokenization can make a short token window behave like a longer source-context window, and we give a loss guarantee describing when this is achievable. The guarantee depends on how reliably token windows span the needed source history, together with the compression rate of the tokenizer. This also yields a simple diagnostic for real tokenizers: measuring how much source context a fixed token window reliably contains. Together, the two directions establish a finite-context information-theoretic framework for reasoning about representation choices in Transformers.

</details>


### [364] [High-Rate Quantized Matrix Multiplication II](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13768)
*Or Ordentlich,Yury Polyanskiy*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 90.0

TL;DR: 本文研究基于协方差矩阵的权重量化方法，利用水填充（waterfilling）策略改进GPTQ算法，证明WaterSIC方案在高码率下接近信息论极限，且GPTQ配合随机旋转也接近最优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM权重量化中，现有GPTQ算法对所有坐标均分比特率，未利用协方差信息进行非均匀分配，导致次优性能。作者希望利用经典的水填充理论来优化比特分配，提升量化效果。

Method: 将权重量化建模为加权均方误差（WMSE）信源编码问题，利用水填充（waterfilling）理论进行非均匀比特分配；分析WaterSIC（标量INT量化器）的高码率性能，并与GPTQ及信息论下界对比。

Result: WaterSIC在高码率下：(a) 与基无关，由协方差矩阵行列式决定，不受随机旋转影响；(b) 与信息论极限仅差因子2πe/12（约0.25 bit/entry）。GPTQ配合随机旋转后，在Llama-3-8B上与WaterSIC差距仅0.1 bit，说明其在高码率下也接近最优。

Conclusion: 水填充策略可有效提升LLM权重量化性能；WaterSIC具有基无关和接近最优的理论保证；GPTQ配合随机旋转后在实际中也接近信息论极限。

Abstract: This is the second part of the work investigating quantized matrix multiplication (MatMul). In part I we considered the case of calibration-free quantization, whereas here we discuss the setting where covariance matrix $Σ_X$ of the columns of the second factor is available. This setting arises in the ubiquitous task of weight-only post-training quantization of LLMs.
  Weight-only quantization is related to the problem of weighted mean squared error (WMSE) source coding, whose classical (reverse) waterfilling solution dictates how one should distribute rate between coordinates of the vector. We show how waterfilling can be used to improve practical LLM quantization algorithms (GPTQ), which at present allocate rate equally. A recent scheme (known as ``WaterSIC'') that only uses scalar INT quantizers is analyzed and its high-rate performance is shown to be (a) basis free (i.e., characterized by the determinant of $Σ_X$ and, thus, unlike existing schemes, is immune to applying random rotations); and (b) within a multiplicative factor of $\frac{2πe}{12}$ (or 0.25 bit/entry) of the information-theoretic distortion limit. GPTQ's performance, in turn, is affected by the choice of basis, but for a random rotation and actual $Σ_X$ from Llama-3-8B we find it to be within 0.1 bit (depending on the layer type) of WaterSIC, suggesting that GPTQ with random rotation is also near optimal, at least in the high-rate regime.

</details>


### [365] [Emergent and Subliminal Misalignment Through the Lens of Data-Mediated Transfer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12798)
*Baris Askin,Muhammed Ustaomeroglu,Anupam Nayak,Gauri Joshi,Guannan Qu,Carlee Joe-Wong*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 研究了LLM微调中出现的"涌现性错误对齐"现象，发现它并非简单由有害数据触发，而是微调数据结构、预训练分布和训练通道之间交互作用的结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解LLM在窄域有害数据集微调后涌现出广泛错误对齐行为的机制，为AI安全提供理论基础。

Method: 通过对比实验分析微调与评估提示的功能结构相似性、任务难度、预训练构成等因素对错误对齐的影响；研究"Subliminal Learning"（潜隐学习）现象，并在SFT、on-policy和off-policy蒸馏下比较错误对齐的迁移。

Result: 错误对齐在功能结构相似的提示下更易出现；目标行为被模型掌握越牢固越容易对齐；预训练组成影响后续对齐；有害对齐可通过良性数据（由有害教师生成）传递；不同训练通道（on/off-policy）下对齐迁移表现不同。

Conclusion: 涌现性/潜隐错误对齐应被视为数据与模型结构交互的产物，而非孤立有害样本的直接后果，需从数据角度进行理解与防范。

Abstract: Fine-tuning LLMs on narrow harmful datasets can induce Emergent Misalignment (EM), where models exhibit misaligned behavior far beyond the fine-tuning distribution. We argue that emergent misalignment can be better understood as a data-mediated transfer phenomenon: harmful fine-tuning examples do not induce uniform behavioral spillover, but interact with the structural properties of the dataset and the difficulty of the tasks relative to the model. Across our experiments, we find that misalignment appears more readily when fine-tuning and evaluation prompts share similar underlying functional structure, when prompts leave more room for coherent harmful completions, and when the target behavior has been more reliably learned by the model. The training pipeline itself also matters: pretraining composition shapes later misalignment. We further study Subliminal Learning (SL), where misalignment is transmitted by fine-tuning on seemingly benign data generated by a harmful teacher. Moving beyond the standard SFT setting, we for the first time compare this transfer under off-policy and on-policy distillation as well, allowing us to separate the roles of the teacher guidance and the training data distribution in transmitting misalignment. Together, these results argue for a data-centric view: Emergent/subliminal misalignment should not be treated as a simple consequence of isolated harmful fine-tuning examples, but as the result of interactions between fine-tuning data structure, pretraining distributions, and training channels.

</details>


### [366] [Orthrus: Memory-Efficient Parallel Token Generation via Dual-View Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12825)
*Chien Van Nguyen,Chaitra Hegde,Van Cuong Pham,Ryan A. Rossi,Franck Dernoncourt,Thien Huu Nguyen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: Orthrus是一个统一自回归LLM（精确生成）与扩散模型（并行生成）的双架构框架，通过轻量级可训练模块和精确共识机制，在O(1)额外内存开销下实现高达7.8倍加速，且保证无损推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归解码的序列性限制了高吞吐推理，而扩散语言模型虽能并行生成但存在性能退化、训练成本高且缺乏收敛保证。作者希望解决这一两难困境，同时保留两种范式的优势。

Method: 在冻结的LLM上添加轻量可训练模块，构建并行扩散视图和标准自回归视图的双架构。两者共享同一个KV缓存：自回归头负责上下文预填充构建精确KV表示，扩散头负责并行生成。通过精确共识机制确保两视图一致，实现无损推理。

Result: 在O(1)内存缓存开销和极少量参数增加下，实现最高7.8倍推理加速，且保证生成结果与原始自回归LLM完全一致（无损）。

Conclusion: Orthrus成功统一了自回归的精确生成和扩散的高效并行生成两个看似矛盾的目标，为高吞吐LLM推理提供了一种简单高效的解决方案。

Abstract: We introduce Orthrus, a simple and efficient dual-architecture framework that unifies the exact generation fidelity of autoregressive Large Language Models (LLMs) with the high-speed parallel token generation of diffusion models. The sequential nature of standard autoregressive decoding represents a fundamental bottleneck for high-throughput inference. While diffusion language models attempt to break this barrier via parallel generation, they suffer from significant performance degradation, high training costs, and a lack of rigorous convergence guarantees. Orthrus resolves this dichotomy natively. Designed to seamlessly integrate into existing Transformers, the framework augments a frozen LLM with a lightweight, trainable module to create a parallel diffusion view alongside the standard autoregressive view. In this unified system, both views attend to the exact same high-fidelity Key-Value (KV) cache; the autoregressive head executes context pre-filling to construct accurate KV representations, while the diffusion head executes parallel generation. By employing an exact consensus mechanism between the two views, Orthrus guarantees lossless inference, delivering up to a 7.8x speedup with only an O(1) memory cache overhead and minimal parameter additions.

</details>


### [367] [Certified Robustness under Heterogeneous Perturbations via Hybrid Randomized Smoothing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12876)
*Blaise Delattre,Hengyu Wu,Paul Caillon,Wei Yang Bryan Lim,Yang Cao*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种统一的随机平滑框架，用于处理离散-连续混合输入的多模态模型鲁棒性认证，基于Neyman-Pearson引理推导出闭式一维证书，严格推广了高斯（图像）和离散（文本）随机平滑方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有随机平滑认证方法局限于单模态（连续或离散），无法应对多模态模型中对手联合扰动异构输入（如文本+图像）的威胁，认证失效。

Method: 基于Neyman-Pearson引理分析联合最坏情况问题，通过分解离散和连续噪声的联合似然排序，推导出闭式一维鲁棒性证书，统一了高斯平滑和离散平滑的理论框架。

Result: 在多模态安全过滤任务上，首次实现了对离散文本标记和连续图像像素联合扰动的模型无关Neyman-Pearson认证，证明了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 该工作填补了多模态鲁棒性认证的空白，为混合输入场景下提供严格、可计算的鲁棒性保证，可推广至更广泛的多模态安全应用。

Abstract: Randomized smoothing provides strong, model-agnostic robustness certificates, but existing guarantees are limited to single modalities, treating continuous and discrete inputs in isolation. This limitation becomes critical in multimodal models, where decisions depend on cross-modal semantics and adversaries can jointly perturb heterogeneous inputs, rendering unimodal certificates insufficient. We introduce a unified randomized smoothing framework for mixed discrete--continuous inputs based on an analytically tractable Neyman--Pearson formulation of the joint worst-case problem. By analyzing the joint likelihood ordering induced by factorized discrete and continuous noise, our approach yields a closed-form, one-dimensional certificate that strictly generalizes both Gaussian (image-only) and discrete (text-only) randomized smoothing. We validate the framework on multimodal safety filtering, providing, to our knowledge, the first model-agnostic Neyman--Pearson certificate for joint discrete-token and continuous-image perturbations in interaction-dependent text--image safety filtering.

</details>


### [368] [Revisiting DAgger in the Era of LLM-Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12913)
*Changhao Li,Rushi Qiang,Jiawei Huang,Chenxiao Gao,Chao Zhang,Niao He,Bo Dai*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 本文提出将DAgger（数据集聚合）算法应用于多轮对话LM智能体的训练，通过回合级别的学生-教师策略插值收集轨迹并用教师监督标签训练学生，有效缓解了协变量偏移问题。在SWE-bench Verified上，4B和8B模型分别提升了3.9和3.6个点，4B模型（27.3%）超越已有的8B SWE-agent系统，8B模型（29.8%）超越SWE-Gym-32B。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有长程LM智能体训练方法存在两难困境：SFT提供密集教师监督但受协变量偏移困扰（训练于离策略的教师轨迹），RL with verifiable rewards虽通过在线策略rollout避免了离策略问题但仅提供稀疏结果反馈。本文旨在融合两者优势，实现既能接触真实状态分布又能获得密集监督信号的训练方法。

Method: 重新审视DAgger算法用于多轮LM智能体：算法通过回合级别的学生-教师策略插值收集轨迹（即部分轮次由教师策略执行、部分由学生策略执行），然后在这些轨迹上使用教师提供的监督标签训练学生。通过直接与环境交互，使模型暴露于部署时可能遇到的真实状态，缓解协变量偏移；同时通过模仿教师行为，学生获得丰富的密集反馈。

Result: 在SWE-bench Verified上，DAgger训练相比最强后训练基线提升4B模型+3.9点、8B模型+3.6点。4B模型达27.3%，超越已有8B SWE-agent系统；8B模型达29.8%，超越SWE-Gym-32B，与更强的32B模型差距在5个点以内。在保留的SWE-Gym分割上也有持续提升。

Conclusion: DAgger训练方法对于现代长程LM智能体是有效的，它结合了SFT的密集监督和RL的在线交互优势，在软件工程智能体任务上取得了显著且一致的性能提升。

Abstract: Long-horizon LM agents learn from multi-turn interaction, where a single early mistake can alter the subsequent state distribution and derail the whole trajectory. Existing recipes fall short in complementary ways: supervised fine-tuning provides dense teacher supervision but suffers from covariate shift because it is trained on off-policy teacher trajectories; while reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards avoids this off-policy mismatch by learning from on-policy rollouts but with only sparse outcome feedback. We address this dilemma by revisiting Dataset Aggregation (DAgger) for multi-turn LM agents: the algorithm collects trajectories through a turn-level interpolation of student and teacher policies, and the student is then trained on these trajectories using supervised labels provided by the teacher. By directly interacting with environments, we expose the model to realistic states likely to be encountered during deployment, thereby effectively mitigating covariate shift. Besides, since the student is learned by mimicking the teacher's behavior, it receives rich feedback during learning. To demonstrate DAgger enjoys the benefits of both worlds, we tested the algorithm to train a software-engineering agent with 4B- and 8B-scale student models. On SWE-bench Verified, our DAgger-style training improves over the strongest post-training baseline by +3.9 points at 4B and +3.6 points at 8B. The resulting 4B agent reaches 27.3%, outperforming representative published 8B SWE-agent systems, while the 8B agent achieves 29.8%, surpassing SWE-Gym-32B and coming within 5 points of stronger 32B-scale agents. Together with consistent gains on the held-out SWE-Gym split, these results suggest the effectiveness of DAgger for modern long-horizon LM agents.

</details>


### [369] [Reinforced Collaboration in Multi-Agent Flow Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12943)
*Zheng Wang,Yuang Liu,Yangkai Ding*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 提出MANGO框架，通过流网络构建、强化学习与文本梯度协同优化多智能体协作路径和智能体行为，并引入跳过机制提升效率，在7个基准上取得12.8%性能提升和47.4%效率提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体系统虽能扩展LLM能力，但存在错误传播问题（子优工作流设计或不准确智能体输出导致协作过程中的错误累积），亟需一种数据驱动的框架来优化智能体协作。

Method: 1) 从历史成功工作流构建流网络来组织智能体协作；2) 结合强化学习和文本梯度联合优化工作流路径与智能体行为；3) 引入跳过机制避免冗余更新已优化的智能体，提升效率。

Result: 在7个基准上相比SOTA基线性能提升最高12.8%，效率提升47.4%，且能泛化到未见领域。

Conclusion: MANGO有效缓解了多智能体系统中的错误传播问题，兼具高性能、高效率与良好泛化能力。

Abstract: Multi-agent systems provide a powerful way to extend large language models (LLMs) by decomposing a complex task into specialized subtasks handled by different agents. However, their performance is often hindered by error propagation, arising from suboptimal workflow design or inaccurate agent outputs, which can propagate through the agent collaboration process and degrade final results. To address the challenges, we present MANGO (Multi-Agent Network Gradient Optimization), a data-driven framework that organizes and refines agent collaboration via a flow network constructed from past successful workflows. MANGO integrates reinforcement learning and textual gradients to jointly optimize workflow paths and agent behaviors, while a skipping mechanism prevents redundant updates to well-optimized agents for improving efficiency. Extensive experiments on seven benchmarks show that MANGO achieves up to 12.8% performance improvement over state-of-the-art baselines, enhances efficiency by 47.4%, and generalizes effectively to unseen domains. Our code and datasets are publicly available at https://github.com/openJiuwen-ai/agent-store/tree/main/community/mango.

</details>


### [370] [FeatCal: Feature Calibration for Post-Merging Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13030)
*Yanggan Gu,Shuo Cai,Zihao Wang,Wenjun Wang,Yuanyi Wang,Pengkai Wang,Sirui Huang,Su Lu,Jianmin Wu,Hongxia Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 本文提出FeatCal，一种基于特征漂移理论的前向逐层校准方法，通过闭式解调整合并模型权重以减少特征漂移，在CLIP和GLUE基准上优于现有后合并校准方法，且高效、样本效率高。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模型合并虽然避免了联合训练，但合并后的模型性能往往不如任务专家模型。作者希望理解并弥合这一性能差距。

Method: 提出FeatCal方法：将性能差距归因于特征漂移（特征漂移分解为上游传播和局部不匹配），通过小校准集以前向逐层方式用闭式解（无梯度下降）校准模型权重，减少特征漂移同时保持接近合并权重。

Result: 在CLIP-ViT-B/32上Task Arithmetic达85.5%（vs Surgery 77.0%/ProbSurgery 78.8%），FLAN-T5-base GLUE达85.2%（vs 83.7%/82.2%），8样本/任务可达82.9%，256样本/任务仅需53秒，比基线快约4倍。

Conclusion: FeatCal通过特征漂移理论分析和前向逐层闭式校准，有效提升了合并模型性能，兼具高效率、低样本需求和无需额外模块的优势。

Abstract: Model merging combines task experts into one model and avoids joint training, retraining, or deploying many expert models, but the merged model often still underperforms task experts. We study this performance gap through feature drift, the difference between features produced by the merged model and by the expert on the same input. Our theory decomposes this drift into upstream propagation and local mismatch, tracks how it propagates and combines through later layers in forward order, and links final feature drift to output drift. This view motivates FeatCal, which uses a small calibration set to calibrate the merged model weights layer by layer in forward order, reducing feature drift while staying close to merged weights and preserving the benefits of model merging. FeatCal uses an efficient closed-form solution to update model weights, with no gradient descent, iterative optimization, or extra modules. On the main CLIP and GLUE benchmarks, FeatCal beats Surgery and ProbSurgery, the closest post-merging calibration baselines: 85.5% vs. 77.0%/78.8% on CLIP-ViT-B/32 Task Arithmetic (TA) and 85.2% vs. 83.7%/82.2% on FLAN-T5-base GLUE. On CLIP-ViT-B/32, 8 examples per task reach 82.9%, and 256 examples per task take 53 seconds, about 4x faster than both baselines, showing better sample efficiency and lower calibration cost.

</details>


### [371] [Continual Fine-Tuning of Large Language Models via Program Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13162)
*Hung Le,Svetha Venkatesh*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 提出ProCL框架，受神经科学互补学习系统启发，通过结构化程序记忆槽组织LoRA适配器，实现持续学习场景下快速适应与知识保留的平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有持续LoRA方法将低秩空间视为同质更新区域，缺乏短期更新如何随时间巩固的调节机制，难以平衡快速适应与知识保留。

Method: 将LoRA适配器组织为结构化程序记忆槽，通过输入条件注意力动态检索，使相似输入复用共享适配器区域，同时保留未用容量给未来数据；槽与底层适配器结合，在任务间逐渐积累知识以平衡可塑性与稳定性。

Result: 在多种基准测试上证明了改进的记忆保留和减少的灾难性遗忘，优于其他持续LoRA策略。

Conclusion: ProCL在LoRA参数化内完全运作，无需额外推理成本，有效解决了持续学习中的稳定性-可塑性困境。

Abstract: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT), particularly Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), has become a standard approach for adapting Large Language Models (LLMs) under limited compute. However, in continual settings where models are updated sequentially with small datasets, conventional LoRA updates struggle to balance rapid adaptation and knowledge retention. Existing methods typically treat the low-rank space as a homogeneous update region, lacking mechanisms to regulate how short-term updates are consolidated over time. We propose a continual LoRA framework with \textbf{Pro}gram memory, inspired by \textbf{C}omplementary \textbf{L}earning Systems in neuroscience. Our approach, dubbed \textbf{ProCL}, organizes LoRA adapters into structured program memory slots that are dynamically retrieved through input-conditioned attention. This enables rapid and localized adaptation, encouraging similar inputs to reuse shared adapter regions while reserving unused capacity for future data. The slots are then combined with the underlying adapter, which maintains a distributed representation that gradually accumulates knowledge across tasks to balance plasticity and stability. Our method operates entirely within the LoRA parameterization and incurs no additional inference cost. Experiments on diverse benchmarks demonstrate improved retention and reduced catastrophic forgetting over other continual LoRA strategies.

</details>


### [372] [EMO: Frustratingly Easy Progressive Training of Extendable MoE](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13247)
*Linghao Jin,Chufan Shi,Huijuan Wang,Nuan Wen,Zhengzhong Liu,Eric Xing,Xuezhe Ma*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: EMO是一种渐进式训练框架，通过逐步增加专家数量而非一次性使用全部专家，解决了MoE模型因内存和通信开销膨胀导致的训练效率低下问题，同时保持性能不变。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前MoE训练中，从训练初期就分配过多专家，但早期数据可能不需要这么多专家容量，导致内存和通信成本膨胀，训练效率低下。

Method: 提出EMO框架，将MoE容量视为可扩展内存，在训练过程中逐步增加专家数量。通过显式建模缩放律中的稀疏性，推导出分阶段计算最优的token预算，用于渐进式扩展。

Result: 在大规模实验中，EMO在保持与固定专家设置相同性能的同时，提升了墙钟时间效率，减少了训练时间和GPU成本。

Conclusion: EMO提供了一种简单有效的可扩展MoE训练路径，既保留了大专家池的优势，又降低了训练开销。

Abstract: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models offer a powerful way to scale model size without increasing compute, as per-token FLOPs depend only on k active experts rather than the total pool of E experts. Yet, this asymmetry creates an MoE efficiency paradox in practice: adding more experts balloons memory and communication costs, making actual training inefficient. We argue that this bottleneck arises in part because current MoE training allocates too many experts from the beginning, even though early-stage data may not fully utilize such capacity. Motivated by this, we propose EMO, a simple progressive training framework that treats MoE capacity as expandable memory and grows the expert pool over the course of training. EMO explicitly models sparsity in scaling law to derive stage-wise compute-optimal token budgets for progressive expansion. Empirical results show that EMO matches the performance of a fixed-expert setup in large-scale experiments while improving wall-clock efficiency. It offers a surprisingly simple yet effective path to scalable MoE training, preserving the benefits of large expert pools while reducing both training time and GPU cost.

</details>


### [373] [Building Interactive Real-Time Agents with Asynchronous I/O and Speculative Tool Calling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13360)
*Coleman Hooper,Minwoo Kang,Suhong Moon,Nicholas Lee,Eric Wen,John Wawrzynek,Michael W. Mahoney,Yakun Sophia Shao,Amir Gholami,Kurt Keutzer*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 本文提出异步I/O和推测性工具调用方法，将LLM智能体的推理-执行线程与等待外部信息解耦，实现实时低延迟的复杂多轮工具调用，在云端模型上获得1.3-1.7倍加速，在边缘小模型上（Qwen2.5-3B/Llama-3.2-3B）获得1.6-2.2倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实时交互场景（如语音助手）要求低延迟（<1秒），但LLM智能体的工具调用和工作流推理会带来数秒延迟，难以满足实时性需求。现有方法无法在保持准确性的同时有效降低多轮工具调用的延迟。

Method: 1) 异步I/O：将核心的推理-执行线程与等待用户/环境信息解耦，允许在等待外部延迟时重叠执行智能体处理。2) 推测性工具调用：在智能体不确定是否收到完整信息时，提前执行任务。3) 基于时钟的训练方法（针对小模型）：适配流式输入和异步响应，结合SFT合成数据生成策略。

Result: 云端模型：1.3-1.7倍加速，轻微准确率损失。Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct和Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct小模型：1.6-2.2倍加速，在多个工具调用基准上有效。

Conclusion: 所提方法能有效降低LLM智能体在多轮工具调用场景下的延迟，支持实时交互，且对强云端模型可开箱即用，对小模型也通过训练方法实现了显著加速。

Abstract: There is a growing demand for agentic AI technologies for a range of downstream applications like customer service and personal assistants. For applications where the agent needs to interact with a person, real-time low-latency responsiveness is required; for example, with voice-controlled applications, under 1 second of latency is typically required for the interaction to feel seamless. However, if we want the LLM to reason and execute an agentic workflow with tool calling, this can add can add several seconds or more of latency, which is prohibitive for real-time latency-sensitive applications. In our work, we aim to enable real-time interaction even for agents with complex multi-turn tool calling. We propose Asynchronous I/O, which decouples the core agent reason-and-act thread from waiting for additional information from either the user or environment, thereby allowing for overlapping agentic processing while waiting on external delays. We also propose Speculative Tool Calling as a method to manage task execution when the agent is still unsure if it has received the full information or if additional user information may later be provided. For strong cloud models, our method can be applied out-of-the-box to existing real-time cloud APIs, providing 1.3-1.7$\times$ speedups with minor accuracy loss. To enable real-time interaction with small edge-scale models, we also present a clock-based training methodology that adapts the model to handle streaming inputs and asynchronous responses, and demonstrate a synthetic data generation strategy for SFT. Altogether, this approach provides 1.6-2.2$\times$ speedups with the Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct and Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct models across multiple tool calling benchmarks.

</details>


### [374] [Attention Once Is All You Need: Efficient Streaming Inference with Stateful Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13784)
*Victor Norgren*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于有状态会话的流式推理引擎，通过增量维护KV缓存将预填充移出关键路径，实现查询延迟O(|q|)且与上下文大小无关，并利用空闲GPU周期预计算问题答案，在流式市场数据基准上相比vLLM等传统引擎实现高达5.9x加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统Transformer推理引擎是请求驱动的，每次查询都需执行O(n)的预填充开销。在流式工作负载中，数据持续到达且查询不断增长的上下文，这种开销难以承受。

Method: 提出基于有状态会话的数据驱动计算模型：持久化KV缓存随新数据增量推进；空闲GPU周期预计算注册问题的答案；多租户连续批处理调度器（结合cell-budget准入和前缀感知分组预填充）支持数十个有状态会话在单GPU上共存。

Result: 在流式市场数据基准上，相比vLLM、SGLang、TensorRT-LLM、llama.cpp等传统推理引擎实现高达5.9x加速，且查询延迟随累积上下文增长保持恒定。

Conclusion: 有状态会话的计算模型能有效解决流式场景下预填充开销问题，实现独立于上下文大小的恒定查询延迟，并通过预计算模式进一步提升效率。

Abstract: Conventional transformer inference engines are request-driven, paying an O(n) prefill cost on every query. In streaming workloads, where data arrives continuously and queries probe an ever-growing context, this cost is prohibitive. We introduce a data-driven computational model centred on stateful sessions: a persistent KV cache advanced incrementally as new data arrives, so prefill is moved off the critical path and query latency becomes O(|q|), independent of accumulated context size. Building on this, Flash Queries reclaim idle GPU cycles between data arrivals to pre-evaluate registered questions and return cached answers before the user asks, a pattern that is structurally impossible in stateless engines because they discard intermediate state between requests. A multi-tenant continuous-batching scheduler with cell-budget admission and prefix-aware grouped prefill lets dozens of stateful sessions coexist on a single GPU while preserving full quadratic self-attention. On streaming market-data benchmarks the reference implementation achieves up to 5.9x speedup over conventional inference engines (vLLM, SGLang, TensorRT-LLM, llama.cpp), holding query latency constant as accumulated context grows.

</details>


### [375] [Multi-Rollout On-Policy Distillation via Peer Successes and Failures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12652)
*Weichen Yu,Xiaomin Li,Yizhou Zhao,Xiaoze Liu,Ruowang Zhang,Haixin Wang,Yinyi Luo,Chen Henry Wu,Gaurav Mittal,Matt Fredrikson,Yu Hu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文提出多轮次在线策略蒸馏（MOPD），通过利用学生对同一提示的多个采样轨迹（包括成功和失败）来构建更密集、更信息丰富的教师信号，相比传统独立蒸馏方法在编程、数学推理等任务上取得一致提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有在线策略蒸馏（OPD）方法对每个学生生成的轨迹独立进行蒸馏，忽略了同一提示下多次尝试之间蕴含的丰富信息，尤其是失败样本中关于错误模式的负面信号未被有效利用。

Method: 提出MOPD框架，核心思想是利用学生同一提示下的本地多轮次采样组（包含成功和失败轨迹）来构建教师信号。具体包括两种peer-context构建方式：正面同伴模仿（仅用成功轨迹）和对比式成功-失败条件化（同时使用成功和失败轨迹）。教师模型在同伴轨迹条件下生成更密集的token级监督信号。

Result: 在竞争性编程、数学推理、科学问答和工具使用等基准测试上，MOPD一致优于标准在线策略基线。进一步分析表明，混合成功-失败上下文使教师分数与验证器奖励更加对齐，说明性能提升源于更忠实、实例自适应的监督信号。

Conclusion: 有效的在线策略蒸馏应当利用学生多轮次试错行为中的结构化信息，而非将各次采样视为孤立样本单独处理。

Abstract: Large language models are often post-trained with sparse verifier rewards, which indicate whether a sampled trajectory succeeds but provide limited guidance about where reasoning succeeds or fails. On-policy distillation (OPD) offers denser token-level supervision by training on student-generated trajectories, yet existing methods typically distill each rollout independently and ignore the other attempts sampled for the same prompt. We introduce Multi-Rollout On-Policy Distillation (MOPD), a peer-conditioned distillation framework that uses the student's local rollout group to construct more informative teacher signals. MOPD conditions the teacher on both successful and failed peer rollouts: successes provide positive evidence for valid reasoning patterns, while failures provide structured negative evidence about plausible mistakes to avoid. We study two peer-context constructions: positive peer imitation and contrastive success-failure conditioning. Experiments on competitive programming, mathematical reasoning, scientific question answering, and tool-use benchmarks show that MOPD consistently improves over standard on-policy baselines. Further teacher-signal analysis shows that mixed success-failure contexts better align teacher scores with verifier rewards, indicating that the gains arise from more faithful, instance-adaptive supervision. These results indicate that effective on-policy distillation should exploit the student's multi-rollout trial-and-error behavior rather than treating rollouts as isolated samples.

</details>


### [376] [Early Data Exposure Improves Robustness to Subsequent Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12705)
*Lawrence Feng,Gaurav R. Ghosal,Jacob Mitchell Springer,Ziqian Zhong,Aditi Raghunathan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 研究了如何通过上游训练选择（如早期暴露）来提升模型在后续微调中保留已获取能力的能力，发现训练方案的鲁棒性差异显著，早期暴露能有效改善遗忘问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作多关注下游干预来缓解遗忘（如重放、dropout），但忽视了上游训练方式本身对能力保留鲁棒性的影响。作者希望从源头预防遗忘，而非事后补救。

Method: 在135M和1B参数的LM上构建三阶段流水线：预训练→后训练（获取目标能力）→下游微调。对比不同训练配方（如是否早期暴露目标数据）对能力保留的影响，并进行计算量匹配实验。

Result: 后训练后的即时性能无法可靠预测后续微调后的保留能力；早期暴露（将后训练数据混入预训练）能持续提升上游能力与下游性能之间的权衡；计算最优分配既不极端偏向预训练也不极端偏向微调；重放和dropout可提供互补增益。

Conclusion: 上游训练应将对后续微调的鲁棒性作为一等目标，通过早期暴露等预防性措施主动加固，而非仅在微调阶段被动应对遗忘。

Abstract: How can we train models whose post-trained capabilities survive subsequent fine-tuning? Rather than focusing on downstream interventions to mitigate forgetting of upstream capabilities, we study how upstream training choices - that is, the manner in which a capability is acquired - shape how robustly that capability is retained. We investigate this question in a controlled three-stage language-model pipeline: pretraining, post-training to acquire a target capability, and downstream fine-tuning on a new objective. Across 135M and 1B models, two post-training domains, and two downstream fine-tuning tasks, we find that immediate post-training performance does not reliably predict retention after subsequent fine-tuning: training recipes that look equivalent immediately after post-training can retain the target capability very differently after subsequent fine-tuning. In particular, early exposure - mixing post-training data into pretraining - consistently improves the frontier between retained upstream performance and downstream performance. In compute-matched experiments, where the target data must be allocated between pretraining and post-training, we find that the optimum lies at neither extreme. Together with our other empirical and theoretical findings, this supports the view that post-training drives immediate specialization while early exposure improves robustness to later forgetting. Replay and dropout, typically used to mitigate forgetting as it occurs during fine-tuning, provide complementary gains to early exposure when applied during post-training. Our findings suggest that robustness to subsequent fine-tuning should be treated as a first-class objective of upstream training, addressed preventatively through choices like early exposure rather than reactively during fine-tuning itself.

</details>


### [377] [Scaling Laws for Mixture Pretraining Under Data Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12715)
*Anastasiia Sedova,Skyler Seto,Natalie Schluter,Pierre Ablin*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了在语言模型预训练中混合稀缺目标数据与通用数据的重复使用策略，发现目标数据可重复使用15-20次，并提出了一个考虑重复效应的混合缩放定律来优化数据配比。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低资源语言或专业领域的数据天生有限，而模型规模增大需要更多数据。当前普遍采用的混合训练策略（稀缺目标数据+丰富通用数据）面临两难：目标数据太少则欠暴露，太多则重复导致过拟合。需要系统研究这个权衡并给出理论指导。

Method: 进行了2000+次语言模型训练实验，涵盖不同模型规模、目标数据集大小以及多种数据类型（多语言、特定领域、质量过滤）。提出了一个考虑重复效应的混合缩放定律，该定律量化了重复目标token价值的衰减以及通用数据的正则化作用。

Result: 1）重复是目标领域性能的核心驱动因素；2）混合训练能容忍比单源训练高得多的重复率，稀缺目标数据可重复使用15-20次；3）最优重复次数取决于目标数据量、计算预算和模型规模；4）提出的缩放定律可有效计算最优混合配置。

Conclusion: 在数据受限场景下，合理重复使用稀缺目标数据是有效的，混合训练比单源训练更耐受重复。基于重复感知的缩放定律可为预训练提供实用的混合配比建议。

Abstract: As language models scale, the amount of data they require grows -- yet many target data sources, such as low-resource languages or specialized domains, are inherently limited in size. A common strategy is to mix this scarce but valuable target data with abundant generic data, which presents a fundamental trade-off: too little target data in the mixture underexposes the model to the target domain, while too much target data repeats the same examples excessively, yielding diminishing returns and eventual overfitting. We study this trade-off across more than 2,000 language-model training runs spanning multiple model and target dataset sizes, as well as several data types, including multilingual, domain-specific, and quality-filtered mixtures. Across all settings, we find that repetition is a central driver of target-domain performance, and that mixture training tolerates much higher repetition than single-source training: scarce target corpora can be reused 15-20 times, with the optimal number of repetitions depending on the target data size, compute budget, and model scale. Next, we introduce a repetition-aware mixture scaling law that accounts for the decreasing value of repeated target tokens and the regularizing role of generic data. Optimizing the scaling law provides a principled way to compute effective mixture configurations, yielding practical mixture recommendations for pretraining under data constraints.

</details>


### [378] [Before the Last Token: Diagnosing Final-Token Safety Probe Failures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12726)
*Shravan Doda*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文发现仅监控最后隐藏状态的final-token安全探针会遗漏恶性提示中早期用户token分布的恶意证据，提出基于PCA-HMM的轨迹模型从预填充轨迹中恢复被遗漏的恶意信息，避免朴素池化带来的误报问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有final-token安全探针仅在提示预填充后监控单个隐藏状态，但越狱提示中不安全证据可能分布在早期用户token表示中，导致探针漏检。研究者希望探索这种预填充阶段的失效模式并寻找解决方案。

Method: 使用SafeSwitch风格探针在三个指令调优LLM上仅用干净有害和无害提示训练；进行子空间分析探针瓶颈宽度对漏检的影响；对token级预填充轨迹进行分析；提出基于PCA-HMM的轨迹模型来恢复漏检的恶意信号。

Result: 探针对干净有害提示高召回，但漏检许多越狱提示并在安全相关无害提示上产生误报；子空间分析显示漏检越狱与干净无害提示在探针子空间捕获不佳的方向上存在差异；增大探针瓶颈宽度无法可靠解决；token级分析显示不安全证据常出现在早期序列但final-token读不出；朴素max-pooling过拟合；PCA-HMM模型从预填充轨迹中恢复了被漏检的提示且无严重误报。

Conclusion: final-token探针存在预填充阶段的信息遗漏问题，轨迹感知的隐藏状态分析可以作为有效的诊断补充手段。

Abstract: Final-token safety probes monitor a single hidden state after prompt prefill, but jailbreak prompts can contain probe-visible unsafe evidence distributed across earlier user-token representations that is missed by this readout. We study this prefill-time failure mode using SafeSwitch-style probes trained only on clean harmful and benign prompts across three instruction-tuned LLMs. The probes achieve high recall on clean harmful prompts, but miss many jailbreaks and can produce false positives on safety-adjacent benign prompts. Subspace analyses suggest that missed jailbreaks differ from clean benign prompts along directions that are poorly captured by the probe's representational subspace, and increasing probe bottleneck width does not reliably resolve this mismatch. Token-level prefill analyses reveal that probe-visible unsafe evidence often appears earlier in the sequence but is not exposed at the final-token readout, while naive max-pooling over token positions overfires on safe prompts. A simple PCA-HMM trajectory model, trained only on the same clean split, recovers many final-token misses from user-content prefill trajectories without the catastrophic false-positive behavior of naive token pooling, motivating trajectory-aware hidden-state analyses as diagnostic complements to final-token probes

</details>


### [379] [WriteSAE: Sparse Autoencoders for Recurrent State](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12770)
*Jack Young*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文提出WriteSAE，首个针对状态空间和混合循环语言模型（如Gated DeltaNet、Mamba-2、RWKV-7）的矩阵缓存写入进行分解和编辑的稀疏自编码器。它将解码器原子分解为原生写入形状，推导出逐token logit偏移的闭式解，并在匹配Frobenius范数下训练。实验表明，原子替换在Qwen3.5-0.8B上击败92.4%的匹配范数消融，闭式解预测效果R²=0.98，且在Mamba-2-370M上实现88.1%的替换成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有稀疏自编码器（SAE）仅读取残差流，无法触及状态空间和混合循环语言模型中独特的矩阵缓存写入操作（通过秩1更新k_t v_t^T写入d_k × d_v缓存），这些写入无法被任何向量原子替换，因此需要新的SAE架构来理解和编辑这些模型的内部机制。

Method: WriteSAE将每个解码器原子分解为与原生写入形状一致的形式（k和v两个向量的外积），推导出逐token logit偏移的闭式解，并在匹配Frobenius范数下训练，使得原子能够一次替换一个缓存槽位。

Result: 在Qwen3.5-0.8B L9 H4上，原子替换在92.4%的激活（n=4,851）上击败匹配范数消融；87原子群体测试保持89.8%；闭式解预测与实测效果R²=0.98；Mamba-2-370M在2,500次激活中替换成功率88.1%。连续三个位置安装将目标延续率从33.3%提升至100%。

Conclusion: WriteSAE首次实现了在矩阵循环写入位点的行为编辑，证明了对状态空间和混合循环语言模型的缓存写入进行可解释性分解和编辑是可行的，为理解这类新兴架构提供了新工具。

Abstract: We introduce WriteSAE, the first sparse autoencoder that decomposes and edits the matrix cache write of state-space and hybrid recurrent language models, where residual SAEs cannot reach. Existing SAEs read residual streams, but Gated DeltaNet, Mamba-2, and RWKV-7 write to a $d_k \times d_v$ cache through rank-1 updates $k_t v_t^\top$ that no vector atom can replace. WriteSAE factors each decoder atom into the native write shape, exposes a closed form for the per-token logit shift, and trains under matched Frobenius norm so atoms swap one cache slot at a time. Atom substitution beats matched-norm ablation on 92.4% of $n=4{,}851$ firings at Qwen3.5-0.8B L9 H4, the 87-atom population test holds at 89.8%, the closed form predicts measured effects at $R^2=0.98$, and Mamba-2-370M substitutes at 88.1% over 2,500 firings. Sustained three-position installs at $3\times$ lift midrank target-in-continuation from 33.3% to 100% under greedy decoding, the first behavioral install at the matrix-recurrent write site.

</details>


### [380] [Correcting Influence: Unboxing LLM Outputs with Orthogonal Latent Spaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12809)
*Shixing Yu,Promit Ghosal,Kyra Gan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于潜在中介方法的token级影响力推断框架，通过稀疏自编码器学习潜在特征，利用Jacobian-向量积实现token级归因，用于提升LLM在医疗等高风险领域的可解释性和可信度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有影响力函数方法受限于自回归设置且隐式假设token独立，导致识别的影响力不可靠。医疗等高风险领域需要token级别的精确归因，以提高LLM的可信度和可审计性。

Method: 在预训练LLM的任意层附加稀疏自编码器学习近似独立的潜在特征；提出了基于Jacobian-向量积的新方法处理影响力的非可分解性；通过token激活模式将潜在归因传播回输入空间；使用高效逆Hessian近似实现规模化。

Result: 在医疗基准上，该方法能够识别稀疏、可解释的token集合，这些token共同影响模型预测。

Conclusion: 该框架增强了模型可信度，支持模型审计，适用于需要透明和可问责决策的高风险领域。

Abstract: A critical step for reliable large language models (LLMs) use in healthcare is to attribute predictions to their training data, akin to a medical case study. This requires token-level precision: pinpointing not just which training examples influence a decision, but which tokens within them are responsible. While influence functions offer a principled framework for this, prior work is restricted to autoregressive settings and relies on an implicit assumption of token independence, rendering their identified influences unreliable. We introduce a flexible framework that infers token-level influence through a latent mediation approach for general prediction tasks. Our method attaches sparse autoencoders to any layer of a pretrained LLM to learn a basis of approximately independent latent features. Unlike prior methods where influence decomposes additively across tokens, influence computed over latent features is inherently non-decomposable. To address this, we introduce a novel method using Jacobian-vector products. Token-level influence is obtained by propagating latent attributions back to the input space via token activation patterns. We scale our approach using efficient inverse-Hessian approximations. Experiments on medical benchmarks show our approach identifies sparse, interpretable sets of tokens that jointly influence predictions. Our framework enhances trust and enables model auditing, generalizing to high-stakes domain requiring transparent and accountable decisions.

</details>


### [381] [Discrete Stochastic Localization for Non-autoregressive Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12836)
*Yunshu Wu,Jiayi Cheng,Longxuan Yu,Partha Thakuria,Rob Brekelmans,Evangelos E. Papalexakis,Greg Ver Steeg*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文提出离散随机定位（DSL），一种连续状态框架，通过单位球面词嵌入和信噪比不变的贝叶斯最优去噪器，弥合了连续扩散与掩码离散扩散模型之间的差距。DSL在OpenWebText上显著提升了MAUVE指标，支持多种采样策略，且无需蒸馏或重新训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 连续扩散模型在离散序列生成中落后于掩码离散扩散模型，作者认为瓶颈在于去噪过程依赖于时间步索引的噪声机制，而非连续性本身。

Method: 提出DSL框架：采用单位球面词嵌入，其贝叶斯最优去噪器在定位信道下对信噪比不变。一个训练好的网络支持多种每令牌信噪比路径，掩码扩散路径是其特例。可对预训练的MDLM检查点进行微调。

Result: 在OpenWebText上，微调预训练MDLM检查点后，在T=128到T=1024的所有步数预算下均显著提升MAUVE指标；支持随机顺序自回归采样，以及仅需T=48步的混合连续-离散采样器。

Conclusion: 连续扩散的瓶颈在于噪声机制设计而非连续性本身，DSL通过信噪比不变的去噪器统一了连续与离散扩散框架，实现了高效灵活的生成。

Abstract: Continuous diffusion is a natural framework for non-autoregressive generation but has generally lagged behind masked discrete diffusion models (MDMs) on discrete sequence generation. We argue that the bottleneck is not continuity itself, but a representation in which denoising depends on timestep-indexed noise regimes. We introduce \emph{Discrete Stochastic Localization} (DSL), a continuous-state framework with unit-sphere token embeddings whose Bayes-optimal denoiser is invariant to the nominal signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) under the localization channel. One trained network then supports an entire family of per-token SNR paths, with endpoint masked-diffusion paths as a special case. Fine-tuning a pretrained MDLM checkpoint with DSL substantially improves distributional faithfulness (MAUVE) on OpenWebText across all step budgets from $T{=}128$ to $T{=}1024$, and the same checkpoint supports random-order autoregressive sampling, as well as a hybrid continuous-then-discrete sampler using as few as T=48 total steps -- without distillation or retraining.

</details>


### [382] [ASAP: Amortized Doubly-Stochastic Attention via Sliced Dual Projection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12879)
*Huy Tran,Max Milkert,David Hyde*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出ASAP方法，在训练阶段使用Sinkhorn缩放实现双随机注意力，推理阶段用轻量级切片对偶算子替代迭代缩放，在保持精度的同时实现5.3倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有双随机注意力方法存在两难：Sinkhorn注意力推理时需要重复矩阵缩放，效率低；Sliced-transport注意力虽去掉了在线迭代，但需要大量训练资源。作者希望在保持高效训练的同时，实现推理加速。

Method: 提出ASAP：训练时使用标准Sinkhorn缩放学习双随机注意力层，推理时用固定的切片对偶算子替代迭代缩放循环。核心是学习一个轻量级参数化映射，从精确的一维Kantorovich势映射到Sinkhorn查询侧对偶，再通过双向熵c-transform重建注意力矩阵。

Result: 在冻结层基准测试中，ASAP比训练好的Sinkhorn教师模型快5.3倍且精度相当；在下游替换任务中，无需重新训练即可恢复大部分教师性能。

Conclusion: ASAP作为一种"训练-编译"方法，成功解耦了双随机注意力的训练效率和推理速度，实现了两全其美。

Abstract: Doubly-stochastic attention has emerged as a transport-based alternative to row-softmax attention, with recent Transformer variants using it to reduce attention sinks and rank collapse while improving performance. In this family, the standard approach is Sinkhorn scaling, which trains more efficiently but still repeats matrix scaling in every inference forward pass. Sliced-transport attention removes the online iteration, but its soft sorting approximation materializes dense tensors for each slice, requiring substantially more training resources than Sinkhorn attention. We introduce ASAP: Amortized Doubly-Stochastic Attention via Sliced Dual Projection, a train-then-compile method that trains the doubly-stochastic layer with Sinkhorn, then replaces the iterative scaling loop at inference with a fixed sliced-dual operator. It learns a lightweight parametric map from exact one-dimensional Kantorovich potentials to the Sinkhorn query-side dual, then reconstructs the attention plan with a two-sided entropic c-transform. Across language and vision benchmarks, ASAP keeps the cheaper training setup and remains highly competitive with recent baselines. In the main frozen-layer benchmark, ASAP is 5.3 faster than the trained Sinkhorn teacher while matching its accuracy; in downstream replacements, ASAP recovers most of the teacher performance without any retraining.

</details>


### [383] [Spectral Flattening Is All Muon Needs: How Orthogonalization Controls Learning Rate and Convergence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13079)
*Tien-Phat Nguyen,Truong Nguyen,Minh-Phuc Truong,Tuc Nguyen,James Bailey,Trung Le*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文从理论上揭示了Muon优化器通过谱平坦化（spectral flattening）机制实现加速收敛：其最大稳定步长由梯度的平均奇异值而非最大奇异值决定，并且在Kronecker分解曲率模型下改进了有效收敛因子。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Muon优化器在实践中表现出比传统优化器（如SGD）能容忍更大学习率且收敛更快，但其背后的理论原因尚不明确。本文旨在揭示Muon成功的几何学解释。

Method: 1) 证明Muon的最大稳定步长由梯度的平均奇异值决定（而非最大奇异值，后者是标准梯度下降的瓶颈）；2) 将Muon重新解释为一种预条件梯度方法，在Kronecker分解曲率模型下分析其有效收敛因子；3) 通过大量实验验证理论结果。

Result: 1) Muon在学习率大到使SGD在前几步就发散的情况下仍能保持稳定；2) 即使使用相同的步长，Muon也能比SGD早若干个epoch达到准确率里程碑。

Conclusion: Muon的成功源于其谱平坦化机制：通过动量缓冲的奇异值归一化，使得优化器对梯度谱的极端值不敏感，从而允许更大的学习率和更快的收敛。这为理解Muon的优越性提供了有原则的几何解释。

Abstract: Muon orthogonalizes the momentum buffer before each update, replacing its singular values with ones via Newton-Schulz iterations. This simple change lets Muon tolerate far larger learning rates and converge faster than other optimizers, but why? We show that the mechanism is spectral flattening, and develop two results around it. First, we prove that Muon's maximal stable step size scales with the average singular value of the gradient rather than the largest, which bottlenecks standard gradient descent. Second, we recast Muon as a preconditioned gradient method and show, under a Kronecker-factored curvature model, that it improves the effective convergence factor, with the improvement controlled by the spectrum of the gradient covariance. Extensive experiments validate both results: Muon remains stable at learning rates that cause SGD to diverge within the first few iterations, and reaches accuracy milestones several epochs earlier even at identical step sizes. Taken together, our results offer a principled, geometric explanation for Muon's empirical success.

</details>


### [384] [OSDN: Improving Delta Rule with Provable Online Preconditioning in Linear Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13473)
*Chenyu Zhou,Hongpei Li,Yuerou Liu,Jianghao Lin,Dongdong Ge,Yinyu Ye*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: OSDN通过在线超梯度反馈学习对角预条件子来增强DeltaNet的标量门控，实现每特征尺度缩放键向量，在不增加状态开销的前提下显著提升联想召回能力，并在1.3B参数规模上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DeltaNet虽通过在线梯度下降每步写入token来缓解线性注意力和状态空间模型在联想召回上的不足，但其步长仅依赖单一标量门控，忽略了内目标函数在各特征维度上的曲率差异，导致收敛效率受限。

Method: 提出Online Scaled DeltaNet (OSDN)，在标量门控基础上引入通过超梯度反馈在线更新的对角预条件子；利用右预条件与写侧键每特征缩放代数等价的特性，保持与DeltaNet一致的块状并行流水线；并引入自适应预条件子遗忘（APF）机制处理非平稳上下文。

Result: 340M参数下OSDN在JRT式联想召回上比DeltaNet提升32%；1.3B参数下召回残差比降低39%，同时在通用下游任务（困惑度、LongBench）上保持持平。

Conclusion: 在线预条件机制能够有效迁移并在十亿参数规模上放大效果，在不牺牲通用性能的前提下显著增强联想召回能力。

Abstract: Linear attention and state-space models offer constant-memory alternatives to softmax attention, but often struggle with in-context associative recall. The Delta Rule mitigates this by writing each token via one step of online gradient descent. However, its step size relies on a single scalar gate that ignores the feature-wise curvature of the inner objective. We propose Online Scaled DeltaNet (OSDN), which augments the scalar gate with a diagonal preconditioner updated online via hypergradient feedback. Crucially, this right-preconditioning is algebraically equivalent to a per-feature scaling of the write-side key. This equivalence allows OSDN to strictly preserve the hardware-friendly chunkwise parallel pipeline of DeltaNet without incurring high-dimensional state overhead. Theoretically, by exploiting the exact-quadratic structure of the inner regression loss, we establish super-geometric convergence against a right-Newton comparator and prove an algorithm-aligned token-local residual contraction bound. To handle non-stationary contexts, we further introduce Adaptive Preconditioner Forgetting (APF) to dynamically refresh stale calibration. Empirically, OSDN demonstrates strong performance across scales. At the 340M-parameter scale, OSDN improves JRT-style in-context recall by 32% over DeltaNet. Scaling to 1.3B parameters, it achieves a 39% reduction in the recall residual ratio while maintaining parity on general downstream tasks (e.g., perplexity and LongBench) -- demonstrating that our online-preconditioning mechanism effectively transfers and amplifies at the billion-parameter scale.

</details>


### [385] [N-vium: Mixture-of-Exits Transformer for Accelerated Exact Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13190)
*Aleksander Lorenc,Frédéric Berdoz,Joël Mathys,Roger Wattenhofer*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: N-vium：一种混合退出（mixture-of-exits）Transformer架构，通过在深度上部分并行化计算来提升推理吞吐量（每秒有效FLOPs），而不是减少每token的FLOPs。1.5B参数模型在无perplexity损失下实现57.9%的墙钟加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统提升自回归Transformer推理效率的方法是减少每token的FLOPs（如剪枝、量化），但这通常会以模型质量下降为代价。作者提出另一种思路：不减少计算量，而是通过并行化深度计算来提升每秒有效FLOPs，从而在不牺牲质量的前提下加速推理。

Method: 1) 在Transformer的多个深度处附加预测头（prediction heads）；2) 将下一个token的分布定义为这些中间退出的可学习混合（learned mixture），并带有token自适应的路由机制；3) 该公式严格推广了标准Transformer（当所有中间头分配零质量时恢复为标准形式）；4) 从混合分布中采样是精确的；5) 通过延迟上层计算并与后续token批处理，可以恢复完整的KV缓存。

Result: 在1.5B参数规模上预训练，相比于参数和数据匹配的标准Transformer，实现了57.9%的墙钟速度提升，且无perplexity损失。

Conclusion: N-vium通过"增加每秒有效FLOPs"而非"减少每token FLOPs"的思路，为Transformer推理加速提供了一种新范式，在保持模型质量的同时显著提升实际推理速度。

Abstract: Improving the inference efficiency of autoregressive transformers typically means reducing FLOPs per token, usually through approximations that degrade model quality. We introduce N-vium, a mixture-of-exits transformer that partially parallelizes computation across depth on standard hardware, increasing effective FLOPs per second rather than minimizing compute per token. N-vium attaches prediction heads at multiple depths and defines the next-token distribution as a learned mixture over these exits, with token-adaptive routing. This formulation strictly generalizes the standard transformer, which is recovered exactly when routing assigns zero mass to all intermediate heads. Sampling from the mixture is exact, and complete KV caches are recovered by deferring the upper-layer computation and batching it with later tokens. We pretrain N-vium at scales up to 1.5B parameters. Our largest model reaches 57.9% wall-clock speedup over a parameter- and data-matched standard transformer at no perplexity cost.

</details>


### [386] [Mix, Don't Tune: Bilingual Pre-Training Outperforms Hyperparameter Search in Data-Constrained Settings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13225)
*Paul Jeha,Anastasiia Sedova,Louis Béthune,Skyler Seto,Jes Frellsen,Pierre Ablin,Natalie Schluter*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 针对数据受限的低资源语言预训练，本文系统比较了超参数调优（如高权重衰减）与混入高资源辅助语言数据这两种正则化策略，发现数据混合在验证损失和下游任务上均显著优于超参数调优，且效果随模型规模扩大而增强，相当于将有效数据量提升2-13倍；同时指出目标语言验证损失会低估混合策略的价值，推荐优先使用数据混合并采用μP进行超参数迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大多数语言在预训练时面临数据受限问题，模型需要重复使用训练数据导致泛化能力下降。现有两种改善方案——超参数调优（如高权重衰减）和混入高资源辅助语言数据——缺乏系统性对比，本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 以阿拉伯语为目标低资源语言、英语为辅助高资源语言，在150M到1.43B四个模型规模下进行约1000次预训练实验，系统比较超参数调优（权重衰减）与数据混合（调整混合比例）两种策略的效果。

Result: 1) 数据混合在验证损失和下游任务精度上均优于超参数调优，差距随模型规模扩大而增大；2) 混合带来的性能提升相当于将有效数据量扩大2-13倍；3) 目标语言验证损失会系统性低估数据混合的价值，因其只捕获了信号多样性效应，而无法体现混合带来的知识补充。

Conclusion: 实践建议：优先采用混入高资源语言数据的策略，优先调节混合比例而非超参数，并使用μP从小代理模型迁移超参数。

Abstract: For most languages of the world, language model pre-training operates in a data-constrained regime where models must repeat their training data many times, degrading generalization. Two remedies exist: aggressive hyperparameter tuning such as high weight decay, and mixing in data from a high-resource auxiliary language to directly aid the low-resource target. While hyperparameter tuning regularizes the model by shrinking weights to restrict network capacity, auxiliary data mixing uses a tunable mixing ratio to expand the training distribution and diversify the training signal with new knowledge. Both offer a principled way to improve training in a data-constrained domain. We compare these levers systematically across four model scales from 150M to 1.43B parameters, using Arabic as the low-resource target and English as the auxiliary, over approximately 1000 pre-training runs. Three findings emerge. First, mixing yields larger improvements than hyperparameter tuning on both validation loss and downstream task accuracy, and the gap grows with model size. Second, we quantify how much mixing helps: it boosts performance by an amount equivalent to 2--3$\times$ the unique target data on validation loss and 2--13$\times$ on downstream task accuracy, with the gain scaling steeply with model size. Third, this divergence reveals that target-language validation loss systematically underestimates mixing's value. Mixing regularizes by diversifying the training signal and contributes knowledge the repeated target corpus cannot supply; validation loss captures only the first effect. Our practical recommendations are: mix in a high-resource language, prioritize the mixing ratio over hyperparameter tuning, and transfer hyperparameters from a small proxy model via $μ$P.

</details>


### [387] [Teacher-Guided Policy Optimization for LLM Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13230)
*Xinyu Liu,Kechen Jiao,Chunyang Xiao,Runsong Zhao,Junhao Ruan,Bei Li,Jiahao Liu,Qifan Wang,Xin Chen,Jingang Wang,Tong Xiao,JingBo Zhu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Teacher-Guided Policy Optimization (TGPO)，一种基于策略的LLM蒸馏算法，通过利用教师模型在学生轨迹上的条件预测提供密集方向性引导，解决了标准Reverse KL在师生分布差异大时反馈无效的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准Reverse KL在师生分布差异大时，负反馈信息量不足，导致学生模型难以有效改进。需要一种更高效的策略蒸馏方法。

Method: 提出TGPO算法：在策略上(on-policy)利用教师模型基于学生rollout的条件预测，提供密集的方向性梯度引导，无需额外数据标注，可无缝集成现有RLVR框架。

Result: 在复杂推理基准测试上，TGPO显著优于标准基线方法，且对不同教师模型具有鲁棒性。

Conclusion: TGPO有效解决了RKL在分布偏移时的效率问题，是一种实用且鲁棒的LLM策略蒸馏方案。

Abstract: The convergence of reinforcement learning and imitation learning has positioned Reverse KL (RKL) as a promising paradigm for on-policy LLM distillation, aiming to unify exploration with teacher supervision. However, we identify a critical limitation: when the student and teacher distributions diverge significantly, standard RKL often fails to yield meaningful improvement due to uninformative negative feedback. To address this inefficiency, we propose Teacher-Guided Policy Optimization (TGPO), an on-policy algorithm that incorporates dense directional guidance by leveraging teacher predictions conditioned on the student's rollout. Because TGPO remains on-policy, the algorithm integrates seamlessly with existing RLVR frameworks without requiring additional data annotation. Experiments on complex reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that TGPO significantly outperforms standard baselines and is robust to different teachers.

</details>


### [388] [Teaching and Learning under Deductive Errors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13384)
*Jan Arne Telle,Brigt Håvardstun,Jose Hernandez-Orallo*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个考虑学习者推理错误的教与学框架（PAC教学），研究了在LLM和人类等存在推理错误的场景下，教师如何找到保证学生近似正确学习的教学集，并分析了计算复杂度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的机器教学和学习模型假设学习者在内部演绎推理中不会出错，但人类和LLM在少样本学习场景中会犯一致性和随机性错误。本文旨在建立一个能容纳这些推理错误的教学框架。

Method: 在PAC（可能近似正确）学习框架下，重新定义教学问题。教师需找到PAC教学集，使得存在推理错误的学习者能以高概率猜测到近似正确的假设。研究了六个相关问题的计算复杂度，给出了以教学集大小为参数的XP算法及紧确时间复杂度下界。

Result: 给出了六个计算PAC最优教学集问题的XP算法，并在ETH等标准复杂性假设下证明了紧确的运行时间下界。实验部分比较了不同教与学协议在模拟LLM教学行为上的表现。

Conclusion: 本文从理论角度阐明了在存在推理错误的场景下进行机器教学的难度和可行性，为理解LLM的少样本学习行为提供了新的理论视角。

Abstract: Most models of machine teaching and learning assume the learner makes no errors in its internal deductive inference. However, humans and large language models in few-shot learning regimes are two important examples of learners where this does not hold. They fail on some consistency checks, and they can fail stochastically. In this paper we introduce a teaching and learning framework that takes these deductive errors into account. We specifically study the case of machine teaching, as different characterizations of the teacher can account for both machine teaching and learning. In an overhauled Probably Approximately Correct (PAC) setting, we study theoretically that, for some estimated error level, the teacher must find a PAC teaching set that with high probability will lead the learner to guess a hypothesis that is approximately correct. We study the computational complexity of six different problems related to computing optimal PAC teaching sets. We give XP algorithms parametrized by size of teaching set, with tight runtime bounds under standard complexity assumptions like ETH. These results are complemented with a small experimental study of which teaching and learning protocols can best represent the observed behavior in some LLM teaching sessions.

</details>


### [389] [When is Warmstarting Effective for Scaling Language Models?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13405)
*Neeratyoy Mallik,Maciej Janowski,Johannes Hog,Herilalaina Rakotoarison,Josif Grabocka,Frank Hutter,Aaron Klein*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了模型生长（从已有检查点扩展模型）的实践限制，发现保留小模型初始性能并非必要，简单架构无关的生长策略优于复杂算子。实验表明存在生长因子g的上界，超过此界限从头训练更高效。在密集MLP和语言模型上，2倍生长因子最可靠，在低token预算下加速效果显著。论文还拟合了标度律以指导实践决策。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模型生长（从已有检查点扩展模型）有望加速大模型训练、节省资源，但在大规模训练中实际应用有限。作者归因于两个被忽视的因素：（1）过度强调保留小模型初始性能，限制了新架构的算子设计；（2）缺乏对生长与超参数及标度行为相互作用的分析，且文献中生长因子不一致。

Method: 通过大量消融实验，对比不同生长策略（简单架构无关 vs. 复杂warmstarting算子），在密集MLP和密集语言模型上系统研究生长因子g的影响。识别了生长因子的经验上界，并拟合标度律来预测何时以及应该生长多少。

Result: （1）保留基础模型初始生长后性能并非强最终性能所必需；（2）简单架构无关的生长策略可以胜过复杂warmstarting算子；（3）存在生长因子g的上界，超过此界从头训练更高效；（4）2倍生长因子最可靠，加速效果在低token预算（<20 tokens/参数）下最显著，随预算增加递减。

Conclusion: 提供了模型生长的实用指南和经验限制，包括生长因子上界、最优生长策略选择，以及基于标度律的预测性建议，帮助从业者决定何时以及如何应用模型生长。

Abstract: Model growth from a given checkpoint aims to accelerate training of a larger model, offering potential resource savings. Despite recent interest, warmstarting has seen limited practical adoption in large-scale training. We attribute this to two underexplored factors: (1) an overemphasis on preserving the smaller model's performance at initialization, which constrains operator design for new architectures, and (2) insufficient analysis of how growth interacts with hyperparameters and scaling behavior, compounded by inconsistent growth factors across the literature.
  We show that preserving the base model's initial post-growth performance is not necessary for strong final performance, and that simple, architecture-agnostic growth strategies can outperform more complex warmstarting operators. Crucially, we empirically identify an upper bound on the growth factor $g$ beyond which training from scratch is more efficient. We observe this across multiple ablation setups. Notably, this limit is also present, but unreported, in prior published results. Across our experiments on dense MLPs and dense language models, we find that a $2\times$ growth factor is the most reliable in yielding convergence speedups, with gains most pronounced under 20 tokens/parameter budgets and diminishing as budget increases. We fit scaling laws over these observations to provide predictive guidance for practitioners deciding when and how much to grow. Together, our analysis provides practical guidelines and empirical limits for model growth.

</details>


### [390] [DP-KFC: Data-Free Preconditioning for Privacy-Preserving Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13418)
*Marc Molina Van den Bosch,Riccardo Taiello,Albert Sund Aillet,Andrea Protani,Miguel Angel Gonzalez Ballester,Luigi Serio*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出DP-KFC，通过使用结构化合成噪声探测网络来构建KFAC预条件子，无需私有或公共数据即可估计曲率，在强隐私预算下显著优于DP-SGD和自适应基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 差分隐私优化存在几何不匹配：深度网络损失景观高度各向异性，而DP-SGD注入各向同性噪声。二阶预条件可解决此问题，但估计曲率需要私有数据（消耗隐私预算）或公共数据（引入分布偏移）。

Method: 证明Fisher信息矩阵可分解为架构敏感性（通过合成噪声恢复）和输入相关性（通过模态特定频率统计近似）。DP-KFC使用结构化合成噪声探测网络构建KFAC预条件子，无需任何真实数据。

Result: 在强隐私设置下（ε≤3），DP-KFC一致优于DP-SGD和自适应基线；匹配使用真实数据的私有数据预条件子性能，而公共数据变体性能下降高达4.8%。

Conclusion: 曲率可以在不消耗隐私预算或引入分布偏移的情况下有效估计，使得在医疗等数据稀缺的监管领域实现隐私保护学习成为可能。

Abstract: Differentially private optimization suffers from a fundamental geometric mismatch: deep networks have highly anisotropic loss landscapes, yet DP-SGD injects isotropic noise. Second-order preconditioning can resolve this, but estimating curvature typically requires private data (consuming privacy budget) or public data (introducing distribution shift). We show that the Fisher Information Matrix decouples into architectural sensitivity, recoverable via synthetic noise, and input correlations, approximable from modality-specific frequency statistics. We propose DP-KFC, which constructs KFAC preconditioners by probing networks with structured synthetic noise, requiring neither private nor public data. Empirically, DP-KFC consistently outperforms DP-SGD and adaptive baselines across diverse modalities in strong privacy regimes ($\varepsilon \leq 3$). DP-KFC matches private-data preconditioners while public-data variants degrade by up to $4.8\%$, showing that curvature can be estimated without consuming privacy budget or introducing distribution shift. This enables privacy-preserving learning in specialized domains (e.g., medical applications) where regulatory constraints make data scarce.

</details>


### [391] [Discovery of Hidden Miscalibration Regimes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13484)
*Katarzyna Kobalczyk,Mihaela van der Schaar*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种发现隐藏的模型校准失败区域的方法，通过学习校准感知的输入空间表示，并在学习到的几何结构上进行核平滑来估计局部校准偏差。在12个LLM和4个基准上发现输入依赖的校准异质性普遍存在，且该方法能有效修正局部校准错误。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的校准评估仅依赖置信度分数与经验正确性的全局比较，忽略了模型可能在某些输入上过度自信、在其他输入上自信不足的结构性问题，导致局部校准失败被全局指标掩盖。

Method: 1. 定义"误校准场"（miscalibration field）；2. 学习校准感知的输入空间表示；3. 在学到的几何结构上通过核平滑估计带符号的局部误校准。

Result: 在4个LLM基准和12个LLM上发现输入依赖的校准异质性普遍存在；发现的误校准场可用于局部置信度修正，在系统误校准区域比等渗回归和温度缩放等基于置信度的方法更有效。

Conclusion: 全局校准诊断会掩盖局部校准失败，本文提出的方法能有效发现并修正这些隐藏的误校准区域，为LLM的可靠性评估提供了更精细的工具。

Abstract: Calibration is commonly evaluated by comparing model confidence with its empirical correctness, implicitly treating reliability as a function of the confidence score alone. However, this view can hide substantial structure: models may be systematically overconfident on some kinds of inputs and underconfident on others, causing global reliability diagnostics to obscure localised calibration failures. To address this, we formulate the problem of discovering hidden miscalibration regimes without assuming access to predefined data slices. We define the corresponding miscalibration field and propose a diagnostic framework for estimating it. Our approach learns a calibration-aware representation of the input space and estimates signed local miscalibration by kernel smoothing in the learned geometry. Across four real-world LLM benchmarks and twelve LLMs, we find that input-dependent calibration heterogeneity is prevalent. We further show that the discovered fields are actionable: they support local confidence correction and reduce calibration error in systematically miscalibrated regions where confidence-based methods such as isotonic regression and temperature scaling are less effective.

</details>


### [392] [A Hierarchical Language Model with Predictable Scaling Laws and Provable Benefits of Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13687)
*Jason Gaitonde,Frederic Koehler,Elchanan Mossel,Joonhyung Shin,Allan Sly*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一类具有层次结构的合成语言（基于树上的广播过程），通过引入精确的k-gram ansatz替代上下文长度为k的Transformer，理论分析了自回归生成中上下文长度与推理能力的作用。证明了对Ising广播过程和coloring广播过程，有界上下文自回归需要Ω(n)的上下文长度才能忠实采样长度为n的序列，而仅需O(log n)工作记忆的自回归推理模型即可精确采样——实现了指数级改进，并通过实验验证了理论预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解自回归生成中上下文长度与推理能力在建模具有层次结构数据时的根本性作用，揭示有限上下文Transformer的理论局限性。

Method: 提出精确k-gram ansatz替代Transformer，在两类合成语言（Ising广播过程、coloring广播过程）上进行理论分析，推导生成序列的分布统计量渐近行为，并通过Transformer实验验证。

Result: Ising广播过程：生成和的方差随上下文深度对数线性增长，峰度收敛到高斯分布，均偏离真实语言；coloring广播过程（冻结区）：有界上下文自回归高概率产生与任何有效着色不一致的序列。证明了忠实采样需要Ω(n)上下文长度，而推理模型仅需O(log n)工作记忆。

Conclusion: 有限上下文自回归Transformer在建模层次结构时存在根本性局限，而引入推理能力（工作记忆）可实现指数级的上下文效率提升。

Abstract: We introduce a family of synthetic languages with hierarchical structure -- generated by a broadcast process on trees -- for which the role of context length and reasoning in autoregressive generation can be analyzed precisely. At the heart of our analytic approach is an \emph{exact $k$-gram ansatz} in place of transformers with context length $k$, a substitution we then validate empirically. Using this ansatz we derive explicit asymptotic predictions for distributional statistics of the sequences produced by a trained model, instantiated in two settings. For the \emph{Ising broadcast process} (a soft-constrained language), we prove that the variance of the generated sum scales log-linearly in the context depth and its kurtosis converges to that of a Gaussian -- both deviating from the true language for any sublinear context. For the \emph{coloring broadcast process} (a hard-constrained language) in the freezing regime, bounded-context autoregression produces sequences that, with high probability, are inconsistent with \emph{any} valid coloring of the underlying tree.
