  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 知识蒸馏在实践中广泛使用，但其理论理解仍然缺乏。本文旨在建立蒸馏过程的严格理论框架，量化教师对学生泛化性能的影响。

Method: 将师生训练建模为耦合随机过程，定义蒸馏散度为两个随机核之间的KL散度，利用算法稳定性和中心条件推导泛化上下界，并引入损失锐度感知边界，最后在线性高斯案例中做可解释分解。

Result: 得到了学生相对教师的泛化上界（子高斯假设下）和下界（中心条件下），发现了教师局部平坦性可严格收紧泛化边界，线性高斯案例中蒸馏散度可分解为偏差、方差和秩瓶颈代价。

Conclusion: 该理论框架为知识蒸馏的设计提供了实用指导，特别是教师平坦性与蒸馏散度分解对实际蒸馏策略的启示。

Abstract: Knowledge distillation is widely used to improve generalization in practice, yet its theoretical understanding remains elusive. In the standard distillation setting, a teacher model provides soft predictions to guide the training of a student model. We model teacher and student training as coupled stochastic processes and introduce a distillation divergence, defined as the Kullback-Leibler divergence between these two stochastic kernels. Within this framework, we derive two generalization bounds for the student model relative to the teacher's generalization gap: an upper bound under a sub-Gaussian assumption via algorithmic stability, and a lower bound under a central condition with sharper dependence on the distillation divergence. We further develop a loss-sharpness-aware bound with an explicit tightness regime, showing that the teacher's local flatness can strictly tighten the bound. Additionally, in a linear Gaussian case study, the distillation divergence admits an interpretable decomposition into bias, variance, and rank-bottleneck costs, yielding practical guidance for distillation design.

</details>


### [429] [Learning Perturbations to Extrapolate Your LLM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13284)
*Zetai Cen,Chenfei Gu,Jin Zhu,Ting Li,Yunxiao Chen,Chengchun Shi*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种在嵌入空间中对token前缀施加可学习连续扰动的框架，通过无偏估计方程和随机梯度下降优化参数，在超参数化条件下建立了统计性质，实验表明在域外场景下显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖固定设计的离散扰动，灵活性不足，限制了语言模型的外推性能。

Method: 在嵌入空间中对token前缀施加由连续潜在向量的可学习变换生成的扰动；利用无偏估计方程处理难以处理的边缘似然，并通过随机梯度下降优化模型参数。

Result: 在合成和真实数据集上，该方法在域外（out-of-domain）设置下显著优于多种最先进的基线方法。

Conclusion: 可学习的连续扰动策略比固定离散扰动更具灵活性和有效性，能显著提升LLM的外推能力。

Abstract: Recent advancements in large language models demonstrate that injecting perturbations can substantially enhance extrapolation performance. However, current approaches often rely on discrete perturbations with fixed designs, which limits their flexibility. In this work, we propose a framework where token prefixes are perturbed by a learnable transformation of a continuous latent vector within an embedding space. To overcome the challenge of an intractable marginal likelihood, we derive unbiased estimating equations for model parameters and optimize them via stochastic gradient descent. We establish the statistical properties of the resulting estimator in over-parameterized regimes. Empirical evaluations on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our proposal yields significant gains in out-of-domain settings over a range of state-of-the-art baseline methods.

</details>


### [430] [Reward-Weighted On-Policy Distillation with an Open Property-Equivalence Verifier for NL-to-SVA Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13501)
*Qingyun Zou,Yingze Li,Tianen Liu,Bingsheng He,Weng-Fai Wong*

Main category: cs.AR

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 针对SystemVerilog断言生成任务，现有模型在时序属性上表现不佳。本文提出Reward-Weighted On-Policy Distillation (RWOPD)，通过属性等价性检查器对学生模型采样结果进行评分，并基于验证器奖励加权的前向KL散度进行知识蒸馏，将14B教师模型蒸馏为7B学生模型，在NL2SVA基准上达到新SOTA，超越专用模型和671B通用模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM生成SVA的准确率看似饱和（~76%），但聚合指标掩盖了时序延迟和活性规约上的严重缺陷——模型仅学会输出几种固定蕴含模板。根本原因在于SFT优化的是token级模仿而非属性等价性（property equivalence），即生成序列与参考答案的文本相似度，而非断言与实际时序逻辑行为的等价性。

Method: 提出RWOPD框架：1) 学生模型（Qwen2.5-Coder-7B）进行on-policy采样生成多个SVA候选；2) 使用开源的SymbiYosys+Z3属性等价性检查器（PEC）对学生输出进行形式化验证评分；3) 基于验证器奖励加权的前向KL散度，从冻结的14B教师模型（CodeV-SVA-14B）向学生蒸馏，仅在验证通过的rollouts上施加梯度，保持逐token稠密监督。

Result: RWOPD蒸馏后的7B学生模型在NL2SVA-Human和NL2SVA-Machine基准上的pass@1、pass@5、pass@10全面超越此前专用SOTA模型以及671B通用大模型，达到新SOTA。

Conclusion: 属性等价性比token级模仿更适合SVA生成任务；将形式化验证器作为奖励信号融入蒸馏过程，能以更小模型取得更强性能。

Abstract: LLM-based generation of SystemVerilog Assertions (SVA) is often reported as nearing saturation, with the strongest specialized model reaching ${\sim}76\%$ accuracy on NL2SVA-Human. We show that this aggregate hides a temporal gap: models that appear strong overall still collapse to a few implication templates on bounded-delay and liveness specifications. The core issue is that the dominant recipe, supervised fine-tuning on NL/SVA pairs, optimizes token-level mimicry rather than the \emph{property equivalence} that defines SVA correctness. We introduce \emph{Reward-Weighted On-Policy Distillation} (RWOPD), an on-policy distillation method that samples student rollouts, scores them with an open SymbiYosys+Z3 Property-Equivalence Checker (PEC), and applies a verifier-reward-weighted forward-KL gradient from a frozen 14B teacher on verifier-passable rollouts. This keeps the supervision dense at every response token while grounding both selection and loss weight in property-equivalent behavior. RWOPD distills CodeV-SVA-14B into a Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct student that sets a new state of the art on NL2SVA-Human and NL2SVA-Machine across pass@1, pass@5, and pass@10, surpassing both specialized prior SOTA models and 671B general-purpose baselines.

</details>


### [431] [Temper and Tilt Lead to SLOP: Reward Hacking Mitigation with Inference-Time Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13537)
*Ye Wang,Jing Liu,Toshiaki Koike-Akino*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 72.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于参考模型温度调整的推理时对齐方法，将对齐推广到生成式奖励模型集成（SLOP），并设计了校准算法以缓解奖励破解问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 推理时对齐技术能够轻量级地替代或补充昂贵的强化学习，并支持持续适应不断变化的对齐目标和奖励函数，但现有方法缺乏对多奖励模型集成的理论支持及奖励破解的鲁棒性保障。

Method: 引入参考模型温度调整，将推理时对齐推广到生成式奖励模型集成的锐化对数意见池（SLOP）；提出校准SLOP权重参数的算法以缓解奖励破解。

Result: 实验表明所提校准算法在提升鲁棒性的同时保持了对齐性能。

Conclusion: 参考模型温度调整可有效扩展推理时对齐至奖励模型集成，校准算法可缓解奖励破解问题。

Abstract: Inference-time alignment techniques offer a lightweight alternative or complement to costly reinforcement learning, while enabling continual adaptation as alignment objectives and reward targets evolve. Existing theoretical analyses justify these methods as approximations to sampling from distributions optimally tilted toward a given reward model. We extend these techniques by introducing reference-model temperature adjustment, which leads to further generalization of inference-time alignment to ensembles of generative reward models combined as a sharpened logarithmic opinion pool (SLOP). To mitigate reward hacking, we propose an algorithm for calibrating SLOP weight parameters and experimentally demonstrate that it improves robustness while preserving alignment performance.

</details>


### [432] [Population Risk Bounds for Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks Trained by DP-SGD with Correlated Noise](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12648)
*Puyu Wang,Jan Schuchardt,Nikita Kalinin,Junyu Zhou,Sophie Fellenz,Christoph Lampert,Marius Kloft*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 本文首次建立了Kolmogorov-Arnold网络（KANs）在小批量SGD（含梯度裁剪）训练下的群体风险界，覆盖了非私有SGD和差分隐私SGD（含独立噪声与时间相关噪声），通过辅助未投影动力学等新分析技术解决了相关噪声DP训练的非凸优化难题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有KAN理论仅分析全批量梯度下降，而实践中广泛使用小批量SGD；且相关噪声机制在隐私-效用权衡上优于独立噪声，但缺乏非凸场景下的理论分析。本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 引入辅助未投影动力学、吸收当前噪声扰动的移位迭代、以及高概率自举证明投影非活跃性，结合稳定性泛化论证，分析相关噪声DP训练的非凸优化。

Result: 建立了KAN在小批量SGD下的群体风险界，统一了非私有SGD和DP-SGD（独立/相关噪声）分析，改进了Wang等人（2026）的全批量GD结果，并给出更尖锐的固定第二层特化结果。

Conclusion: 这是首个超越凸学习的相关噪声机制DP训练的优化与群体风险分析，为KAN在隐私保护场景下的理论提供了坚实基础。

Abstract: We establish the first population risk bounds for Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs) trained by mini-batch SGD with gradient clipping, covering non-private SGD as well as differentially private SGD (DP-SGD) with Gaussian perturbations that interpolate between independent and temporally correlated noise. This setting is substantially closer to practice than prior KAN theory along two axes: training is by mini-batch SGD, the standard recipe for modern networks, rather than full-batch gradient descent (GD); and correlated-noise mechanisms have empirically shown a more favorable privacy-utility tradeoff than independent-noise mechanisms. Our results cover the corresponding full-batch GD and independent-noise DP-GD results for KANs by Wang et al. (2026), while yielding sharper fixed-second-layer specializations. The technical core is a new analysis route for correlated-noise DP training in the non-convex regime. Temporal dependence breaks the conditional-centering structure underlying standard one-step SGD arguments, and the projection step obstructs the exact cancellation structure of correlated perturbations. We address these difficulties through an auxiliary unprojected dynamics, a shifted iterate that absorbs the current noise perturbation, and a high-probability bootstrap certifying projection inactivity. Combining this optimization analysis with a stability-based generalization argument yields the stated population risk bounds. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first optimization and population risk analysis of a correlated-noise mechanism for DP training beyond convex learning, in particular for neural networks.

</details>


### [433] [AGOP as Explanation: From Feature Learning to Per-Sample Attribution in Image Classifiers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12816)
*Raj Kiran Gupta Katakam*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 本文提出基于平均梯度外积（AGOP）的归因方法AGOP-Weighted和AGOP-Global，利用训练分布先验抑制梯度噪声并放大重要像素，在XAI-TRIS和CLEVR-XAI基准上相比Integrated Gradients、GradCAM等方法取得显著提升（最高7倍mIoU），且AGOP-Global零推理成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有归因方法存在梯度噪声大、对小分辨率图像失效（GradCAM）等问题，且缺乏利用训练分布先验来提升归因质量的手段。作者从神经特征假设（Neural Feature Ansatz）出发，探索AGOP作为后验归因方法的可行性。

Method: 提出AGOP-Weighted（将样本梯度乘以训练分布先验sqrt(diag(M)/max diag(M))）和AGOP-Global（直接使用diag(M)作为零成本显著性图），实现训练时高效累计钩子；AGOP-Global零推理成本，AGOP-Weighted仅需一次梯度传播。

Result: 在线性任务上，AGOP-Weighted比IG高44% mIoU；在乘法任务上，AGOP-Global比IG高7倍mIoU（IG低于随机），且零推理成本。在CLEVR-XAI上分别提升18%和37%。GradCAM因空间分辨率坍塌在小图像上失效。diag(M)质量随训练单调提升。

Conclusion: AGOP作为一种训练分布先验，不仅能解释特征学习机制，还能作为高效、高质量的后验归因方法，尤其适合小分辨率图像和需要零成本归因的场景。

Abstract: The Average Gradient Outer Product (AGOP) governs feature learning in neural networks: the Neural Feature Ansatz states that weight Gram matrices at each layer align with the corresponding AGOP matrices computed over the training distribution. We ask a complementary question: can this same quantity serve as a post-hoc attribution method for explaining individual predictions? We introduce AGOP-Weighted: a novel attribution method that multiplies the per-sample gradient by sqrt(diag(M) / max diag(M)), a training-distribution prior that suppresses gradient noise and amplifies consistently important pixels -- a combination not present in any prior attribution method. We formalise two companion variants -- AGOP-Local (per-sample gradient, equivalent to VanillaGrad) and AGOP-Global (diag(M) directly as a zero-cost saliency map) -- and implement an efficient training-time accumulation hook; AGOP-Global then requires zero inference cost (disk lookup) while AGOP-Weighted requires only a single gradient pass. We conduct the first rigorous comparison of AGOP attribution against Integrated Gradients (IG), SmoothGrad, GradCAM, and VanillaGrad across two benchmarks with pixel-level ground truth: (i) the synthetic XAI-TRIS benchmark (four classification scenarios, 8x8 images, CNN8by8) and (ii) the photorealistic CLEVR-XAI benchmark (ResNet-18 fine-tuned from ImageNet). AGOP-Weighted achieves 44% higher mIoU than IG on linear tasks; AGOP-Global achieves 7x higher mIoU than IG on multiplicative tasks (where IG falls below random) at zero inference cost. Both findings generalise to ResNet-18 on CLEVR-XAI (+18% and +37% respectively). We further show that GradCAM fails on small-resolution images due to spatial resolution collapse, and that diag(M) quality improves monotonically throughout training even after classification accuracy has plateaued.

</details>


### [434] [Shortcut Mitigation via Spurious-Positive Samples](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13340)
*Phuong Quynh Le,Jörg Schlötterer,Sari Sadiya,Gemma Roig,Christin Seifert*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种无需额外标注或平衡数据的目标模型分析方法，通过识别模型依赖虚假特征的少数样本，定位关键神经元并正则化其影响，从而提升模型鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有捷径缓解策略通常依赖训练数据标注、组平衡的保留数据或训练数据中存在所有组（即所有虚假属性与类别的组合），但这些条件在实践中很少满足。

Method: 1) 通过目标模型分析识别模型依赖虚假属性的一小部分样本；2) 基于"此特征不应被用于预测"的逻辑，识别中间层中高度相关的神经元；3) 对这些神经元施加正则化，抑制其影响。

Result: 模型学会依赖有信息的特征而非因错误原因做出正确判断，鲁棒性得到提升。

Conclusion: 该方法无需额外的平衡保留数据或标注，即可有效缓解捷径学习问题，提升模型鲁棒性。

Abstract: Shortcut mitigation strategies commonly rely on training data annotations, group-balanced held-out data or the presence of all groups, i.e., all combinations of (spurious) attributes and classes, in the training data. However, these requirements are rarely met in practice. We instead propose a method for targeted model analysis to identify a small set of instances in which the model relies on spurious attributes. Using that set and following ``this feature should not be used for prediction'' reasoning, we identify highly relevant neurons in an intermediate layer and regularize their impact. This ensures that models learn to depend on informative features rather than being right for the wrong reasons, thereby improving robustness without requiring additional balanced held-out data or annotations.

</details>


### [435] [Achieving $ε^{-2}$ Sample Complexity for Single-Loop Actor-Critic under Minimal Assumptions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13639)
*Ishaq Hamza,Zaiwei Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 本文证明了离策略演员-评论家方法在强化学习中的最后一次迭代收敛率，在单循环、单时间尺度实现下实现了$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-2})$的样本复杂度，仅需最小假设（存在一个可诱导不可约马尔可夫链的策略），并通过耦合李雅普诺夫漂移框架解决了单循环实现中耦合更新方程和离策略学习导致的潜在无界迭代问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离策略演员-评论家方法的样本复杂度结果要么需要嵌套循环更新，要么依赖于强且依赖算法的假设（如均匀混合和均匀探索），本文希望在最弱假设下建立单循环、单时间尺度实现的最后一次迭代收敛率。

Method: 提出耦合李雅普诺夫漂移框架：分别建立演员的几何收敛率和评论家的$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/T)$收敛率，然后通过交叉支配（cross-domination）性质将两者结合，从而整体证明$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-2})$样本复杂度。

Result: 首次在单循环、单时间尺度实现下，仅需最小假设（存在可诱导不可约马尔可夫链的策略），即证明了离策略演员-评论家方法达到ε-最优策略的$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-2})$样本复杂度。

Conclusion: 本文的分析框架具有独立价值，可能适用于其他耦合迭代算法（特别是涉及无界迭代的问题），并显著降低了离策略演员-评论家方法收敛性分析所需的假设强度。

Abstract: In this paper, we establish last-iterate convergence rates for off-policy actor--critic methods in reinforcement learning. In particular, under a single-loop, single-timescale implementation and a broad class of policy updates, including approximate policy iteration and natural policy gradient methods, we prove the first $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-2})$ sample complexity guarantee for finding an $ε$-optimal policy under minimal assumptions, namely, the existence of a policy that induces an irreducible Markov chain. This stands in stark contrast to the existing literature, where an $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-2})$ sample complexity is achieved only through nested-loop updates and/or under strong, algorithm-dependent assumptions on the policies, such as uniform mixing and uniform exploration. Technically, to address the challenges posed by the coupled update equations arising from the single-loop implementation, as well as the potentially unbounded iterates induced by off-policy learning, our analysis is based on a coupled Lyapunov drift framework. Specifically, we establish a geometric convergence rate for the actor and an $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/T)$ convergence rate for the critic, and combine the two Lyapunov drift inequalities through a cross-domination property. We believe this analytical framework is of independent interest and may be applicable to other coupled iterative algorithms with unbounded

</details>


### [436] [Sampling from Flow Language Models via Marginal-Conditioned Bridges](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13681)
*Iskander Azangulov,Leo Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 本文针对Flow Language Models (FLMs)提出了一种基于后验预测的自然采样器，替代了标准DDPM风格的采样方法。该方法在每一步从FLM token边际定义的后验分布中采样干净的one-hot端点，然后通过Ornstein-Uhlenbeck桥进行过渡，无需额外训练，能更好地控制质量-多样性权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准DDPM采样器将FLM的后验边际坍缩为条件均值端点，导致生成的序列不是有效的one-hot序列；作者认为FLM的自然采样器应当是后验预测的，以保留token级别的概率结构并提升生成质量。

Method: 提出后验预测采样：在每个逆向步骤中，从FLM token边际定义的后验分布中采样干净的one-hot端点，然后基于该端点从解析的Ornstein-Uhlenbeck桥中采样下一连续状态。该方法无需额外训练，并支持温度缩放和nucleus截断等解码控制。

Result: 理论分析表明，在精确后验边际下，端点近似误差等于token位置之间的条件多信息；该桥核保留了所有token-wise后验预测边际，仅丢失剩余的跨位置依赖。实验表明该采样器改善了质量-多样性权衡。

Conclusion: 后验预测采样是FLM更自然的采样方式，在理论上优于标准DDPM采样，实践中能更好地平衡生成质量和多样性。

Abstract: Flow Language Models (FLMs) are a recently introduced class of language models which adapt continuous flow matching for one-hot encoded token sequences. Their denoisers have a special structure absent from generic continuous diffusion models: each block of the denoising mean is a posterior marginal distribution over the clean token at that position. Standard DDPM-style samplers collapse these marginals to a single conditional-mean endpoint and bridge toward this simplex-valued point, which is generally not a valid one-hot sequence. We argue that the natural sampler for an FLM is instead posterior-predictive. At each reverse step, we sample a clean one-hot endpoint from the factorized posterior defined by the FLM token marginals, and then sample the next continuous state from the analytic Ornstein--Uhlenbeck bridge conditioned on that endpoint. The method is training-free, uses the same model evaluations as standard sampling, and gives a principled interface for token-level decoding controls such as temperature scaling and nucleus truncation. We show that, under exact posterior marginals, the endpoint approximation error is exactly the conditional multi-information among token positions. The induced one-step bridge kernel preserves all token-wise posterior-predictive marginals and loses only the residual cross-position dependence. Finally, we prove a Girsanov path-space comparison showing that the marginal-conditioned bridge has a no-larger denoising-error term than the frozen conditional-mean bridge, with strict improvement whenever intermediate coordinate-wise bridge observations reveal additional information about the clean token. Experiments with FLMs show that the sampler improves the quality--diversity tradeoff. Code is available at: github.com/imbirik/mcb.

</details>


### [437] [ENSEMBITS: an alphabet of protein conformational ensembles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13789)
*Kaiwen Shi,Carlos Oliver*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 提出Ensembits，第一个蛋白质构象集合的tokenizer，通过学习动力学信息提升各项预测任务性能，并支持从单结构预测动力学token。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有蛋白质结构tokenizer只捕捉静态结构的局部几何信息，忽略了由蛋白质集合揭示的相关运动和构象状态，亟需能编码动力学的tokenizer。

Method: 采用Residual VQ-VAE和帧蒸馏目标在大规模分子动力学语料上训练，解决跨构象几何描述子提取、变尺寸集合的置换不变编码以及动力学数据稀疏性等挑战。

Result: 在RMSF预测上优于所有相关方法，在token条件ANOVA测试中是最强的独立结构tokenizer；在EC/GO/结合位点/亲和力预测及零样本突变效应预测上匹配或超越静态tokenizer。

Conclusion: Ensembits为蛋白质动力学提供了离散化词汇，推动了从静态结构预测向集合生成转变，有望将动力学引入蛋白质语言建模和设计中。

Abstract: Protein structure tokenizers (PSTs) are workhorses in protein language modeling, function prediction, and evolutionary analysis. However, existing PSTs only capture local geometry of static structures, and miss the correlated motions and alternative conformational states revealed by protein ensembles. Here we introduce Ensembits, the first tokenizer of protein conformational ensembles. Ensembits address challenges inherent to tokenizing dynamics: deriving informative geometric descriptors across conformations, permutation-invariance encoding of variable-size ensembles, and conquering sparsity in dynamics data. Trained with a Residual VQ-VAE using a frame distillation objective on a large molecular dynamics corpus, Ensembits outperforms all related methods on RMSF prediction, and is the strongest standalone structural tokenizer on an token-conditioned ANOVA test on per-residue motion amplitude. Ensembits further matches or exceeds static tokenizers on EC, GO, binding site/affinity prediction, and zero-shot mutation-effect prediction despite using far less pretraining data. Notably, the distillation objective enables Ensembits to predict dynamics token from one single predicted structure, which alleviates dynamics data sparsity. As the field moves from static structure prediction toward ensemble generation, Ensembits offer the discrete vocabulary needed to bring dynamics into protein language modeling and design.

</details>


### [438] [Provable Quantization with Randomized Hadamard Transform](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13810)
*Ying Feng,Piotr Indyk,Michael Kapralov,Dmitry Krachun,Boris Prokhorov*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 70.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了一种基于单次随机Hadamard变换的抖动量化方法，证明其在均方误差上渐近匹配全随机旋转的理论保证，且计算复杂度仅为O(d log d)。其中抖动版本的TurboQuant在b比特/坐标下达到(π√3/2 + o(1))·4^{-b}的均方误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随机投影后标量量化是机器学习中的基本操作，但稠密随机旋转需要Θ(d²)时间，而Hadamard变换虽将成本降至O(d log d)但其离散结构导致理论分析困难、保证较弱。作者希望设计一种既有Hadamard变换效率、又能保持全随机旋转理论保证的量化方法。

Method: 提出抖动量化（dithered quantization）与单次随机Hadamard变换结合的方案：对输入向量先应用HD变换，减去随机标量偏移后再量化，以极小成本注入额外随机性。理论分析证明该方法的无偏性和MSE界，并特别分析了抖动版TurboQuant的渐近性能。

Result: 证明了该方法是无偏的，且均方误差渐近匹配全随机旋转的理论保证。抖动版TurboQuant在b比特/坐标下MSE为(π√3/2 + o(1))·4^{-b}，其中o(1)项在量化级数增加时对所有单位向量和维度一致消失。

Conclusion: 该工作弥合了Hadamard变换在实际效率与理论保证之间的差距，为高效向量量化提供了理论扎实的实用方案，可应用于相似性搜索、联邦学习、KV缓存压缩等场景。

Abstract: Vector quantization via random projection followed by scalar quantization is a fundamental primitive in machine learning, with applications ranging from similarity search to federated learning and KV cache compression. While dense random rotations yield clean theoretical guarantees, they require $Θ(d^2)$ time. The randomized Hadamard transform $HD$ reduces this cost to $O(d \log d)$, but its discrete structure complicates analysis and leads to weaker or purely empirical compression guarantees.
  In this work, we study a variant of this approach: dithered quantization with a single randomized Hadamard transform. Specifically, the quantizer applies $HD$ to the input vector and subtracts a random scalar offset before quantizing, injecting additional randomness at negligible cost. We prove that this approach is unbiased and provides mean squared error bounds that asymptotically match those achievable with truly random rotation matrices. In particular, we prove that a dithered version of TurboQuant achieves mean squared error $\bigl(π\sqrt{3}/2 + o(1)\bigr) \cdot 4^{-b}$ at $b$ bits per coordinate, where the $o(1)$ term vanishes uniformly over all unit vectors and all dimensions as the number of quantization levels grows.

</details>


### [439] [IGT-OMD: Implicit Gradient Transport for Decision-Focused Learning under Delayed Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12693)
*Benjamin Amoh,Geoffrey G. Parker,Wesley Marrero*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文提出IGT-OMD算法，解决在线决策聚焦学习中的梯度陈旧放大问题，通过隐式梯度传输结合在线镜像下降，将运输误差从二次依赖降为线性依赖，首次实现延迟双层优化的亚线性遗憾界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线决策聚焦学习中，延迟反馈导致梯度陈旧性放大——一种双层优化在延迟下特有的失败模式，传统单层延迟理论无法解释。现有方法缺乏针对双层结构延迟问题的理论分析和有效算法。

Method: 提出IGT-OMD算法：在Online Mirror Descent框架中应用隐式梯度传输（Implicit Gradient Transport），利用存储的内部解在当前参数处重新评估陈旧梯度，从而将运输误差从延迟的二次依赖降为线性依赖，并采用队列长度自适应的步长策略。

Result: 延迟为1时运输收益精确为0.0%（p=1.00），延迟50轮时增长至9.5%（p<0.001）。在LQR、Warcraft最短路径和Sinkhorn最优传输任务上，决策损失相比单层基线降低17-55%。首次实现了延迟双层优化的亚线性遗憾界。

Conclusion: IGT-OMD有效解决了在线双层优化中的梯度陈旧放大问题，理论分析与实验验证的一致性表明该方法在延迟决策聚焦学习中的有效性。

Abstract: Decision-focused learning trains predictive models end-to-end against downstream decision loss, but online settings suffer delayed feedback: outcomes may not arrive for many environment interactions. We identify \emph{staleness amplification}, a failure mode unique to bilevel optimization under delay, in which gradient staleness couples with inner-solver sensitivity to inflate regret beyond single-level delay theory. We prove that any black-box delayed optimizer incurs an irreducible regret cost from inner-solver approximation error, and that gradient staleness contributes a quadratically growing transport error without bilevel-aware correction. Our algorithm, \textbf{IGT-OMD}, applies Implicit Gradient Transport to hypergradients within Online Mirror Descent, re-evaluating stale gradients at the current parameters using stored inner solutions. This method reduces transport error from a quadratic to a linear dependence on delay and achieves the first sublinear regret bound for delayed bilevel optimization with queue-length-adaptive step sizes. Controlled experiments provide a \emph{mechanistic fingerprint}: transport benefit is exactly $0.0\%$ ($p=1.00$) at unit delay and grows monotonically to $9.5\%$ at fifty rounds ($p<0.001$), isolating the correction's effect. On Linear Quadratic Regulator, Warcraft shortest-path, and Sinkhorn optimal transport, IGT-OMD reduces decision loss by $17$--$55\%$ relative to single-level baselines, with phase transitions matching the theory.

</details>


### [440] [From Generalist to Specialist Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12733)
*Yujia Zheng,Fan Feng,Yuke Li,Shaoan Xie,Kevin Murphy,Kun Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文在完全非参数设定下，证明了时间步与任务之间的结构在完全无监督方式下是可识别的，并且通过简单的稀疏正则化，任务相关的潜在表示可以与无关部分解耦，为从通用模型向专家模型转变提供了理论保障。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从通用模型学习任务相关的专业表示是下游应用的基础，而可识别性（identifiability）是保证恢复真实表示的关键理论极限。现有方法依赖干预、参数形式或结构约束，缺乏非参数设定下的通用可识别性保证。

Method: 在完全非参数设定下，首先证明即使序列缺乏严格时间依赖且可能断开连接，时间步与任务结构在无监督下可识别；然后证明通过简单稀疏正则化，每个时间步内任务相关潜在表示可与无关部分解耦。

Result: 建立了层次化基础：跨时间步的任务结构可识别，每个时间步内的任务相关潜在表示可识别，每个结果都是首个一般非参数可识别性保证。

Conclusion: 该工作为从通用模型走向专家模型提供了理论上的可行性证明，标志着向可证明的通用到专精模型转变迈出一步。

Abstract: Given a generalist model, learning a task-relevant specialist representation is fundamental for downstream applications. Identifiability, the asymptotic guarantee of recovering the ground-truth representation, is critical because it sets the ultimate limit of any model, even with infinite data and computation. We study this problem in a completely nonparametric setting, without relying on interventions, parametric forms, or structural constraints. We first prove that the structure between time steps and tasks is identifiable in a fully unsupervised manner, even when sequences lack strict temporal dependence and may exhibit disconnections, and task assignments can follow arbitrarily complex and interleaving structures. We then prove that, within each time step, the task-relevant latent representation can be disentangled from the irrelevant part under a simple sparsity regularization, without any additional information or parametric constraints. Together, these results establish a hierarchical foundation: task structure is identifiable across time steps, and task-relevant latent representations are identifiable within each step. To our knowledge, each result provides a first general nonparametric identifiability guarantee, and together they mark a step toward provably moving from generalist to specialist models.

</details>


### [441] [LightSplit: Practical Privacy-Preserving Split Learning via Orthogonal Projections](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13265)
*Mert Cihangiroglu,Alessandro Pegoraro,Phillip Rieger,Antonino Nocera,Ahmad-Reza Sadeghi*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: LightSplit通过在分割学习的切割层应用轻量级固定正交随机投影，作为信息瓶颈来限制信息暴露并减少通信开销，在高达32倍维度压缩下仍能保持95%以上的基线准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分割学习中，切割层的高维激活值既带来巨大的通信开销，又容易遭受重建攻击。现有方法通常单独处理效率或隐私问题，缺乏同时兼顾两者的轻量级方案。

Method: 在切割层应用一个固定的正交随机投影矩阵，将高维激活值投影到低维空间。该投影基于香农信息论作为信息瓶颈，限制实例特定信息并抑制可被利用的每样本信号。投影不可逆，部分原始表示在客户端被不可逆丢弃。无需额外可训练组件，通过精确梯度传播保持端到端可微性。

Result: 在IID和非IID设置下，LightSplit在高达32倍维度压缩时仍保留超过95%的基线准确率，训练动态稳定，兼容现有SL架构。

Conclusion: LightSplit是一种轻量级、无需修改架构的方法，能同时提升分割学习的通信效率和隐私保护，适合边缘设备部署。

Abstract: Split learning (SL) enables collaborative training by partitioning a neural network across clients and a central server, but the cut-layer interface introduces a key challenge: high-dimensional activations incur substantial communication overhead while exposing representations vulnerable to reconstruction attacks. Existing approaches typically address efficiency or privacy in isolation, relying on additional mechanisms such as sparsification, quantization, or noise injection. We propose LightSplit, which limits information exposure and reduces communication overhead by applying a lightweight fixed orthogonal random projection at the cut layer. Based on Shannon's information theory, this projection acts as an information bottleneck that restricts instance-specific information and suppresses exploitable per-sample signals. By transmitting low-dimensional projections instead of raw activations, the server operates on lifted representations without requiring architectural modifications, ensuring compatibility with existing SL architectures. By avoiding additional trainable components on the client, the method remains lightweight and suitable for edge devices while preserving end-to-end differentiability via exact gradient propagation. As the projection is non-invertible, part of the original representation is irreversibly discarded at the client, LightSplit reduces the information available for reconstruction and limits information exposure. We extensively evaluate LightSplit on state-of-the-art benchmarks in both IID and non-IID settings across varying projection dimensions and client scales. Our results show that the method retains more than 95% of the baseline accuracy at up to 32x reduction in transmitted dimensionality while maintaining stable training dynamics.

</details>


### [442] [HLS-Seek: QoR-Aware Code Generation for High-Level Synthesis via Proxy Comparative Reward Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13536)
*Qingyun Zou,Feng Yu,Hongshi Tan,Yao Chen,Bingsheng He,WengFai Wong*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: HLS-Seek是一个QoR感知的自然语言到HLS框架，利用强化学习和比较性代理奖励模型，通过不确定性感知的MC dropout切换实现自我改进，在7B参数下超越GPT-5.1等前沿模型，实现8.5倍训练加速和最低延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的HLS方法只关注功能正确性，完全忽略QoR（延迟和资源利用率），而QoR对于硬件综合至关重要。作者观察到HLS的RL不需要绝对综合结果，只需要候选方案间的相对比较。

Method: 提出HLS-Seek框架，用比较性代理奖励模型替代昂贵的综合驱动RL，达到99.53%帕累托支配准确率；引入不确定性感知的MC dropout切换机制，对低置信度候选方案选择性调用真实Vitis HLS综合并在线更新代理。

Result: 在HLS-eval上达到81.5%语法正确率pass@1和81.4% Func@5，超越GPT-5.1等模型；训练速度比真实奖励RL快8.5倍；在30个内核中的16个上实现最低延迟，在9个内核上帕累托支配HLS特定基线。

Conclusion: HLS-Seek证明了在HLS任务中，基于相对比较的代理奖励模型可以有效替代昂贵综合过程，兼顾功能正确性与QoR优化，为NL-to-HLS提供了新范式。

Abstract: High-Level Synthesis (HLS) compiles algorithmic C/C++ descriptions into hardware, with Quality of Results (QoR) -- latency and resource utilization -- critically governed by pragma configurations and code structure. Existing LLM-based HLS approaches train for functional correctness but ignore QoR entirely. We observe that reinforcement learning (RL) for HLS does not require absolute synthesis results -- only relative comparisons between candidates. Based on this insight, we propose \textbf{HLS-Seek}, a QoR-aware NL-to-HLS framework that replaces expensive synthesis-in-the-loop RL with a comparative proxy reward model achieving 99.53\% Pareto-dominance accuracy. To prevent reward hacking, we introduce \textit{uncertainty-aware Monte Carlo (MC) dropout switching} that selectively invokes real Vitis HLS synthesis for low-confidence candidates and online updates the proxy, creating a self-improving reward system. HLS-Seek achieves 81.5\% syntax correctness pass@1 and 81.4\% Func@5 on HLS-eval with only 7B parameters, surpassing GPT-5.1 and other frontier models while achieving 8.5$\times$ faster training than real-reward RL. On QoR evaluation, HLS-Seek achieves the lowest latency on 16/30 kernels and Pareto-dominates HLS-specific baselines on 9 kernels.

</details>


### [443] [Multimodal Graph-based Classification of Esophageal Motility Disorders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13623)
*Alexander Geiger,Lars Wagner,Daniel Rueckert,Alois Knoll,Dirk Wilhelm,Alissa Jell*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种多模态机器学习方法，结合高分辨率阻抗测压（HRIM）数据、患者信息（通过LLM提取）和图神经网络（GNN）建模食管生理结构，用于食管动力障碍分类，实验表明该方法优于仅依赖HRIM的视觉基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 食管动力障碍诊断因HRIM数据复杂性和临床解读变异性而面临挑战，现有方法未充分利用患者信息和食管解剖结构的关系。

Method: 将HRIM数据构建为时空图（节点=压力值，边=空间邻接+阻抗动态），使用GNN学习生理表征；同时利用LLM从结构化问卷和自由文本中提取患者特征，将两者融合进行多类别吞咽事件分类。

Result: 多模态方法在所有分类类别上优于仅依赖HRIM特征的模型；图建模相比视觉基线方法带来性能提升。

Conclusion: 整合患者层面数据与HRIM信号的图表示是更准确分类食管动力障碍的有前景方向。

Abstract: Diagnosing esophageal motility disorders pose significant challenges due to the complexity of high-resolution impedance manometry (HRIM) data and variability in clinical interpretation. This work explores the feasibility of a multimodal Machine Learning (ML)-based classification approach that combines HRIM recordings with patient-specific information and incorporates a graph-based modeling of esophageal physiology. We analyze HRIM recordings with corresponding patient information from 104 patients with esophageal motility disorders. Patient data includes demographic, clinical, and symptom information extracted from structured questionnaires and free-text notes using keyword detection and large language model-based processing. HRIM data is represented as spatio-temporal graphs, where nodes correspond to pressure values along the esophagus and edges encode spatial adjacency and impedance dynamics. A graph neural network (GNN) is applied to learn physiologically meaningful representations, which are fused with patient embeddings for multi-category, multi-class classification of swallow events. The impact of patient features and graph-based modeling is evaluated by ablation studies and comparison to vision-based classifier baselines. The proposed multimodal approach indicates improvements over models that rely solely on HRIM-derived features across all classification categories. Additionally, the graph-based modeling provides gains compared to vision-based baselines. Our experiments systematically assess the complementary contribution of multiple modalities, as well as demonstrate the feasibility of our proposed graph-based approach. Our initial findings demonstrate that integrating patient-level data with graph-based representations of HRIM signals appears to be a promising direction for more accurate classification of esophageal motility disorders.

</details>


### [444] [QLAM: A Quantum Long-Attention Memory Approach to Long-Sequence Token Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13833)
*Hoang-Quan Nguyen,Sankalp Pandey,Khoa Luu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出QLAM，一种利用量子叠加特性增强状态空间模型（SSM）的混合量子-经典记忆机制，通过参数化量子电路演化量子状态来隐式捕获全局依赖关系，在序列化图像分类任务上超越循环基线和Transformer模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Transformers的二次复杂度限制了长序列可扩展性，而SSMs虽然线性高效但线性/加性记忆更新方式难以捕获复杂的全局交互。作者希望利用量子系统的叠加特性来增强基于状态的序列建模能力。

Method: 提出Quantum Long-Attention Memory (QLAM)，将隐藏状态表示为量子状态，其振幅编码历史信息的叠加；通过输入条件化的参数化量子电路实现非经典全局更新机制；保留SSM的循环线性时间结构，通过查询相关测量检索任务相关信息。

Result: 在sMNIST、sFashion-MNIST和sCIFAR-10三个序列化图像分类基准上，QLAM一致性地优于循环基线方法和Transformer模型。

Conclusion: 量子叠加特性可以有效地增强状态空间模型的记忆表示能力，QLAM在保持线性时间复杂度同时实现了对全局依赖的隐式捕获，为量子机器学习与序列建模的结合提供了新方向。

Abstract: Modeling long-range dependencies in sequential data remains a central challenge in machine learning. Transformers address this challenge through attention mechanisms, but their quadratic complexity with respect to sequence length limits scalability to long contexts. State-space models (SSMs) provide an efficient alternative with linear-time computation by evolving a latent state through recurrent updates, but their memory is typically formed via additive or linear transitions, which can limit their ability to capture complex global interactions across tokens. In this work, we introduce one of the first studies to leverage the superposition property of quantum systems to enhance state-based sequence modeling. In particular, we propose Quantum Long-Attention Memory (QLAM), a hybrid quantum-classical memory mechanism that can be viewed as a quantum extension of state-space models. Instead of maintaining a classical latent state updated through additive dynamics, QLAM represents the hidden state as a quantum state whose amplitudes encode a superposition of historical information. The state evolves through parameterized quantum circuits conditioned on the input, enabling a non-classical, globally update mechanism. In this way, QLAM preserves the recurrent and linear-time structure of SSMs while fundamentally enriching the memory representation through quantum superposition. Unlike attention mechanisms that explicitly compute pairwise interactions, QLAM implicitly captures global dependencies through the evolution of the quantum state, and retrieves task-relevant information via query-dependent measurements. We evaluate QLAM on sequential variants of standard image classification benchmarks, including sMNIST, sFashion-MNIST, and sCIFAR-10, where images are flattened into token sequences. Across all tasks, QLAM consistently improves over recurrent baselines and transformer-based models.

</details>


### [445] [SHM-Agents: A Generalist-Specialist Integrated Agent System for Structural Health Monitoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12916)
*Yuequan Bao,Xing Li,Huabin Sun,Dawei Liu,Yuxuan Tian,Haiyang Hu*

Main category: cs.MA

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出SHM-Agents，一个结合大语言模型推理规划能力与专用算法求解能力的通用-专用智能体系统，用于结构健康监测，通过自然语言实现端到端执行多种SHM任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有结构健康监测（SHM）专用算法虽然有效，但存在实施门槛高、互操作性差、训练流程复杂等问题，需要一种更通用、易用的解决方案。

Method: 设计了SHM-Agents通用-专用智能体系统，将大语言模型的推理和规划能力与专用算法的求解能力相结合，支持自然语言交互、深度学习预训练和模块化扩展。

Result: 在大跨度斜拉桥上的实验表明，SHM-Agents能够准确高效地完成数据异常诊断恢复、信号处理、统计分析、模态识别、损伤识别、有限元模型更新、车辆荷载建模等多种SHM任务。

Conclusion: SHM-Agents通过LLM与专用算法的协同，有效降低了SHM任务的使用门槛，提升了系统的灵活性和互操作性。

Abstract: Artificial intelligence is increasingly used to simplify complex tasks. In engineering applications of structural health monitoring (SHM), existing specialized algorithms, while effective, often face high implementation barriers, limited interoperability and complex training procedures. To overcome these challenges, this paper proposes SHM-Agents, a generalist-specialist agent system that integrates the reasoning and planning abilities of large language models with the problem-solving strengths of specialized algorithms. SHM-Agents enables end-to-end execution of single and combined SHM tasks via natural language, supports deep learning pre-training to simplify deployment and allows flexible expansion through a modular design. Experiments on a long-span cable-stayed bridge show that SHM-Agents can accurately and efficiently perform diverse SHM tasks, including data anomaly diagnosis and recovery, signal processing, statistical analysis, modal identification, damage identification, finite element model updating, vehicle load modeling, response calculation, reliability assessment, fatigue estimation and bridge knowledge Q\&A.

</details>


### [446] [Do Fair Models Reason Fairly? Counterfactual Explanation Consistency for Procedural Fairness in Credit Decisions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12701)
*Gideon Popoola,John Sheppard*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: 现有公平性算法只关注预测结果公平，但忽略了模型对不同群体使用不同推理过程的"隐藏程序偏见"。本文提出反事实解释一致性(CEC)框架，通过对齐特征归因来检测和缓解这种偏见，并引入"相同结果、不同推理"的Regime B概念。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在信用评估等社会敏感领域，现有公平性机器学习算法只关注预测结果公平（如不同群体得到相同的批准率），但即使结果公平，模型仍可能对不同的个体使用根本不同的推理逻辑，这是一种被忽视的隐藏程序偏见。

Method: 提出CEC框架：1) 最近邻反事实生成方法；2) 修改Integrated Gradient的基线以进行特征归因比较；3) 个体级别的程序公平性度量；4) 对应的训练损失函数。

Result: 在合成数据、German Credit、Adult Income、HMDA抵押贷款数据上，结果公平的基线方法存在显著的隐藏偏见，而CEC能够大幅减少这种偏见，且只带来适度的效用损失。

Conclusion: 仅追求结果公平是不够的，必须关注模型的推理过程公平性。CEC能有效检测和缓解隐藏的程序偏见，是现有公平性方法的必要补充。

Abstract: Machine learning algorithms in socially sensitive domains (e.g., credit decisions) often focus on equalizing predictive outcomes. However, satisfying these metrics does not guarantee that models use the same reasoning for different groups. We show that existing outcome-fair models can still apply fundamentally different reasoning to individuals, a ``hidden procedural bias'' missed by standard fairness metrics and algorithms. We propose Counterfactual Explanation Consistency (CEC), a framework that detects and mitigates this bias by aligning feature attributions between individuals and their counterfactual counterparts. Key contributions include a nearest-neighbor counterfactual generation method, a modified baseline for integrated gradient comparisons, an individual-level procedural fairness metric, and a corresponding training loss. We introduce a taxonomy identifying ``Regime B'' (same outcome, different reasoning) as a critical blind spot. Experiments on synthetic data, German Credit, Adult Income, and HMDA mortgage data demonstrate that outcome-fair baselines exhibit substantial hidden bias, while CEC substantially reduces it with modest utility cost.

</details>


### [447] [ToolMol: Evolutionary Agentic Framework for Multi-objective Drug Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12784)
*Andrew Y. Zhou,Sharvaree Vadgama,Sumanth Varambally,Peter Eckmann,Michael K. Gilson,Rose Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: 本文提出 ToolMol，一种将多目标遗传算法与智能体 LLM 算子相结合的进化框架，用于小分子药物设计。通过在 RDKit 工具包支持下进行精确的配体修饰，ToolMol 在多目标性质优化任务上达到了 SOTA，在三个蛋白靶点上预测结合亲和力提升 >10%，绝对结合自由能评分提升 >35%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于 LLM 的分子生成方法存在高比例的无效和低质量配体候选物的问题，这是由于模型在处理分子字符串时的语法限制所致。本文旨在克服这一局限性，通过工具调用增强 LLM 在药物设计中的能力。

Method: ToolMol 是一个进化式智能体框架，核心包含两部分：1) 多目标遗传算法用于全局搜索；2) 基于 LLM 的智能体算子通过调用 RDKit 工具包（如分子编辑、性质预测等）对配体群体进行迭代更新。LLM 通过链式思维推理规划修改策略，再通过工具调用精确执行。

Result: 在三个蛋白靶点上，ToolMol 生成的配体预测结合亲和力比现有方法强 >10%，绝对结合自由能（ABFE）评分超越现有方法 >35%，同时保持了类药性和可合成性。

Conclusion: 工具调用机制使 LLM 能够更忠实地执行计划的分子修改，高效利用了 LLM 中的化学先验知识。ToolMol 证明了将 LLM 的推理能力与专业化学工具相结合的进化智能体框架在药物设计中的巨大潜力。

Abstract: Advances in large language models (LLMs) have recently opened new and promising avenues for small-molecule drug discovery. Yet existing LLM-based approaches for molecular generation often suffer from high rates of invalid and low-quality ligand candidates, a result of the syntactic limitations of current models with regard to molecular strings. In this paper, we introduce $\texttt{ToolMol}$, an evolutionary agentic framework for de novo drug design. $\texttt{ToolMol}$ combines a multi-objective genetic algorithm with an agentic LLM operator that iteratively updates the ligand population. We build a comprehensive toolbox of RDKit-backed functions that allows our agentic operator to consisently make precise ligand modifications. $\texttt{ToolMol}$ achieves state-of-the-art performance on multi-objective property optimization tasks, discovering drug-like and synthesizable ligands that have $>10\%$ stronger predicted binding affinity compared to existing methods, evaluated on three protein targets. $\texttt{ToolMol}$ ligands additionally achieve state-of-the-art results in gold-standard Absolute Binding Free Energy scores, gaining over existing methods by over $35\%$. By studying chain-of-thought reasoning traces, we observe that tool-calling enables the model to more faithfully execute its planned modifications, efficiently exploiting the strong chemical prior knowledge in LLMs.

</details>


### [448] [The Expressivity Boundary of Probabilistic Circuits: A Comparison with Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12940)
*Zhiyu Zhao,Xuejie Liu,Muhan Zhang,Anji Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: 本文系统分析了概率电路（PCs）与Transformer大语言模型（LLMs）在自回归语言建模中的差距，揭示了两个关键瓶颈：输出瓶颈（概率空间vs logit空间参数化）和上下文编码瓶颈（固定路由结构导致对异构依赖拓扑的建模能力受限），并证明了可分解PC在表达能力上严格优于结构化可分解PC。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究概率电路在自回归语言建模中为何落后于基于Transformer的大语言模型，试图理解两者之间的表达性差距，为改进PC架构提供理论基础。

Method: 在统一的自回归框架下对比PCs和LLMs，从两个角度分析：1) 输出瓶颈：比较概率空间与logit空间的参数化方式；2) 上下文编码瓶颈：理论上证明结构化可分解PC在vtree对齐的划分上能达到Transformer的分离秩，但受限于固定路由结构；并证明可分解PC的表达能力严格强于结构化可分解PC。

Result: 1) 概率空间的凸组合参数化难以表达语言中的尖锐分布，logit空间参数化可显著缩小差距；2) 结构化可分解PC的表达能力受限于固定的路由结构，在异构依赖拓扑数据上表现严重退化；3) 可分解PC理论上表达能力更强，但优化困难。

Conclusion: PCs在自回归语言建模中的落后主要源于输出参数化方式和固定上下文编码结构的局限性，改进方向包括采用logit空间参数化以及探索更灵活的PC结构。

Abstract: Probabilistic Circuits (PCs) are deep generative models that support exact and efficient probabilistic inference. Yet in autoregressive language modeling, PCs still lag behind Transformer-based large language models (LLMs), suggesting an important expressivity gap. In this work, we compare PCs and LLMs under a unified autoregressive formulation. First, an output bottleneck: PCs parameterize predictions as convex combinations in probability space, which struggles to represent the sharp distributions typical of language; adopting a logit-space parameterization substantially narrows this gap. Second, a context-encoding bottleneck: we prove that structured-decomposable PCs can match Transformer separation rank on vtree-aligned partitions, but show, both theoretically and empirically, that this capacity is limited to partitions aligned with the fixed routing structure, leading to severe degradation when the data exhibits heterogeneous dependency topologies. We further prove that decomposable PCs are strictly more expressive than structured-decomposable ones, though effectively optimizing them remains an open challenge.

</details>


### [449] [U-HNO: A U-shaped Hybrid Neural Operator with Sparse-Point Adaptive Routing for Non-stationary PDE Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12965)
*Yingzhe Ma,Xiao Yang,Yuxin Xie,Zihan Xiong,Jinliang Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: 本文提出U-HNO，一种U形混合神经算子，通过稀疏点自适应路由（SPAR）在全局傅里叶分支和局部多尺度高斯分支之间进行空间自适应融合，有效解决了PDE求解中全局平滑输运与局部尖锐特征并存的难题，在多个基准测试上达到了SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经算子方法在处理PDE时面临两难：基于傅里叶的架构擅长非局部全局交互但难以解析局部尖锐特征（如激波、界面），而空间局部架构虽能恢复细节但长程传播和 rollout 稳定性差。现有的混合算子采用固定、空间均匀的融合方式，无法在不同区域自适应调整全局与局部计算的混合比例。

Method: 提出U-HNO架构，核心是SPAR（稀疏点自适应路由）机制：在每个空间位置，通过逐像素硬掩码选择全局傅里叶分支或局部多尺度高斯分支的主导程度，稀疏率由路由信号的局部对比度动态决定。该机制嵌入在带跳跃连接的层次化编码器-瓶颈-解码器骨干中，双分支和门控在所有分辨率上协同工作。训练结合逐点监督、有限差分H¹梯度项和带频谱一致性正则化。

Result: 在1D Burgers、Kuramoto-Sivashinsky、KdV、2D advection、Allen-Cahn、Navier-Stokes、Darcy flow以及3D可压缩Navier-Stokes（PDEBench）等多个基准上，U-HNO在大多数任务中达到SOTA rollout精度（相对L²和H¹指标），在含尖锐局部特征的问题上增益最大。消融实验表明移除任一组件都会显著降低性能。

Conclusion: 通过空间自适应的稀疏路由机制，U-HNO成功调和了全局非局部传播与局部细节恢复之间的矛盾，为处理多尺度PDE问题提供了一种有效的混合架构范式。

Abstract: Solutions to many partial differential equations (PDEs) display coexisting smooth global transport and localized sharp features within a single trajectory: shock fronts, thin interfaces, and concentrated high-frequency content sit on top of slowly varying backgrounds. This poses a challenge for neural operators: Fourier-based architectures mix nonlocal interactions efficiently but tend to under-resolve localized non-smooth features, whereas spatially local architectures recover fine detail at the cost of long-range propagation and rollout stability. Existing hybrid operators paper over this tension with a fixed, spatially uniform fusion that forces the same trade-off everywhere.
  We propose U-HNO, a U-shaped hybrid neural operator whose central design is Sparse-Point Adaptive Routing (SPAR): at every spatial location, a per-pixel hard mask selects whether the global Fourier branch or the local multi-scale Gaussian branch should dominate, and the sparsity ratio is a function of the local contrast of the routing signal, so smooth and shock-aligned regions receive different mixtures of global and local computation. SPAR is embedded in a hierarchical encoder-bottleneck-decoder backbone with skip connections so that the dual branches and the gate operate at every resolution. Training combines pointwise supervision with a finite-difference H^1 gradient term and a band-wise spectral consistency regularizer.
  Across benchmarks spanning 1D Burgers, Kuramoto-Sivashinsky, KdV, 2D advection, Allen-Cahn, Navier-Stokes, Darcy flow, and 3D transonic compressible Navier-Stokes from PDEBench, U-HNO achieves state-of-the-art rollout accuracy on the majority of tasks in both relative L^2 and H^1 metrics, with the largest gains on problems dominated by sharp localized features. Ablations show that removing any single component substantially degrades rollout error.

</details>


### [450] [Delightful Exploration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13287)
*Ian Osband*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: 本文提出"愉悦门控探索"(DE)方法，将探索动作的分配与期望改进和信息熵的乘积挂钩，通过潘多拉最优停止规则动态决定何时探索，在伯努利老虎机、线性老虎机和表格MDP中展现出比汤普森采样和ε-贪心更弱的遗憾增长。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当动作空间过大时，传统探索算法（如汤普森采样）无法在预算内充分解决不确定性，而ε-贪心虽然限制探索成本但盲目覆盖。作者希望设计一种高效的探索启发式方法，能够在有限信息预算下智能分配探索资源。

Method: 提出Delight-gated exploration (DE)，其核心是"愉悦"度量 = 期望改进 × 信息熵（surprisal）。当愉悦值超过预设的"门控价格"时才执行探索动作。这等价于潘多拉魔盒问题中的保留价值规则，其中信息熵作为有效检查成本。已解决的动作退出门控，新动作超过先验阈值则被关闭。

Result: 在伯努利老虎机、线性老虎机和表格MDP三类环境中，同一组超参数无需调优即可迁移；DE在测试的未解决机制（unresolved regimes）中表现出比汤普森采样和ε-贪心显著更弱的遗憾增长。

Conclusion: 愉悦（Delight）提升行动的原因与提升学习的理由相同：它通过"预期收益×信息熵"来对稀缺资源定价，从而更高效地利用有限的信息预算进行探索。

Abstract: Most exploration algorithms search broadly until uncertainty is resolved. When the action space is too large to resolve within budget, practitioners default to $\varepsilon$-greedy, which bounds disruption but spends its override blindly. We introduce \textit{Delight-gated exploration} (DE), a host--override rule that spends exploratory actions only when their prospective delight (expected improvement times surprisal) exceeds a gate price. This practical heuristic recovers a classical result: Pandora's reservation-value rule for costly search, with surprisal setting the effective inspection cost. Resolved arms exit the gate, fresh arms shut off above a prior-determined threshold, and selected linear-bandit overrides consume finite information budget. Across Bernoulli bandits, linear bandits, and tabular MDPs, the same hyperparameters transfer without retuning, and DE shows much weaker regret growth than Thompson Sampling and $\varepsilon$-greedy in the tested unresolved regimes. Delight improves acting for the same reason it improves learning: it prices scarce resources by the product of upside and surprisal.

</details>


### [451] [Code-Centric Detection of Vulnerability-Fixing Commits: A Unified Benchmark and Empirical Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13138)
*Nils Loose,Joseph Bienhüls,Kristoffer Hempel,Felix Mächtle,Thomas Eisenbarth*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了基于代码语言模型的漏洞修复提交（VFC）检测方法，发现仅靠代码变更无法习得可迁移的安全理解，模型主要依赖提交信息而非代码本身，在低假阳率下漏检率超过93%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 安全公告通常落后于补丁发布中位数25天，且许多修复从未被记录，因此自动检测漏洞修复提交对于及时部署安全补丁至关重要。

Method: 构建统一框架整合20多个数据集（超过18万次提交），对125M到14B参数规模的代码语言模型进行微调，进行超过180项实验，包括分组分层评估、归因分析、时间分裂评估等。

Result: 1) 模型无法从代码变更中习得可迁移的安全理解；2) 提交信息占据模型注意力主导，移除后语义增强无法将注意力转向代码；3) 分组分层评估性能下降约17%；4) 0.5%假阳率下所有模型漏检率超93%。

Conclusion: 现有代码语言模型在VFC检测任务上存在根本性局限，更大规模和更多样化的训练数据或生成式方法虽有初步改进但无法解决核心问题。

Abstract: Automated detection of vulnerability-fixing commits (VFCs) is critical for timely security patch deployment, as advisory databases lag patch releases by a median of 25 days and many fixes never receive advisories. We present a comprehensive evaluation of code language model based VFC detection through a unified framework consolidating over 20 fragmented datasets spanning more than 180000 commits. Across over 180 experiments with fine-tuned models from 125 M to 14 B parameters, we find no evidence that models acquire transferable security-relevant code understanding from code changes alone. When commit messages are available, they dominate model attention, and when removed, an attribution analysis shows that enriching diffs with additional intra-procedural semantic context does not shift model attention toward the code changes. Group-stratified evaluation exposes approximately 17% performance drops compared to random splits, while temporal splits on aggregated datasets prove unreliable due to compositional shift in the underlying project distributions. At a false positive rate of 0.5% all fine-tuned code-only models miss over 93% of vulnerabilities. Larger and more diverse training data or generative approaches show preliminary improvements but do not resolve the underlying limitations. To support future research on code-centric VFC detection, we release our unified framework and evaluation suite.

</details>


### [452] [Learning to Decide with AI Assistance under Human-Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12646)
*Nina Corvelo Benz,Eleni Straitouri,Manuel Gomez-Rodriguez*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 55.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了AI辅助决策中，AI置信度与人类置信度之间的对齐程度如何影响学习最优决策的复杂度。在二进制预测和决策场景下，证明了该问题等价于一个完全反馈的两臂在线上下文学习问题，并给出了遗憾下界。理论分析表明，完美对齐能显著降低学习复杂度，而真实实验验证了理论结果的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究已发现AI置信度与人类置信度的对齐程度与AI辅助决策的效用正相关，但尚未阐明这种对齐如何影响通过重复交互学习最优决策的复杂度。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，量化对齐对学习复杂度的影响。

Method: 将问题形式化为完全反馈下的两臂在线上下文学习问题，推导了遗憾下界Ω(√(|H|·|B|·T))；在完美对齐假设下，给出了O(√(|H|·T log T))的遗憾上界；利用Dvoretzky-Kiefer-Wolfowitz不等式的推广进一步优化到O(√(T log T))；并用两个真实人类实验数据验证理论结果的鲁棒性。

Result: 建立了遗憾下界Ω(√(|H|·|B|·T))；完美对齐下遗憾上界为O(√(|H|·T log T))；当条件满足时可改进为O(√(T log T))；真实实验表明理论结果在偏离完美对齐假设时仍然稳健。

Conclusion: AI与人类置信度的对齐能够显著降低学习最优决策的复杂度，理论边界在真实数据上具有鲁棒性。这为设计更有效的AI辅助决策系统提供了理论指导。

Abstract: It is widely agreed that when AI models assist decision-makers in high-stakes domains by predicting an outcome of interest, they should communicate the confidence of their predictions. However, empirical evidence suggests that decision-makers often struggle to determine when to trust a prediction based solely on this communicated confidence. In this context, recent theoretical and empirical work suggests a positive correlation between the utility of AI-assisted decision-making and the degree of alignment between the AI confidence and the decision-makers' confidence in their own predictions. Crucially, these findings do not yet elucidate the extent to which this alignment influences the complexity of learning to make optimal decisions through repeated interactions. In this paper, we address this question in the canonical case of binary predictions and binary decisions. We first show that this problem is equivalent to a two-armed online contextual learning problem with full feedback, and establish a lower bound of $Ω(\sqrt{|H| \cdot |B| \cdot T} )$ on the expected regret any learner can attain, where $H$ and $B$ denote the sets of human and AI confidence values. We then demonstrate that, under perfect alignment between AI and human confidence, a learner can attain an expected regret of $O(\sqrt{|H| \cdot T\log T})$ and, when $\sqrt{|H|} = O(\log T)$ and $B$ is countable, a non-trivial generalization of the Dvoretzky-Kiefer-Wolfowitz inequality improves the regret bound to $O(\sqrt{T\log T})$. Taken together, these results reveal that alignment can reduce the complexity of learning to make decisions with AI assistance. Experiments on real data from two different human-subject studies where participants solve simple decision-making tasks assisted by AI models show that our theoretical results are robust to violations of perfect alignment.

</details>


### [453] [PaMM: Periodic Motif Memory for Atomistic Models with an Explicit Local-Structure Interface](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13297)
*Ryan Dong*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 55.0

TL;DR: 提出PaMM（周期性基序记忆模块），为等变原子模型显式编码成对和三体局部结构模式。在UMA-S+OMAT设定下，10k步训练检查点显示门控变体能量MAE最优，仿射变体力MAE最优，相比基线有提升，且收益来自结构化模式而非额外容量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前等变原子模型通常仅在密集边特征中隐式编码周期性晶体的局部配位模式，缺乏对显式结构的利用，PaMM旨在通过显式键值对/三体基序记忆增强模型归纳偏置。

Method: PaMM将成对基序按(Z_j, Z_i, b_r)哈希、三体基序按(Z_j, Z_i, Z_k, b_θ)哈希，存入固定大小表格，再通过门控或仿射融合方式与UMA eSCN-MD基线边表示结合。

Result: 在10k步检查点，门控变体能量MAE最优，仿射变体力MAE最优；成对/三体单独、随机桶或参数匹配MLP的消融实验收益减弱，表明收益来自结构化组织；OMAT24内源家族评估也有稳定小幅度提升。

Conclusion: 在UMA-S+OMAT设定下，显式成对/三体基序记忆是一种有用的归纳偏置；不宣称跨数据集迁移、单一最优融合变体或强科学可解释性。

Abstract: Periodic crystals repeatedly instantiate similar local coordination motifs across translated cells and chemically related structures, but current equivariant atomistic models usually encode these patterns only implicitly in dense edge features. We introduce PaMM, a periodic motif memory that augments the UMA eSCN-MD edge encoder with explicit pair and triplet lookup features. Pair motifs are keyed by $(Z_j, Z_i, b_r)$ and triplet motifs by $(Z_j, Z_i, Z_k, b_θ)$, hashed into fixed-size tables and fused with the baseline edge representation through lightweight gate-only and affine-equipped variants. We evaluate PaMM in a matched UMA-S OMAT setting and focus on a narrow question: whether explicit motif memory helps at a fixed intermediate training budget. At the 10k-step checkpoint, both PaMM variants improve over the plain baseline; gate-only gives the best energy MAE, while the affine-equipped variant gives the best force MAE. A matched 20k follow-up keeps the same operating-point picture. Aligned controls show that the gain weakens for pair-only, triplet-only, random-bucket, and parameter-matched MLP alternatives, suggesting that the benefit is tied to structured pair/triplet organization rather than generic added capacity. A within-OMAT24 source-family evaluation also shows small but consistent gains across held-out generation families. We therefore make a focused claim: in the studied UMA-S + OMAT regime, explicit pair/ triplet motif memory is a useful inductive bias for periodic atomistic modeling. We do not claim broad cross-dataset transfer, a uniquely preferred fusion variant, or strong scientific interpretability beyond a more inspectable local-structure interface.

</details>


### [454] [The WidthWall: A Strict Expressivity Hierarchy for Hypergraph Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13690)
*Fengqing Jiang,Yuetai Li,Yichen Feng,Kaiyuan Zheng,Luyao Niu,Bhaskar Ramasubramanian,Basel Alomair,Linda Bushnell,Radha Poovendran*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 55.0

TL;DR: 本文通过同态密度理论揭示了超图神经网络（HGNN）的表达能力受限于其能检测的小模式结构，提出了"宽度墙"这一理论基础，表明超图结构的复杂度（超树宽）是HGNN表达能力的根本瓶颈，并实验验证了宽度墙对实际应用的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 超图神经网络被广泛用于建模高阶交互数据，但学术界对其表达能力——即能表示哪些高阶结构——缺乏理论基础。研究者希望通过形式化框架来理解HGNN的内在限制。

Method: 将同态计数完备性与不变逼近理论结合，证明同态密度可以生成所有连续超图不变量，并建立以超树宽为索引的严格层次结构，进而推导出"宽度墙"——固定深度的HGNN无法表示超出其超树宽模式的不变量。

Result: 统一刻画了15种HGNN架构的表达能力；精确定位了团扩展（clique expansion）导致的信息丢失；提出了密度感知模型以扩展表达能力；在真实世界超图节点分类任务上验证了宽度墙的预测准确性。

Conclusion: 超图神经网络的表达能力存在根本性上限（宽度墙），超树宽决定了哪类模式能被表示，这为设计更具表达能力的超图模型提供了理论指导。

Abstract: Hypergraphs provide a natural framework to model higher-order interactions in scientific, social, and biological systems. Hypergraph neural networks (HGNNs) aim to learn from such data, yet it remains unclear which higher-order structures these models can represent. We show that hypergraph expressivity is governed by which small patterns an architecture can detect and count. We formalize this via homomorphism densities, which measure how often a structural motif appears in a hypergraph. Combining classical homomorphism-count completeness with invariant approximation, we show that homomorphism densities generate all continuous hypergraph invariants and organize them into a strict hierarchy indexed by hypertree width. This yields a Width Wall: a fundamental architectural limit beyond which no hidden dimension, training procedure or fixed-depth HGNN can represent invariants requiring wider patterns. Our framework provides a unified characterization of 15 HGNN architectures, precisely identifies information lost by clique expansion, and motivates density-aware models that extend expressivity beyond bounded-width message passing. We experimentally validate this finding on an APPLICATION NODE CLASSIFICATION SUITE of real-world hypergraphs, where the Width Wall predicts when graph-reduction baselines fail and when density features help.

</details>


### [455] [Earth Science Foundation Models: From Perception to Reasoning and Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12542)
*Xiangyu Zhao,Bo Liu,Yuehan Zhang,Zelin Song,Wanghan Xu,Feng Liu,Fengxiang Wang,Ben Fei,Fenghua Ling,Wangxu Wei,Wenlong Zhang,Xiao-Ming Wu*

Main category: astro-ph.IM

Relevance: 55.0

TL;DR: 本文通过"深度"（从感知到多模态推理与智能体科学工作流）和"广度"（涵盖大气圈、水圈、岩石圈、生物圈、人类圈、冰冻圈及耦合地球系统）两个维度，系统综述了地球科学基础模型（Earth FMs），整理了200多个数据集和基准，并讨论了多模态数据异质性、科学可靠性、可扩展性等关键挑战及未来方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 地球科学面临多模态异构数据（多平台影像、网格化再分析数据、地球物理/化学观测、领域文本等）的整合需求，现有基础模型在该领域的应用缺乏系统性综述。本文旨在通过深度（能力演进）和广度（应用领域）两个维度提供统一框架，梳理Earth FMs的发展脉络。

Method: 采用双维度综述框架：（1）深度维度——追溯模型从基础感知到多模态推理、再到智能体科学工作流的能力演进；（2）广度维度——总结模型在大气圈、水圈、岩石圈、生物圈、人类圈、冰冻圈及耦合地球系统中的应用。同时汇编了200多个多模态数据集和基准。

Result: 系统梳理了代表性多模态地球基础模型，整合了200+数据集和基准，识别出多模态数据异质性、科学可靠性与持续更新、可扩展性与可持续性、从基础模型到智能体与具身地球智能的过渡等关键挑战。

Conclusion: 本文提供了地球基础模型发展的结构化路线图，指出未来方向是构建更集成、可信赖、可行动的AI地球科学家，强调了从感知到推理再到智能体工作流的演进路径。

Abstract: Large foundation models (FMs) are transforming Earth science by integrating heterogeneous multimodal data, such as multi-platform imagery, gridded reanalysis data, diverse geophysical and geochemical observations, and domain-specific text, to support tasks ranging from basic perception to advanced scientific discovery. This paper provides a unified review of Earth science foundation models (Earth FMs) through two complementary dimensions: depth, which traces the evolution of model capabilities from perception to multimodal reasoning and agentic scientific workflows, and breadth, which summarizes their expanding applications across the atmosphere, hydrosphere, lithosphere, biosphere, anthroposphere, and cryosphere, as well as coupled Earth system processes. Using this framework, we review representative multimodal Earth foundation models and compile more than 200 datasets and benchmarks spanning diverse Earth science tasks and modalities. We further discuss key challenges in multimodal data heterogeneity, scientific reliability and continual updating, scalability and sustainability, and the transition from foundation models to agentic and embodied Earth intelligence, and outline future directions toward more integrated, trustworthy, and actionable AI Earth scientists. Overall, this paper offers a structured roadmap for understanding the development of Earth foundation models from both capability depth and application breadth.

</details>


### [456] [Adam-SHANG: A Convergent Adam-Type Method for Stochastic Smooth Convex Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12878)
*Yaxin Yu,Long Chen,Minfu Feng*

Main category: math.OC

Relevance: 55.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Adam-SHANG，一种结合动量、自适应预条件和曲率感知校正的Lyapunov引导型Adam变体，通过稳定的滞后预条件更新和可计算的迹比步长，在凸优化中证明了收敛性，并在深度学习任务上表现出竞争力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Adam类方法在理论收敛性分析（尤其在非单调二阶矩序列下）和实践步长选择之间存在差距，缺乏一个既能保证理论收敛又具有实用性的统一框架。

Method: 提出Lyapunov引导的Adam-SHANG方法，核心创新包括：(1) 滞后预条件更新提升稳定性；(2) 基于局部坐标对齐条件的可计算迹比步长；(3) 在随机光滑凸优化下证明收敛性，无需全局单调性假设。

Result: 在凸优化下证明了期望收敛性；实验验证了理论预测的随机衰减特性，并在深度学习任务中取得了与Adam/AdamW竞争的训练性能。

Conclusion: Adam-SHANG在理论和实践之间建立了更好的桥梁，通过可计算的步长规则兼顾了收敛保证和实用性能，且可推广到非凸场景。

Abstract: We propose Adam-SHANG, a Lyapunov-guided Adam-type method that couples momentum, adaptive preconditioning, and a curvature-aware correction through a more stable lagged-preconditioner update. For stochastic smooth convex optimization, we prove convergence in expectation under an admissible stepsize condition that can always be satisfied by a conservative spectral bound, without imposing global monotonicity on the second-moment sequence. To obtain a less conservative practical rule, we introduce a computable trace-ratio stepsize, motivated by a local coordinatewise alignment condition. The same structural update is also tested beyond the convex setting with simplified parameters. Experiments validate the predicted stochastic decay and show competitive training performance against Adam and AdamW on deep learning tasks.

</details>


### [457] [On the Limits of Latent Reuse in Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13448)
*Yifeng Yu,Lu Yu*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 50.0

TL;DR: 本文理论分析了扩散模型中潜在空间复用在分布偏移下的可靠性，揭示了源-目标子空间主角度错位和时间尺度放大的噪声是导致分数误差的关键因素，并给出了混合训练所需共享维度的几何依赖关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型通常先在低维潜在空间中训练，之后该空间会被复用于相关但分布不同的下游数据集。然而，这种复用（冻结）潜在空间在分布偏移下是否可靠、何时失效，尚缺乏理论理解。

Method: 作者在源-目标设定下，假设两个数据集均近似低维但落在不同子空间，推导了目标域分数误差的上界，该误差由源-目标子空间之间的主角度错位和扩散时间尺度放大的目标域环境噪声共同决定。进一步分析了混合源-目标训练，刻画所需共享潜在维度与两个分布相对几何关系之间的联系。

Result: (1) 潜在空间复用的目标域分数误差由子空间夹角和时间尺度放大的噪声决定；(2) 混合训练中所需共享维度依赖于两个子空间的相对几何结构。

Conclusion: 本文为扩散模型中潜在空间复用何时可靠、何时需要学习共享表示提供了理论指导。

Abstract: Diffusion models are often trained in low-dimensional latent spaces, which are then reused for related but shifted datasets. In this work, we study when such latent reuse remains reliable under distribution shift. We consider a source-target setting in which both datasets are approximately low-dimensional but may lie near different subspaces. We show that freezing and reusing a source latent space induces a target-domain score error governed by two quantities: the principal-angle misalignment between the source and target subspaces, and the target ambient noise amplified by the diffusion time scale. Motivated by these limits, we further study mixed source-target training and characterize how the required shared latent dimension depends on the relative geometry of the two distributions. Our results provide theoretical guidance on when latent reuse is reliable and when learning a shared representation may be necessary.

</details>


### [458] [Parallel-in-Time Training of Recurrent Neural Networks for Dynamical Systems Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12683)
*Florian Hess,Florian Götz,Daniel Durstewitz*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究利用并行化时间算法（如状态空间模型和DEER框架）进行非线性动力系统重建（DSR），并提出广义教师强制（GTF-DEER）方法，解决了线性训练时间递归模型在学习非线性动力学中的局限性，并证明长序列（T>10^4）训练能显著提升具有长时间尺度特征的动力系统重建效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非线性动力系统重建（DSR）是科学与工程中的基本挑战，传统方法依赖顺序模型，其反向传播时间复杂度为O(T)，限制了序列长度。新出现的并行化算法（O(log T)）为长序列DSR提供了新机会，但现有并行方法（如线性SSM）在处理非线性动力学时存在局限。

Method: 论文系统研究了两类并行化时间算法用于DSR：1）具有线性非自治动力学+非线性读出层的模型（如现代SSM）；2）基于DEER框架的通用非线性模型。针对第一类模型的局限性，作者提出了DEER框架的扩展——广义教师强制（GTF-DEER），通过在训练过程中融合教师信号实现稳定有效的非线性动力学学习。

Result: 发现线性训练时间递归（如SSM）在建模非线性动力系统时存在学习能力限制；GTF-DEER方法能够有效学习非线性动力学，且支持任意序列长度；在数据具有长时间尺度特征时，超长序列（T>10^4）训练能显著提升DSR性能。

Conclusion: 建立了GTF-DEER作为数据驱动动力系统发现的鲁棒工具，强调长序列学习在建模复杂动力系统中具有巨大的未开发潜力。

Abstract: Reconstructing nonlinear dynamical systems (DS) from data (DSR) is a fundamental challenge in science and engineering, but it inherently relies on sequential models. Recent breakthroughs for sequential models have produced algorithms that parallelize computation along sequence length $T$, achieving logarithmic time complexity, $\mathcal{O}(\log T)$. Since sequence lengths have been practically limited due to the linear runtime complexity $\mathcal{O}(T)$ of classical backpropagation through time, this opens new avenues for DSR. This paper studies two prominent classes of parallel-in-time algorithms for this task, both of which leverage parallel associative scans as their core computational primitive. The first class comprises models with linear yet non-autonomous dynamics and a nonlinear readout, such as modern State Space Models (SSMs), while the second consists of general nonlinear models which can be parallelized using the DEER framework. We find that the linear training-time recurrence of the first class of models imposes limitations that often hinder learning of accurate nonlinear dynamics. To address this, we augment DEER with Generalized Teacher Forcing (GTF), a novel variant within the more general nonlinear framework that ensures stable and effective learning of nonlinear dynamics across arbitrary sequence lengths. Using GTF-DEER, we investigate the benefits of training on extremely long sequences ($T>10^4$) for DSR. Our results show that access to such long trajectories significantly improves DSR if the data features long time scales. This work establishes GTF-DEER as a robust tool for data-driven discovery and underscores the largely untapped potential of long-sequence learning in modeling complex DS.

</details>


### [459] [RISED: A Pre-Deployment Safety Evaluation Framework for Clinical AI Decision-Support Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12895)
*Rohith Reddy Bellibatlu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出RISED框架，从可靠性、包容性、敏感性、公平性和可部署性五个维度对临床AI决策支持系统进行预部署评估，揭示了传统聚合准确率指标无法检测的部署阶段风险。通过在合成队列和三个真实世界队列（跨越1980年代至2024年）上的验证，展示了不同维度失败模式的差异，并将公平性重新定义为代理依赖诊断而非独立门控。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统临床AI评估仅依赖聚合准确率指标，无法检测部署阶段在输入可靠性、亚组公平性、阈值敏感性和操作可行性等方面的失败风险，需要更全面的预部署评估框架。

Method: 提出RISED五维度评估框架（可靠性、包容性、敏感性、公平性、可部署性），每个维度通过形式化子标准、预设通过/失败阈值、偏差校正加速Bootstrap 95%置信区间和Holm-Bonferroni族系误差校正来操作化实现。

Result: 满足传统高判别力基准的分类器同时可能在输入编码稳定性和阈值偏移敏感性检查上失败，且亚组AUC奇偶性统计上无定论；不同临床队列（1980年代心脏病学数据集到2024年健康调查）的失败维度存在差异，验证了区分效度。

Conclusion: RISED框架为临床AI报告标准提供了所需的量化评估结果，是连接纯模型验证与静默试验临床评估的原则性网关，已作为开源Python包发布。

Abstract: Aggregate accuracy metrics dominate the evaluation of clinical AI decision-support systems but do not detect deployment-phase failures of input reliability, subgroup equity, threshold sensitivity, or operational feasibility. We propose the RISED Framework: a five-dimension pre-deployment evaluation covering Reliability, Inclusivity, Sensitivity, Equity, and Deployability, in which each dimension is operationalized through formal sub-criteria, pre-specified pass/fail thresholds, and bias-corrected accelerated (BCa) bootstrap 95% confidence intervals combined under a Holm-Bonferroni family-wise error correction. A central demonstration is that a classifier satisfying conventional high-discrimination benchmarks can simultaneously fail input-encoding stability and threshold-shift sensitivity checks, while subgroup AUC parity remains statistically inconclusive, pointing to deployment risks that aggregate evaluation alone cannot detect. We validate this differential pass/fail pattern on a synthetic cohort and three publicly available real-world cohorts spanning 35 years of clinical data vintage, from a 1980s cardiology dataset to a 2024 nationally representative health survey, where failing dimensions differ across cohorts, providing preliminary evidence of construct validity. The Equity dimension is reframed as a proxy-dependence diagnostic rather than a stand-alone gate: any need-based fairness verdict computed against a utilization-derived proxy carries a construct-validity problem the framework surfaces explicitly, triggering a procurement requirement for an outcome-independent need measure before the gate is binding. RISED is released as an open-source Python package that supplies the quantitative verdicts existing clinical AI reporting standards require, providing a principled gateway between in-silico model validation and silent-trial clinical evaluation.

</details>


### [460] [Three-Stage Learning Unlocks Strong Performance in Simple Models for Long-Term Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13678)
*Zhenan Yu,Guangxin Jiang,Jin Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出STAIR，一种分阶段训练范式，通过共享学习、通道微调和残差学习三阶段逐步提升简单时间映射模型（如浅层MLP）在长期时间序列预测中的能力，在九个基准上达到或超越现有复杂方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管简单线性/MLP模型在长期时间序列预测中表现不错，但现有方法仍依赖频域建模、多尺度混合等复杂结构先验。作者希望在不引入复杂架构模块的前提下，通过更有效的训练范式释放简单时间映射模型的潜力。

Method: STAIR包含三个渐进阶段：1) 共享时间映射学习跨变量的通用时间动态；2) 通过通道级微调（Shared-to-Individual Fine-tuning）适应各变量特有模式；3) 通过残差学习补充跨变量信息。还引入alpha-RevIN缓解标准RevIN的过强归一化先验。

Result: 在九个长期时间序列预测基准上，STAIR匹配或超越了近期强基线方法，同时保持简单的时间预测主干（浅层MLP），证明了简洁方法的有效性。

Conclusion: STAIR提供了一种简洁有效的时间序列预测视角，表明精心设计的训练范式可以替代复杂的架构创新，为长期时间序列预测研究提供了新方向。

Abstract: Recent studies on long-term time series forecasting have shown that simple linear models and MLP-based predictors can achieve strong performance without increasingly complex architectures. However, many competitive baselines still rely on structural priors such as frequency-domain modeling, explicit decomposition, multi-scale mixing, or sophisticated cross-variable interaction modules, while paying less attention to how simple temporal mappings should be trained and organized. In this paper, we propose STAIR, short for Stagewise Temporal Adaptation via Individualization and Residual Learning, a training paradigm for long-term time series forecasting that aims to unlock the capacity of simple temporal mapping models without introducing complex architectural modules. STAIR decomposes forecasting ability into three progressive stages: it first learns common temporal dynamics across variables through a shared temporal mapping, then adapts the shared model to each variable via channel-wise fine-tuning to capture variable-specific patterns, and finally complements the backbone with cross-variable information through residual learning. We further introduce Shared-to-Individual Fine-tuning and alpha-RevIN to mitigate the limitations of strict channel independence and the overly strong normalization prior induced by standard RevIN. This design gradually increases modeling flexibility while keeping the core temporal predictor as a shallow MLP in the main experiments, with linear variants analyzed separately. Experiments on nine long-term forecasting benchmarks show that STAIR matches or outperforms recent strong baselines while preserving a simple temporal backbone, providing a concise and effective modeling perspective for long-term time series forecasting.

</details>


### [461] [ISOMORPH: A Supply Chain Digital Twin for Simulation, Dataset Generation, and Forecasting Benchmarks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12768)
*Zhizhen Zhang,Hyemin Gu,Benjamin J. Zhang,Daniel Elenius,Michael Tyrrell,Theo J. Bourdais,Houman Owhadi,Markos A. Katsoulakis,Tuhin Sahai*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: ISOMORPH 是首个公开的多级物流网络数字孪生仿真器，具有完全可解释、用户可配置的参数，可复现牛鞭效应等动态现象，并发布了两个规模的数据集（C=50和C=200）及多种场景滚动。零样本评估四个基础模型（Chronos, Moirai, TimesFM, Lag-Llama）显示MASE值在低至中预测范围内超过GIFT-Eval参考值，且可用作数据孪生前向不确定性的快速替代模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列预测基准涵盖零售、能源、天气、交通等领域，但供应链物流领域仍缺乏公开基准。作者旨在填补这一空白，提供一个可解释、可配置的物流网络仿真环境，并生成具有独特动态特征（如方差放大、级联瓶颈、机制转换等）的数据集，以推动该领域的研究。

Method: 构建了一个多级物流网络的数字孪生仿真器，采用有向路由图在离散时间步进推进，需求到达目的地后从库存满足或记录为积压，并触发补货过程。状态向量追踪每个节点的库存、在途订单、在途货物及平滑需求估计，形成马尔可夫链。释放两个规模的数据集，并通过拉丁超立方体扰动生成不确定性子样本。在此基础上对四个基础模型进行零样本评估。

Result: 1) 成功复现牛鞭效应，其幅度与实证一致。2) 马尔可夫链中编码的三个守恒定律可作为验证工具。3) 四种基础模型在低至中预测范围上的MASE值超过GIFT-Eval基准参考。4) 通过拉丁超立方体扰动生成的前向不确定性估计表明，基础模型可作为数字孪生的快速替代模型。

Conclusion: ISOMORPH填补了供应链物流领域公开时间序列预测基准的空白，其生成的数据具有传统固定基准不具备的动态特性（如方差放大、级联瓶颈等），基础模型虽在部分场景表现尚可，但整体仍有提升空间。该仿真器可作为前向不确定性的高效代理。

Abstract: Open time-series forecasting (TSF) benchmarks cover retail, energy, weather, and traffic, but supply-chain logistics remains underserved. We introduce ISOMORPH, the first public digital twin of a multi-echelon logistics network with fully interpretable, user-configurable parameters and modular topology, demand process, and control rules. The simulator advances a directed routing graph in discrete time: demand arrives at the destination, is served from stock or recorded as backlog, and triggers replenishment through the network. The state vector tracks per-node on-hand inventory with outstanding orders, in-transit shipments, and a smoothed demand estimate, so the dynamics close as a Markov chain on a tractable state space whose transition kernel acts linearly on the empirical distribution of the state. The released data reproduces the bullwhip effect at empirically consistent magnitudes, and three conservation laws encoded in the Markov chain serve as verification tools when users extend the simulator. We release datasets at two catalogue scales ($C=50$ and $C=200$) with six scenario sweeps producing 30 additional rollouts and 20 Latin-hypercube perturbations, exhibiting dynamics absent from fixed TSF benchmarks: variance amplification, cascading bottlenecks, regime shifts, and cross-channel coupling through shared macro shocks. Zero-shot evaluation of four foundation models (Chronos, Moirai, TimesFM, Lag-Llama) shows MASE values exceeding public GIFT-Eval references at low-to-moderate horizons, supporting incorporation into existing benchmarks. The same pairing produces forecast confidence bands via Latin-hypercube perturbation of demand-side knobs, forward UQ from parameter uncertainty unavailable on standard TSF datasets, demonstrating that foundation models can serve as fast surrogates for the digital twin's forward UQ. Code (MIT): https://github.com/tuhinsahai/ISOMORPH.

</details>


### [462] [Context-Aware Web Attack Detection in Open-Source SIEM Systems via MITRE ATT&CK-Enriched Behavioral Profiling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13337)
*Badr Alboushy,Assef Jafar,Mohamad Aljnidi,Mohamad Bashar Disoki,Aref Shaheed*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Smart-SIEM，一个集成到Wazuh SIEM平台的AI模块，通过构建基于源IP的上下文行为向量（包含HTTP响应状态分布、规则激活计数和MITRE ATT&CK技术频率），并采用LightGBM+XGBoost两级混合级联模型，实现多步Web攻击的高效检测与分类。实验表明上下文特征带来显著提升（F1平均提升+0.254和+0.324），且具备概念漂移自适应恢复能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统SIEM系统的规则关联引擎难以检测多步Web应用攻击，因其逐事件检查而忽略源主机的行为历史，导致对复杂攻击（如暴力破解、身份验证绕过）检测率低。

Method: (1) 构建每个源IP的上下文行为向量，包含HTTP响应状态分布、峰值规则激活计数、MITRE ATT&CK技术频率；(2) 两级混合级联：Stage1用LightGBM进行二分类攻击检测，Stage2用XGBoost进行六类攻击分类。

Result: 46,454个安全事件上，上下文特征使各类梯度提升算法F1提升显著（平均+0.254和+0.324）；混合级联达到0.967（二分类）和0.914（六分类）F1；对暴力破解和身份验证攻击检测率分别达100%和98.3%；概念漂移后自适应重训练可恢复F1从0.465至0.814。

Conclusion: 基于行为上下文的AI模块能显著提升SIEM系统对多步Web攻击的检测能力，且具备自适应概念漂移恢复能力，是传统规则引擎的有效补充。

Abstract: Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) systems aggregate log data from heterogeneous sources to detect coordinated attacks. Traditional rule-based correlation engines struggle to classify multi-step web application attacks because they examine each event without reference to the behavioural history of the originating host.
  We present Smart-SIEM, an AI module for the open-source Wazuh SIEM platform with two contributions: (1) a per-source-IP behavioural context vector encoding HTTP response-status distributions, peak rule activation counts, and MITRE ATT&CK technique frequencies from the N most recent prior events; (2) a two-stage hybrid cascade combining LightGBM for binary attack detection and XGBoost for six-class attack categorisation.
  Evaluated on 46,454 purpose-built Wazuh security events, context features improve all tested gradient boosting algorithms from ~0.705 macro F1 to 0.947-0.967 (Stage 1) and 0.876-0.914 (Stage 2), an average gain of +0.254 and +0.324 respectively. The hybrid cascade achieves F1 of 0.967 (binary) and 0.914 (six-class). Wazuh's native rule engine detects 0% of Brute Force and Broken Authentication events; the AI module detects 100% and 98.3% respectively. A self-adaptive retraining mechanism recovers from concept drift: F1 drops from 0.905 to 0.465 when unseen attack types emerge, recovering to 0.814 after retraining on the combined corpus.

</details>


### [463] [Hierarchical Transformer Preconditioning for Interactive Physics Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13343)
*Carl Osborne,Minghao Guo,Crystal Owens,Wojciech Matusik*

Main category: cs.GR

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出层次化Transformer预条件子，基于弱可接受H-矩阵划分实现O(N)复杂度的全图近似逆计算，采用低秩远场因子的高速连接和余弦-Hutchinson探测目标学习MA在关键谱子空间上的作用，在刚性多相泊松系统上实现显著加速（N=8192时17.9ms/帧），比GPU Jacobi快2.2倍，比GPU IC/DILU快约28倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经预条件子因继承局部消息传递或稀疏算子访问模式，难以高效捕获长程耦合；传统SAI风格目标强制特征值聚类到预设位置，引入了不必要的谱约束。

Method: 1) 基于弱可接受H-矩阵划分的多尺度结构先验；2) 低秩远场因子的Transformer架构+轴向缓冲器和全局摘要令牌；3) 余弦-Hutchinson探测目标，优化MAz与z的角度对齐而非特征值位置。

Result: 在N=8,192时17.9ms/帧，~143至~21fps；GPU Jacobi加速2.2倍，GPU IC/DILU加速约28倍，神经SPAI加速2.7倍。

Conclusion: H-矩阵结构先验与Transformer结合可高效建模长程耦合；余弦-Hutchinson目标函数有效提升不规则谱上的条件数；密集、无依赖的张量程序可捕获为单一CUDA Graph实现高效推理。

Abstract: Neural preconditioners for real-time physics simulation offer promising data-driven priors, but they often fail to capture long-range couplings efficiently because they inherit local message passing or sparse-operator access patterns. We introduce the Hierarchical Transformer Preconditioner, a neural preconditioner anchored to a weak-admissibility H-matrix partition.
