The partition provides a multiscale structural prior (dense diagonal leaves plus coarsening off-diagonal tiles) that enables full-graph approximate-inverse computation with O(N) scaling at fixed block sizes. The network models the inverse through low-rank far-field factors and uses highway connections (axial buffers plus a global summary token) to propagate context across transformer depth. At each PCG iteration, preconditioner application reduces to batched dense GEMMs with regular memory access.
  The key training contribution is a cosine-Hutchinson probe objective that learns the action of MA on convergence-critical spectral subspaces, optimizing angular alignment of MAz with z rather than forcing eigenvalue clusters to a prescribed location. This removes unnecessary spectral-placement constraints from SAI-style objectives and improves conditioning on irregular spectra. Because both inference and apply are dense, dependency-free tensor programs, the full solve loop is captured as a single CUDA Graph.
  On stiff multiphase Poisson systems (up to 100:1 density contrast, N = 1,024-16,384), the solver runs from ~143 to ~21 fps. At N = 8,192, it reaches 17.9 ms/frame, with 2.2x speedup over GPU Jacobi, ~28x over GPU IC/DILU (AMGX multicolor_dilu), and 2.7x over neural SPAI retrained per scale on the same benchmark.

</details>


### [464] [TurboGR: An Accelerated Training System for Large-Scale Generative Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13433)
*Huichao Chai,Zhixin Wu,Xuemiao Li,Shiqing Fan,Hengfeng Wang,Maojun Peng,Lu Xu,Yaoyuan Wang,Yibo Jin,Wei Guo,Yongxiang Feng*

Main category: cs.DC

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出\model，一个针对Ascend NPU的生成式推荐训练系统，通过锯齿加速、分布式通信优化和负采样优化三大创新，在KuaiRand-27K数据集上支持0.2B参数训练，实现54.71%的MFU和近线性可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式推荐（GR）在Ascend NPU上部署面临系统级挑战：缺乏高性能锯齿算子实现，且NPU的密集计算优化设计与不规则稀疏原语存在架构不匹配。

Method: 三大核心创新：(i) Ascend亲和锯齿加速（融合算子消除填充冗余，动态负载均衡将设备间不平衡从47%降至2.4%）；(ii) 分布式通信优化（层次化稀疏并行、半异步训练、精细流水线编排，NPU利用率达94%）；(iii) 负采样优化（异步卸载、锯齿感知FP16量化、批内logit共享，无需额外嵌入查找即可扩展有效负空间）。

Result: 在KuaiRand-27K数据集上，支持0.2B参数训练，MFU达54.71%，近线性可扩展性0.97。

Conclusion: 该工作有效解决了GR在Ascend NPU上的部署瓶颈，证明了针对特定硬件的系统优化对生成式推荐大规模训练的重要性。

Abstract: Generative recommendation (GR) has emerged as a promising paradigm that replaces fragmented, scenario-specific architectures with unified Transformer-based models, exhibiting scaling-law behavior where recommendation quality improves systematically with increased model capacity and training data. However, deploying GR at scale on Ascend NPUs faces fundamental system-level challenges. These challenges are further exacerbated on Ascend NPUs due to the absence of high-performance implementations for jagged operators and the architectural mismatch between irregular sparse primitives and NPU's dense-computation-optimized design. In this paper, we present \model, an Ascend-affinity training system for generative recommendation that systematically addresses these bottlenecks through three core innovations: (i) Ascend-affinity jagged acceleration, including fusion operators that eliminate padding redundancy and dynamic load balancing that reduces inter-device imbalance from 47\% to 2.4\%; (ii) distributed communication optimization, comprising hierarchical sparse parallelism, semi-asynchronous training with proven convergence guarantees, and fine-grained pipeline orchestration that sustains 94\% NPU utilization; and (iii) negative sampling optimization via asynchronous offloading, jaggedness-aware FP16 quantization, and intra-batch logit sharing that expand the effective negative space without additional embedding lookups. Evaluated on the KuaiRand-27K dataset, \model supports training at up to 0.2B parameters and achieves 54.71\% MFU with near-linear scalability (0.97).

</details>


### [465] [DisAgg: Distributed Aggregators for Efficient Secure Aggregation in Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13708)
*Haaris Mehmood,Giorgos Tatsis,Dimitrios Alexopoulos,Karthikeyan Saravanan,Jie Xu,Anastasios Drosou,Mete Ozay*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: DisAgg是一种利用客户端委员会（Aggregators）进行秘密共享聚合的联邦学习协议，相较于现有OPA方案，在保护隐私的同时实现了4.6倍加速，显著降低了计算和通信开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联邦学习安全聚合方案存在通信轮次多、公钥操作重、难以处理客户端掉线等问题，而单轮交互的OPA方案虽减少了通信轮次，但给客户端和服务器带来了巨大的密码学和计算开销。

Method: 提出DisAgg协议，选取一小部分客户端作为Aggregators委员会。每个客户端将其更新向量通过秘密共享分发给Aggregators，Aggregators在本地计算部分和，仅将聚合后的份额返回给服务器进行重构。该设计消除了本地掩码和昂贵的同态加密操作。

Result: 在处理100k维更新向量和100k个5G客户端时，DisAgg相比当前最优的OPA方案实现了4.6倍加速。

Conclusion: DisAgg通过引入聚合委员会机制，在通信与计算成本之间取得最优权衡，实现了高效、可扩展且隐私保护的联邦学习安全聚合。

Abstract: Federated learning enables collaborative model training across distributed clients, yet vanilla FL exposes client updates to the central server. Secure-aggregation schemes protect privacy against an honest-but-curious server, but existing approaches often suffer from many communication rounds, heavy public-key operations, or difficulty handling client dropouts. Recent methods like One-Shot Private Aggregation (OPA) cut rounds to a single server interaction per FL iteration, yet they impose substantial cryptographic and computational overhead on both server and clients. We propose a new protocol called DisAgg that leverages a small committee of clients called Aggregators to perform the aggregation itself: each client secret-shares its update vector to Aggregators, which locally compute partial sums and return only aggregated shares for server-side reconstruction. This design eliminates local masking and expensive homomorphic encryption, reducing endpoint computation while preserving privacy against a curious server and a limited fraction of colluding clients. By leveraging optimal trade-offs between communication and computation costs, DisAgg processes 100k-dimensional update vectors from 100k 5G clients with a 4.6x speedup compared to OPA, the previous best protocol.

</details>


### [466] [GHGbench: A Unified Multi-Entity, Multi-Task Benchmark for Carbon Emission Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13743)
*Yifan Duan,Siyuan Zheng,Lihuan Li,Chao Xue,Flora Salim*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 42.0

TL;DR: GHGbench是一个面向公司和建筑级别的温室气体排放预测的开放数据集和基准，涵盖32,000+公司年度记录和491,591建筑年度记录，包含多模态数据（财务、气候、遥感嵌入），并定义了分布内和跨区域迁移等评估任务。实验发现建筑排放比公司更难预测，分布内外差距远超模型间差距，多模态遥感嵌入在表格数据泛化失败时最有用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的实体级碳排放预测数据集和基准在访问、规模、粒度和评估标准方面高度碎片化，缺乏统一的、标准化的评估框架来推动该领域的发展。

Method: 构建了两大追踪（公司级和建筑级）的数据集，融合财务、气候、遥感等多模态信号；定义了分布内评估、跨区域/城市迁移、时间外推和短期预测等任务；使用梯度提升树、表格基础模型、MLP、FT-Transformer、多模态融合和LLM面板作为基准，并采用多种子配对bootstrap检验进行统计显著性评估。

Result: (i) 建筑排放比公司排放更难预测；(ii) 分布内到分布外的性能差距远大于任何模型间的差距，表格基础模型首次在建筑排放任务上显著超越调优后的树模型；(iii) 多模态遥感嵌入在表格数据泛化失败时最有帮助。同时暴露了城市迁移灾难和行业因子查找天花板等系统性失败模式。

Conclusion: GHGbench为碳排放预测领域提供了标准化基准，揭示了当前方法在跨区域泛化上的严重局限，并指出多模态数据融合是缓解这一问题的有前景方向。

Abstract: Open datasets and benchmarks for entity-level carbon-emission prediction remain fragmented across access, scale, granularity, and evaluation. We introduce GHGbench, an open dataset and benchmark for company- and building-level greenhouse-gas prediction. The company track contains 32,000+ company-year records from 12,000+ firms with Scope 1+2 and Scope 3 disclosures and financial/sectoral signals; the building track harmonises 491,591 building-year records from 13 open sources into a single schema across 26 metropolitan areas (10 U.S., 15 Australian, 1 Singaporean), with climate covariates and multimodal remote-sensing embeddings. GHGbench defines canonical splits with in-distribution and cross-region/city transfer as primary tasks and temporal hold-out plus short-horizon forecasting as supplementary appendix evidence; headline baselines span gradient-boosted trees, a tabular foundation model, MLP, FT-Transformer, and multimodal fusion, with an LLM panel as auxiliary, all evaluated under multi-seed paired-bootstrap tests. Three benchmark-level findings emerge: (i) building emissions are structurally harder than company emissions; (ii) the in-distribution to out-of-distribution gap dwarfs any within-model gap across both the company track and the building track, and a tabular foundation model is, to our knowledge, the first baseline to open a paired-bootstrap-significant gap over tuned trees on a multi-city building-emissions task; (iii) multimodal remote-sensing embeddings help precisely where tabular generalisation breaks. GHGbench also exposes catastrophic city transfer and the sector-factor lookup ceiling as systematic failure modes. Code and reconstruction recipes are available at GHGbench.

</details>


### [467] [Understanding Generalization through Decision Pattern Shift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13148)
*Huiqi Deng,Yibo Li,Quanshi Zhang,Peng Zhang,Hongbin Pei,Xia Hu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 本文提出决策模式偏移（DPS）概念，通过GradCAM通道贡献向量衡量模型内部决策模式的稳定性，发现DPS与泛化差距呈强线性相关（Pearson r > 0.8），并统一解释了多种泛化失败场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注数据、表征或输出等外部因素变化，缺乏对模型内部决策机制从训练到测试如何演化的理解，因此需要一种从内部决策模式稳定性角度定义和量化泛化失败的新视角。

Method: 将每个样本的决策模式表示为GradCAM-based通道贡献向量，定义DPS指标衡量该向量与类平均模式的差异，从而量化内部决策模式的偏移程度。

Result: (i) 决策模式形成高度结构化、类一致的语义空间；(ii) DPS与泛化差距呈强线性相关（Pearson r > 0.8）；(iii) DPS谱系可将多种泛化退化场景统一组织为连续轨迹。

Conclusion: DPS为早期泛化风险检测、失败模式诊断和通道级缺陷定位提供了新可能性，揭示了泛化失败本质上是模型内部决策机制的系统性漂移。

Abstract: Understanding why deep neural networks (DNNs) fail to generalize to unseen samples remains a long-standing challenge. Existing studies mainly examine changes in externally observable factors such as data, representations, or outputs, yet offer limited insight into how a model's internal decision mechanism evolves from training to test. To address this gap, we introduce Decision Pattern Shift (DPS), a new perspective that defines generalization through the stability of internal decision patterns and quantifies failure as their deviation from those learned during training. Specifically, we represent each sample's decision pattern as a GradCAM-based channel-contribution vector, which captures how feature channels collectively support a prediction, and we propose the DPS metric to measure its discrepancy from the class-average pattern. Empirical analyses across multiple datasets and architectures show that, (i) decision patterns form a highly structured, class-consistent space with strong intra-class cohesion and low inter-class confusion, enabling direct analysis of a model's decision logic; (ii) the DPS magnitude correlates linearly with the generalization gap (nearly all Pearson r > 0.8), revealing generalization as a systematic drift in the model's internal decision mechanism; (iii) the DPS spectrum organizes diverse generalization degradation scenarios (covering ideal generalization, in-distribution degradation, domain shift, out-of-distribution, and shortcut learning) into a continuous trajectory, providing a unified explanation of their failure modes. These findings open up new possibilities for early generalization-risk detection, failure-mode diagnosis, and channel-level defect localization.

</details>


### [468] [Do Heavy Tails Help Diffusion? On the Subtle Trade-off Between Initialization and Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13175)
*Hamza Cherkaoui,Hélène Halconruy,Antonio Ocello*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 本文通过理论和实验研究发现，在扩散/流模型中用重尾噪声替代高斯噪声会加剧统计估计难度，导致更差的采样误差界，质疑了近期用重尾噪声提升生成多样性的做法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 近期工作提出在扩散模型和流模型中使用重尾（HT）噪声，声称能更好地恢复目标分布的尾部并提升生成多样性。本文旨在重新审视这一范式，检验其理论基础是否成立。

Method: 建立了重尾噪声和轻尾（高斯）噪声驱动的两种代表性扩散模型的采样误差界，并通过合成数据和真实数据上的实验进行验证，对比两种噪声下的统计估计困难程度。

Result: 重尾噪声使统计估计问题变得更困难，导致更差的采样误差界；实验在合成和真实数据集上验证了这一误差权衡的存在。

Conclusion: 质疑了在生成模型中使用重尾噪声来改进稀有区域探索的设计趋势，认为这一做法可能适得其反。

Abstract: Recent works have proposed incorporating heavy-tailed (HT) noise into diffusion- and flow-based generative models, with the goals of better recovering the tails of target distributions and improving generative diversity. This motivation is intuitive: if the data are heavy-tailed, HT noise may appear better matched than light-tailed (LT) Gaussian noise. However, replacing Gaussian noise by HT noise also changes the underlying estimation problem. In this paper, we revisit this paradigm through a combined theoretical and empirical study, establishing sampling-error bounds for two representative diffusion models driven by HT and LT noise. We show that HT noise makes the statistical estimation problem harder, leading to less favorable sampling-error bounds. We support these findings with experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets, empirically recovering the predicted error trade-off. Our results call into question a growing design trend in generative modeling and challenge the use of HT noise to improve rare-region exploration.

</details>


### [469] [Stable Attention Response for Reliable Precipitation Nowcasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13181)
*Penghui Wen,Zexin Hu,Sen Zhang,Patrick Filippi,Xiaogang Zhu,Allen Benter,Thomas Bishop,Zhiyong Wang,Kun Hu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 本文发现降水临近预报中注意力响应能量的跨样本不稳定性是预测不可靠的重要来源，提出HARECast框架通过头级别注意力响应能量正则化来稳定跨样本波动，在SEVIR和MeteoNet上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有注意力方法主要关注表征学习和预测能力，忽视了注意力响应在样本间的稳定性问题。作者发现不准确预测与注意能量跨头跨层的高方差相关，且理论上证明了跨样本变异性会通过自注意力传播并放大预测误差下界。

Method: 提出HARECast框架，显式建模头级别注意力响应能量，并通过分组正则化目标降低跨样本波动。该框架通用，适用于单模态和多模态架构，在标准预测管道中集成重建分支和扩散预测器。

Result: 在SEVIR和MeteoNet基准上达到SOTA性能，验证了注意力响应能量稳定性对预测质量的重要性。

Conclusion: 注意力响应能量的跨样本稳定性是降水临近预测中一个被忽视但关键的因素，HARECast通过正则化有效提升了预测可靠性。

Abstract: Precipitation nowcasting remains challenging due to the highly localized, rapidly evolving, and heterogeneous nature of atmospheric dynamics. Although recent methods increasingly adopt attention-based architectures in both unimodal and multimodal settings, they mainly emphasize stronger representation learning and prediction capacity, while paying less attention to the stability of attention responses across samples. In this work, we show that cross-sample instability of attention-response energy is an important and previously underexplored source of forecasting unreliability. Empirically, inaccurate forecasts are associated with larger attention-response energy variance across heads and layers. Theoretically, we show that cross-sample variability can propagate through self-attention, and enlarge a lower bound on prediction error. Based on this insight, we propose HARECast, a Head-wise Attention Response Energy-regulated framework for precipitation nowcasting. HARECast explicitly models head-wise attention-response energy and stabilizes it through a group-wise regularization objective that reduces cross-sample fluctuations. The proposed formulation is generic and applicable to both unimodal and multimodal nowcasting architectures. We instantiate HARECast in a standard forecasting pipeline with reconstruction branches and a diffusion-based predictor, and evaluate it on commonly used benchmarks--SEVIR and MeteoNet. Experimental results demonstrate that HARECast achieves state-of-the-art performance.

</details>


### [470] [Toward AI-Driven Digital Twins for Metropolitan Floods: A Conditional Latent Dynamics Network Surrogate of the Shallow Water Equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13761)
*Phillip Si,Yuan Qiu,Omar Sallam,Jeremy Feinstein,Ziang He,Eugene Yan,Peng Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 本文提出条件潜在动力学网络（CLDNet），将神经ODE与坐标解码器结合，实现城市尺度洪水数字孪生的超快速水动力学代理模型，在保证精度的同时实现约115倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI驱动的洪水数字孪生需要快速水动力学代理模型用于集合预报和观测同化，但传统GPU加速的二维浅水方程求解器耗时过长（如大流域需55分钟），无法满足实际应用需求。

Method: 提出CLDNet：降雨驱动的低维潜在神经ODE + 基于静态地形（高程、坡度、曼宁糙率）条件化的坐标解码器，可在任意查询点重建水深和流量。逐点解码使内存与网格大小解耦，天然支持不规则流域。

Result: 在250,000单元德克萨斯基准和Des Plaines流域案例上，CLDNet将无条件基线的相对均方根误差减半，超越VAE-ConvLSTM和FNO基线，0.5米淹没阈值下关键成功指数约86%，96小时流域预报仅需29秒（约115倍加速）。

Conclusion: CLDNet有效解决了大规模水动力学代理建模的精度-效率权衡问题，为AI驱动洪水数字孪生提供了实用的解决方案。

Abstract: AI-driven flood digital twins demand fast hydrodynamic surrogates for ensemble forecasting and observation assimilation. Yet even GPU-accelerated two-dimensional shallow water equation (SWE) solvers still require $\sim 55$ minutes per $96$-hour run on a $\sim 4.2$-million-active-cell metropolitan basin (the Des~Plaines River basin at $30\,\mathrm{m}$ resolution), making such workloads prohibitive at native resolution. We present the Conditional Latent Dynamics Network (CLDNet): a low-dimensional latent neural ODE driven by rainfall, paired with a coordinate-based decoder conditioned on static terrain (elevation, slope, Manning roughness) that reconstructs depth and discharge at arbitrary query points. Pointwise decoding decouples memory from grid size and handles irregular watersheds natively, enabling metropolitan-scale training on a single compute node and direct queries at exact gauge coordinates without raster snapping. We evaluate CLDNet on a synthetic $250{,}000$-cell Texas benchmark and on a new Des~Plaines case study of $114$ real-rainfall Stage~IV storms whose reference simulator we validate against United States Geological Survey (USGS) gauges at the April~2013 flood-of-record (Nash--Sutcliffe efficiency $0.57$--$0.94$ on mean-recentered water-surface elevation). CLDNet roughly halves the relative root-mean-squared error of an unconditional baseline, outperforms regular-grid VAE--ConvLSTM and FNO baselines on the Texas benchmark (both presuppose a Cartesian grid and do not apply to the irregular Des~Plaines watershed), reaches a critical success index of $\approx 86\%$ at the $0.5\,\mathrm{m}$ inundation threshold, and produces a full $96$-hour basin-wide forecast in $\sim 29$ seconds -- a $\sim 115\times$ speedup.

</details>


### [471] [Real-World Challenges in Fake News Detection: Dealing with Posts by Cold Users](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12511)
*Sai Keerthana Karnam,Abhirup Kundu,Jashn Arora,Manish Jain,Animesh Mukherjee*

Main category: cs.SI

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 本文针对社交媒体中假新闻检测面临的冷用户问题（新用户或行为数据稀疏的用户），提出了一种名为USER EVIDENCE NETWORK (UEN)的社会感知上下文表示方案，通过从现有用户交互中近似缺失的行为数据，有效缓解冷用户带来的检测困难。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有假新闻检测方法过度依赖用户过往行为数据，导致面对新用户或行为稀疏用户（冷用户）时性能急剧下降。本文旨在解决这一冷用户问题，同时保持对已有行为用户的检测效果。

Method: 提出USER EVIDENCE NETWORK (UEN)，一种社会感知的上下文表示方案。核心思路是利用现有用户之间的交互（用户-用户交互和内容交互）来近似或补全新用户缺失的行为数据，从而在冷用户场景下仍能进行有效检测。

Result: 通过真实世界数据集验证了冷用户的普遍存在性，并展示了UEN在应对冷用户挑战时的有效性，相比依赖完整行为数据的SOTA方法更具鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 妥善处理冷用户问题是提升假新闻检测系统在实际平台中实用性的关键。UEN通过社会感知的近似策略，为冷用户场景下的假新闻和谣言检测提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

Abstract: Social media serves as a primary source of information in the current digital era. Many people consume a vast range of information in a very short span, yet, amidst the stream of genuine information, fake news and rumors continue to spread. The need for effective detection models is becoming increasingly critical. Past user behavior and user engagement on a post are strong signals that SOTA approaches leverage for fake news detection and other post classification tasks. However, these approaches lean too heavily on knowing this past behavior, and thus suffer from a cold user problem, or users that are new or have minimal footprint on the platform. In this paper, we make three core contributions. We first establish the value of user behavior, both content and user-user interactions, in the task of fake news and rumor detection. We then establish the extensive prevalence of cold users in the real-world datasets, and show the need for newer algorithms considering cold users. We next propose a novel socially-aware context representation scheme - USER EVIDENCE NETWORK (UEN) - to detect the spread of misinformation and unverified information while efficiently navigating this cold user challenge. We introduce techniques that approximate missing or absent behavior data of a new user from existing users' interactions. By carefully addressing the cold user challenge, our work provides robust approaches targeting fake news and rumor detection for real-world platforms.

</details>


### [472] [Plan Before You Trade: Inference-Time Optimization for RL Trading Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12653)
*Eun Go,Rohan Deb,Arindam Banerjee*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出FPILOT框架，利用价格预测在推理时优化投资组合管理策略，无需重新训练，显著提升收益和风险调整指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有强化学习投资组合管理策略是静态的，无法在推理时利用价格预测信息，限制了策略的自适应能力。

Method: 借鉴模型预测控制(MPC)思想，利用预测器生成的多步价格轨迹构建分配收益目标，在推理时优化策略参数，再执行一步交易操作。关键洞察：未来价格不受单个智能体投资分配影响，因此无需动作条件 rollout。

Result: 在TradeMaster DJ30基准上，FPILOT在五种策略算法上均一致提升总收益和夏普比率、Sortino比率、Calmar比率等风险调整指标，随机策略比确定性策略收益更大；且收益随预测器质量提高而提升。

Conclusion: FPILOT是一种与预训练智能体兼容的推理时优化框架，无需重新训练即可利用价格预测自适应调整策略，且性能会随金融预测技术进步而持续提升。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning agents for portfolio management are typically trained and deployed as static policies, with no mechanism for using price forecasts at inference time. We propose $\text{FPILOT}$ (**Fin**ancial **P**lugin **I**nference-time **L**earning for **O**ptimal **T**rading), a plugin inference-time optimization framework inspired by Model Predictive Control (MPC). Our key structural insight is that future prices mostly do not depend on one agent's portfolio allocation, so a suitable predictive model can produce a multi-step price trajectory without iterative action-conditioned rollouts as in typical reinforcement learning. At each decision step, we use the forecaster's predicted price trajectory to construct an allocation-based imagined return objective, and optimize the policy at inference-time before executing one step of the trade. Our framework is compatible with any pre-trained agent and adapts the policy to the forecaster's predictions without any retraining. Evaluated across five policy learning algorithms on the TradeMaster DJ30 benchmark, $\text{FPILOT}$ produces consistent improvements in total return and return-based risk-adjusted metrics (Sharpe, Sortino, Calmar), with stochastic policies benefiting more than deterministic ones. Further, using synthetic forecasts at calibrated quality levels, we show that gains consistently improve with forecaster quality, suggesting that our performance will improve based on advances in financial forecasting.

</details>


### [473] [State-Space NTK Collapse Near Bifurcations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12763)
*James Hazelden,Eric Shea-Brown*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了递归神经网络在分岔点附近的梯度下降动力学，发现分岔会主导并简化学习过程：通过经验状态空间神经正切核（sNTK）可将高维动力学约化为一维经典范式系统，从而实现可解析的学习几何描述。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解递归神经网络在经历动力学定性变化（分岔）时的学习行为，揭示梯度下降如何在这些关键转变点附近运作，并提供可解析的理论框架。

Method: 开发了状态空间神经正切核（sNTK）的局部理论，将sNTK分解为分岔相关通道和残差通道，证明在常见余维1分岔附近相关通道是秩为一的高度放大算子，可通过经典范式系统描述学习几何。

Result: 在师生递归神经网络实验中，首次学到的分岔与sNTK有效秩的急剧下降以及主导参数方向的出现相吻合，且该方向的受限sNTK与标量范式（pitchfork）预测的损失景观高度匹配。低秩自然梯度法能以极低开销解决分岔附近的学习不稳定性。

Conclusion: 分岔会局部扭曲学习景观，将梯度下降引导到少数关键动力学方向，使核和损失几何可从经典范式预测。这项工作为理解和优化递归神经网络在动力学转变期的学习提供了理论工具。

Abstract: Rich feature learning in tasks that unfold over time often requires the model to pass through bifurcations, constituting qualitative changes in the underlying model dynamics. We develop a local theory of gradient descent near these transitions through the empirical state-space neural tangent kernel (sNTK). Our central finding is that bifurcations both dominate and simplify learning dynamics: near bifurcations, we can reduce sNTK to a rank-one operator corresponding to learning in a classical normal form system, providing an analytically tractable description of the local learning geometry, even for high-dimensional recurrent systems. Concretely, we give a procedure for decomposing sNTK into bifurcation-relevant and residual channels, showing that near commonly codimension-1 bifurcations the relevant channel is a rank-one operator that is highly amplified. This amplification causes the bifurcation channel to dominate the full sNTK. Thus, bifurcations locally warp the learning landscape, funneling gradient descent into a few critical dynamical directions and making the nearby kernel and loss geometry predictable from classical normal forms. We illustrate this in a student-teacher recurrent neural network: the first learned bifurcation coincides with a sharp collapse in sNTK effective rank and the emergence of a dominant parameter direction whose restricted sNTK closely matches the landscape predicted by the scalar pitchfork normal form. Finally, we show that low-rank natural gradient methods resolve the resulting learning instability near bifurcations with very little overhead over SGD.

</details>


### [474] [SoK: A Comprehensive Analysis of the Current Status of Neural Tangent Generalization Attacks with Research Directions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12792)
*Thushari Hapuarachchi,Kaiqi Xiong*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文对黑盒环境下的神经正切泛化攻击（NTGA）进行了全面分析，包括攻击分类、实验验证及鲁棒性评估，发现NTGA易受对抗训练和图像变换攻击，并指出一些新方法在数据保护上优于NTGA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着DNN训练中使用未授权数据的问题日益严重，需要有效的clean-label泛化攻击来保护数据版权。NTGA是目前首个已知的黑盒clean-label泛化攻击，但缺乏对其系统性的深入分析。

Method: 1) 提出针对DNN攻击的分类体系，阐明NTGA的定位；2) 构建黑盒攻击的taxonomy；3) 通过实验验证已有NTGA研究发现；4) 测试NTGA对对抗训练和图像变换的鲁棒性；5) 评估线性可分性对攻击的影响；6) 与其他clean-label泛化攻击进行对比实验。

Result: NTGA易受对抗训练和图像变换攻击；NTGA生成的图像经线性可分性处理后更易受攻击；部分新提出的clean-label泛化攻击在数据保护上优于NTGA。

Conclusion: NTGA虽有开创性但存在明显鲁棒性缺陷，未来需进一步研究提升其鲁棒性及数据保护效果。

Abstract: There is recently a serious issue that Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) training uses more and more unauthorized data. A clean-label generalization attack, one type of data poisoning attacks, has been suggested to address this issue. The Neural Tangent Generalization Attack (NTGA) is considered as the first well-known clean-label generalization attack under the black-box settings, which provided an unprecedented step in data protection approaches. In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive analysis on the state-of-the-art of NTGA; to the best of our knowledge, this is the first thorough analysis regarding NTGA. First, we provide a classification of attacks against DNNs with their explanations and relations to NTGA. Then, this paper presents a taxonomy of black-box attacks and demonstrate that the NTGA is the first clean-label generalization attack under the black-box setting. We further analyze the existing studies of NTGA and give a comprehensive comparisons of their findings by conducting our own experiments to verify these findings. Moreover, our extensive experiments show that NTGA is vulnerable to adversarial training and image transformations, and applying linear separability to NTGA-generated images makes them more susceptible to such vulnerablities. We present the pros and cons of NTGA and suggest ways to improve NTGA robustness based on our analysis. Our further experiments indicate that several recently proposed clean-label generalization attacks outperform NTGA on data protection. Finally, we unveil the necessity of further research with future research insights on NTGA.

</details>


### [475] [Neurodata Without Boredom: Benchmarking Agentic AI for Data Reuse](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12808)
*Ling-Qi Zhang,Kristin Branson*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了如何利用基于LLM的智能体（Agentic AI）自动解析和整合来自不同实验室、格式和实验范式的神经科学数据。作者选取了8篇小鼠神经记录论文，让智能体加载数据、理解代码并将数据重新格式化为统一的解码任务格式。结果发现通用编码智能体在子任务上表现良好，但难以完成无错误的端到端解决方案，且智能体自身难以可靠地检测错误，因此人类参与仍然必要。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经科学数据高度碎片化，跨实验室、格式和实验范式的数据重用需要大量人工劳动。现有的通用数据格式面临两难：要么灵活但缺乏自解释性，要么描述详细但维护成本高。研究者希望利用AI智能体自动化这一数据整合过程。

Method: 选取8篇近期发表的、同时共享数据和代码的小鼠大规模神经群体记录论文，涵盖多种记录模态、行为范式和数据集格式（NWB、专用API、通用Python/MATLAB文件）。让通用编码智能体（科学家常用的）加载数据、理解代码，并将数据重新格式化为统一的下游任务（从神经活动解码任务或行为变量）。分析智能体的错误类型及触发错误的属性，并提出面向智能体时代的数共享最佳实践。

Result: 通用编码智能体在各项子任务上表现良好，但很少能完成完全无错误的端到端解决方案。智能体作为裁判（agents-as-judges）在检测错误时不可靠，尤其在没有ground-truth参考的情况下。

Conclusion: 虽然LLM智能体在神经科学数据整合方面有潜力，但目前仍需人机协同（human-in-the-loop）来确保代码正确性。同时，研究者应针对智能体特性调整数据共享实践，以提高自动化处理的成功率。

Abstract: Neuroscience data are highly fragmented across labs, formats, and experimental paradigms, and reuse often requires substantial manual effort. A persistent roadblock to data reuse and integration is the need to decipher bespoke and diverse data formatting choices. Common data formats have been proposed in response, but the field continues to struggle with a fundamental tension: formats flexible enough to accommodate diverse experiments are rarely descriptive enough to be self-explanatory, and sufficiently descriptive formats demand detailed documentation and curation effort that few labs can sustain. Agentic AI is a natural candidate to solve this problem: LLMs read code and text faster and with sustained attention to the low-level details humans tend to skim over. To measure how well agentic AI performs on this task, we selected eight recent papers studying large-scale mouse neural population recordings that shared both data and code, spanning diverse recording modalities, behavioral paradigms, and dataset formats (e.g., NWB, specialized APIs, and general-purpose Python or MATLAB files). We provided agents with the data, code, and paper, and prompted them to load, understand, and reformat the data for a common downstream task: training a decoder from neural activity to task or behavioral variables. General-purpose coding agents commonly used by scientists performed well on each sub-task, but rarely strung together a fully error-free end-to-end solution. We characterize the types of mistakes agents made and the dataset properties that elicited them, and propose data-sharing best practices for the agentic-AI era. We further find that agents-as-judges are unreliable at catching errors, especially without ground-truth references, so interactive, human-in-the-loop coding remains necessary.

</details>


### [476] [Training Large Language Models to Predict Clinical Events](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12817)
*Benjamin Turtel,Paul Wilczewski,Kris Skotheim*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 将Foresight Learning扩展到临床预测，通过将MIMIC-III时间序列笔记转换为自然语言问答形式（过去患者背景+未来事件问题+标签），训练LoRA适配器，在6,900个预测样本上将校准误差从0.1269降至0.0398，Brier分数从0.199降至0.145，略优于GPT-5。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 纵向临床笔记包含丰富的患者随时间演变信息，但如何将这些信号转化为可训练的临床预测监督信号仍具挑战性。现有方法依赖手工特征或专用分类器，缺乏可复用性。

Method: 1) 将MIMIC-III时间排序笔记转换为(患者上下文, 未来事件自然语言问题, 标签)三元组；2) 使用LoRA微调小型适配器进行训练；3) 在6,900个样本（涵盖药物、程序、器官支持、微生物学和死亡率）上评估。

Result: LoRA适配器将期望校准误差从0.1269降至0.0398，Brier分数从0.199降至0.145，在保留问题上略优于GPT-5点估计。

Conclusion: 该方法能从纵向笔记中提取可复用的临床预测监督信号，无需手工结构化特征或特定端点的分类器。

Abstract: Longitudinal clinical notes contain rich evidence of how patients evolve over time, but converting this signal into training supervision for clinical prediction remains challenging. We extend Foresight Learning to clinical prediction by converting time-ordered MIMIC-III notes into examples consisting of past patient context, a natural-language question about a possible future event, and a label resolved from later documentation. This process yields 6,900 prediction examples from 702 admissions across medications, procedures, organ support, microbiology, and mortality. A small LoRA adapter trained on these examples improves over the prompted base model, reducing expected calibration error from 0.1269 to 0.0398 and Brier score from 0.199 to 0.145, while slightly outperforming GPT-5 point estimates on held-out questions. The approach enables reusable clinical prediction supervision from longitudinal notes without hand-engineered structured features or endpoint-specific classifiers.

</details>


### [477] [Quantifying Potential Observation Missingness in Inverse Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12831)
*Leo Benac,Abhishek Sharma,Alihan Huyuk,Finale Doshi-Velez*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种在行为数据可能缺失观测信息时，通过最小扰动记录数据使专家动作看起来最优的逆强化学习算法，并在合成任务、癌症治疗模拟器和ICU数据上验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实行为数据集中常存在观测缺失问题（如医疗场景），导致标准IRL学习到的奖励函数产生误导。现有IRL变体忽略了这一关键问题。

Method: 识别使专家动作在给定信息下显得最优的最小观测扰动，并开发了相应的实用算法。

Result: 在合成导航任务、癌症治疗模拟器和ICU治疗数据上验证了算法量化观测缺失程度的有效性。

Conclusion: 该方法能有效处理实际行为数据中的观测缺失问题，提高IRL在医疗等应用场景中的可靠性。

Abstract: Inverse reinforcement learning (IRL), which infers reward functions from demonstrations, is a valuable tool for modeling and understanding decision-making behavior. Many variants of IRL have been developed to capture complexities of human decision-making, such as subjective beliefs, imperfect planning, and dynamic goals. However, an often-overlooked issue in real-world behavioral datasets is that the recorded data may be missing observations that were available to the original decision-maker. In use-inspired settings such as healthcare, this can make expert actions appear suboptimal, even when they were near-optimal given the information available at the time. As a result, the rewards learned by standard IRL may be misleading. In this paper, we identify the minimal perturbations to the recorded observations needed for the expert's actions to appear optimal. We develop a practical algorithm for this problem and demonstrate its utility for quantifying the possible extent of missing observations in behavioral datasets through extensive experiments on synthetic navigation tasks, a cancer treatment simulator, and ICU treatment data.

</details>


### [478] [CoRe-Gen: Robust Spectrum-to-Structure Generation under Imperfect Fingerprint Conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12980)
*Tianbo Liu,Chixiang Lu,Jing Hao,Hengyu Zhang,Lifei Wang,Haibo Jiang,Xiaojuan Qi*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: CoRe-Gen通过合成光谱预训练、频率感知指纹噪声匹配、结构感知自回归解码等方法，解决了质谱到分子结构生成中预测指纹与真实指纹条件不匹配的问题，在NPLIB1上达到SOTA（Top-1: 19.54%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有质谱到分子结构生成方法采用"光谱→指纹预测→指纹→结构解码"两阶段流程，但训练时使用真实指纹，部署时依赖有偏的预测指纹，导致条件不匹配和误差传播，尤其对长尾子结构影响严重。

Method: 1) 合成光谱预训练编码器；2) 频率感知的指纹损坏策略匹配部署噪声；3) 结构感知自回归解码（SELFIES表示、辅助结构监督、轻量化学约束）。

Result: NPLIB1上Top-1 19.54%、Top-10 29.92%精确匹配准确率，达到SOTA；在更难的MassSpecGym上保持竞争力；保留自回归解码的效率优势。

Conclusion: 明确解决条件不匹配问题能显著提升质谱到分子结构生成的鲁棒性和准确性，为实际部署提供了可扩展的解决方案。

Abstract: Molecular structure elucidation from tandem mass spectra (MS/MS) remains challenging, particularly for de novo generation beyond database coverage. A common approach decomposes the task into spectrum-to-fingerprint prediction followed by fingerprint-to-structure decoding, enabling the use of large-scale molecular corpora. However, at deployment, the decoder relies on predicted rather than oracle fingerprints, introducing structured errors that propagate into generation. This results in a fundamental condition mismatch, where models trained on clean inputs must operate under noisy, biased predictions, especially for long-tail substructures.
  We present CoRe-Gen that explicitly addresses this gap. CoRe-Gen improves the intermediate condition via synthetic-spectrum pretraining of the encoder, matches deployment-time noise through frequency-aware fingerprint corruption during decoder training, and mitigates residual errors using structure-aware autoregressive decoding with compositional SELFIES representations, auxiliary structural supervision, and lightweight chemical constraints. Experiments on standard benchmarks show that CoRe-Gen establishes a new state of the art on NPLIB1, achieving 19.54\% Top-1 and 29.92\% Top-10 exact-match accuracy, while remaining competitive on the more challenging MassSpecGym benchmark. Importantly, CoRe-Gen preserves the efficiency advantages of autoregressive decoding, providing a practical and scalable solution for robust spectrum-to-structure generation under realistic conditions.

</details>


### [479] [Bridging Domain Gaps with Target-Aligned Generation for Offline Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13054)
*Minung Kim,Jeongmo Kim,Gwanwoo Choi,Seungyul Han*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出Target-aligned Coverage Expansion (TCE)框架，通过双分生成模型在跨域离线强化学习中利用源域数据扩展目标域状态覆盖，显著提升策略迁移效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 跨域离线强化学习中目标域数据极其有限时，如何有效利用源域数据同时减少分布不匹配是一个关键挑战。

Method: 提出TCE框架，基于双分数生成模型合成目标一致性的转移数据，扩展目标域状态覆盖区域。

Result: 在多种跨域环境下，TCE consistently outperforms现有最先进的跨域离线RL基线方法。

Conclusion: 通过目标对齐的覆盖扩展策略，可以更有效地利用源域数据提升跨域离线强化学习性能。

Abstract: Cross-domain offline reinforcement learning aims to adapt a policy from a source domain to a target domain using only pre-collected datasets, where environment dynamics may differ. A key challenge is to leverage source data while reducing distributional mismatch, particularly when the target dataset is extremely limited. To address this, we propose Target-aligned Coverage Expansion (TCE), a framework that decides how source data should be used, either by directly incorporating target-near transitions or by expanding state coverage through target-aligned generation, guided by theoretical analysis. TCE builds on a dual score-based generative model to synthesize target-consistent transitions over an expanded state region. Extensive experiments across diverse cross-domain environments show that TCE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art cross-domain offline RL baselines.

</details>


### [480] [McCast: Memory-Guided Latent Drift Correction for Long-Horizon Precipitation Nowcasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13197)
*Penghui Wen,Yu Luo,Lintao Wang,Mengwei He,Patrick Filippi,Thomas Francis Bishop,Zhiyong Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: McCast提出了一种记忆引导的潜在漂移校正方法，通过显式校正自回归生成过程中的轨迹漂移，实现了更长时间上连贯可靠的降水预报，在SEVIR和MeteoNet基准上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有降水预报方法采用自回归公式，长期滚动中误差累积导致预报偏离物理合理的演化轨迹，且缺乏主动校正漂移的机制。

Method: 提出McCast，核心是Drift-Corrective Memory Bank (DCBank)，包含两个阶段：1) Corrective Latent Extractor从当前预测和参考潜在状态中估计初始校正；2) Correction-Aware Memory Retrieval利用时序组织的历史记忆对初始校正进行精炼，主动校正自回归潜在演化。

Result: 在SEVIR和MeteoNet两个基准上达到SOTA性能，特别是在具有挑战性的长时程预测场景中表现优异。

Conclusion: 通过显式校正潜在演化而非仅提升单步预测精度，McCast能够生成时序更连贯、更可靠的长期预报，验证了主动漂移校正范式的有效性。

Abstract: Existing precipitation nowcasting methods typically adopt an autoregressive formulation, where future states are predicted from previous outputs. However, such an approach accumulates errors over long rollouts, causing forecasts to drift away from physically plausible evolution trajectories. Although various studies have attempted to alleviate this problem by improving step-wise prediction accuracy, they largely neglect the global temporal evolution of meteorological systems and lack mechanisms to actively correct drift during rollouts. To address this issue, we propose McCast, a memory-guided latent drift correction method for precipitation nowcasting. Rather than treating memory as an unordered dictionary of latent states for passive conditioning, McCast leverages temporally organized memory to actively correct autoregressive latent evolution. Specifically, McCast introduces a Drift-Corrective Memory Bank (DCBank) that explicitly estimates the temporally consistent drift corrections to calibrate the divergent trajectory. DCBank performs drift correction in two stages: a Corrective Latent Extractor first predicts an initial correction from the current prediction and a reference latent state, and a Correction-Aware Memory Retrieval module then refines the initial correction using temporally organized historical memory. By explicitly correcting latent evolution, instead of improving step-wise prediction accuracy only, McCast produces more temporally coherent and reliable long-horizon forecasts. Experiments on two widely used benchmarks, SEVIR and MeteoNet, show that McCast achieves state-of-the-art performance, particularly in challenging long-horizon forecasting scenarios.

</details>


### [481] [MPINeuralODE: Multiple-Initial-Condition Physics-Informed Neural ODEs for Globally Consistent Dynamical System Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13305)
*Lake Yang,Antonio Malpica-Morales,Frank Ioannis Papadakis Wood,Serafim Kalliadasis*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出MPINeuralODE，结合物理信息残差与多初始条件多打靶课程学习，显著提升神经ODE对未知初始条件和长时域的外推泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准神经ODE常出现过拟合训练轨迹、对未见初始条件和长时域泛化差的问题，缺乏对潜在动力学向量场的正确恢复能力。

Method: 将软物理信息残差（physics-informed residual）与多初始条件（MIC）多打靶课程学习相结合，物理项锚定向量场幅度，MIC扩大支持域，二者互补。

Result: 在Lotka-Volterra上，MPINeuralODE在样本外误差和长时域MSE上均最低，相比基线神经ODE降低26%的误差，哈密顿漂移与PINN消融实验基本持平。

Conclusion: 物理信息与多初始条件课程学习的组合能有效提升神经ODE对底层动力学的恢复能力，改善泛化与长期稳定性。

Abstract: Neural ordinary differential equations (Neural ODEs) often fit training trajectories while generalizing poorly to unseen initial conditions and long horizons. We propose MPINeuralODE, which combines a soft physics-informed residual with a Multiple-Initial-Condition (MIC) multiple-shooting curriculum whose ingredients are structurally complementary: the physics term anchors the vector-field magnitude on the support that MIC enlarges. We evaluate along three axes: out-of-sample error, long-horizon stability, and Hamiltonian drift, which together expose whether the learned dynamics recover the underlying vector field. On Lotka-Volterra, MPINeuralODE achieves the lowest out-of-sample and long-horizon MSE among data-driven methods, with a 26% reduction over the baseline Neural ODE, while essentially matching the PINN ablation on Hamiltonian drift.

</details>


### [482] [The Diffusion Encoder](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13399)
*Akhil Premkumar,Sarah Lucioni*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用扩散模型替代传统VAE编码器的新方法，通过交替训练方案（受EM算法启发）解决编码器与解码器之间的同步问题，保留扩散模型简单高效的训练目标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统VAE中，重参数化技巧限制了编码器只能使用简单分布族，作者希望利用扩散模型的强大表达能力来构建更强大的编码器，同时解决编码器与解码器在更新潜在表示时方向冲突的问题。

Method: 提出交替训练方案，受期望最大化（EM）算法启发，在编码器（扩散模型）和解码器之间交替更新，实现两者对潜在表示的同步估计，同时保持标准扩散模型的简单训练目标。

Result: 实现了编码器与解码器之间更可靠的同步，保留了扩散模型原有的训练简洁性和效率。

Conclusion: 将扩散模型作为编码器是可行的，交替训练方案能有效解决同步问题，为生成模型提供了一种新的架构思路。

Abstract: We construct a new kind of encoder, leveraging the expressive power of diffusion models. In a traditional variational autoencoder, the encoder and decoder jointly negotiate a latent representation of the input. This is made possible by the reparameterization trick, which simplifies training at the cost of restricting the encoder to a simple family of distributions. Replacing this encoder with a diffusion model requires rethinking how the decoder pressure can be transmitted back to the encoder, given that they tend to update their internal estimates of the latent in opposing directions. We solve this problem with an alternating training scheme, inspired by the expectation-maximization algorithm. Our method enables more reliable synchronization between encoder and decoder, while preserving the simple and efficient training objective of standard diffusion models.

</details>


### [483] [Decoupled and Divergence-Conditioned Prompt for Multi-domain Dynamic Graph Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13540)
*Haonan Yuan,Qingyun Sun,Junhua Shi,Xingcheng Fu,Jianxin Li,Philip S. Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出了DyGFM，一种基于解耦和发散条件提示的多领域动态图基础模型，通过语义-时间解耦的双分支预训练、发散感知的路由机制和条件提示生成器，解决了多领域动态图统一建模中的负迁移问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动态图在不同领域存在语义和时间模式不一致的问题，导致通用的"预训练-微调"范式在多领域动态图场景中遭受严重的负知识迁移，目前缺乏能够处理多领域的动态图基础模型。

Method: 1) 双分支预训练策略实现语义-时间解耦；2) 跨域路由机制结合发散感知的专家选择来缓解负迁移；3) 发散条件提示生成器注入轻量级可学习图提示。

Result: 在连续动态图基准上，DyGFM在节点分类和链接预测任务上一致优于12个最先进的基线方法。

Conclusion: DyGFM通过解耦和发散条件提示有效实现了多领域动态图基础模型，兼具优越的效果和效率。

Abstract: Dynamic graphs are ubiquitous in real-world systems, and building generalizable dynamic Graph Foundation Models has become a frontier in graph learning. However, dynamic graphs from different domains pose fundamental challenges to unified modeling, as their semantic and temporal patterns are inherently inconsistent, making the multi-domain pre-training difficult. Consequently, the widely used "pretrain-then-finetune" paradigm often suffers from severe negative knowledge transfer. To the best of our knowledge, there exists no multi-domain dynamic GFM. In this work, we propose DyGFM, a Dynamic Graph Foundation Model over multiple domains based on decoupled and divergence-conditioned prompting. To disentangle transferable semantics from the domain-specific dynamics, we introduce a dual-branch pre-training strategy with semantic-temporal decoupling. To alleviate negative transfer during domain adaptation, we further develop a cross-domain routing mechanism with divergence-aware expert selection. To enable efficient downstream fine-tuning, we design a divergence-conditioned prompt generator that injects lightweight, learnable graph prompts tailored to semantic and temporal traits. Extensive experiments on continuous dynamic graph benchmarks demonstrate that DyGFM consistently outperforms 12 state-of-the-art baselines on both node classification and link prediction tasks, achieving superior effectiveness and efficiency.

</details>


### [484] [Self-Supervised On-Policy Reinforcement Learning via Contrastive Proximal Policy Optimisation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13554)
*Asim Osman,Sasha Abramowitz,Mark Bergh,Ulrich Armel Mbou Sob,Ruan John de Kock,Omayma Mahjoub,Oussama Hidaoui,Noah De Nicola,Arnol Manuel Fokam,Felix Chalumeau,Daniel Rajaonarivonivelomanantsoa,Siddarth Singh,Refiloe Shabe,Juan Claude Formanek,Simon Verster Du Toit,Arnu Pretorius*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出对比近端策略优化（CPPO），首个将对比强化学习与在线策略训练（PPO）结合的方法，无需奖励函数和回放缓冲区，在连续/离散、单智能体/多智能体任务中显著超越现有CRL基线，并在多数任务中匹配或超越使用手工奖励的PPO。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对比强化学习（CRL）算法全部依赖离策略优化，且主要局限于连续动作空间，缺乏对离散环境的研究，无法与现代在线策略训练流程（如PPO）连接。作者旨在建立首个联系，将CRL引入在线策略框架。

Method: 提出CPPO，通过对比学习得到状态-动作-目标的Q值，直接从对比Q值推导策略优势函数，并使用标准PPO目标进行优化，无需奖励函数和回放缓冲区。

Result: 在18个任务（涵盖连续/离散、单智能体/多智能体）中，CPPO在14个任务上显著优于已有CRL基线；在12个任务上匹配或超过使用手工密集奖励的PPO。

Conclusion: CPPO成功将对比强化学习与在线策略训练桥接，展示了无奖励函数场景下PPO级别性能的可行性，扩展了CRL在离散环境和多智能体场景的应用。

Abstract: Contrastive reinforcement learning (CRL) learns goal-conditioned Q-values through a contrastive objective over state-action and goal representations, removing the need for hand-crafted reward functions. Despite impressive success in achieving viable self-supervised learning in RL, all existing CRL algorithms rely on off-policy optimisation and are mostly constrained to continuous action spaces, with little research invested in discrete environments. This leaves CRL disconnected from widely used and effective, modern on-policy training pipelines adopted across both single-agent and multi-agent RL in continuous and discrete environments. To establish a first connection, we introduce Contrastive Proximal Policy Optimisation (CPPO). CPPO is an on-policy contrastive RL algorithm that derives policy advantages directly from contrastive Q-values and optimises them via the standard PPO objective, without requiring a reward function or a replay buffer. We evaluate CPPO across continuous and discrete, single-agent and cooperative multi-agent tasks. Whilst the existence of an on-policy approach is inherently useful, we observe that \textbf{CPPO not only significantly outperforms the previous CRL baselines in 14 out of 18 tasks, but also matches or exceeds PPO's performance, which uses hand-crafted dense rewards, in 12 out of the 18 tasks tested.}

</details>


### [485] [Topology-Preserving Neural Operator Learning via Hodge Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13834)
*Dongzhe Zheng,Tao Zhong,Christine Allen-Blanchette*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文从函数空间视角研究几何网格上的物理场方程解算子，基于Hodge理论提出Hodge Spectral Duality (HSD)框架，通过离散微分形式捕捉拓扑主导成分，用正交辅助环境空间表示复杂局部动力学，实现了更高的精度和效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决几何网格上物理场方程求解中频谱干扰问题，特别是区分可学习的几何动力学与不可学习的拓扑自由度。

Method: 基于Hodge理论和算子分裂，提出混合欧拉-拉格朗日架构HSD：使用离散微分形式处理拓扑成分，用正交辅助环境空间表示局部动力学。

Result: 在几何图上实现了优越的精度和效率，对物理不变量的保真度更高。

Conclusion: Hodge正交性可从根本上解决频谱干扰问题，HSD框架能有效分离拓扑与几何成分，实现结构保持的近似求解。

Abstract: In this paper, we study solution operators of physical field equations on geometric meshes from a function-space perspective. We reveal that Hodge orthogonality fundamentally resolves spectral interference by isolating unlearnable topological degrees of freedom from learnable geometric dynamics, enabling an additive approximation confined to structure-preserving subspaces. Building on Hodge theory and operator splitting, we derive a principled operator-level decomposition. The result is a Hybrid Eulerian-Lagrangian architecture with an algebraic-level inductive bias we call Hodge Spectral Duality (HSD). In our framework, we use discrete differential forms to capture topology-dominated components and an orthogonal auxiliary ambient space to represent complex local dynamics. Our method achieves superior accuracy and efficiency on geometric graphs with enhanced fidelity to physical invariants. Our code is available at https://github.com/ContinuumCoder/Hodge-Spectral-Duality

</details>


### [486] [BioSEN: A Bio-acoustic Signal Enhancement Network for Animal Vocalizations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12534)
*Tianyu Song,Ton Viet Ta,Ngamta Thamwattana,Hisako Nomura,Linh Thi Hoai Nguyen*

Main category: cs.SD

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出BioSEN，一个专为生物声学信号设计的音频增强模型，包含多尺度双轴注意力、生物谐波多尺度增强和能量自适应门控连接三个模块，在三个数据集上以更少计算量达到或超越SOTA语音增强模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大部分音频增强工作聚焦于人声，而生物声学因录音噪声大、动物声音特征独特而研究不足，因此需要专门针对生物声学信号的增强方法。

Method: BioSEN包含三个模块：(1) 多尺度双轴注意力单元，用于时频特征提取；(2) 生物谐波多尺度增强单元，用于捕捉谐波结构；(3) 能量自适应门控连接单元，利用频率权重防止动物发声被当作噪声去除。

Result: 在三个生物声学数据集上，BioSEN匹配或超越了最先进的语音增强模型，同时计算量大幅降低。

Conclusion: BioSEN在生物声学音频增强方面表现优异，对生物多样性监测和保护具有应用潜力。

Abstract: Most work in audio enhancement targets human speech, while bioacoustics is less studied due to noisy recordings and the distinct traits of animal sounds. To fill this gap, we adapt speech enhancement methods and build BioSEN, a model made for bioacoustic signals. BioSEN has three modules: a multi-scale dual-axis attention unit for time-frequency feature extraction, a bio-harmonic multi-scale enhancement unit for capturing harmonic structures, and an
  energy-adaptive gating connection unit that uses frequency weights to keep vocalizations from being removed as noise. Tests on three bioacoustic datasets show that BioSEN matches or exceeds state-of-the-art speech enhancement models while using far less computation. These results show BioSEN's strength for bioacoustic audio enhancement and its promise for biodiversity monitoring and conservation.

</details>


### [487] [Towards Robust Federated Multimodal Graph Learning under Modality Heterogeneity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12584)
*Sirui Zhang,Haonan Wang,Xunkai Li,Zekai Chen,Shumeng Li,Hongchao Qin,Rong-Hua Li,Guoren Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文提出FedMPO，一种面向缺失模态场景的鲁棒联邦多模态图学习框架，通过拓扑感知跨模态生成、缺失感知专家路由和可靠性感知聚合来解决联邦环境中模态缺失和数据异构问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有集中式多模态图学习方法无法处理联邦场景下的知识共享与泛化，而联邦多模态学习方法主要面向非图数据；同时真实世界中图数据存在模态缺失和孤立性问题，迫切需要鲁棒的联邦方案。

Method: 提出FedMPO框架，包含：1) 拓扑感知跨模态生成（利用图结构上下文恢复缺失特征）；2) 缺失感知专家路由（本地过滤噪声恢复信号）；3) 可靠性感知聚合（对不可靠更新进行降权聚合）。

Result: 在6个数据集上的3个任务中，FedMPO优于基线方法，在高缺失率和非IID设定下分别提升高达4.10%和5.65%。

Conclusion: FedMPO通过综合考虑图拓扑结构、模态缺失情况和更新可靠性，有效提升了联邦多模态图学习的鲁棒性。

Abstract: Recently, multimodal graph learning (MGL) has garnered significant attention for integrating diverse modality information and structured context to support various network applications. However, real-world graphs are often isolated due to data-sharing limitations across multiple parties, and their modalities are frequently incomplete. This highlights an urgent need to develop a robust federated approach. However, we find that existing methods remain insufficient. On the one hand, centralized MGL methods that handle missing modalities overlook the knowledge sharing and generalization in federated scenarios. On the other hand, while federated MGL methods have become increasingly mature, they primarily target non-graph data. Based on these technologies, we identify a two-stage pipeline wherein client-side completion reconstructs missing modalities, and server-side aggregation integrates the client-updated parameters of both the modality generator and the backbone models. Although this serves as a general solution, we identify two primary challenges in achieving greater robustness: (1) Topology-Isolated Local Completion: Client-side modality generation struggles to effectively leverage global semantics. (2) Reliability-Imbalanced Global Aggregation: Server-side multi-party collaboration is hindered by client updates with varying modality availability and recovery reliability. To address these challenges, we propose \textsc{FedMPO}, which utilizes topology-aware cross-modal generation to recover missing features using comprehensive graph context, missing-aware expert routing to locally filter out noisy recovered signals, and reliability-aware aggregation to appropriately down-weight unreliable updates. Extensive experiments on 3 tasks across 6 datasets demonstrate that FedMPO outperforms baselines, achieving performance gains of up to 4.10% and 5.65% in high-missing and non-IID settings.

</details>


### [488] [A Unified Perspective for Learning Graph Representations Across Multi-Level Abstractions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12685)
*Mohamed Mahmoud Amar,Nairouz Mrabah,Mohamed Bouguessa,Abdoulaye Baniré Diallo*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种统一的图自监督学习对比框架，能够同时建模节点级、邻近级、簇级和图级信息，并引入了一种无需参数的自适应权重机制，自动调整正负样本对的权重，从而在分类、聚类和链路预测等下游任务中超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图自监督学习方法多集中于单一图抽象层次（如仅节点级或仅图级），且对所有样本采用统一的惩罚强度，缺乏优化灵活性，导致收敛状态模糊。

Method: 提出统一对比框架，通过线性组合多层级（节点、邻近、簇、图）的正负样本对相似度得分；并引入无参数的自适应加权机制，自动对偏离目标值的得分赋予更大权重。

Result: 在真实数据集上，该方法在单层和多层场景下的分类、聚类、链路预测任务中均一致优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 多层级统一对比学习结合自适应加权策略，能有效提升图表示质量，且避免了多任务GSSL中繁琐的超参数调优。

Abstract: Graph Self-Supervised Learning (GSSL) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for generating high-quality representations for graph-structured data. While multi-scale graph contrastive learning has received increasing attention, many existing methods still predominantly focus on a single graph abstraction level. To address this limitation, we propose a unified contrastive framework that can target node-level, proximity-level, cluster-level, and graph-level information and integrate them through a linear combination of similarity scores on positive pairs and dissimilarity scores (i.e., similarity scores on negative pairs). Furthermore, current approaches typically assign uniform penalty strengths to all examples, which reduces optimization flexibility and leads to ambiguous convergence status. To overcome this, we introduce a novel parameter-free fine-grained self-weighting mechanism that adaptively assigns weights to individual similarity and dissimilarity scores. The proposed mechanism emphasizes the scores that deviate significantly from their target values. Our approach not only enhances optimization flexibility but also eliminates the computational overhead of hyperparameter tuning in conventional multi-task GSSL methods. Comprehensive experiments on real-world datasets show that our methods consistently outperform state-of-the-art approaches across downstream tasks, including classification, clustering, and link prediction, in both single-level and multi-level scenarios.

</details>


### [489] [Multitask Multimodal Fusion with Tabular Foundation Models for Peak and Durability Prediction of Pertussis Booster Response](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12852)
*Divya Sitani*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种多任务对比多模态融合架构，结合TabPFN-v2编码器、双标签监督对比损失和缺失掩码注意力融合，用于同时预测百日咳加强免疫后的峰值抗体反应和长期持久性，在两个任务上均取得优于基线的显著结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有计算模型通常只关注免疫反应的峰值或持久性之一，无法联合预测完整的"上升-衰减"轨迹；且两个终点在生物学上不相关，样本量小、模态异构、缺失模式结构化，联合预测具有挑战性。

Method: 多任务对比多模态融合架构：使用冻结的TabPFN-v2作为每模态编码器；双标签监督对比损失（两个样本在任务1或任务2上标签一致即视为正对）；根据经验缺失率校准的模态丢弃策略；缺失掩码注意力融合机制。

Result: 在CMI-PB百日咳加强数据集（n=158，四模态，44.9%有缺失）上，峰值预测AUROC 0.797，持久性预测AUROC 0.755，均显著（p<0.05）；是唯一在两个任务上95%置信区间均高于随机水平的模型；模态贡献分析符合免疫学认知。

Conclusion: 提出的多任务对比学习框架能有效利用生物医学多模态数据中的部分共享信息，同时预测免疫反应的峰值和持久性，并具有可解释的模态贡献分析能力。

Abstract: Pertussis booster vaccination produces immune responses that vary widely across individuals in both peak magnitude and long-term durability. These two phases are governed by partly distinct biological compartments:peak reflects acute B-cell activation and antibody secretion, while durability reflects the establishment of long-term humoral memory. Yet most computational models target only one, missing the full boost-and-wane trajectory. Jointly predicting both is non-trivial because the two endpoints are biologically dissociated rather than redundant; samples are small, modalities are heterogeneous with structured missingness, and the two tasks rely on different measurement windows. We propose a multi-task contrastive multimodal fusion architecture combining frozen TabPFN-v2 per-modality encoders, a dual-label supervised contrastive loss that treats two subjects as a positive pair if they agree on the Task 1 label or the Task 2 label, modality dropout calibrated to empirical missingness, and missingness-masked attention fusion. Applied to a curated subset of the CMI-PB pertussis booster dataset (n = 158 subjects, four modalities, 44.9% with at least one modality missing; Spearman r = -0.58 between peak and durability, n = 96), the model achieves test AUROC 0.797 (95% CI [0.621, 0.948]) for peak response and 0.755 (95% CI [0.519, 0.945]) for durability, with both significant under joint label permutation (N = 1000; p = 0.002 and p = 0.045). Across logistic regression, XGBoost, and MLP baselines on raw features and on TabPFN embeddings, the proposed model is the only one whose 95% CIs lie above chance on both tasks simultaneously. Per-modality contribution analyses recover task-specific modality contributions consistent with the underlying immunology: peak prediction is carried by cytokine signatures, while durability is carried by baseline antibody features.

</details>


### [490] [Frequency Bias and OOD Generalization in Neural Operators under a Variable-Coefficient Wave Equation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12997)
*Runlong Xie,An Luo*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 研究FNO和DeepONet两种神经算子架构在波动方程PDE求解中，面对频率和光滑度分布偏移时的泛化能力差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经算子在PDE求解中表现优异，但其在结构化分布偏移下的行为尚不清晰，需系统研究其泛化能力。

Method: 以一维变系数波动方程为背景，分别测试FNO和DeepONet在输入频率偏移和系数光滑度偏移下的表现，分析架构偏差对泛化的影响。

Result: 光滑度偏移下两者均保持稳定，FNO误差更低；频率偏移下FNO在高频输入时误差剧增，DeepONet退化较轻但总体误差更高。

Conclusion: 指出架构表示偏差是导致分布偏移下泛化差距的关键因素，未来应关注更可靠的神经算子设计。

Abstract: Neural operators learn to map initial conditions to the terminal solution of partial differential equations (PDEs), providing a surrogate for the full operator mapping. This enables rapid prediction across different input configurations. While recent neural operator architectures have demonstrated strong performance on diverse PDE tasks, their behavior under structured distribution shifts remains insufficiently understood. To investigate this, we study operator learning in a wave propagation setting governed by a one-dimensional variable-coefficient wave equation, using two representative architectures, the Fourier Neural Operator (FNO) and the Deep Operator Network (DeepONet). To examine their generalization under distribution shifts, we consider structured out-of-distribution (OOD) settings that independently vary input frequency and coefficient smoothness. The results show that under smoothness shifts, both models maintain stable performance, with FNO achieving lower error. In contrast, under frequency shifts, FNO exhibits a sharp increase in error under unseen high-frequency inputs, whereas DeepONet shows milder degradation despite higher overall error. Our analysis reveals that these differences arise from how each architecture represents and responds to variations in frequency structure. Together, these findings highlight a fundamental gap between strong in-distribution performance and generalization under distribution shifts in operator learning, underscoring the role of architectural representation bias in developing more reliable neural operators for physics-based PDE simulations beyond the training distribution.

</details>


### [491] [Rethinking Efficient Graph Coarsening via a Non-Selfishness Principle](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13021)
*Xu Bai,Bin Lu,Kun Zhang,Shengbo Chen,Xinbing Wang,Chenghu Zhou,Meng Jin*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为NOPE的非自私图粗化方法，通过优先考虑邻域集体干扰而非成对相似匹配，实现了线性内存和近线性计算复杂度；进一步提出NOPE*变体，基于局部各向同性假设加速对高维节点的处理，在保持图结构语义的同时，比现有方法快1-3个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图粗化方法依赖成对相似度匹配，每个节点基于全局信息独立寻找最佳伙伴（"自私"范式），导致计算和内存开销巨大。作者希望通过"非自私"原则，利用邻域集体干扰来降低复杂度。

Method: 提出NOPE方法：基于非自私原则，优先考虑邻域集体干扰进行粗化，实现线性内存和近线性计算复杂度。进一步提出NOPE*变体：利用局部各向同性假设，将O(δ·d)的干扰评估降为O(d)，缓解高维节点的计算瓶颈。

Result: NOPE*相比NOPE实现1.8-10倍加速，相比于几乎所有基线方法快1-3个数量级。在粗化图上学习可与原始图性能相当，甚至在LLM图推理任务上表现更优。

Conclusion: 非自私的邻域集体干扰范式的确能有效降低图粗化的计算复杂度，且粗化后的图可压缩信息但保持甚至提升下游任务性能，包括LLM图推理。

Abstract: Graph coarsening is a graph dimensionality reduction technique that aims to construct a smaller and more tractable graph while preserving the essential structural and semantic properties of the original graph. However, most existing methods rely on pair-wise similarity matching, where each node independently searches for its best partner based on global information. This selfishness matching paradigm incurs substantial computational and memory overhead. To address this problem, we shift to a non-selfishness principle that prioritizes the collective interference of neighborhood in coarsening, and propose an efficient method named NOPE, which achieves linear memory consumption and near-linear computational complexity in the number of nodes. Furthermore, we derive a faster variant NOPE*, which reduces O(δ\dot d) interference evaluation to O(d) based on the local isotropy assumption, and consequently alleviates the computational bottleneck for high-degree nodes. Experimental results show that NOPE* achieves 1.8-10\times speedup over NOPE and surpass almost all baselines with 1-3 orders of magnitude acceleration. Meanwhile, learning on coarsened graphs yields comparable performance to original graphs, and can even show superior performance over LLM-based graph reasoning owing to compact graph information. The code can be available at https://github.com/dazonglian/NOPE-main.

</details>


### [492] [Ergodic Trajectory Design by Learned Pushforward Maps: Provable Coverage via Conditional Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13063)
*Ehsan Aghazadeh,Masoud Malekzadeh,Ahmad Ghasemi,Hossein Pishro-Nik*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种"epushforward"框架，通过最优传输条件流匹配离线学习映射，将均匀遍历的潜在轨迹推送到目标密度，实现无人机遍历覆盖，具有无需重优化、支持多智能体、可融入多类约束等优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无人机遍历覆盖方法要么在线重新优化（成本随规划时长增长，每次需对目标、智能体、场景分别重跑），要么依赖需要针对每种新约束重新推导的解析构造，缺乏灵活且可扩展的方案。

Method: 将遍历覆盖解耦为两部分：1）分析构造的潜在轨迹在简单环形域上提供精确均匀遍历性；2）通过最优传输条件流匹配学习一个映射，离线将潜在占有度推送到目标密度。约束作为可微软惩罚加入训练损失。

Result: 推导了三个理论结果：加速度-能量界、O(1/√K)的遍历收敛速率、近似误差界；结合成一个端到端覆盖界，可通过CFM训练诊断估计。

Conclusion: 训练好的映射可服务于无限多条轨迹和多智能体集群而无需每个智能体重新训练，同时支持多种可微操作约束。

Abstract: Designing continuous trajectories whose time-averaged occupancy provably matches a prescribed spatial density (the \emph{ergodic coverage} problem) is central to UAV-assisted data collection and sensing, robotic exploration, and mobile monitoring. For flying agents in particular, this challenge is acute: trajectories must balance coverage fidelity against tight energy budgets, no-fly zones, and acceleration limits. Existing methods either re-optimize each trajectory online (with cost growing in the horizon and re-running for every target, agent, and realization) or rely on bespoke analytical constructions that must be re-derived for each new constraint. We propose a \emph{epushforward} framework that decouples ergodicity from density matching: an analytic latent trajectory provides exact uniform ergodicity on a simple annular domain, and a single map, learned offline by optimal-transport conditional flow matching, transports this latent occupancy onto the prescribed target density. The composed trajectory is then asymptotically ergodic with respect to the learned pushforward distribution, with deviation from the target controlled by the flow-matching training loss. Once trained for a given target density and constraint set, the map serves an unbounded number of trajectories and a multi-agent fleet without per-agent retraining, and many differentiable operational constraints (no-fly zones, acceleration ceilings, or fairness penalties) enter as additive soft penalties in the training loss without re-deriving the design. We prove three results (an acceleration-energy bound, an $O(1/\sqrt{K})$ ergodic convergence rate in the number of trajectory cycles $K$, and an approximation-error bound) that combine into an end-to-end coverage bound estimable from CFM training diagnostics (certified given an architectural Lipschitz bound on $v_θ$).

</details>


### [493] [Taming the Long Tail: Rebalancing Adversarial Training via Adaptive Perturbation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13395)
*Lilin Zhang,Yimo Guo,Yue Li,Jiancheng Shi,Xianggen Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文提出RobustLT框架，针对长尾数据下的对抗训练问题，通过自适应调整扰动来同时提升对抗鲁棒性和类别平衡性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对抗训练主要关注平衡数据集，忽略了现实场景中普遍存在的长尾数据分布问题，且对抗扰动会改变训练分布，需要研究其对长尾学习的影响。

Method: RobustLT是一个即插即用框架，通过理论分析发现长尾对抗训练存在两个问题：类别不平衡导致的偏斜训练目标，以及对抗分布的不稳定演化。该方法自适应调整对抗训练中的扰动来同时缓解这两个问题。

Result: 在长尾数据集上的大量实验表明，RobustLT能够持续提升对抗鲁棒性和类别平衡性。

Conclusion: 对抗扰动可以同时解决对抗脆弱性和类别不平衡问题，RobustLT是有效的长尾对抗训练方案。

Abstract: Deep neural networks are highly vulnerable to adversarial examples, i.e.,small perturbations that can significantly degrade model performance. While adversarial training has become the primary defense strategy, most studies focus on balanced datasets, overlooking the challenges posed by real-world long-tail data. Motivated by the fact that perturbations in adversarial examples inherently alter the training distribution, we theoretically investigate their impact. We first revisit adversarial training for long-tail data and identify two key limitations: (i) a skewed training objective caused by class imbalance, and (ii) unstable evolution of adversarial distributions. Furthermore, we show that perturbations can simultaneously address both adversarial vulnerability and class imbalance. Based on these insights, we propose RobustLT, a plug-and-play framework that adaptively adjusts perturbations during adversarial training. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RobustLT consistently enhances adversarial robustness and class-balance on long-tailed datasets. The code is available at \href{https://github.com/zhang-lilin/RobustLT}{https://github.com/zhang-lilin/RobustLT}.

</details>


### [494] [Strategic PAC Learnability via Geometric Definability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13426)
*Yuval Filmus,Shay Moran,Elizaveta Nesterova,Nir Rosenfeld,Alexander Shlimovich*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文研究策略分类中个体为影响分类器而修改特征的问题，发现即使VC维为1的简单假设类在策略行为下也可能变得不可学习，但通过引入一阶公式定义的几何可定义性假设，可以保证可学习性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究策略分类中，个体的策略性特征修改是否会导致原本简单的假设类变得难以学习，以及如何在这种场景下保证可学习性。

Method: 引入基于实数指数域（R_exp）的一阶公式定义的几何可定义性假设，将假设类和成本诱导的邻域关系用算术运算、指数、对数等描述，从而控制策略假设类的样本复杂度。

Result: 证明了即使VC维为1的简单假设类，在策略行为下也可能具有无限VC维（不可学习）；但在几何可定义性假设下，可学习性得以保持，样本复杂度由定义公式的复杂度控制。

Conclusion: 策略行为可能从根本上破坏可学习性，但通过几何可定义性假设（覆盖广泛自然类和成本函数）可以恢复学习保证。

Abstract: Strategic classification studies learning settings in which individuals can modify their features, at a cost, in order to influence the classifier's decision. A central question is how the sample complexity of the induced (strategic) hypothesis class depends on the complexities of the underlying hypothesis class and the cost structure governing feasible manipulations. Prior work has shown that in several natural settings, such as linear classifiers with norm costs, the induced complexity can be controlled. We begin by showing that such guarantees fail in general - even in simple cases: there exist hypothesis classes of VC dimension $1$ on the real line such that, even under the simplest interval neighborhoods, the induced class has infinite VC dimension. Thus, strategic behavior can turn an easy learning problem into a non-learnable one. To overcome this, we introduce structure via a geometric definability assumption: both the hypothesis class and the cost-induced neighborhood relation can be defined by first-order formulas over $\mathbb{R}_{\mathtt{exp}}$. Intuitively, this means that hypotheses and costs can be described using arithmetic operations, exponentiation, logarithms, and comparisons. This captures a broad range of natural classes and cost functions, including $\ell_p$ distances, Wasserstein distance, and information-theoretic divergences. Under this assumption, we prove that learnability is preserved, with sample complexity controlled by the complexity of the defining formulas.

</details>


### [495] [Twincher: Bijective Representation Learning for Robust Inversion of Continuous Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13470)
*Arkady Gonoskov*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 提出Twincher架构，通过结构化微分同胚变换堆叠和对抗训练学习正/逆向双射表示，实现鲁棒且高效的逆向推理，在合成系统中展现出优于基线方法的数据效率和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI进展主要依赖大规模神经架构的函数逼近能力，缺乏针对资源高效感知和规划（通过求解逆问题）的定制化归纳偏置和学习策略，因此需要探索能够实现连续前向过程鲁棒逆变换的方法。

Method: 提出Twincher架构，基于结构化微分同胚变换堆叠，结合定制的对抗训练策略，学习与p双射对齐且对y中扰动不敏感的表征。

Result: 在合成系统中能高效学习双射表征并实现鲁棒的迭代逆向推理；相比基线逆建模方法，展现出更好的数据效率和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 双射表征学习在机器人、视觉和物理AI领域具有潜力，为资源高效的逆问题求解提供了新的方向。

Abstract: Recent advances in AI have been primarily driven by large-scale neural architectures that excel at function approximation, rather than by tailored inductive biases and inference or learning strategies that could be important for resource-efficient real-world perception and planning through the solution of inverse problems. In this work, we consider the possibility of enabling robust inversion of continuous forward processes $p \mapsto y$ by learning representations of $y$ that are bijectively aligned with $p$ while remaining insensitive to perturbations in $y$ caused by noise or model mismatch. We propose Twincher, a class of architectures based on stacks of structured diffeomorphic transformations and tailored adversarial training strategies that enable learning such bijective representations. We provide a public API for training and inference and empirically demonstrate the ability of the proposed architecture to efficiently learn bijective representations of synthetic systems, thereby enabling robust and efficient iterative inverse inference. Compared to a baseline inverse-modeling approach, the method exhibits improved data efficiency and robustness, providing initial evidence for the potential of bijective representation learning in robotics, vision, and physical AI.

</details>


### [496] [Path-independent Flow Matching for Multi-parameter Generative Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13487)
*Francisco Téllez,AmirHossein Zamani,Philippe Martin,Shuang Ni,Guy Wolf,Eugene Belilovsky,Sina Sanjari,Yanlei Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Path-independent Flow Matching (PiFM)，将标准Flow Matching扩展到高维参数域，实现路径无关的概率分布传输，并通过实验证明其在路径无关轨迹插值和分布外样本生成方面优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准Flow Matching的单参数框架无法处理多参数变化场景，且不保证路径无关性——即变换结果应仅依赖于初始分布和目标分布，而非具体路径。这种路径无关性对于确保组合变换的一致性至关重要。

Method: PiFM通过构建满足结构条件的高维向量场，强制实现路径无关的分布传输；理论上证明其在适当假设下可逼近Wasserstein重心；提出一种可训练的、无仿真的多参数条件概率路径回归目标。

Result: 在合成数据和真实数据上，PiFM在路径无关轨迹插值和分布外样本生成任务中均优于其他对比方法。

Conclusion: PiFM成功将Flow Matching推广到多参数路径无关场景，建立了与Wasserstein重心之间的联系，并提供了一种实用的无仿真训练方法。

Abstract: Flow Matching is a powerful framework for learning transport maps between probability distributions. Yet its standard single-parameter formulation is not designed to capture multi-parameter variations where the resulting transport should be path-independent. Path independence is crucial because it ensures that transformations depend only on the initial and target distributions, not on the specific path. In this work, we introduce Path-independent Flow Matching (PiFM), a method for learning vector fields whose induced flows yield path-independent transport between distributions. We show that PiFM generalizes Flow Matching to higher-dimensional parameter domains while enforcing structural conditions that ensure consistency of composed transformations. In addition, we show that, under suitable assumptions, PiFM approximates the Wasserstein barycenter, linking the framework to a notion of distributional interpolation. To enable practical training, we propose a tractable, simulation-free objective that regresses onto multi-parameter conditional probability paths. We showcase empirically that PiFM outperforms other approaches on both synthetic and real world data in interpolating path-independent trajectories and generating desired out of distribution samples.

</details>


### [497] [SpikeProphecy: A Large-Scale Benchmark for Autoregressive Neural Population Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12992)
*John R. Minnick,Jinghui Geng,Kamran Hussain,Jesus Gonzalez-Ferrer,Ash Robbins,Mohammed A. Mostajo-Radji,David Haussler,Jason K. Eshraghian,Mircea Teodorescu*

Main category: q-bio.NC

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文提出SpikeProphecy，首个因果自回归尖峰计数预测的大规模基准，引入种群度量分解（时间保真度、空间模式精度、幅度不变对齐），在105个Neuropixels sessions上评估七种架构（含SSM、Transformer、LSTM、脉冲网络），揭示跨基线可复现的脑区可预测性排名，并发现次泊松评估下限及ANN-to-SNN蒸馏负结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经群体模型仅用单一Pearson相关系数r评估尖峰预测性能，掩盖了时间、空间和幅度等关键结构信息。作者认为评估方式与模型本身同等重要，因此需要更细粒度的评估基准来揭示模型真实能力。

Method: 构建SpikeProphecy基准，包含105个Neuropixels sessions（~89,800神经元），使用七种基线架构（四种SSM、Transformer、LSTM、脉冲网络），提出种群度量分解方法将聚合性能分解为时间保真度、空间模式精度和幅度不变对齐三个维度，并通过ANCOVA校正分析脑区可预测性。

Result: 度量分解揭示了跨七个基线可复现的脑区可预测性排名（ANCOVA校正后区域ΔR²=0.018），暴露了次泊松评估下限（严格指标与生物物理约束结合），并得出KL-on-output-rates蒸馏在ANN-to-SNN迁移中为负结果。

Conclusion: 评估方式深刻影响对神经群体模型的理解，单一聚合指标会掩盖重要结构信息；提出的度量分解方法为未来研究提供了更有信息量的评估框架。

Abstract: Neural population models, which predict the joint firing of many simultaneously recorded neurons forward in time, are typically evaluated by a single aggregate Pearson correlation $r$ between predicted and actual spike counts, a number that masks critical structure. We argue that how we evaluate spike forecasting matters as much as what we build, and introduce SpikeProphecy, the first large-scale benchmark for causal, autoregressive spike-count forecasting on real electrophysiology recordings. Our core contribution is a population metric decomposition that separates aggregate performance into temporal fidelity, spatial pattern accuracy, and magnitude-invariant alignment. The decomposition surfaces aspects of the underlying data that an aggregate scalar collapses together. We apply the protocol to 105 Neuropixels sessions (Steinmetz 2019 + IBL Repeated Site; ~89,800 neurons) with seven architecture baselines spanning four structural families: four SSMs (three diagonal and one non-diagonal), a Transformer, an LSTM, and a spiking network. The decomposition surfaces a brain-region predictability ranking that reproduces across all seven baselines and survives ANCOVA correction for firing-statistics constraints (region $ΔR^2 = 0.018$ above the firing-statistics covariates). It also exposes a sub-Poisson evaluation floor where rigorous metrics combine with genuine biophysical constraints on regular spike trains, and yields a negative result on KL-on-output-rates distillation for ANN-to-SNN transfer in this Poisson count domain.

</details>


### [498] [Kernel-based guarantees for nonlinear parametric models in Bayesian optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13160)
*Rafael Oliveira*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个基于核的框架，用于分析在自适应数据收集下训练的带正则化的非线性参数模型，并证明其置信界和收敛性保证，弥合了贝叶斯优化中理论分析与实际非线性模型之间的差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的贝叶斯优化理论分析主要局限于高斯过程、核机器、线性模型或线性化神经网络近似，而实际中广泛使用的非线性参数模型缺乏理论保证。作者旨在填补这一理论与实践的鸿沟。

Method: 通过在参数空间上定义核函数，诱导对应模型类上的再生核希尔伯特空间结构，进而为在自适应数据上使用正则化凸损失训练的非线性参数模型推导出置信界。

Result: 证明了所推导的置信界能够支持非线性采集函数和代理模型的收敛性保证，包括通过最大化训练好的随机模型来选择采样点的随机正则化策略。

Conclusion: 该框架为在贝叶斯优化及相关自适应优化场景中分析非线性参数模型提供了一条统一的理论路径。

Abstract: Modern Bayesian optimization and adaptive sampling methods increasingly rely on nonlinear parametric models, yet theoretical guarantees for such models under adaptive data collection remain limited. Existing analyses largely focus on Gaussian processes, kernel machines, linear models, or linearized neural approximations, leaving a gap between theory and the nonlinear models used in practice. We develop a kernel based framework for analyzing regularized nonlinear parametric models trained on adaptively collected data. Our approach uses kernels over the parameter space to induce reproducing kernel Hilbert space structures over the corresponding model class, yielding confidence bounds for models trained with broad classes of regularized convex losses. We show how these bounds can support convergence guarantees for nonlinear acquisition and surrogate models, including randomized regularized policies that select points by maximizing a trained random model. These results provide a unified route to analyzing nonlinear parametric models in Bayesian optimization and related adaptive optimization settings.

</details>


### [499] [Proximal-Based Generative Modeling for Bayesian Inverse Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13278)
*Boyang Zhang,Zhiguo Wang,Ya-Feng Liu*

Main category: math.OC

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于近端算子（Proximal）的生成建模框架（PGM），通过将扩散模型中的高斯卷积与非光滑优化中的Moreau-Yosida正则化建立理论等价，规避了传统扩散模型在逆问题中需要显式计算时间依赖似然分数的瓶颈，实现了更优的重建质量和采样效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型在生成任务中表现优异，但在处理逆问题（如重构、修复）时，由于时间依赖的似然分数（score）难以解析求解，存在根本性瓶颈。现有方法通常需要近似或早期截断，导致偏差和性能损失。

Method: 1) 建立高斯卷积与Moreau-Yosida正则化的理论等价关系；2) 提出Moreau score，通过近端算子获得闭合形式的解析表达式；3) 引入Moreau score matching，仅依赖先验分布的样本学习近端算子；4) 构建新的采样机制替代传统分数匹配。

Result: PGM消除了基于分数的扩散模型中固有的提前停止偏差（early-stopping bias），证明了非渐近收敛性，在重构质量和采样时间上显著优于当前最先进方法。

Conclusion: 通过将扩散过程与优化理论中的近端算子结合，提出了一种无需显式似然分数计算的新生成建模范式，为逆问题提供了理论更完备、效果更好的解决方案。

Abstract: Score-based diffusion models demonstrate superior performance in generative tasks but encounter fundamental bottlenecks in inverse problems due to the analytical intractability of the time-dependent likelihood score. To bridge this gap, we propose a novel proximal-based generative modeling (PGM) framework that rigorously circumvents explicit likelihood evaluation. Our framework is built upon a theoretical equivalence between Gaussian convolution in diffusion processes and Moreau-Yosida regularization in nonsmooth optimization. This enables a new sampling mechanism driven by the proposed Moreau score, which admits a closed-form expression via proximal operators. Moreover, we introduce Moreau score matching to learn the proximal operators that rely solely on samples drawn from the prior distribution. Theoretically, PGM eliminates the early-stopping bias inherent in the score-based diffusion model and achieves non-asymptotic convergence. Experiments demonstrate that PGM significantly surpasses state-of-the-art methods in reconstruction quality and sampling time.

</details>


### [500] [CAWI: Copula-Aligned Weight Initialization for Randomized Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12580)
*Mushir Akhtar,M. Tanveer,Mohd. Arshad*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 28.0

TL;DR: 本文提出CAWI（Copula-Aligned Weight Initialization）框架，通过从数据拟合的copula中采样输入到隐藏层的权重，使随机化神经网络（RdNN）的固定随机投影能够保留特征间的依赖关系（相关性、不对称性和尾部依赖），在不改变封闭解求解范式的前提下显著提升分类性能。在83个基准数据集和两个生物医学数据集上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统RdNN随机初始化权重时忽略特征间的相互依赖关系（相关性、不对称性、尾部依赖），导致矩阵条件数恶化、预测性能下降。目前RdNN文献中尚无有效解决该问题的方法。

Method: CAWI三步法：(i) 用经验CDF将每个特征映射到单位区间；(ii) 拟合多元copula捕获特征间的秩相关性（支持高斯/t分布椭圆族和Clayton/Frank/Gumbel阿基米德族）；(iii) 从拟合copula采样权重列，应用固定逆边际变换设定尺度。仅改变权重的采样分布，不改变目标函数、求解器和"一次性冻结"范式。

Result: 在83个分类基准（二分类/多分类）和BreaKHis、精神分裂症两个生物医学数据集上，采用标准浅层和深层RdNN架构，CAWI相比传统随机初始化始终取得显著的预测性能提升。
