Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets provide evidence that \methodname captures the complex interplay of homophilic and heterophilic interactions in multiplex graphs, and tends to yield improved node classification performance compared to state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [537] [ConRetroBert: EMA Stabilized Dual Encoders for Template-Based Single-Step Retrosynthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12736)
*Mohammad Jahid Ibna Basher,Ali Khodabandeh Yalabadi,Ivan Garibay,Ozlem Ozmen Garibay*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出ConRetroBert，将模板基单步逆合成预测重新构建为密集检索+列表排序的双编码器框架，通过对比预训练、难负例挖掘和EMA稳定化训练，在USPTO-50k上达到75.4% top-1准确率，证明模板法仍具竞争力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模板基逆合成预测因其可解释性对合成规划有价值，但传统上将其视为全局分类任务，受限于长尾规则库，被认为不如无模板方法。本文认为问题不在于模板本身，而在于学习范式，旨在通过改进训练方式来释放模板法的潜力。

Method: 双编码器框架：Stage 1用对比预训练学习产物与反应模板的共享嵌入空间；Stage 2用多正例列表排序目标对难负例候选集进行排序。引入EMA更新的慢速模板编码器用于检索库构建，同时通过排序损失更新实时模板编码器，避免难负例挖掘不稳定。

Result: USPTO-50k上Stage 2将top-1准确率从50.5%提升至61.3%，EMA稳定化进一步提至62.4%；在泄漏控制的USPTO-Full上微调后达75.4%。在稀有模板的长尾分布上表现优越。

Conclusion: 模板法若采用合适的检索+排序学习范式，而非全局分类，可以具备强大竞争力；EMA机制有效稳定了模板侧表示的持续学习；正确的产物预测可能来自多种有效模板，而不仅仅是标注的正例模板。

Abstract: Template based single step retrosynthesis predicts reactants by selecting and applying an explicit reaction template, making each prediction traceable to a chemical transformation rule. This is useful for synthesis planning, but template based methods are often viewed as less competitive than template free models because template prediction is commonly formulated as global classification over a long tailed rule library. We argue that this weakness is not inherent to templates, but to the learning formulation. We present ConRetroBert, a dual encoder framework that reframes template based retrosynthesis as dense product template retrieval followed by candidate set listwise ranking. Stage 1 uses contrastive pretraining to learn a shared embedding space between products and reaction templates. Stage 2 refines template ranking over mined hard negative candidate sets with a multi positive listwise objective. To enable template side adaptation without destabilizing hard negative mining, ConRetroBert uses a slow moving exponential moving average template encoder for retrieval bank construction while updating the live template encoder through the ranking loss. On the local USPTO-50k benchmark, Stage 2 candidate set ranking improves top-1 reaction accuracy from 50.5% to 61.3%, while EMA stabilized template adaptation further improves it to 62.4%. Fine tuning from a leakage controlled USPTO-Full checkpoint reaches 75.4% top-1 accuracy on USPTO-50k. We also show that retrieval based template prediction is strong in the long tail of rare templates, and that many correct reactant predictions arise from alternative explicit templates rather than only the recorded positive label. Code and data are available at https://github.com/JahidBasher/ConRetroBert.

</details>


### [538] [Predicting Channel Closures in the Lightning Network with Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12759)
*Simone Antonelli,Vincent Davis,Harrison Rush,Anthony Potdevin,Jesse Shrader,Vikash Singh,Emanuele Rossi*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文研究闪电网络（LN）中通道关闭类型的预测问题，发现基于时间行为和节点历史事件的简单MLP模型优于所有基于图结构的方法，并指出LN的隐私特性从根本上限制了从公开gossip数据预测通道关闭的可能性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 闪电网络的单方面强制关闭通道会导致资金长期锁定并降低网络可靠性，因此预测通道关闭类型（相互协商关闭 vs. 强制关闭）对于提高网络可靠性和资金效率具有实际意义。

Method: 将通道关闭类型预测建模为时序链路分类任务，构建两年多的LN活动数据集，对比了从MLP到时序图神经网络（T-GNN）及频谱编码等多种机器学习方法。

Result: 基于边层面特征、节点级别事件计数和时间模式的简单MLP优于所有基于图结构的方法；网络拓扑结构对预测没有额外帮助；预测的主导信号是时间行为特征（节点最近活跃程度和过去关闭历史）。

Conclusion: LN的隐私设计导致关键信息（通道余额、支付流）不可见，从根本上限制了仅从gossip数据预测通道关闭的可行性，简单方法已接近信息上限。

Abstract: The Lightning Network (LN) is a second-layer protocol for Bitcoin designed to enable fast and cost-efficient off-chain transactions. Channels in the LN can be closed either by mutual agreement or unilaterally through a forced closure, which locks the involved capital for an extended period and degrades network reliability. In this paper, we study the problem of predicting channel closure types from publicly available gossip data, framing it as a temporal link classification task over the evolving channel graph. We construct a dataset spanning over two years of LN activity and benchmark a range of machine learning approaches, from MLPs to temporal graph neural networks and spectral encodings. Our experiments reveal that the dominant predictive signals are temporal and behavioural, namely how recently each endpoint was active and the per-node history of past closures, while the surrounding network topology provides no additional benefit. We find that a simple MLP operating on edge-level features, node-level event counts, and temporal patterns outperforms all graph-based approaches, and discuss how the inherent privacy of the LN, where critical information such as channel balances and payment flows remains hidden, fundamentally limits the predictability of closures from gossip data alone. We publicly release the dataset and code at https://github.com/AmbossTech/ln-channel-closure-prediction to encourage further research on this practically relevant task.

</details>


### [539] [Identifying the nonlinear string dynamics with port-Hamiltonian neural networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12785)
*Maximino Linares,Guillaume Doras,Thomas Hélie*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向偏微分方程的Port-Hamiltonian神经网络（PHNN），用于从数据中学习非线性弦动力学，在物理一致性框架下结合了哈密顿力学与深度学习，相比非物理信息方法在精度和可解释性上更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Port-Hamiltonian神经网络（PHNN）主要适用于常微分方程（ODE）系统，但乐器声学等实际场景中的分布参数系统由偏微分方程（PDE）描述，因此需要将PHNN扩展到PDE领域。

Method: 基于Port-Hamiltonian系统理论构建结构化神经网络架构，将物理知识（哈密顿量、耗散项）嵌入网络设计中，实现对PDE描述的非线性弦动力学的学习。

Result: 在合成数据上的数值实验表明，所提出的PHNN模型能够准确识别并模拟非线性弦动力学，在准确性和可解释性方面均优于非物理信息的基线方法。

Conclusion: 将物理知识（PHS）融入神经网络可以有效提升对PDE系统的学习能力，为乐器声学等领域的可解释性建模提供了新途径。

Abstract: Hybrid machine learning combines physical knowledge with data-driven models to enhance interpretability and performance. In this context, Port-Hamiltonian Systems (PHS), which generalize Hamiltonian mechanics to describe open, non-autonomous dynamical systems, have been successfully integrated with neural networks under the name Port-Hamiltonian Neural Networks (PHNNs). While the ability of PHNNs to identify Hamiltonian ordinary differential equation (ODE) systems has already been demonstrated, their application to learning Hamiltonian partial differential equation (PDE) systems remains largely unexplored. This limitation restricts their use in musical acoustics, where instruments are typically modeled as distributed parameter systems governed by PDEs. In this work, we demonstrate how to learn the nonlinear string dynamics from data in a physically-consistent framework through a PHNN extension to PDEs. By constructing structured neural network architectures based on PHS, we can recover both the Hamiltonian governing the string and the dissipation affecting it. This approach outperforms baseline, non-physics-informed methods in terms of both accuracy and interpretability. Numerical experiments using synthetic data demonstrate the ability of the proposed PHNN model to identify and emulate the nonlinear dynamics of the system.

</details>


### [540] [Hessian Matching for Machine-Learned Coarse-Grained Molecular Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12823)
*Sanya Murdeshwar,Sanjit Shashi,Kevin Bachelor,William Noid,Ashwin Lokapally,Razvan Marinescu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种随机Hessian-vector product (HVP)匹配框架，在粗粒度分子动力学模拟中引入二阶曲率信息，相比传统力匹配方法在8/9个蛋白质基准上取得显著改进，最多降低85%的KL散度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的粗粒度神经势能模型仅通过力匹配拟合自由能面的梯度，忽略了曲率（二阶信息），导致动力学行为不准确。

Method: 在力匹配基础上，引入随机Hessian-vector product (HVP)匹配。通过将目标CG Hessian分解为预处理好的模型无关项和在线计算的模型相关协方差校正项，利用随机探针向量构造无偏估计器，高效地注入二阶曲率信息。

Result: 在9个快速折叠蛋白质基准上，HVP匹配在8个蛋白质上优于纯力匹配，最大蛋白质的最慢集体模式上KL散度降低85%。

Conclusion: 高阶物理监督（二阶信息）是构建更准确、更具迁移性的粗粒度势能模型的实用路径。

Abstract: Coarse-grained (CG) molecular dynamics enables simulations of atomic systems such as biomolecules at timescales inaccessible to all-atom (AA) methods, but existing CG neural potentials trained via force matching capture only the gradient of the free-energy surface, leaving its curvature unconstrained. We introduce a framework that augments force matching with stochastic Hessian-vector product (HVP) matching, instilling second-order curvature information into CG potentials without constructing the full Hessian. We derive a decomposition of the target CG Hessian into a model-independent projected AA Hessian, precomputed once before training, and a model-dependent covariance correction computed online at negligible cost. We construct an unbiased stochastic estimator of the Hessian-matching objective by using random probe vectors. We evaluate our method by comparing against force matching on a benchmark of nine fast-folding proteins unseen during training. HVP matching outperforms plain force matching on 8 of 9 proteins on slow-mode metrics, with reductions of up to 85% in the Kullback--Leibler divergence between the CG and reference distributions along the slowest collective mode of the largest protein. Our results demonstrate that higher-order physical supervision is a practical path to more accurate and transferable CG potentials for biomolecular simulation.

</details>


### [541] [IV-ICL: Bounding Causal Effects with Instrumental Variables via In-Context Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12924)
*Vahid Balazadeh,Hamidreza Kamkari,Medha Barath,Ricardo Silva,Rahul G. Krishnan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出IV-ICL，一种基于上下文学习的贝叶斯方法，用于工具变量设置下的因果效应部分识别。它通过优化包容性KL散度直接学习因果效应的边际后验分布，从而恢复整个识别集，比现有方法更可靠、信息更丰富，推理速度快20-500倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统IV部分识别方法存在瓶颈：需要闭式界估计量（如Balke-Pearl方程），且设计准确估计器需要大量人工。直接贝叶斯推断因果效应则计算密集、对先验敏感或后验欠分散。作者希望开发一种无需闭式界、自动高效且能覆盖整个识别集的方法。

Method: 提出IV-ICL（Instrumental Variables - In-Context Learning），一种摊销贝叶斯上下文学习方法。通过优化包容性KL散度（mass-covering objective），直接学习因果效应的边际后验分布，以分位数形式导出边界。与标准变分推断优化独占性KL不同，该方法能恢复整个识别集。

Result: 在合成和半合成IV基准上，IV-ICL生成的区间比高效的半参数方法、贝叶斯方法和插件基线更可靠、信息更丰富，且推理时间降低20-500倍。此外，还提出了一种将随机对照试验转化为IV基准的程序，可保留真实因果效应。

Conclusion: IV-ICL有效解决了IV部分识别中的方法论瓶颈，通过摊销贝叶斯推断和包容性KL优化，实现了无需闭式界的高效、可靠推断，为因果效应部分识别提供了新范式。

Abstract: The instrumental-variables (IV) setting is standard for partial identification of causal effects when unobserved confounding makes point identification impossible. Existing approaches face methodological bottlenecks: closed-form bound estimands are required -- e.g., Balke-Pearl equations in binary IV -- and even when available, designing accurate estimators requires manual effort tailored to each estimand. While direct Bayesian inference of the causal effects, instead of the bounds, circumvents these challenges, it is often computationally intensive and suffers from high prior sensitivity or under-dispersed posteriors. As a remedy, we introduce IV-ICL, an amortized Bayesian in-context learning method that learns the marginal posterior distribution of the causal effects directly and derives bounds as its quantiles. Unlike standard variational inference that optimizes exclusive KL divergence, amortized Bayesian inference minimizes the expected inclusive KL, a mass-covering objective. We empirically observe that optimizing inclusive KL can recover the entire identified set across diverse data-generating processes, while exclusive-KL (e.g. with variational inference) of the same Bayesian formulation collapses onto a single mode and fails to cover the identified set. We evaluate IV-ICL on synthetic and semi-synthetic IV benchmarks and show it produces intervals that are more reliably valid and more informative compared to efficient semi-parametric, Bayesian, and plug-in baselines, at 20-500x lower inference time. Beyond methodology, we propose a procedure to convert randomized controlled trials into IV benchmarks with provably preserved ground-truth causal effects that enables a more realistic evaluation of partial-identification methods.

</details>


### [542] [Decision Tree Learning on Product Spaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12983)
*Arshia Soltani Moakahr,Faraz Ghahremani,Kiarash Banihashem,MohammadTaghi Hajiaghayi*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文将决策树贪心算法的理论分析从均匀分布推广到更一般的乘积分布，并给出了近似误差保证。主要结果表明，对于最优决策树，贪心启发式算法构建的ε-近似树的大小受指数级上界约束。此外，还提出了一种无需先验参数的自适应算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 决策树贪心算法在实际中广泛应用，但其理论分析长期局限于均匀分布。本文旨在将理论保证推广到更一般、更符合实际的乘积分布场景，填补理论与实践的鸿沟。

Method: 本文扩展了Blanc等人的理论分析框架，将分布假设从均匀分布放宽到任意乘积分布；同时设计了一种参数自适应的贪心算法，无需预先知道最优树的大小或深度。

Result: 主要结果：对任意可由最优决策树（规模s、最大深度D_opt、平均深度Δ_opt）计算的函数f，贪心算法构建的ε-近似树的大小上界为exp(Δ_opt D_opt log(e/ε))。在最优树为满二叉树时，该界优于Blanc等人的结果，且适用于更广的分布类。

Conclusion: 本文成功将决策树贪心算法的理论分析从均匀分布推广到乘积分布，并提出了更实用的无参数方法。该工作有助于深化对贪心算法的理论理解，并为实际应用提供更坚实的理论基础。

Abstract: Decision tree learning has long been a central topic in theoretical computer science, driven by its practical importance. A fundamental and widely used method for decision tree construction is the top-down greedy heuristic, which recursively splits on the most influential variable. Despite its empirical success, theoretical analysis of this heuristic has been limited. A recent breakthrough by Blanc et al. (ITCS, 2020) provided the first rigorous theoretical guarantees for the greedy approach, but only under the uniform distribution. We extend this analysis to the more general and practically relevant setting of arbitrary product distributions. Our main result shows that for any function $f$ computable by an optimal decision tree of size $s$, maximum depth $D_{\text{opt}}$, and average depth $Δ_{\text{opt}}$, the greedy heuristic constructs an $ε$-approximating tree whose size grows at most with $\exp\bigl(Δ_{\text{opt}} D_{\text{opt}} \log(e/ε)\bigr)$. In the special case where the optimal tree is a full binary tree, this bound improves upon the bound of Blanc et al. and holds under a strictly broader class of distributions. Moreover, we present an algorithm based on the top-down greedy heuristic that is entirely parameter-free -- it requires no prior knowledge of the optimal tree's size or depth -- offering a practical advantage over Blanc et al.'s method.

</details>


### [543] [What Information Matters? Graph Out-of-Distribution Detection via Tri-Component Information Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13032)
*Danny Wang,Ruihong Qiu,Zi Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Tide框架，通过三组件信息分解（特征特定、结构特定、联合成分）来过滤虚假信号，结合信息瓶颈目标提升图神经网络在分布外检测中的性能，在7个数据集上FPR95提升最高达34%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 图神经网络在节点分类中容易受到特征和结构的分布外偏移影响，标准监督学习会捕获特征和/或结构中的虚假信号，导致模型在分布变化下表现脆弱。

Method: 提出Tri-Component Information Decomposition (Tide)框架，将信息显式分解为特征特定、结构特定和联合三部分，保留联合信息中与标签相关的部分，过滤特征和结构的虚假信号，并采用信息瓶颈目标替代标准监督学习。

Result: 在7个数据集上，Tide在FPR95指标上相比强基线提升最高达34%，同时保持具有竞争力的ID准确率。

Conclusion: 信息瓶颈目标比标准监督学习更适合图OOD检测，能提供更高的ID置信度和更大的ID与OOD数据间的熵差距；所提分解框架能有效增强ID和OOD节点的区分。

Abstract: Graph neural networks are widely used for node classification, but they remain vulnerable to out-of-distribution (OOD) shifts in node features and graph structure. Prior work established that methods trained with standard supervised learning (SL) objectives tend to capture spurious signals from either features and/or structure, leaving the model fragile under distributional changes. To address this, we propose textscTide, a textbfnovel and effective underlineTri-Component underlineInformation underlineDecomposition framework that textbfexplicitly decomposes information into textitfeature-specific, structure-specific and joint components. textscTide aims to textbfpreserve only the label-relevant part of the joint information while textbffiltering out spurious feature- and structure-specific information, thereby enhancing the separation between in-distribution (ID) and OOD nodes. Beyond the framework, we provide theoretical and empirical analyses showing that an information bottleneck objective is preferable to standard SL for graph OOD detection, with higher ID confidence and a greater entropy gap between ID and OOD data. Extensive experiments across seven datasets confirm the efficacy of textscTide, achieving up to a 34% improvement in FPR95 over strong baselines while maintaining competitive ID accuracy.

</details>


### [544] [Local Inverse Geometry Can Be Amortized](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13068)
*Aaditya L. Kachhadiya*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Deceptron，一种为非线性逆问题设计的双向代理模型，通过Jacobian Composition Penalty (JCP)训练反向Jacobian作为前向Jacobian的局部左逆，并基于此构建D-IPG迭代求解器，在多个PDE逆问题基准上以77倍更低的推理成本达到或超越经典方法性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非线性逆问题中，一阶方法计算成本低但效果脆弱，曲率感知方法（如Gauss-Newton/LMA）效果好但需反复求解Jacobian线性化系统。作者希望将局部逆几何信息摊销为可复用的反向算子，从而兼顾效率与效果。

Method: 提出Deceptron框架：1) 学习一个双向代理模型；2) 通过Jacobian Composition Penalty (JCP)训练反向Jacobian成为前向Jacobian的局部左逆；3) 提出D-IPG迭代求解器，利用残差校正的测量空间提案回溯到潜在空间；4) 运行时通过RJCP监控逆一致性误差。

Result: 在7个PDE逆问题基准上，D-IPG超越标准基线方法，在六问题可靠性测试套件中达到94.8%的平均成功率，在主要基准上以高达77倍更低的推理成本达到相当或更好的恢复质量。

Conclusion: 本文证明了D-IPG在局部伪逆一致性条件下等价于阻尼Gauss-Newton的一阶形式，偏差由组合误差和条件数控制。该方法有效摊销了逆问题的局部几何信息，显著降低了推理成本。

Abstract: Nonlinear inverse problems often trade inexpensive but fragile first-order updates against curvature-aware methods such as Gauss-Newton and Levenberg-Marquardt, which obtain stronger directions by repeatedly solving Jacobian-based linearized systems. We propose a learned alternative: amortize local inverse geometry into a reusable reverse operator. Our framework learns a bidirectional surrogate, Deceptron, and deploys it through D-IPG (Deceptron Inverse-Preconditioned Gradient), an iterative solver that pulls residual-corrected measurement-space proposals back to latent space. The key mechanism is a Jacobian Composition Penalty (JCP), which trains the reverse Jacobian to act as a local left inverse of the forward Jacobian; its runtime counterpart, RJCP, measures the same inverse-consistency error along optimization trajectories. We prove that D-IPG is first-order equivalent to damped Gauss-Newton under local pseudoinverse consistency, with deviation controlled by composition error and conditioning. Across seven PDE inverse-problem benchmarks, D-IPG outperforms standard baselines, achieves 94.8% mean success across the six-problem reliability suite, and reaches comparable or better recovery quality at up to 77x lower inference-time solve cost on the main benchmarks.

</details>


### [545] [Bayesian Nonparametric Mixed-Effect ODEs with Gaussian Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13088)
*Julien Martinelli,Maksim Sinelnikov,Harri Lähdesmäki,Quentin Clairon,Mélanie Prague*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出MEGPODE，一个贝叶斯非参数混合效应ODE模型，用高斯过程先验分解群体共享动态和个体特异偏差，并通过状态空间GP轨迹先验与虚拟搭配观测实现高效训练，在异质性ODE基准上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典非线性混合效应ODE模型依赖参数化向量场，容易因结构误设定和未建模机制而导致预测偏差；现有非参数ODE方法通常假设单一共享动态系统，缺乏明确的混合效应层次结构来处理异质性。

Method: 将每个个体的向量场分解为共享群体成分和个体特异偏差，两者均赋予高斯过程先验；结合状态空间GP轨迹先验与虚拟搭配观测，通过卡尔曼平滑更新轨迹并得到向量场的闭式回归，避免了对每个个体重复求解ODE。

Result: 在振荡、生物医学系统等多个异质性ODE基准上，MEGPODE在群体场恢复和个体水平轨迹预测方面均优于强基线方法。

Conclusion: MEGPODE为异质性动态系统建模提供了兼具非参数灵活性和贝叶斯不确定性量化的有效框架，可推广到更多科学领域。

Abstract: Dynamical modelling is central to many scientific domains, including pharmacometrics, systems biology, physiology, and epidemiology. In these settings, heterogeneity is often intrinsic: different subjects or units follow related but distinct continuous-time dynamics. Classical nonlinear mixed-effects Ordinary Differential Equation (ODE) models address this by combining population-level structure with subject-specific effects, but they rely on a parametric vector field and are therefore vulnerable to structural misspecification and unmodelled mechanisms. This motivates nonparametric approaches that can retain principled uncertainty quantification, yet existing nonparametric ODE methods typically assume a single shared dynamical system rather than an explicit mixed-effect hierarchy over subject-specific dynamics. We propose MEGPODE, a Bayesian nonparametric mixed-effect ODE model in which each subject's vector field is decomposed into a shared population component and a subject-specific deviation, both endowed with Gaussian process (GP) priors. To avoid repeated ODE solves per subject during training, we combine state-space GP trajectory priors with virtual collocation observations, yielding Kalman-smoothing trajectory updates and closed-form regressions for the vector fields. Across controlled heterogeneous ODE benchmarks spanning oscillatory, biomedical systems, MEGPODE improves population-field recovery and subject-level trajectory prediction relative to strong baselines.

</details>


### [546] [MLGIB: Multi-Label Graph Information Bottleneck for Expressive and Robust Message Passing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13126)
*Chaokai Wu,Haofu Shi,Ningxuan Ma,Jianghong Ma,Xiaofeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出多标签图信息瓶颈（MLGIB），旨在解决深度消息传递中因过压缩导致的多标签图噪声干扰问题，通过最大化与目标标签的互信息并约束冗余信息，构建端到端的标签感知消息传递架构，实验验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GNN在深度消息传递中存在过压缩问题，而在多标签图上这一问题尤为严重：邻居节点共享标签有限，大量不相关标签信息作为噪声稀释了预测信号，导致模型表现下降。

Method: 提出MLGIB框架，将多标签消息传递建模为受约束的信息传输过程，构建马尔可夫依赖空间并推导可处理的变分上下界：下界最大化与目标标签的互信息，上界约束冗余源信息，进而设计出标签感知的消息传递架构。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法一致性地优于现有方法，验证了框架的有效性和泛化能力。

Conclusion: MLGIB通过信息瓶颈原理有效缓解了多标签图中的标签噪声稀释问题，为多标签GNN提供了一种兼具表达力与鲁棒性的通用解决方案。

Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) suffer from over-squashing in deep message passing, where information from exponentially growing neighborhoods is compressed into fixed-dimensional representations. We show that this issue becomes a distinct failure mode in multi-label graphs: neighboring nodes often share only limited labels while differing across many irrelevant ones, causing predictive signals to be diluted by noisy label information. To address this challenge, we propose the Multi-Label Graph Information Bottleneck (MLGIB), which formulates multi-label message passing as constrained information transmission under irrelevant label noise. MLGIB balances expressiveness and robustness by preserving predictive label signals while suppressing irrelevant noise. Specifically, it constructs a Markovian dependence space and derives tractable variational bounds, where the lower bound maximizes mutual information with target labels and the upper bound constrains redundant source information. These bounds lead to an end-to-end label-aware message-passing architecture. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over existing methods, validating the effectiveness and generality of the proposed framework.

</details>


### [547] [KAST-BAR: Knowledge-Anchored Semantically-Dynamic Topology Brain Autoregressive Modeling for Universal Neural Interpretation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13133)
*Haoning Wang,Wenchao Yang,Shuai Shen,Yang Li*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出KAST-BAR模型，通过双流分层注意力编码器建模脑电时空拓扑，结合知识锚定语义剖析器和文本感知精炼器，在21个数据集上预训练，实现跨6个下游任务的SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有EEG基础模型未能有效建模复杂的时空拓扑结构，且低-level生理信号与高-level文本语义之间存在模态鸿沟。

Method: 1) 双流分层注意力(DSHA)编码器捕获局部时间动态与全局空间上下文；2) 知识锚定语义剖析器(KASP)生成物理层与实例层文本描述；3) 语义文本感知精炼器(STAR)通过潜在专家查询动态重构EEG表征。

Result: 在21个数据集上进行大规模预训练，在6个下游任务上取得一致的最优性能。

Conclusion: KAST-BAR有效将专家级医学知识融入EEG信号表征，证明了知识锚定语义动态拓扑建模的有效性。

Abstract: While EEG foundation models have shown significant potential in universal neural decoding across tasks, their advancement remains constrained by the inadequacy modeling of complex spatiotemporal topology, as well as the inherent modality gap between low-level physiological signals and high-level textual semantics. To address these challenges, we propose a Knowledge-Anchored Semantically-Dynamic Topology Brain Autoregressive Model (KAST-BAR), which dynamically aligns physiological representations derived from multi-level brain topology with an expert-level semantic space. Specifically, we design a Dual-Stream Hierarchical Attention (DSHA) encoder that accurately captures the brain's intrinsic non-Euclidean topology by modeling local temporal dynamics with global spatial contexts. On this basis, a Knowledge-Anchored Semantic Profiler (KASP) is proposed to synthesize physically-grounded and instance-level textual profiles, which subsequently drive a Semantic Text-Aware Refiner (STAR) to dynamically reconstruct EEG representations using Latent Expert Queries. By conducting large-scale pre-training on 21 diverse datasets to build a foundation model, KAST-BAR effectively integrates expert-level medical knowledge into EEG signal representations, consistently achieving superior performance across six downstream tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/KAST-BAR/KAST-BAR

</details>


### [548] [Collaborating in Multi-Armed Bandits with Strategic Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13145)
*Idan Barnea,Ofir Schlisselberg,Yishay Mansour*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了多智能体贝叶斯强盗问题中的协作学习，提出CAOS机制，通过信息共享维持战略智能体之间的合作，实现接近完全协作系统的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决多智能体多臂老虎机中战略智能体的搭便车问题，在长期参与场景下通过纯信息共享机制（无货币转移）维持协作探索。

Method: 提出CAOS机制，将协作探索设计为纳什均衡，通过信息共享而非货币转移来激励长期参与的战略智能体进行合作。

Result: CAOS机制能够维持合作作为纳什均衡，且遗憾界接近完全协作系统的性能。

Conclusion: 即使没有货币转移，纯信息共享机制也足以维持多智能体在长期贝叶斯强盗问题中的协作探索。

Abstract: We study collaborative learning in multi-agent Bayesian bandit problems, where strategic agents collectively solve the same bandit instance. While multiple agents can accelerate learning by sharing information, strategic agents might prefer to free-ride and avoid exploration. We consider a setting with persistent agents that participate in multiple time periods. This is in contrast to most previous works on incentives in multi-agent MAB, which assume short-lived agents, namely each agent has a single decision to make and optimizes their expected reward in that single decision. As in the multi-agent MAB model with incentives, our model does not have monetary transfers, and the only incentives are through information sharing.
  We propose \texttt{CAOS}, a mechanism that sustains collaboration as a Nash equilibrium while achieving strong regret guarantees. Our results demonstrate that collaborative exploration can be sustained purely through information sharing, achieving performance close to that of fully cooperative systems despite strategic behavior.

</details>


### [549] [ECG-NAT: A Self-supervised Neighborhood Attention Transformer for Multi-lead Electrocardiogram Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13194)
*Mahsa Gazeran,Sayvan Soleymanbaigi,Fatemeh Daneshfar,Amjad Seyedi,Fardin Akhlaghian Tab*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出ECG-NAT，一种自监督学习框架，结合掩码自编码器预训练和对比学习微调，利用邻域注意力Transformer高效提取心电信号的多尺度时空特征，在仅用1%标签数据时达到88.1%准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ECG心律失常分类方法存在以下问题：(1) 信号噪声大、标注数据有限；(2) 自监督方法要么关注全局上下文特征，要么关注局部形态模式，缺乏层次化多尺度特征提取；(3) 需要在准确性和计算效率之间取得平衡。本文旨在设计一个既能同时捕获细粒度搏动级形态和更宽泛节律级依赖、又具有计算效率的架构。

Method: 两阶段自监督学习方法：(1) 生成式预训练——使用掩码自编码器在多个不同数据集上重建被部分遮蔽的ECG信号，学习鲁棒的域不变表示；(2) 判别式微调——结合监督对比损失和交叉熵损失的双损失函数。核心架构采用邻域注意力Transformer（NAT），通过层次化注意力机制高效捕获从局部搏动形态到全局节律模式的多尺度时序特征。

Result: 在基准数据集上达到88.1%准确率（仅用1%标注数据），在低资源场景下表现出强有效性，同时保持计算效率，适合实时ECG诊断。

Conclusion: ECG-NAT通过层次化邻域注意力Transformer与两阶段自监督学习相结合，有效解决了ECG分类中多尺度特征提取和标签稀缺问题，在性能和效率之间取得了良好平衡，为实时心电诊断提供了实用方案。

Abstract: Electrocardiogram (ECG) arrhythmia classification remains challenging due to signal variability, noise, limited labeled data, and the difficulty in achieving both accuracy and efficiency in models. While self-supervised learning reduces label dependency, most methods target either global contextual features or local morphological patterns, but rarely implement hierarchical multi-scale feature extraction. ECG signals require architectures that simultaneously capture fine-grained beat-level morphology and broader rhythm-level dependencies with computational efficiency. To overcome this limitation, this paper proposes the Electrocardiogram Neighborhood Attention Transformer (ECG-NAT), a novel self-supervised learning approach tailored for multi-lead ECG classification. Our two-stage approach begins with generative pretraining, using a masked autoencoder to reconstruct partially masked ECG signals across multiple diverse datasets, enabling the model to learn robust, domain-invariant representations from unlabeled data. This is followed by discriminative fine-tuning with a dual-loss function that combines supervised contrastive and cross-entropy losses, aligning representation learning with label prediction. The hierarchical attention mechanism efficiently captures multi-scale temporal features from localized beat morphology to broader rhythm patterns at low computational cost. ECG-NAT achieves robust performance on benchmark datasets, with 88.1\% accuracy using only 1\% labeled data, demonstrating strong efficacy in low-resource settings. The framework combines superior classification performance with computational efficiency, making it practical for real-time ECG diagnosis. The code will be made available upon acceptance at: https://github.com/Mahsagazeran/ECG-NAT.

</details>


### [550] [Switching Successor Measures for Hierarchical Zero-shot Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13207)
*Stefan Stojanovic,Alexandre Proutiere*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出切换后继测度（Switching Successor Measures），将传统后继测度扩展到分层强化学习，实现零样本层次化控制，无需额外监督、固定时间跨度或手动设计子目标。提出FB π-Switch算法，从FB表征中同时提取高层子目标选择策略和底层控制策略，实验表明该方法在目标导向和通用奖励任务上均优于非分层基线，并匹配最先进的分层方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分层强化学习方法多依赖固定时间抽象或目标条件目标函数，这限制了它们在通用奖励函数上的应用，难以推广到非目标导向任务。本文旨在突破这一限制，构建更灵活的分层强化学习框架。

Method: 提出切换后继测度（Switching Successor Measures），将经典后继测度理论扩展至分层零样本强化学习；在此基础上设计FB π-Switch算法，利用前向后向（FB）表征同时学习高层子目标选择策略和底层控制策略，使分层行为从单一学习表征中自然涌现。

Result: 在目标导向和通用奖励任务上，FB π-Switch优于非分层基线；在目标导向场景中，性能匹配当前最先进的分层方法。

Conclusion: 结构化后继表征为超越目标导向任务的分层零样本强化学习提供了灵活的基础，展示了该方法在通用决策问题中的潜力。

Abstract: Hierarchical reinforcement learning can improve generalization by decomposing long-horizon decision-making into simpler subproblems. However, existing approaches often rely on restrictive design choices, such as fixed temporal abstractions or goal-conditioned objectives, which largely confine them to goal-reaching tasks and limit their applicability to general reward functions. In this paper, we introduce switching successor measures, an extension of successor measures that enables hierarchical control in zero-shot reinforcement learning without additional supervision, fixed horizons, or manually designed subgoals. We show that switching successor measures arise naturally from classical successor measures while preserving their underlying structure. Building on this result, we propose FB $π$-Switch, an algorithm that extracts both a high-level subgoal-selection policy and a low-level control policy directly from forward-backward (FB) representations, allowing hierarchical behavior to emerge from a single learned representation. Experiments on both goal-conditioned and general reward-based tasks show that FB $π$-Switch improves over non-hierarchical baselines and matches state-of-the-art hierarchical methods in goal-conditioned settings. These results demonstrate that structured successor representations provide a flexible foundation for hierarchical zero-shot reinforcement learning beyond goal-reaching tasks. Our project website is available at: https://stestokth.github.io/switching-successors/.

</details>


### [551] [Unified generalization analysis for physics informed neural networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13260)
*Yuka Hashimoto,Tomoharu Iwata*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文针对物理信息神经网络（PINNs）及其变分形式（VPINNs），提出了统一的泛化理论分析框架。通过泰勒展开将非线性微分算子转化为高维空间上的线性算子，利用Koopman分析证明高秩网络在涉及微分算子的设置中也能良好泛化，并揭示了微分算子非线性会指数级放大泛化界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的PINNs和VPINNs泛化分析存在局限，往往需要稳定性条件或线性椭圆性等严格假设，缺乏统一且宽松的理论框架来理解这类网络的泛化行为。

Method: 利用泰勒展开将非线性微分算子表示为高维空间上的线性算子，引入Koopman算子理论进行分析，从而统一分析PINNs和VPINNs的泛化误差界。

Result: 证明了高秩网络在涉及微分算子的场景下仍能良好泛化；同时发现微分算子的非线性程度会指数级放大泛化界。

Conclusion: 为PINNs和VPINNs提供了更通用的泛化理论，揭示了微分算子非线性对泛化的显著影响，对设计更稳定的物理信息神经网络具有指导意义。

Abstract: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) and their variational counterparts (VPINNs) are neural networks that incorporate physical laws, making them useful for scientific problems. Existing generalization analyses for PINNs and VPINNs remain limited, often requiring restrictive assumptions such as stability conditions or linear ellipticity. In this paper, we derive generalization bounds for neural networks that involve differentiation with respect to input variables, covering PINNs and VPINNs under a unified framework. We apply Taylor expansion to represent nonlinear differential operators as linear operators on a high-dimensional space, enabling the use of Koopman-based analysis and showing that high-rank networks can generalize well even in settings involving differential operators. We also show that the nonlinearity of the differential operator exponentially enlarges the bound, highlighting its significant impact on generalization.

</details>


### [552] [Supervised Deep Multimodal Matrix Factorization for Interpretable Brain Network Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13312)
*Amjad Seyedi,Lifang He,Songlin Zhao,Akwum Onwunta,Nicolas Gillis*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出SD3MF框架，将无监督的单图聚类扩展为有监督的多模态图群体预测，通过深度层次分解和共享潜在表示实现可解释的大脑网络分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大脑网络分析方法缺乏对多模态数据的可解释性整合与监督预测能力，亟需一个既能融合多模态信息、又能提供可解释特征的统一框架。

Method: 基于对称非负矩阵三因子分解，为每个模态学习深度层次分解，通过编码器-解码器结构联合优化图重构和监督预测，并引入自适应权重实现数据驱动的多模态融合。

Result: 在多模态连接组数据集上，SD3MF优于CNN和GNN等强深度学习基线，并能提供生物学可解释的洞察。

Conclusion: SD3MF成功将可解释性与监督预测能力结合，为多模态脑网络分析提供了有效且可解释的解决方案。

Abstract: We present Supervised Deep Multimodal Matrix Factorization (SD3MF), an interpretable framework for integrative brain network analysis that generalizes Symmetric Nonnegative Matrix Tri-Factorization (SNMTF) from unsupervised single-graph clustering to supervised prediction over populations of multimodal graphs. SD3MF learns deep hierarchical factorizations for each modality together with a shared latent representation that aligns subjects across views. An encoder-decoder formulation jointly optimizes graph reconstruction and supervised prediction, while adaptive weights enable data-driven multimodal fusion. By representing each subject through community-level interaction matrices, the model yields interpretable and discriminative features. Experiments on multimodal connectome datasets show that SD3MF consistently outperforms strong deep learning baselines such as CNNs and GNNs, while enabling biologically interpretable insights. Code for reproducibility is available at: https://github.com/amjadseyedi/SD3MF.

</details>


### [553] [Trajectory-Level Data Augmentation for Offline Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13401)
*Tobias Schmähling,Matthias Burkhardt,Tobias Windisch*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种针对离线强化学习的数据增强方法，专门用于主动定位问题。通过在轨迹层面进行增强，利用奖励、价值函数和日志策略的几何关系，在有限次优轨迹下提升Offline RL性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线强化学习面临数据稀缺和次优轨迹质量低的问题，现有方法难以从有限次优数据中有效学习，因此需要一种能利用任务结构进行数据增强的方法。

Method: 提出轨迹级数据增强技术，利用任务结构以及奖励、价值函数与日志策略数学性质之间的几何关系，在数据收集阶段支持次优日志策略，提升数据质量。

Result: 在多种维度的定位任务以及部分可观测条件下，该方法有效提升了离线强化学习性能。

Conclusion: 该数据增强方法能从有限次优轨迹中有效提升Offline RL性能，理论分析和实验验证均支持其有效性。

Abstract: We propose a data augmentation method for offline reinforcement learning, motivated by active positioning problems. Particularly, our approach enables the training of off-policy models from a limited number of suboptimal trajectories. We introduce a trajectory-based augmentation technique that exploits task structure and the geometric relationship between rewards, value functions, and mathematical properties of logging policies. During data collection, our augmentation supports suboptimal logging policies, leading to higher data quality and improved offline reinforcement learning performance. We provide theoretical justification for these strategies and validate them empirically across positioning tasks of varying dimensionality and under partial observability.

</details>


### [554] [Uncertainty-Aware Prediction of Lung Tumor Growth from Sparse Longitudinal CT Data via Bayesian Physics-Informed Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13560)
*Lingfei Kong,Haoran Ma*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种贝叶斯物理信息神经网络，结合Gompertz生长动力学和低维贝叶斯推断，用于从稀疏、不规则的CT观测数据中预测肺肿瘤生长，并在30名患者数据上验证了其不确定性量化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决稀疏、不规则纵向CT观测下肺肿瘤生长预测问题，同时提供校准的不确定性估计，弥补确定性建模方法无法量化不确定性的不足。

Method: 将Gompertz生长动力学融入贝叶斯物理信息神经网络，在log-体积域进行低维贝叶斯推断，采用两阶段推断策略：最大后验估计（MAP）结合哈密顿蒙特卡洛（HMC）采样。

Result: 在30名NLST患者数据上，模型log空间RMSE约0.20，95%可信区间覆盖率良好，捕获了异质性肿瘤生长模式，并提供了校准的不确定性估计。

Conclusion: 贝叶斯物理信息建模在仅有少量纵向随访扫描时，可用于不确定性感知的肿瘤生长评估。

Abstract: This work studies lung tumor growth prediction from sparse and irregular longitudinal computed tomography (CT) observations with measurement variability. A Bayesian physics-informed neural network is developed by combining Gompertz growth dynamics with low-dimensional Bayesian inference in the log-volume domain. The framework employs a two-stage inference strategy combining maximum a posteriori (MAP) estimation and Hamiltonian Monte Carlo (HMC) sampling to estimate posterior predictive distributions and uncertainty intervals. The method was evaluated on longitudinal data from the National Lung Screening Trial (30 patients). Results show that the model captures heterogeneous tumor growth patterns while maintaining reasonable prediction accuracy under limited observations. Compared with deterministic modeling approaches, the proposed approach additionally provides calibrated uncertainty estimates. The inferred posterior parameter correlations were consistent with expected biological growth behavior. The proposed framework achieved a cohort-level log-space RMSE of approximately 0.20 together with well-calibrated 95% credible interval coverage across 30 patients. These findings suggest that Bayesian physics-informed modeling may be useful for uncertainty-aware tumor growth assessment when only limited longitudinal follow-up scans are available.

</details>


### [555] [Rethinking Generalization in Graph Neural Networks: A Structural Complexity Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13597)
*Peiyao Wang,Liang Bai,Xian Yang,Richard Yi Da Xu,Jiye Liang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了图结构对GNN泛化能力的影响，证明边缘过密会导致过拟合，并提出基于有效边数的结构复杂度度量及结构熵正则化方法以提升泛化性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GNN泛化分析主要关注模型复杂度，忽视了图结构本身的根本作用。作者旨在回答：图结构是否真正影响泛化？影响程度多大？

Method: 1) 理论证明：纳入更多边会使输入表示过度适应输出模型，导致过拟合；2) 提出基于有效边数的结构复杂度度量；3) 推导基于Rademacher复杂度的泛化界；4) 提出结构熵正则化方法，通过调控有效边数平衡欠拟合与过拟合。

Result: 证明了GNN泛化不仅依赖传统参数因素，还显式依赖于结构复杂度。结构熵正则化方法可有效改善泛化性能。

Conclusion: 图结构是影响GNN泛化的关键因素，控制结构复杂度有助于提升泛化性能。

Abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have emerged as a fundamental tool for learning from graph-structured data, achieving strong performance across a wide range of applications. However, understanding their generalization capabilities remains challenging due to the complex structural dependencies inherent in such data. Existing generalization analyses largely follow the classical machine learning paradigm, focusing primarily on model complexity while overlooking the fundamental role of graph structure. Therefore, in this work, we systematically investigate this role by asking: does the graph structure actually influence generalization, and if so, by how much? To answer the first question and validate our intuition, we theoretically prove that incorporating more edges into the prediction process transforms the input representations to be overly accommodating to the output model, thereby inducing overfitting. To address the second question, we formulate a structural complexity measure based on the number of effective edges and derive a Rademacher complexity-based generalization bound. In doing so, we demonstrate that GNN generalization depends explicitly on structural complexity, alongside traditional parameter-dependent factors. Motivated by these theoretical findings, we propose a structural entropy regularization method. This approach controls structural complexity by regulating effective edges to balance underfitting and overfitting, ultimately improving the generalization performance of GNNs.

</details>


### [556] [Graph Neural Networks with Triangle-Based Messages for the Multicut Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13673)
*Jannik Irmai,Lucas Fabian Naumann,Bjoern Andres*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文针对NP难的multicut问题，提出了一种专门适配的图神经网络架构（仅边特征、基于三角形的消息传递），在最多200节点的合成和真实实例上，解质量优于现有启发式求解器，且能在数秒内找到最优解（而精确求解器需要数小时）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图神经网络对multicut问题的适配不足，未能充分利用其特殊的 objective function 和约束条件。

Method: 提出一种新的图神经网络架构：特征仅分配给边，消息计算基于图中的三角形结构。

Result: 在合成和真实实例（最多200节点）上，解质量优于state-of-the-art启发式求解器，运行时间可行；部分实例可在数秒内找到最优解。

Conclusion: 专门针对multicut问题设计的图神经网络能显著提升求解质量，兼顾效率。

Abstract: The multicut problem is an NP-hard combinatorial optimization problem with diverse applications in fields such as bioinformatics, data mining and computer vision. Graph neural networks have been defined for the multicut problem but can be adapted further to its specific objective function and constraints. In this article, we introduce such an adapted graph neural network architecture in which features are assigned only to edges, and the computation of messages is based on triangles in the underlying graph. Experiments with synthetic and real-world instances with up to 200 nodes show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art heuristic solvers in terms of solution quality while maintaining feasible runtimes. For some instances, our method finds optimal solutions in seconds whereas exact solvers need hours to find and certify optimal solutions.

</details>


### [557] [Scale-Sensitive Shattering: Learnability and Evaluability at Optimal Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13684)
*Shashaank Aiyer,Yishay Mansour,Shay Moran,Han Shao,Tom Waknine*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了实值函数类在不同尺度下的uniform convergence和可学习性，建立了PAC学习基本定理的尺度敏感推广，证明了在γ尺度下的uniform convergence、γ/2尺度下的agnostic learnability以及每个更大尺度下fat-shattering维数的有限性三者等价，并解决了多个开放问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决Anthony和Bartlett（1999）提出的关于控制可学习性的精确尺度问题，反驳Phil Long关于2倍乘法因子差距不可避免的猜想，并改进Bartlett和Long（1998）的上界。同时解决Alon et al.（1997）和Rudelson & Vershynin（2006）的开放问题。

Method: 关键技巧是直接对经验ℓ∞覆盖数进行界估计，绕过了标准的使用打包数的绕路。通过这种直接方法，获得了以fat-shattering尺度γ为参数的渐近度量熵界：在γ/2尺度下得到O(log² n)界，在2γ尺度下得到O(log n)界。

Result: 建立了实值函数类在不同尺度下uniform convergence、agnostic learnability和fat-shattering维数有限性三者的等价关系（无2倍因子损失）。获得了sharp的渐近度量熵界，并证明了O(log² n)界有时是紧的。作为应用，对有界积分概率度量建立了sharp二分法：要么可估计，要么不能在c<3的乘法因子内弱评估，而3-弱评估总是成立。

Conclusion: 本文是学习理论中关于实值函数类尺度敏感学习性的重要理论突破，解决了多个长期开放的猜想和问题，并指出了定量样本复杂度和可评估性方面的若干开放问题。

Abstract: We study the optimal scale at which real-valued function classes exhibit uniform convergence and learnability. Our main result establishes a scale-sensitive generalization of the fundamental theorem of PAC learning: for every bounded real-valued class and every $γ>0$, uniform convergence at scale $γ$, agnostic learnability at scale $γ/2$, and finiteness of the fat-shattering dimension at every scale $γ'>γ$ are equivalent. This resolves a question by Anthony and Bartlett (Cambridge Univ. Press 1999) on the precise scales governing learnability, refuting a conjecture attributed there to Phil Long that a multiplicative 2-factor gap is unavoidable, and improves the upper bounds of Bartlett and Long (JCSS 1998), which incur such a loss.
  The key technical ingredient is a direct bound on empirical $\ell_\infty$ covering numbers, avoiding the standard detour through packing numbers. As a consequence, we obtain sharp asymptotic metric-entropy bounds in terms of the fat-shattering scale $γ$: an $O(\log^2 n)$ bound holds already at scale $γ/2$, while an $O(\log n)$ bound holds at scale $2γ$. We further show that the $O(\log^2 n)$ bound is sometimes tight. These results resolve open questions by Alon et al. (JACM 1997) and Rudelson and Vershynin (Ann. of Math. 2006).
  As an application, we establish a sharp dichotomy for bounded integral probability metrics: every such IPM is either estimable or cannot be weakly evaluated within any multiplicative factor $c<3$, while $3$-weak evaluability always holds, resolving an open question from Aiyer et al. (ICML 2026). We also highlight several open questions on quantitative sample complexity and evaluability.

</details>


### [558] [Polyhedral Instability Governs Regret in Online Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13692)
*Yuetai Li,Fengqing Jiang,Yichen Feng,Kaiyuan Zheng,Luyao Niu,Bhaskar Ramasubramanian,Basel Alomair,Linda Bushnell,Radha Poovendran*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了组合动作空间在线决策问题的后悔界，提出由"多面体不稳定性"（活跃区域切换次数）决定的遗憾上界，在完全信息反馈下实现了专家算法与维度相关OCO率之间的插值，并在在线子模-凹博弈中通过置换切换次数获得匹配的后悔界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 组合动作空间的在线决策问题通常通过凸松弛（如Lovász凸化）转化为在线凸优化问题，但现有理论未能充分解释"问题结构复杂度"（而非单纯维度）如何影响后悔界。作者希望从多面体结构的视角，用活跃区域切换次数来刻画问题难度。

Method: 利用多面体分段线性目标函数的几何结构，定义"区域切换次数"RS_T作为不稳定性度量；在完全信息反馈和固定划分假设下，推导出后悔界Θ(√((1+RS_T) T log V_max))。对于子模-凹博弈，将RS_T简化为置换切换次数SC_T，获得匹配的Θ(√((1+SC_T) T log n))后悔界。

Result: 理论上证明了后悔界与区域切换次数RS_T的平方根关系，在低不稳定性场景（RS_T小）下退化为专家的对数维度率，在高不稳定性下退化为维度相关OCO率。实验（最短路径、影响力最大化）验证了该理论预测，表明低不稳定场景在实际问题中可以出现。

Conclusion: 组合动作空间的在线决策问题中，后悔的主要驱动因素是"多面体不稳定性"而非简单的问题维度，这为设计更高效的算法提供了新视角。

Abstract: Many online decision problems over combinatorial actions are addressed via convex relaxations, leading to online convex optimization with piecewise linear objectives and induced polyhedral structure. We show that regret in such problems is governed by \emph{polyhedral instability}: the number of changes of the active region. Under full information feedback and fixed partition assumptions, if $\mathrm{RS}_T$ denotes the number of region switches and $V_{\max}$ the maximum number of vertices per region, we prove $\Regret_T= Θ(\sqrt{(1+\mathrm{RS}_T)\,T\,\log V_{\max}})$ interpolating between experts-like and dimension-dependent OCO rates. For online submodular--concave games under Lovász convexification, this reduces to the permutation-switch count $\mathrm{SC}_T$, yielding the matching rate $\Regret_T= Θ(\sqrt{(1+\mathrm{SC}_T)\,T\,\log n})$. Experiments on synthetic and real combinatorial problems (shortest path, influence maximization) validate the predicted scaling and indicate that low-instability regimes can arise in practice without explicit enumeration of actions.

</details>


### [559] [Tight Sample Complexity Bounds for Entropic Best Policy Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13717)
*Amer Essakine,Claire Vernade*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了有限时域风险敏感强化学习（基于熵风险度量）的最佳策略识别问题，通过引入基于KL的探索奖励、利用指数效用函数的平滑性推导更紧的集中界以及提出新的停止规则，缩小了样本复杂度上下界之间的指数差距，实现了与下界匹配的样本复杂度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有风险敏感强化学习在最佳策略识别问题中存在样本复杂度上下界之间的指数差距（下界Ω(e^{|β|H})，上界O(e^{2|β|H})），本文旨在消除这一差距。

Method: 提出基于前向模型的算法，核心创新包括：(1) 基于KL散度的探索奖励适应熵准则；(2) 利用指数效用函数的平滑性推导更紧的集中不等式；(3) 设计新的停止规则以充分利用这种紧致性。

Result: 实现了与下界匹配的样本复杂度，消除了原有的额外指数因子。

Conclusion: 成功闭合了风险敏感强化学习中样本复杂度上下界的开放差距，证明了该问题的最优样本复杂度。

Abstract: We study best-policy identification for finite-horizon risk-sensitive reinforcement learning under the entropic risk measure. Recent work established a constant gap in the exponential horizon dependence between lower and upper bounds on the number of samples required to identify an approximately optimal policy. Precisely, known lower bounds scale in $Ω(e^{|β| H})$ where $H$ is the horizon of the MDP, while the state-of-the-art upper bound achieves at best $O(e^{2|β| H})$ (arXiv:2506.00286v2) using a generative model. We show that this extra exponential factor can be traced to overly loose concentration control for exponential utilities. To close this open gap, we revisit the analysis of this problem through a forward-model based algorithm building on KL-based exploration bonuses that we adapt to the entropic criterion. The improvement we get is due to two main novel technical innovations. We leverage the smoothness properties of the exponential utility to derive sharper concentration bounds, and we propose a new stopping rule that exploits further this tightness to obtain a sample complexity that matches the lower bound.

</details>


### [560] [Distinguishing performance gains from learning when using generative AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13731)
*Lixiang Yan,Samuel Greiff,Jason M. Lodge,Dragan Gašević*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 生成式AI被越来越多地应用于教育领域以提升学习者的表现，但它未能促进高质量学习所需的深层认知和元认知加工过程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探讨生成式AI在教育中的应用现状，指出其虽然能提高表现但缺乏对深层学习过程的促进。

Method: 基于摘要推测，可能是文献综述或批判性分析，讨论生成式AI在教育中的使用方式及其对认知过程的影响。

Result: 生成式AI的使用并未促进深层认知和元认知加工。

Conclusion: 需要重新思考如何设计AI工具，使其不仅提高表现，还能促进深度学习。

Abstract: Generative artificial intelligence (AI) is increasingly being integrated into education, where it can boost learners' performance. However, these uses do not promote the deep cognitive and metacognitive processing that are required for high-quality learning.

</details>


### [561] [Fast and effective algorithms for fair clustering at scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13759)
*Claudio Mantuano,Manuel Kammermann,Philipp Baumann*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出一个公平聚类框架，通过三种启发式算法实现聚类代价与公平性之间的精确权衡，在大规模数据集上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有公平聚类方法在代价-公平性权衡控制上有限，且难以兼顾可扩展性和解质量。

Method: 提出通用公平聚类框架，设计了三种启发式算法：第一种侧重解质量和额外约束灵活性，第二种在保持高质量的同时提升可扩展性，第三种面向最大可扩展性（可处理百万级数据）。

Result: 在基准数据集上的综合数值实验中，所提出的启发式算法优于现有方法，且第三种算法可在数秒内处理数百万个对象。

Conclusion: 提出的框架和启发式算法能够有效控制公平性与聚类代价之间的权衡，兼具高质量和可扩展性。

Abstract: Clustering is an unsupervised machine learning task that consists of identifying groups of similar objects. It has numerous applications and is increasingly used in fairness-sensitive domains where objects represent individuals, such as customers, employees, or students. We address a fair clustering problem in which objects belong to protected groups. The problem consists of partitioning the objects into a predefined number of clusters while attaining a user-defined target level of fairness, meaning that each protected group is sufficiently represented in each cluster. The objective is to minimize the clustering cost, defined as the sum of squared Euclidean distances between the objects and the centers of their clusters. Since clustering cost and fairness are generally in conflict, managing the trade-off between them is essential in practical applications. Existing methods provide limited control over this trade-off and either fail to scale to large datasets or, when they scale, produce low-quality solutions. We propose a general framework for fair clustering that provides precise control over the cost-fairness trade-off and introduce three heuristics based on it. The first heuristic focuses on solution quality and the flexibility to incorporate additional constraints, the second improves scalability while retaining high solution quality, and the third is designed for maximum scalability, producing solutions for instances with millions of objects in seconds. The proposed heuristics outperform existing approaches in comprehensive numerical experiments on benchmark datasets. The source code of our heuristics and instructions for reproducing the experiments are publicly available on GitHub.

</details>


### [562] [Interpretable Machine Learning for Antepartum Prediction of Pregnancy-Associated Thrombotic Microangiopathy Using Routine Longitudinal Laboratory Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13786)
*Chuanchuan Sun,Zhen Yu,Qin Fan,Qingchao Chen,Feng Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该研究利用机器学习方法（梯度提升模型）基于纵向临床实验室检测数据，对妊娠期血栓性微血管病（P-TMA）进行早期风险预测，在独立测试集上达到了0.872的AUROC。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: P-TMA罕见但危及生命，早期风险预测困难，因为相关实验室异常表现微妙、多维且常被妊娠期生理变化掩盖，传统单变量或规则方法难以捕捉复杂模式，而机器学习可以从纵向临床数据中提取潜在的时间依赖风险信号。

Method: 回顾性研究纳入300例妊娠（142例P-TMA，158例对照），保留146个纵向实验室预测变量。比较五种算法（逻辑回归、SVM-RBF、随机森林、极端随机树、梯度提升），通过交叉验证选梯度提升为最终模型，在20%的独立测试集上评估。

Result: 梯度提升模型在独立测试集上AUROC为0.872（95% CI: 0.769-0.952），AUPRC为0.883（95% CI: 0.780-0.959），敏感性0.750，特异性0.812。胱抑素C在第6周显示作为早期监测指标的潜力。

Conclusion: 常规护理中获得的纵向临床实验室检测包含可用于P-TMA风险预测的信息性和临床可解释信号，机器学习方法可有效提取这些信号。

Abstract: Background: Pregnancy-associated thrombotic microangiopathy (P-TMA) is rare but life-threatening. Early risk prediction before overt clinical presentation remains challenging, as the associated laboratory abnormalities are subtle, multidimensional, and frequently masked by common physiological changes such as gestational thrombocytopenia and pregnancy-related proteinuria, thus overlapping heavily with benign obstetric and renal conditions. This complexity is poorly captured by univariate or rule-based approaches; however, it is addressable by machine learning, which can extract latent, time-dependent risk signatures from longitudinal clinical tests. Methods: This retrospective study included 300 pregnancies comprising 142 P-TMA cases and 158 controls. After exclusion of identifiers and non-informative variables, 146 longitudinal laboratory predictors were retained. Participants were divided into a training cohort (80%) and a held-out test cohort (20%) using stratified sampling. Five algorithms were evaluated: logistic regression, support vector machine with radial basis function kernel, random forest, extra trees, and gradient boosting. The final model was selected by mean cross-validated AUROC, refitted on the full training cohort, and evaluated once in the held-out test cohort. Interpretability analyses examined global feature importance and distributional patterns of leading predictors. Results: Gradient boosting was prespecified by cross-validation in the training cohort. The model achieved an AUROC of 0.872 (95% CI: 0.769-0.952) and an AUPRC of 0.883 (95% CI: 0.780-0.959) in a held-out test cohort, with sensitivity of 0.750 and specificity of 0.812. Conclusions: Longitudinal clinical laboratory tests obtained during routine care contained informative and clinically plausible signals for P-TMA risk. Notably, cystatin C at week 6 showed promise as an early monitoring indicator.

</details>


### [563] [Force-Aware Neural Tangent Kernels for Scalable and Robust Active Learning of MLIPs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13788)
*Eszter Varga-Umbrich,Zachary Weller-Davies,Paul Duckworth,Jules Tilly,Olivier Peltre,Shikha Surana*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文针对机器学习原子间势（MLIPs）的主动学习提出了一个线性扩展的采集框架，基于分块特征空间后验方差筛选，并扩展神经正切核（NTK）到力感知场景（力NTK和联合能量-力NTK），在OC20、T1x等基准上实现了可扩展、力感知且对分布偏移鲁棒的主动学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 主动学习在MLIPs应用中面临三个关键挑战：需从大规模候选池中筛选、需同时利用能量和力标签监督、候选池存在分布偏差时需保持鲁棒性。现有方法（如基于委员会的采集策略）计算成本高且对偏差敏感。

Method: 1) 提出了基于分块特征空间后验方差筛选的线性扩展采集框架，避免计算完整候选集和训练集核矩阵，可在一小时内筛选约20万个候选结构。2) 通过混合参数-坐标导数，将神经正切核推广到力感知场景，定义了力NTK和联合能量-力NTK，为向量场预测提供自然的相似度度量。

Result: 在OC20数据集上，力感知联合NTK方法在所有指标和分布划分上取得了最低的能量和力MAE/RMSE。在T1x、PMechDB、RGD基准上，力NTK方法在与基线方法保持竞争力的同时，显著比基于委员会的方法更高效。在T1x的候选池偏移案例研究中，基于预训练MLIP嵌入和NTK的方法保持鲁棒，而委员会方法方差更高。

Conclusion: 单个预训练MLIP即可实现可扩展、力感知且对分布鲁棒的主动学习，适用于基础模型的微调。

Abstract: Active learning for machine-learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) must address several challenges to be practical: scaling to large candidate pools, leveraging energy-force supervision, and maintaining robustness when candidate pools are biased relative to the target distribution. In this work, we jointly address these challenges. We first introduce a linearly scaling acquisition framework based on chunked feature-space posterior-variance shortlisting. By avoiding materialisation of the candidate and train set kernels, this approach enables screening of ~200k structures within hours and applies broadly to acquisition strategies that score candidates based on molecular similarity metrics. We then extend the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) to a force-aware setting via mixed parameter-coordinate derivatives, yielding a force NTK and a joint energy-force NTK that provide natural similarity metrics for vector-field prediction. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the joint energy-force NTK on the OC20 dataset, where force-aware acquisition is crucial: it achieves the lowest energy and force MAE and RMSE across all metrics and distribution splits. Across T1x, PMechDB, and RGD benchmarks, our force NTK methods remain competitive with established baselines while being significantly more efficient than committee-based approaches. Under a controlled candidate-pool shift case study on T1x, acquisition based on pretrained MLIP embeddings and NTKs remains robust, whereas committee-based methods exhibit higher variance. Overall, these results show that a single pretrained MLIP can enable scalable, force-aware, and distribution-robust active learning for foundation-model fine-tuning.

</details>


### [564] [Di-BiLPS: Denoising induced Bidirectional Latent-PDE-Solver under Sparse Observations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13790)
*Zhonghao Li,Chaoyu Liu,Qian Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Di-BiLPS，一种结合变分自编码器、潜在扩散模块和对比学习的统一神经框架，用于在极稀疏观测数据下高效求解PDE正问题和逆问题，支持零样本超分辨率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界中PDE观测数据极其稀疏，传统数值求解器和现有神经方法在极稀疏场景下精度严重下降，且高分辨率推理效率受限。

Method: 结合VAE压缩高维输入到潜在空间、潜在扩散模块建模不确定性、对比学习对齐表征；提出基于方差保持扩散过程的PDE-informed去噪算法。

Result: 在多个PDE基准上，即使在低至3%的极稀疏输入下也达到SOTA性能，同时大幅降低计算成本，支持零样本超分辨率。

Conclusion: Di-BiLPS在极稀疏观测下有效统一了PDE正问题和逆问题的求解，兼具高效推理与高精度。

Abstract: Partial differential equations (PDEs) are fundamental for modeling complex natural and physical phenomena. In many real-world applications, however, observational data are extremely sparse, which severely limits the applicability of both classical numerical solvers and existing neural approaches. While neural methods have shown promising results under moderately sparse observations, their inference efficiency at high resolutions is limited, and their accuracy degrades substantially in the extremely sparse regime. In this work, we propose the Di-BiLPS, a unified neural framework that effectively handle both forward and inverse PDE problems under extremely sparse observations. Di-BiLPS combines a variational autoencoder to compress high-dimensional inputs into a compact latent space, a latent diffusion module to model uncertainty, and contrastive learning to align representations. Operating entirely in this latent space, the framework achieves efficient inference while retaining flexible input-output mapping. In addition, we introduce a PDE-informed denoising algorithm based on a variance-preserving diffusion process, which further improves inference efficiency. Extensive experiments on multiple PDE benchmarks demonstrate that Di-BiLPS consistently achieves SOTA performance under extremely sparse inputs (as low as 3%), while substantially reducing computational cost. Moreover, Di-BiLPS enables zero-shot super-resolution, as it allows predictions over continuous spatial-temporal domains.

</details>


### [565] [Uncertainty-Driven Anomaly Detection for Psychotic Relapse Using Smartwatches: Forecasting and Multi-Task Learning Fusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13816)
*Nikolaos Tsalkitzis,Panagiotis P. Filntisis,Petros Maragos,Niki Efthymiou*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了两种基于智能手表的精神病复发检测框架：一种通过预测心脏动力学检测异常，另一种通过多任务学习融合睡眠、运动和心脏信号。两种框架均使用Transformer编码器和集成MLP估计不确定性输出每日异常分数，最终通过后期融合策略结合两者，在e-Prevention Grand Challenge数据集上相比竞赛基线提升8%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 利用数字表型技术通过持续被动监测行为和生理信号，实现精神病复发的早期检测。

Method: 提出两种框架：1) 心脏动力学预测+偏差检测；2) 多任务融合睡眠/运动/心脏信号+时间感知嵌入。均使用Transformer编码器，通过集成MLP估计预测不确定性输出异常分数，最后采用后期融合策略。

Result: 融合模型在e-Prevention Grand Challenge数据集上相比竞赛基线提升8%的相对性能，消融实验表明心脏、运动和睡眠信号的整合对高保真检测至关重要。

Conclusion: 多种数字表型（心脏、运动、睡眠）的集成对于现实场景中精神病复发的高保真检测至关重要。

Abstract: Digital phenotyping enables continuous passive monitoring of behavior and physiology, offering a promising paradigm for early detection of psychotic relapse. In this work, we develop and systematically study two smartwatch-based frameworks for daily relapse detection. The first forecasts cardiac dynamics and flags deviations between predicted and observed features as indicators of abnormality. The second adopts a multi-task formulation that fuses sleep with motion and cardiac-derived signals, learning time-aware embeddings and predicting measurement timing. Both pipelines use Transformer encoders and output a daily anomaly score, derived from predictive uncertainty estimated via an ensemble of multilayer perceptrons to improve robustness to real-world wearable variability. While each framework independently demonstrates strong predictive power, we show that they capture complementary physiological signatures. Consequently, we propose a late-fusion strategy that synergistically combines the anomaly signals from both architectures into a unified decision score. We benchmark our methodology on the 2nd e-Prevention Grand Challenge dataset, where our fused model achieves a 8% relative improvement over the competition-winning baseline. Our results, supported by extensive ablation studies, suggest that the integration of diverse digital phenotypes, cardiac, motion, and sleep, is essential for the high-fidelity detection of psychotic relapse in real-world settings.

</details>


### [566] [The Payment Heterogeneity Index: An Integrated Unsupervised Framework for High-Volume Procurement Oversight and Decision Support](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12547)
*Kyriakos Christodoulides*

Main category: econ.EM

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出结构性异质性指数(SHI)及其在支付场景的实例PHI，一种无监督、可解释的统计方法，用于检测采购支付中的异常结构模式，在英国市政数据上验证有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 公共采购易受错误、欺诈和腐败影响，但交易量大导致监督困难。现有研究多聚焦招标阶段异常，对支付后阶段关注不足；且监督数据稀缺、Benford定律等方法假设过强，亟需可解释的无监督框架来辅助筛查。

Method: 提出结构性异质性指数(SHI)，由模态性、不对称性、尾行为、结构离散度四部分组成。支付异质性指数(PHI)是其乘法实例，通过GMM估计结构离散度，结合尾行为组件，量化支付模式异质性。

Result: 在英国市政采购数据中，PHI识别出10.1%的高量供应商存在结构性偏离；置换检验和KS检验证实高PHI组具有显著差异；注册舞弊审查师支持优先案例的合理性；PHI能识别变异系数(CV)无法捕捉的模式分离(rho=0.310)。

Conclusion: PHI可作为无标签场景下的有效发现工具，为支付后监督提供透明、轻量化的筛查机制。

Abstract: Public procurement is vulnerable to error, fraud and corruption, yet high transaction volumes overwhelm oversight. While research often focuses on tender-stage anomalies, post-award payments remain underexplored. Since labelled datasets are rare and existing methods such as Benford's Law face restrictive assumptions, there is a need for additional interpretable, unsupervised frameworks that augment oversight and simplify management. This paper introduces the Structural Heterogeneity Index (SHI), a composite statistic for one-dimensional samples defined by four components: modality, asymmetry, tail behaviour, and structural dispersion. The Payment Heterogeneity Index (PHI) is its multiplicative instance for post-award payments. PHI combines a tail-behaviour component, sensitive to outliers and point clustering, with a structural-dispersion component summarising payment regime architecture. Structural dispersion is computed via Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) estimation, integrating within-regime variability, prevalence, and separation from the dominant mode. Applied to UK municipal procurement data, PHI isolates a financially significant cohort (10.1% of high-volume suppliers) whose structural signatures deviate from the population and interact with recurring payment anchors. Permutation and Kolmogorov-Smirnov tests confirm that high-PHI suppliers exhibit statistically significant structural differences. A forensic review by a Certified Fraud Examiner supports the plausibility of the prioritised cases. Comparison shows PHI uniquely identifies regime separation obscured by metrics like the Coefficient of Variation (\r{ho}=0.310). PHI functions as an effective discovery tool where no confirmed labels exist, offering a transparent, lightweight screening mechanism for post-award oversight.

</details>


### [567] [Online Conformal Prediction: Enforcing monotonicity via Online Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12668)
*Eduardo Ochoa Rivera,Ambuj Tewari*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出两种新型在线共形预测方法，能够生成嵌套预测集，在多个置信水平上同时提供有效的覆盖保证，适用于不同风险容忍度的用户场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有在线共形预测方法通常只关注单一覆盖水平，无法在不同风险容忍度下同时提供一致的校准不确定性估计。现实应用（如天气预报、宏观经济预测、风险管理）中用户需求多样，需要跨多个覆盖水平的嵌套且有效的预测集。

Method: 提出两种在线共形预测方法，通过在线优化视角，在保证预测集嵌套性的同时控制分位数估计误差，实现多个覆盖水平的联合估计。

Result: 在合成和真实数据集上（包括具有异质风险需求的预测任务），该方法在多个覆盖水平上实现了稳定的覆盖率、严格嵌套的预测集，并相比现有在线共形基线方法提升了效率。

Conclusion: 多水平嵌套共形预测能有效解决异质风险容忍度下的不确定性量化问题，具有更好的统计效率和实际应用价值。

Abstract: Conformal prediction provides a principled framework for uncertainty quantification with finite-sample coverage guarantees. While recent work has extended conformal prediction to online and sequential settings, existing methods typically focus on a single coverage level and do not ensure consistency across multiple confidence levels. In many real-world applications, such as weather forecasting, macroeconomic prediction, and risk management, different users operate under heterogeneous risk tolerances and require calibrated uncertainty estimates across a range of coverage levels. In such settings, it is desirable to produce prediction sets corresponding to different coverage levels that are nested and valid simultaneously. In this paper, we propose two novel online conformal prediction methods that output \emph{nested prediction sets} across a range of coverage levels, enabling simultaneous uncertainty quantification across the entire risk spectrum. Beyond interpretability, jointly estimating multiple coverage levels is known to improve statistical efficiency in classical quantile regression by enforcing non-crossing constraints and sharing information across quantiles. Our approaches leverage an online optimization perspective with small regret that translates to quantile estimation error control while enforcing nestedness of prediction sets. Empirical results on synthetic and real-world datasets, including applications in forecasting tasks with heterogeneous risk requirements, demonstrate that our method achieves stable coverage across all levels, strictly nested prediction sets, and improved efficiency compared to existing online conformal baselines.

</details>


### [568] [A Five-Layer MLOps Architecture for Connected Automated Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12719)
*Bastian Lampe,Lutz Eckstein*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向自动驾驶系统（ADS）的五层集体学习MLOps架构，旨在通过车队间的数据共享与集体学习，持续保障ADS的安全与性能，并支持对边缘案例（包括黑天鹅事件）的检测与缓解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶系统运行在复杂、动态、开放的世界环境中，面临大量罕见或开发阶段未预见到的场景。传统的安全保障方法难以应对持续变化的环境，而集体学习（多车队数据共享）能够提供新的解决机会，但目前缺乏相应的架构蓝图。

Method: 基于已有的MLOps原则和网联自动驾驶领域的研究，设计了一个五层架构，定义了每一层的主要职责、层间交互方式，以及如何通过多层次自评估来检测和减少边缘案例。

Result: 提出了一个概念性的五层集体学习MLOps架构蓝图，并为如何利用该架构进行多层次自评估、检测黑天鹅事件等边缘案例提供了描述。

Conclusion: 该架构为车队运营商等相关利益方提供了设计和实现MLOps流程的指导，有望通过集体学习提升自动驾驶系统的持续安全保障能力。

Abstract: The continual assurance of safety and performance of automated driving systems (ADSs) poses significant challenges. ADSs operate in complex, dynamic, open-world environments allowing a wide range of scenarios, including ones that are rare or not foreseen during initial development. While the incorporation of artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) technology allows ADSs to learn from data gathered during operation and thus enables them to adapt over time, these approaches come with their own challenges. A key advantage of ADSs compared to human drivers is their greater ability to gather data collectively across a fleet of vehicles, or even across multiple fleets operated by different entities, and to learn from this data collectively. Vehicles can share and combine their data to identify additional learning opportunities otherwise missed by individual vehicles. This creates new opportunities to tackle the challenges of continual assurance of safety and performance, but requires the implementation of architectures that leverage the collective learning potential. Based on established MLOps principles and existing work in the field of connected automated driving, this paper presents a five-layer architecture for collective learning-enabled MLOps processes for ADSs. The goal of this architecture is to provide a conceptual blueprint for the design and implementation of MLOps processes by fleet operators and other relevant stakeholders. The paper describes the main responsibilities of each layer, their interactions, and how multi-level self-assessments enabled by the architecture can support the detection and reduction of edge cases including black swan events.

</details>


### [569] [Yield Curves Dynamics Using Variational Autoencoders Under No-arbitrage](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12764)
*Fusheng Luo,H'elyette Geman*

Main category: q-fin.MF

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出一个物理信息驱动的生成框架，结合学生t条件变分自编码器（CVAEsT+LS）和无套利PDE约束的神经SDE，解决固定收益建模中深度学习灵活性与理论约束的冲突，在多个主权货币上实现了6.58 bps的预测误差并克服了经典HJM模型在极端环境下的缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准生成模型和统计外推在预测不同宏观经济制度下的期限结构时，会出现"流形崩溃"和严重套利违规现象。需要一种既能保持深度学习统计灵活性、又能满足无套利理论约束的框架。

Method: 两阶段架构：1）学生t条件变分自编码器（CVAEsT+LS）提取稳健的厚尾期限结构流形，解耦宏观经济形状动态与绝对基准利率；2）隐变量动态演化由连续时间神经SDE控制，并通过无套利PDE严格惩罚。

Result: 在USD、GBP、JPY等多个主权货币上，均方根误差达到6.58 bps；成功克服了经典HJM模型在极端环境下的平行漂移和零下限违规问题；通过相空间向量场分析展示了无监督宏观经济制度检测和高质量连续时间场景生成能力。

Conclusion: 提供了一个高度可扩展、数学上严谨的期限结构演化引擎，在深度学习灵活性与金融理论约束之间取得了有效的平衡。

Abstract: This paper introduces a physics-informed generative framework that resolves the fundamental conflict between the statistical flexibility of deep learning and the rigorous theoretical constraints of fixed-income modeling. We demonstrate that standard generative models and unconstrained statistical extrapolations suffer from "manifold collapse" and severe arbitrage violations when forecasting term structures across diverse macroeconomic regimes. To overcome this, we propose a two-stage architecture. First, a Student-t Conditional Variational Autoencoder with Dynamic Level Injection (CVAEsT+LS) extracts a robust, heavy-tailed term structure manifold, effectively decoupling macroeconomic shape dynamics from absolute base rates. Second, the latent dynamic evolution is governed by a continuous-time Neural Stochastic Differential Equation (SDE) strictly penalized by a No-Arbitrage Partial Differential Equation (PDE). Empirical results across multiple sovereign currencies (USD, GBP, JPY) confirm that our synergistic approach drastically reduces out-of-sample forecasting errors -- achieving an exceptional 6.58 bps Mean Tenor RMSE -- and successfully overcomes the massive parallel drift and zero-lower-bound violations exhibited by the classical HJM model in extreme environments. Furthermore, through phase space vector field analysis, we demonstrate the model's superior capability in unsupervised macroeconomic regime detection and high-quality continuous-time scenario generation. Ultimately, this research provides a highly scalable, mathematically sound evolutionary engine for term structure modeling.

</details>


### [570] [When to Trust Confidence Thresholding: Calibration Diagnostics for Pseudo-Labelled Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12780)
*Marcell T. Kurbucz*

Main category: stat.ME

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种校准感知的诊断工具，用于评估伪标注流程中置信度阈值化对下游回归任务带来的衰减偏差，并给出了一个可实际操作的(V*, κ)决策规则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着校准概率输出越来越多地被用于下游回归估计（如效应、流行率、差异等），标准做法是设定置信度阈值将软标签转为硬标签，但这一做法会在下游回归系数中引入衰减偏差。作者希望为从业者提供一个可预先计算的诊断工具，帮助他们判断阈值化是否安全。

Method: 1）推导出置信度阈值化导致下游回归系数衰减偏差的闭式表达式；2）证明该偏差可从无标注集上残差得分方差V*预测；3）给出有界校准漂移下的灵敏度界；4）识别出V*=0的边界条件；5）通过5个模拟实验和UCI Adult数据集验证理论预测。

Result: 推导出衰减偏差的闭式解；证明了V*是预测偏差的关键量；得到有界校准漂移下的灵敏度界；发现V*=0当且仅当p是X的确定性函数，从而激励分类器特征W与下游控制变量X的结构分离。

Conclusion: 贡献是提供了一个操作化的(V*, κ)决策规则，从业者可以从任何分类器输出中计算出该规则，以决定置信度阈值化是否安全。

Abstract: Calibrated probability outputs of trained classifiers are increasingly used as inputs to downstream regression estimands such as effects, prevalences, or disparities for a latent group observed only on a small labelled subset. A standard practice is to threshold the calibrated score at a confidence cutoff and treat the hard label as the truth. Building on a recent identification result for the underlying moment equation, we develop a calibration-aware diagnostic apparatus for pseudo-labelling pipelines. We derive a closed-form expression for the attenuation bias that confidence thresholding induces in the downstream regression coefficient, and show that the bias can be predicted, before any inference is run, from the residual score variance $V^{*}=\mathbb{E}[\operatorname{Var}(p\mid X)]$ on the unlabelled set after partialling out the downstream controls $X$. We further obtain a sharp sensitivity bound under bounded calibration drift, and identify the boundary $V^{*}=0$, which holds iff $p$ is a deterministic function of $X$; this motivates a structural separation between classifier features $W$ and downstream controls $X\subsetneq W$. Five controlled simulations and a UCI Adult illustration trace the predictions. The contribution is operational: a $(V^{*}, κ)$ decision rule that practitioners can compute from any classifier output to decide whether confidence thresholding is safe.

</details>


### [571] [Robust Sequential Experimental Design for A/B Testing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12899)
*Qianglin Wen,Xiangkun Wu,Chengchun Shi,Ting Li,Niansheng Tang,Yingying Zhang,Hongtu Zhu*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种在模型错误指定下仍能保证稳健性的序贯实验设计框架，适用于上下文赌博机和动态设定，并从理论和实验两方面验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有实验设计方法严重依赖正确指定的模型，而实际中模型往往存在错误指定，因此亟需一种对模型误设鲁棒的序贯实验设计方法。

Method: 提出了一个统一的鲁棒序贯实验设计框架，理论上证明了该方法能够限制估计处理效应的最坏情况均方误差，涵盖上下文赌博机和动态设定。

Result: 在合成数据集和某领先科技公司的真实数据集上验证了该方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 该框架能够在模型误设下仍保持较好的实验设计性能，提升了A/B测试的样本效率和鲁棒性。

Abstract: Experimental design has emerged as a powerful approach for improving the sample efficiency of A/B testing, yet existing designs rely critically on correctly specified models. We study robust sequential experimental design under model misspecification and develop a unified framework that covers both contextual bandit and dynamic settings. Theoretically, we prove that our design bounds the worst-case mean squared error of the estimated treatment effect. Empirically, we demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach using synthetic and real-world datasets from a leading technology company.

</details>


### [572] [Implicit Behavioral Decoding from Next-Step Spike Forecasts at Population Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12999)
*John R. Minnick,Jesus Gonzalez-Ferrer,Kamran Hussain,Jinghui Geng,Ash Robbins,Mohammed A. Mostajo-Radji,David Haussler,Jason Eshraghian,Mircea Teodorescu*

Main category: q-bio.NC

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出使用单个Mamba状态空间模型作为神经群体活动的预测器，只需训练于下一时刻的尖峰计数，即可在一个前向传播中同时完成神经活动预测和行为状态解码。在Steinmetz视觉辨别基准上，Mamba预测的发放率经轻量线性头解码，性能显著优于相同时间窗口下对原始尖峰计数的线性解码。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 闭环脑机接口需要同时预测神经群体活动和解码动物行为状态，现有方法通常需要分开处理这两个任务。作者希望探索一个统一的时序预测模型能否同时高效完成这两个目标。

Method: 使用Mamba（状态空间模型）作为时序预测器，仅训练于下一时刻的神经尖峰计数预测。训练完成后，在模型预测的发放率上方添加一个轻量的、每会话独立的线性解码头，用于行为分类。评估在Steinmetz视觉辨别基准（39个会话，约27,000个神经元，1,994个留出试验）上进行。

Result: Mamba预测的发放率解码小鼠选择准确率达75.7±0.2%（约2.3倍随机水平），刺激侧解码达66.1±0.6%（约2倍随机水平）。相比使用500ms上下文窗口的原始尖峰计数线性解码器，Mamba在投票层面高出4-6个百分点。约100-150个校准试验即可接近渐近性能，且完整流程可在50ms预算内运行于工作站级GPU。

Conclusion: Mamba作为神经活动预报器，其预测的发放率携带了更丰富的行为相关信息，能够以较低计算成本和少量校准数据高效支持闭环脑机接口的双重需求。

Abstract: Closed-loop brain-computer interfaces often require both a forecast of upcoming neural population activity and a readout of the animal's behavioral state. A single Mamba forecaster, trained only on next-step spike counts at Neuropixels scale, can deliver both in one forward pass. A lightweight per-session linear head reading the model's predicted rates decodes behavior better than the same linear classifier reading the raw spike counts, under matched temporal context. We test on the Steinmetz visual-discrimination benchmark, which spans 39 sessions, roughly 27,000 neurons, and 1,994 held-out trials. Across three training seeds, Mamba's predicted rates decode mouse choice at 75.7$\pm$0.2% trial vote, roughly 2.3 times chance level, and stimulus side at 66.1$\pm$0.6%, about twice chance. Compared to a matched 500 ms-context linear decoder on the raw spike counts, Mamba wins at trial vote by 4-6 pp on response and 4-6 pp on stimulus side. A session-start calibration block of about 100-150 trials brings the readout within 1-2 pp of asymptote, and the full pipeline fits inside the 50 ms bin budget on workstation-class GPUs typical of tethered chronic Neuropixels recordings.

</details>


### [573] [Adaptive Kernel Density Estimation with Pre-training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13092)
*Ruitong Zhang,Ke Deng*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出将预训练思想引入高维非参数密度估计，通过预训练神经网络为每个样本点推荐位置自适应核函数，实现高效高维密度估计。当目标分布与预训练分布族接近时效果显著；差异较大时可通过微调恢复性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于核平滑的密度估计方法在高维场景下效率低下，难以指定合适的位置自适应核函数。作者希望借助预训练这一AI核心技术来解决该问题。

Method: 建立预训练神经网络，学习推荐位置自适应核函数；针对每个样本点输出合适的核参数，实现自适应核密度估计；当目标分布与预训练分布差异大时，引入微调机制。

Result: 数值实验表明该策略在目标分布接近预训练分布族时能显著提升密度估计精度；当分布差异大时预训练收益下降，但微调可重新激活性能。

Conclusion: 预训练+微调范式可以有效迁移到高维非参数密度估计任务中，为传统统计方法提供了新的解决思路。

Abstract: Density estimation in high-dimensional settings is an important and challenging statistical problem.Traditional methods based on kernel smoothing are inefficient in high dimensions due to the difficulties in specifying appropriate location-adaptive kernels. In this work, we introduce pre-training, a key idea behind many cutting-edge AI technologies, to the context of non-parametric density estimation. By establishing a pre-trained neural network that can recommend an appropriate location-adaptive kernel for each sample point, efficient density estimation with adaptive kernels is achieved in high dimensions. A wide range of numerical experiments show that this strategy is highly effective for improving density-estimation accuracy, when the target distribution is close to the distribution family for pre-training. When the target distribution is substantially different from the pre-training distribution family, the benefit from the proposed pre-training strategy may be diluted, but can be reactivated by an additional fine-tuning procedure.

</details>


### [574] [Amortized Neural Clustering of Time Series based on Statistical Features](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13128)
*Ángel López-Oriona,Ying Sun*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于摊销神经推断的、算法无关的时间序列聚类方法，通过学习模拟数据中的最优划分规则，替代传统K-means、K-medoids等聚类方法，能够自动确定聚类数量并在多个场景下达到或超越传统方法的聚类精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统时间序列聚类方法（如K-means、层次聚类）依赖特定的目标函数和启发式算法，需要手动选择聚类算法、指定聚类形状或结构，且聚类数量的确定往往是ad-hoc的。作者希望通过神经推断自动化这一过程。

Method: 利用统计特征（如自相关、分位数自相关）作为输入，训练神经网络从模拟数据中学习数据驱动的亲和性结构，进而恢复聚类划分。该方法有两种版本：一种需要指定聚类数，另一种可自动确定聚类数量。

Result: 大量实验表明，该方法在聚类准确性上达到或超越传统方法，即使在提供真实聚类数的挑战性场景下也表现优异。在金融股票回报时间序列的案例中验证了其实用性。

Conclusion: 该框架减少了算法选择和参数校准的需求，为时间序列数据的自动化、自适应、数据驱动的聚类开辟了新途径，适用于科学和工业领域。

Abstract: This paper introduces an algorithm-agnostic approach to feature-based time series clustering via amortized neural inference. By training neural networks to approximate the optimal partitioning rule from simulated data, the proposed framework reduces reliance on conventional clustering methods, such as $K$-means, $K$-medoids, or hierarchical clustering, and their associated objective functions and heuristics.
